authors_text: Danish Iqbal,Barbora Buhnova,Emilia Cioroaica
title: Digital Twins for Trust Building in Autonomous Drones through Dynamic Safety Evaluation
title_zh: 通过动态安全评估在自主无人机中建立信任的数字孪生
comment: Proceedings of ENASE 2023
comments: Proceedings of ENASE 2023
abstract: The adoption process of innovative software-intensive technologies leverages complex trust concerns in different forms and shapes. Perceived safety plays a fundamental role in technology adoption, being especially crucial in the case of those innovative software-driven technologies characterized by a high degree of dynamism and unpredictability, like collaborating autonomous systems. These systems need to synchronize their maneuvers in order to collaboratively engage in reactions to unpredictable incoming hazardous situations. That is however only possible in the presence of mutual trust. In this paper, we propose an approach for machine-to-machine dynamic trust assessment for collaborating autonomous systems that supports trust-building based on the concept of dynamic safety assurance within the collaborative process among the software-intensive autonomous systems. In our approach, we leverage the concept of digital twins which are abstract models fed with real-time data used in the run-time dynamic exchange of information. The information exchange is performed through the execution of specialized models that embed the necessary safety properties. More particularly, we examine the possible role of the Digital Twins in machine-to-machine trust building and present their design in supporting dynamic trust assessment of autonomous drones. Ultimately, we present a proof of concept of direct and indirect trust assessment by employing the Digital Twin in a use case involving two autonomous collaborating drones.

Perceived safety plays a fundamental role in technology adoption, being especially crucial in the case of those innovative software-driven technologies characterized by a high degree of dynamism and unpredictability, like collaborating autonomous systems. That is however only possible in the presence of mutual trust. In this paper, we propose an approach for machine-to-machine dynamic trust assessment for collaborating autonomous systems that supports trust-building based on the concept of dynamic safety assurance within the collaborative process among the software-intensive autonomous systems. In our approach, we leverage the concept of digital twins which are abstract models fed with real-time data used in the run-time dynamic exchange of information. The information exchange is performed through the execution of specialized models that embed the necessary safety properties. More particularly, we examine the possible role of the Digital Twins in machine-to-machine trust building and present their design in supporting dynamic trust assessment of autonomous drones. Ultimately, we present a proof of concept of direct and indirect trust assessment by employing the Digital Twin in a use case involving two autonomous collaborating drones.
abstract_zh: 创新软件密集型技术的采用过程利用了不同形式和形式的复杂信任问题。感知安全在技术采用中发挥着基础作用，对于那些具有高度动态性和不可预测性的创新软件驱动技术（例如协作自主系统）来说尤其重要。这些系统需要同步其操作，以便协作对不可预测的危险情况做出反应。然而，这只有在相互信任的情况下才有可能实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于协作自治系统的机器对机器动态信任评估方法，该方法支持基于软件密集型自治系统之间的协作过程中的动态安全保证概念的信任构建。在我们的方法中，我们利用数字孪生的概念，这是一种抽象模型，提供运行时动态信息交换中使用的实时数据。信息交换是通过执行嵌入必要安全属性的专用模型来执行的。更具体地说，我们研究了数字孪生在机器对机器信任构建中的可能作用，并展示了它们在支持自主无人机动态信任评估方面的设计。最终，我们通过在涉及两个自主协作无人机的用例中使用数字孪生来提供直接和间接信任评估的概念证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生技术的动态信任评估方法，用于协作自主无人机系统中的信任构建，通过实时安全评估增强系统间的互信。
AI.motivation: 自主无人机等动态软件驱动系统的协作需要解决互信问题，而传统静态信任评估难以应对运行时的不确定性与安全风险，亟需动态安全保证机制。
AI.method: 利用数字孪生技术构建抽象模型，通过实时数据交换和嵌入安全属性的专用模型，实现无人机间动态信任评估，区分直接与间接信任评估机制。
AI.result: 在双无人机协作场景中验证了数字孪生支持的动态信任评估方法，证明其可有效实现运行时的信任构建与安全保障。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生技术通过实时动态安全评估，为自主系统间的信任构建提供了可行框架，未来可扩展至更复杂的协作场景。

authors_text: Thomas Pierrot,Arthur Flajolet
title: Evolving Populations of Diverse RL Agents with MAP-Elites
title_zh: 使用 MAP-Elites 不断进化不同的 RL 智能体群体
abstract: Quality Diversity (QD) has emerged as a powerful alternative optimization paradigm that aims at generating large and diverse collections of solutions, notably with its flagship algorithm MAP-ELITES (ME) which evolves solutions through mutations and crossovers. While very effective for some unstructured problems, early ME implementations relied exclusively on random search to evolve the population of solutions, rendering them notoriously sample-inefficient for high-dimensional problems, such as when evolving neural networks. Follow-up works considered exploiting gradient information to guide the search in order to address these shortcomings through techniques borrowed from either Black-Box Optimization (BBO) or Reinforcement Learning (RL). While mixing RL techniques with ME unlocked state-of-the-art performance for robotics control problems that require a good amount of exploration, it also plagued these ME variants with limitations common among RL algorithms that ME was free of, such as hyperparameter sensitivity, high stochasticity as well as training instability, including when the population size increases as some components are shared across the population in recent approaches. Furthermore, existing approaches mixing ME with RL tend to be tied to a specific RL algorithm, which effectively prevents their use on problems where the corresponding RL algorithm fails. To address these shortcomings, we introduce a flexible framework that allows the use of any RL algorithm and alleviates the aforementioned limitations by evolving populations of agents (whose definition include hyperparameters and all learnable parameters) instead of just policies. We demonstrate the benefits brought about by our framework through extensive numerical experiments on a number of robotics control problems, some of which with deceptive rewards, taken from the QD-RL literature.
summary: Quality Diversity (QD) has emerged as a powerful alternative optimization paradigm that aims at generating large and diverse collections of solutions, notably with its flagship algorithm MAP-ELITES (ME) which evolves solutions through mutations and crossovers. While very effective for some unstructured problems, early ME implementations relied exclusively on random search to evolve the population of solutions, rendering them notoriously sample-inefficient for high-dimensional problems, such as when evolving neural networks. Follow-up works considered exploiting gradient information to guide the search in order to address these shortcomings through techniques borrowed from either Black-Box Optimization (BBO) or Reinforcement Learning (RL). While mixing RL techniques with ME unlocked state-of-the-art performance for robotics control problems that require a good amount of exploration, it also plagued these ME variants with limitations common among RL algorithms that ME was free of, such as hyperparameter sensitivity, high stochasticity as well as training instability, including when the population size increases as some components are shared across the population in recent approaches. Furthermore, existing approaches mixing ME with RL tend to be tied to a specific RL algorithm, which effectively prevents their use on problems where the corresponding RL algorithm fails. To address these shortcomings, we introduce a flexible framework that allows the use of any RL algorithm and alleviates the aforementioned limitations by evolving populations of agents (whose definition include hyperparameters and all learnable parameters) instead of just policies. We demonstrate the benefits brought about by our framework through extensive numerical experiments on a number of robotics control problems, some of which with deceptive rewards, taken from the QD-RL literature.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 已成为一种强大的替代优化范式，旨在生成大量且多样化的解决方案集合，特别是其旗舰算法 MAP-ELITES (ME)，该算法通过突变和交叉来演化解决方案。虽然对于一些非结构化问题非常有效，但早期的 ME 实现完全依赖于随机搜索来演化解决方案群体，这使得它们对于高维问题（例如在演化神经网络时）的样本效率低下。后续工作考虑利用梯度信息来指导搜索，以便通过借用黑盒优化（BBO）或强化学习（RL）的技术来解决这些缺点。虽然将 RL 技术与 ME 相结合，为需要大量探索的机器人控制问题解锁了最先进的性能，但它也困扰着这些 ME 变体，这些 ME 变体受到了 ME 所不具备的 RL 算法中常见的局限性的困扰，例如超参数敏感性、高随机性以及训练不稳定性，包括在最近的方法中，由于某些组件在总体中共享而导致总体规模增加。此外，将 ME 与 RL 混合的现有方法往往与特定的 RL 算法绑定，这有效地阻止了它们在相应 RL 算法失败的问题上的使用。为了解决这些缺点，我们引入了一个灵活的框架，允许使用任何 RL 算法，并通过发展代理群体（其定义包括超参数和所有可学习参数）而不仅仅是策略来缓解上述限制。我们通过对许多机器人控制问题进行广泛的数值实验来展示我们的框架带来的好处，其中一些问题具有欺骗性的奖励，取自 QD-RL 文献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合MAP-Elites与强化学习（RL）的灵活框架，通过进化多样化智能体种群解决高维问题中的样本效率低下及训练不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MAP-Elites在高维问题（如神经网络进化）中样本效率低下，而结合RL的改进方法存在超参数敏感性、训练不稳定等缺陷，且依赖特定RL算法限制了适用性。
AI.method: 设计了一种通用框架，允许任意RL算法参与进化过程，通过同时优化智能体的超参数与可学习参数，替代传统仅优化策略的模式，减少共享参数带来的稳定性问题。
AI.result: 在多个机器人控制任务（含欺骗性奖励场景）的实验中，该框架显著提升了样本效率与稳定性，验证了其灵活性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合了MAP-Elites与RL的优势，克服了现有方法的局限性，为复杂环境下的多样化智能体进化提供了新思路。

search_text: Evolving Populations of Diverse RL Agents with MAP-Elites 使用 MAP-Elites 不断进化不同的 RL 智能体群体 Quality Diversity (QD) has emerged as a powerful alternative optimization paradigm that aims at generating large and diverse collections of solutions, notably with its flagship algorithm MAP-ELITES (ME) which evolves solutions through mutations and crossovers. While very effective for some unstructured problems, early ME implementations relied exclusively on random search to evolve the population of solutions, rendering them notoriously sample-inefficient for high-dimensional problems, such as when evolving neural networks. Follow-up works considered exploiting gradient information to guide the search in order to address these shortcomings through techniques borrowed from either Black-Box Optimization (BBO) or Reinforcement Learning (RL). While mixing RL techniques with ME unlocked state-of-the-art performance for robotics control problems that require a good amount of exploration, it also plagued these ME variants with limitations common among RL algorithms that ME was free of, such as hyperparameter sensitivity, high stochasticity as well as training instability, including when the population size increases as some components are shared across the population in recent approaches. Furthermore, existing approaches mixing ME with RL tend to be tied to a specific RL algorithm, which effectively prevents their use on problems where the corresponding RL algorithm fails. To address these shortcomings, we introduce a flexible framework that allows the use of any RL algorithm and alleviates the aforementioned limitations by evolving populations of agents (whose definition include hyperparameters and all learnable parameters) instead of just policies. We demonstrate the benefits brought about by our framework through extensive numerical experiments on a number of robotics control problems, some of which with deceptive rewards, taken from the QD-RL literature. 质量多样性 (QD) 已成为一种强大的替代优化范式，旨在生成大量且多样化的解决方案集合，特别是其旗舰算法 MAP-ELITES (ME)，该算法通过突变和交叉来演化解决方案。虽然对于一些非结构化问题非常有效，但早期的 ME 实现完全依赖于随机搜索来演化解决方案群体，这使得它们对于高维问题（例如在演化神经网络时）的样本效率低下。后续工作考虑利用梯度信息来指导搜索，以便通过借用黑盒优化（BBO）或强化学习（RL）的技术来解决这些缺点。虽然将 RL 技术与 ME 相结合，为需要大量探索的机器人控制问题解锁了最先进的性能，但它也困扰着这些 ME 变体，这些 ME 变体受到了 ME 所不具备的 RL 算法中常见的局限性的困扰，例如超参数敏感性、高随机性以及训练不稳定性，包括在最近的方法中，由于某些组件在总体中共享而导致总体规模增加。此外，将 ME 与 RL 混合的现有方法往往与特定的 RL 算法绑定，这有效地阻止了它们在相应 RL 算法失败的问题上的使用。为了解决这些缺点，我们引入了一个灵活的框架，允许使用任何 RL 算法，并通过发展代理群体（其定义包括超参数和所有可学习参数）而不仅仅是策略来缓解上述限制。我们通过对许多机器人控制问题进行广泛的数值实验来展示我们的框架带来的好处，其中一些问题具有欺骗性的奖励，取自 QD-RL 文献。 本文提出了一种结合MAP-Elites与强化学习（RL）的灵活框架，通过进化多样化智能体种群解决高维问题中的样本效率低下及训练不稳定性问题。 Thomas Pierrot,Arthur Flajolet cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yang Liu,Yue-Jie Hou,Chen-Xin Qin,Xin-Hui Li,Si-Jing Li,Bin Wang,Chi-Chun Zhou
title: A Data Augmentation Method and the Embedding Mechanism for Detection and Classification of Pulmonary Nodules on Small Samples
title_zh: 一种用于小样本肺结节检测和分类的数据增强方法和嵌入机制
abstract: Detection of pulmonary nodules by CT is used for screening lung cancer in early stages.omputer aided diagnosis (CAD) based on deep-learning method can identify the suspected areas of pulmonary nodules in CT images, thus improving the accuracy and efficiency of CT diagnosis. The accuracy and robustness of deep learning models. Method:In this paper, we explore (1) the data augmentation method based on the generation model and (2) the model structure improvement method based on the embedding mechanism. Two strategies have been introduced in this study: a new data augmentation method and a embedding mechanism. In the augmentation method, a 3D pixel-level statistics algorithm is proposed to generate pulmonary nodule and by combing the faked pulmonary nodule and healthy lung, we generate new pulmonary nodule samples. The embedding mechanism are designed to better understand the meaning of pixels of the pulmonary nodule samples by introducing hidden variables. Result: The result of the 3DVNET model with the augmentation method for pulmonary nodule detection shows that the proposed data augmentation method outperforms the method based on generative adversarial network (GAN) framework, training accuracy improved by 1.5%, and with embedding mechanism for pulmonary nodules classification shows that the embedding mechanism improves the accuracy and robustness for the classification of pulmonary nodules obviously, the model training accuracy is close to 1 and the model testing F1-score is 0.90.Conclusion:he proposed data augmentation method and embedding mechanism are beneficial to improve the accuracy and robustness of the model, and can be further applied in other common diagnostic imaging tasks.
summary: Detection of pulmonary nodules by CT is used for screening lung cancer in early stages.omputer aided diagnosis (CAD) based on deep-learning method can identify the suspected areas of pulmonary nodules in CT images, thus improving the accuracy and efficiency of CT diagnosis. The accuracy and robustness of deep learning models. Method:In this paper, we explore (1) the data augmentation method based on the generation model and (2) the model structure improvement method based on the embedding mechanism. Two strategies have been introduced in this study: a new data augmentation method and a embedding mechanism. In the augmentation method, a 3D pixel-level statistics algorithm is proposed to generate pulmonary nodule and by combing the faked pulmonary nodule and healthy lung, we generate new pulmonary nodule samples. The embedding mechanism are designed to better understand the meaning of pixels of the pulmonary nodule samples by introducing hidden variables. Result: The result of the 3DVNET model with the augmentation method for pulmonary nodule detection shows that the proposed data augmentation method outperforms the method based on generative adversarial network (GAN) framework, training accuracy improved by 1.5%, and with embedding mechanism for pulmonary nodules classification shows that the embedding mechanism improves the accuracy and robustness for the classification of pulmonary nodules obviously, the model training accuracy is close to 1 and the model testing F1-score is 0.90.Conclusion:he proposed data augmentation method and embedding mechanism are beneficial to improve the accuracy and robustness of the model, and can be further applied in other common diagnostic imaging tasks.
abstract_zh: CT检测肺结节用于肺癌的早期筛查。基于深度学习方法的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）可以识别CT图像中疑似肺结节的区域，从而提高CT诊断的准确性和效率。深度学习模型的准确性和鲁棒性。方法：本文探讨了（1）基于生成模型的数据增强方法和（2）基于嵌入机制的模型结构改进方法。本研究引入了两种策略：新的数据增强方法和嵌入机制。在增强方法中，提出了一种3D像素级统计算法来生成肺结节，并通过结合伪造的肺结节和健康肺，生成新的肺结节样本。嵌入机制旨在通过引入隐变量更好地理解肺结节样本像素的含义。结果：采用增强方法进行肺结节检测的3DVNET模型结果表明，所提出的数据增强方法优于基于生成对抗网络（GAN）框架的方法，训练精度提高了1.5%，并且采用嵌入机制进行肺结节分类表明，嵌入机制明显提高了肺结节分类的准确性和鲁棒性，模型训练精度接近1，模型测试F1-score为0.90。结论：提出的数据增强方法和嵌入机制有利于提高模型的准确性和鲁棒性，并且可以进一步应用于其他常见的诊断成像任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据增强方法和嵌入机制，用于在小样本情况下提升肺结节检测与分类的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在肺结节检测中需大量标注数据，但医学影像数据获取困难，现有生成对抗网络（GAN）方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出两种策略：（1）基于3D像素级统计算法生成合成肺结节样本；（2）通过引入隐变量的嵌入机制增强模型对结节像素特征的理解。
AI.result: 数据增强方法使3DVNET模型训练准确率提升1.5%，嵌入机制使分类模型测试F1-score达0.90，准确率接近1。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升模型性能，可推广至其他医学影像诊断任务。

authors_text: Jaidip Kotak,Yuval Elovici
title: IoT Device Identification Based on Network Communication Analysis Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的网络通信分析的物联网设备识别
comment: J Ambient Intell Human Comput (2022)
comments: J Ambient Intell Human Comput (2022)
abstract: Attack vectors for adversaries have increased in organizations because of the growing use of less secure IoT devices. The risk of attacks on an organization's network has also increased due to the bring your own device (BYOD) policy which permits employees to bring IoT devices onto the premises and attach them to the organization's network. To tackle this threat and protect their networks, organizations generally implement security policies in which only white listed IoT devices are allowed on the organization's network. To monitor compliance with such policies, it has become essential to distinguish IoT devices permitted within an organization's network from non white listed (unknown) IoT devices. In this research, deep learning is applied to network communication for the automated identification of IoT devices permitted on the network. In contrast to existing methods, the proposed approach does not require complex feature engineering of the network communication, because the 'communication behavior' of IoT devices is represented as small images which are generated from the device's network communication payload. The proposed approach is applicable for any IoT device, regardless of the protocol used for communication. As our approach relies on the network communication payload, it is also applicable for the IoT devices behind a network address translation (NAT) enabled router. In this study, we trained various classifiers on a publicly accessible dataset to identify IoT devices in different scenarios, including the identification of known and unknown IoT devices, achieving over 99% overall average detection accuracy.

The proposed approach is applicable for any IoT device, regardless of the protocol used for communication. As our approach relies on the network communication payload, it is also applicable for the IoT devices behind a network address translation (NAT) enabled router. In this study, we trained various classifiers on a publicly accessible dataset to identify IoT devices in different scenarios, including the identification of known and unknown IoT devices, achieving over 99% overall average detection accuracy.
abstract_zh: 由于越来越多地使用安全性较低的物联网设备，组织中对手的攻击媒介有所增加。由于自带设备 (BYOD) 政策允许员工将物联网设备带到现场并将其连接到组织的网络，组织网络遭受攻击的风险也有所增加。为了应对这种威胁并保护其网络，组织通常会实施安全策略，其中只允许白名单中的物联网设备进入组织的网络。为了监控此类策略的遵守情况，必须将组织网络内允许的 IoT 设备与非白名单（未知）IoT 设备区分开来。在这项研究中，深度学习应用于网络通信，以自动识别网络上允许的物联网设备。与现有方法相比，所提出的方法不需要网络通信的复杂特征工程，因为物联网设备的“通信行为”被表示为从设备的网络通信有效负载生成的小图像。所提出的方法适用于任何物联网设备，无论用于通信的协议如何。由于我们的方法依赖于网络通信有效负载，因此它也适用于支持网络地址转换 (NAT) 的路由器后面的物联网设备。在本研究中，我们在可公开访问的数据集上训练了各种分类器，以识别不同场景下的物联网设备，包括识别已知和未知的物联网设备，总体平均检测准确率达到 99% 以上。

AI.tldr: 基于深度学习的网络通信分析实现物联网设备识别
AI.motivation: 随着物联网设备使用增加及BYOD政策实施，组织网络面临更多攻击风险，需通过识别白名单设备与未知设备保障网络安全。
AI.method: 将物联网设备的网络通信负载转换为图像表示，利用深度学习模型自动识别设备，无需复杂特征工程，适用于任意协议及NAT路由器后的设备。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现99%以上的检测准确率，成功识别已知和未知物联网设备。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过网络通信负载图像分析有效识别物联网设备，具有协议无关性和NAT兼容性，为网络访问控制提供高效解决方案。

search_text: IoT Device Identification Based on Network Communication Analysis Using Deep Learning 基于深度学习的网络通信分析的物联网设备识别 Attack vectors for adversaries have increased in organizations because of the growing use of less secure IoT devices. The risk of attacks on an organization's network has also increased due to the bring your own device (BYOD) policy which permits employees to bring IoT devices onto the premises and attach them to the organization's network. To tackle this threat and protect their networks, organizations generally implement security policies in which only white listed IoT devices are allowed on the organization's network. To monitor compliance with such policies, it has become essential to distinguish IoT devices permitted within an organization's network from non white listed (unknown) IoT devices. In this research, deep learning is applied to network communication for the automated identification of IoT devices permitted on the network. In contrast to existing methods, the proposed approach does not require complex feature engineering of the network communication, because the 'communication behavior' of IoT devices is represented as small images which are generated from the device's network communication payload. The proposed approach is applicable for any IoT device, regardless of the protocol used for communication. As our approach relies on the network communication payload, it is also applicable for the IoT devices behind a network address translation (NAT) enabled router. In this study, we trained various classifiers on a publicly accessible dataset to identify IoT devices in different scenarios, including the identification of known and unknown IoT devices, achieving over 99% overall average detection accuracy. 由于越来越多地使用安全性较低的物联网设备，组织中对手的攻击媒介有所增加。由于自带设备 (BYOD) 政策允许员工将物联网设备带到现场并将其连接到组织的网络，组织网络遭受攻击的风险也有所增加。为了应对这种威胁并保护其网络，组织通常会实施安全策略，其中只允许白名单中的物联网设备进入组织的网络。为了监控此类策略的遵守情况，必须将组织网络内允许的 IoT 设备与非白名单（未知）IoT 设备区分开来。在这项研究中，深度学习应用于网络通信，以自动识别网络上允许的物联网设备。与现有方法相比，所提出的方法不需要网络通信的复杂特征工程，因为物联网设备的“通信行为”被表示为从设备的网络通信有效负载生成的小图像。所提出的方法适用于任何物联网设备，无论用于通信的协议如何。由于我们的方法依赖于网络通信有效负载，因此它也适用于支持网络地址转换 (NAT) 的路由器后面的物联网设备。在本研究中，我们在可公开访问的数据集上训练了各种分类器，以识别不同场景下的物联网设备，包括识别已知和未知的物联网设备，总体平均检测准确率达到 99% 以上。 基于深度学习的网络通信分析实现物联网设备识别 Jaidip Kotak,Yuval Elovici cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zekun Li,Shiyang Li,Xifeng Yan
title: Time Series as Images: Vision Transformer for Irregularly Sampled Time Series
title_zh: 时间序列作为图像：不规则采样时间序列的视觉转换器
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS2023. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Leezekun/ViTST
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS2023. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Leezekun/ViTST
abstract: Irregularly sampled time series are increasingly prevalent, particularly in medical domains. While various specialized methods have been developed to handle these irregularities, effectively modeling their complex dynamics and pronounced sparsity remains a challenge. This paper introduces a novel perspective by converting irregularly sampled time series into line graph images, then utilizing powerful pre-trained vision transformers for time series classification in the same way as image classification. This method not only largely simplifies specialized algorithm designs but also presents the potential to serve as a universal framework for time series modeling. Remarkably, despite its simplicity, our approach outperforms state-of-the-art specialized algorithms on several popular healthcare and human activity datasets. Especially in the rigorous leave-sensors-out setting where a portion of variables is omitted during testing, our method exhibits strong robustness against varying degrees of missing observations, achieving an impressive improvement of 42.8% in absolute F1 score points over leading specialized baselines even with half the variables masked. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Leezekun/ViTST
summary: Irregularly sampled time series are increasingly prevalent, particularly in medical domains. While various specialized methods have been developed to handle these irregularities, effectively modeling their complex dynamics and pronounced sparsity remains a challenge. This paper introduces a novel perspective by converting irregularly sampled time series into line graph images, then utilizing powerful pre-trained vision transformers for time series classification in the same way as image classification. This method not only largely simplifies specialized algorithm designs but also presents the potential to serve as a universal framework for time series modeling. Remarkably, despite its simplicity, our approach outperforms state-of-the-art specialized algorithms on several popular healthcare and human activity datasets. Especially in the rigorous leave-sensors-out setting where a portion of variables is omitted during testing, our method exhibits strong robustness against varying degrees of missing observations, achieving an impressive improvement of 42.8% in absolute F1 score points over leading specialized baselines even with half the variables masked. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Leezekun/ViTST
abstract_zh: 不规则采样的时间序列越来越普遍，特别是在医学领域。尽管已经开发了各种专门方法来处理这些不规则性，但有效地对其复杂的动态和明显的稀疏性进行建模仍然是一个挑战。本文引入了一种新颖的视角，将不规则采样的时间序列转换为线图图像，然后利用强大的预训练视觉变换器以与图像分类相同的方式进行时间序列分类。这种方法不仅大大简化了专门的算法设计，而且还具有作为时间序列建模通用框架的潜力。值得注意的是，尽管我们的方法很简单，但在几个流行的医疗保健和人类活动数据集上，我们的方法优于最先进的专用算法。特别是在测试过程中省略部分变量的严格的传感器排除设置中，我们的方法对不同程度的缺失观察表现出很强的鲁棒性，即使在一半变量被掩盖的情况下，绝对 F1 得分也比领先的专业基线显着提高了 42.8%。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Leezekun/ViTST 获取

AI.tldr: 将不规则采样时间序列转换为图像并利用视觉Transformer进行分类，以解决其复杂动态和稀疏性建模难题
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效建模不规则时间序列的复杂动态和稀疏性，需探索更通用且高效的解决方案
AI.method: 将不规则时间序列转化为线图图像，利用预训练视觉Transformer进行分类，无需专门设计算法
AI.result: 在多个医疗和活动数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在数据缺失情况下F1分数提升42.8%
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法作为通用时间序列建模框架，兼具简单性与有效性，尤其在数据缺失时表现稳健

authors_text: Julie Keisler,El-Ghazali Talbi,Sandra Claudel,Gilles Cabriel
title: An algorithmic framework for the optimization of deep neural networks architectures and hyperparameters
title_zh: 用于优化深度神经网络架构和超参数的算法框架
abstract: In this paper, we propose an algorithmic framework to automatically generate efficient deep neural networks and optimize their associated hyperparameters. The framework is based on evolving directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), defining a more flexible search space than the existing ones in the literature. It allows mixtures of different classical operations: convolutions, recurrences and dense layers, but also more newfangled operations such as self-attention. Based on this search space we propose neighbourhood and evolution search operators to optimize both the architecture and hyper-parameters of our networks. These search operators can be used with any metaheuristic capable of handling mixed search spaces. We tested our algorithmic framework with an evolutionary algorithm on a time series prediction benchmark. The results demonstrate that our framework was able to find models outperforming the established baseline on numerous datasets.
summary: In this paper, we propose an algorithmic framework to automatically generate efficient deep neural networks and optimize their associated hyperparameters. The framework is based on evolving directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), defining a more flexible search space than the existing ones in the literature. It allows mixtures of different classical operations: convolutions, recurrences and dense layers, but also more newfangled operations such as self-attention. Based on this search space we propose neighbourhood and evolution search operators to optimize both the architecture and hyper-parameters of our networks. These search operators can be used with any metaheuristic capable of handling mixed search spaces. We tested our algorithmic framework with an evolutionary algorithm on a time series prediction benchmark. The results demonstrate that our framework was able to find models outperforming the established baseline on numerous datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种算法框架来自动生成高效的深度神经网络并优化其相关的超参数。该框架基于不断发展的有向无环图（DAG），定义了比文献中现有搜索空间更灵活的搜索空间。它允许混合不同的经典操作：卷积、递归和密集层，但也允许更新颖的操作，例如自注意力。基于这个搜索空间，我们提出邻域和进化搜索算子来优化我们网络的架构和超参数。这些搜索运算符可以与任何能够处理混合搜索空间的元启发式算法一起使用。我们在时间序列预测基准上使用进化算法测试了我们的算法框架。结果表明，我们的框架能够在众多数据集上找到优于既定基线的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动优化深度神经网络架构和超参数的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在搜索空间灵活性和操作多样性上存在局限，难以有效优化复杂模型结构。
AI.method: 基于演化有向无环图(DAG)构建混合操作搜索空间，结合邻域搜索与进化算子，兼容各类元启发式算法。
AI.result: 在时间序列预测任务中，框架找到的模型在多个数据集上超越了基准模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过灵活的搜索空间设计和高效优化策略，有效提升了神经网络架构搜索效果。

search_text: An algorithmic framework for the optimization of deep neural networks architectures and hyperparameters 用于优化深度神经网络架构和超参数的算法框架 In this paper, we propose an algorithmic framework to automatically generate efficient deep neural networks and optimize their associated hyperparameters. The framework is based on evolving directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), defining a more flexible search space than the existing ones in the literature. It allows mixtures of different classical operations: convolutions, recurrences and dense layers, but also more newfangled operations such as self-attention. Based on this search space we propose neighbourhood and evolution search operators to optimize both the architecture and hyper-parameters of our networks. These search operators can be used with any metaheuristic capable of handling mixed search spaces. We tested our algorithmic framework with an evolutionary algorithm on a time series prediction benchmark. The results demonstrate that our framework was able to find models outperforming the established baseline on numerous datasets. 在本文中，我们提出了一种算法框架来自动生成高效的深度神经网络并优化其相关的超参数。该框架基于不断发展的有向无环图（DAG），定义了比文献中现有搜索空间更灵活的搜索空间。它允许混合不同的经典操作：卷积、递归和密集层，但也允许更新颖的操作，例如自注意力。基于这个搜索空间，我们提出邻域和进化搜索算子来优化我们网络的架构和超参数。这些搜索运算符可以与任何能够处理混合搜索空间的元启发式算法一起使用。我们在时间序列预测基准上使用进化算法测试了我们的算法框架。结果表明，我们的框架能够在众多数据集上找到优于既定基线的模型。 本文提出一种用于自动优化深度神经网络架构和超参数的算法框架。 Julie Keisler,El-Ghazali Talbi,Sandra Claudel,Gilles Cabriel cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tohida Rehman,Suchandan Das,Debarshi Kumar Sanyal,Samiran Chattopadhyay
title: An Analysis of Abstractive Text Summarization Using Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 使用预训练模型进行抽象文本摘要分析
comment: 11 Pages, 6 Figures, 3 Tables
comments: 11 Pages, 6 Figures, 3 Tables
abstract: People nowadays use search engines like Google, Yahoo, and Bing to find information on the Internet. Due to explosion in data, it is helpful for users if they are provided relevant summaries of the search results rather than just links to webpages. Text summarization has become a vital approach to help consumers swiftly grasp vast amounts of information.In this paper, different pre-trained models for text summarization are evaluated on different datasets. Specifically, we have used three different pre-trained models, namely, google/pegasus-cnn-dailymail, T5-base, facebook/bart-large-cnn. We have considered three different datasets, namely, CNN-dailymail, SAMSum and BillSum to get the output from the above three models. The pre-trained models are compared over these different datasets, each of 2000 examples, through ROUGH and BLEU metrics.

We have considered three different datasets, namely, CNN-dailymail, SAMSum and BillSum to get the output from the above three models. The pre-trained models are compared over these different datasets, each of 2000 examples, through ROUGH and BLEU metrics.
abstract_zh: 如今，人们使用 Google、Yahoo 和 Bing 等搜索引擎在互联网上查找信息。由于数据爆炸，如果向用户提供搜索结果的相关摘要而不仅仅是网页链接，这对用户会很有帮助。文本摘要已成为帮助消费者快速掌握大量信息的重要方法。本文在不同的数据集上评估了不同的文本摘要预训练模型。具体来说，我们使用了三种不同的预训练模型，即 google/pegasus-cnn-dailymail、T5-base、facebook/bart-large-cnn。我们考虑了三个不同的数据集，即 CNN-dailymail、SAMSum 和 BillSum，以获得上述三个模型的输出。通过 ROUGH 和 BLEU 指标，在这些不同的数据集（每个数据集 2000 个示例）上对预训练模型进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种预训练模型在不同数据集上的文本摘要效果。
AI.motivation: 随着数据量爆炸式增长，用户需要更高效的摘要技术来快速获取信息，而非仅依赖网页链接。
AI.method: 采用google/pegasus-cnn-dailymail、T5-base和facebook/bart-large-cnn三种模型，在CNN-dailymail、SAMSum和BillSum三个数据集（各2000条样本）上进行测试，使用ROUGH和BLEU指标对比模型表现。
AI.result: 通过实验比较了不同模型在各数据集上的摘要质量，但未明确说明具体优劣排序。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型在文本摘要任务中表现有效，但需根据具体数据集选择适配模型。

authors_text: Tohida Rehman,Debarshi Kumar Sanyal,Prasenjit Majumder,Samiran Chattopadhyay
title: Named Entity Recognition Based Automatic Generation of Research Highlights
title_zh: 基于命名实体识别的研究亮点自动生成
comment: 7 Pages, 3 Figures, 2 Tables
comments: 7 Pages, 3 Figures, 2 Tables
abstract: A scientific paper is traditionally prefaced by an abstract that summarizes the paper. Recently, research highlights that focus on the main findings of the paper have emerged as a complementary summary in addition to an abstract. However, highlights are not yet as common as abstracts, and are absent in many papers. In this paper, we aim to automatically generate research highlights using different sections of a research paper as input. We investigate whether the use of named entity recognition on the input improves the quality of the generated highlights. In particular, we have used two deep learning-based models: the first is a pointer-generator network, and the second augments the first model with coverage mechanism. We then augment each of the above models with named entity recognition features. The proposed method can be used to produce highlights for papers with missing highlights. Our experiments show that adding named entity information improves the performance of the deep learning-based summarizers in terms of ROUGE, METEOR and BERTScore measures.
summary: A scientific paper is traditionally prefaced by an abstract that summarizes the paper. Recently, research highlights that focus on the main findings of the paper have emerged as a complementary summary in addition to an abstract. However, highlights are not yet as common as abstracts, and are absent in many papers. In this paper, we aim to automatically generate research highlights using different sections of a research paper as input. We investigate whether the use of named entity recognition on the input improves the quality of the generated highlights. In particular, we have used two deep learning-based models: the first is a pointer-generator network, and the second augments the first model with coverage mechanism. We then augment each of the above models with named entity recognition features. The proposed method can be used to produce highlights for papers with missing highlights. Our experiments show that adding named entity information improves the performance of the deep learning-based summarizers in terms of ROUGE, METEOR and BERTScore measures.
abstract_zh: 传统上，科学论文以总结论文的摘要作为序言。最近，以论文主要发现为重点的研究亮点已作为摘要之外的补充摘要出现。然而，要点还不像摘要那样普遍，并且在许多论文中都没有。在本文中，我们的目标是使用研究论文的不同部分作为输入自动生成研究亮点。我们研究在输入上使用命名实体识别是否可以提高生成的亮点的质量。特别是，我们使用了两个基于深度学习的模型：第一个是指针生成器网络，第二个通过覆盖机制增强了第一个模型。然后，我们使用命名实体识别功能来增强上述每个模型。所提出的方法可用于为缺少亮点的论文生成亮点。我们的实验表明，添加命名实体信息可以提高基于深度学习的摘要器在 ROUGE、METEOR 和 BERTScore 度量方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用研究论文的不同部分自动生成研究亮点，并探讨命名实体识别（NER）对生成质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统摘要无法全面概括研究重点，而研究亮点作为补充总结尚未普及，需自动生成功能以填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用指针生成网络及集成覆盖机制的深度学习模型，并融合命名实体识别特征以增强模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入命名实体识别信息显著提升了基于深度学习的摘要模型在ROUGE、METEOR和BERTScore等指标上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证实了命名实体识别在提升自动亮点生成质量中的有效性，为缺失研究亮点的论文提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Yiting Cheng,Fangyun Wei,Jianmin Bao,Dong Chen,Wenqiang Zhang
title: CiCo: Domain-Aware Sign Language Retrieval via Cross-Lingual Contrastive Learning
title_zh: CiCo：通过跨语言对比学习进行领域感知手语检索
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT
abstract: This work focuses on sign language retrieval-a recently proposed task for sign language understanding. Sign language retrieval consists of two sub-tasks: text-to-sign-video (T2V) retrieval and sign-video-to-text (V2T) retrieval. Different from traditional video-text retrieval, sign language videos, not only contain visual signals but also carry abundant semantic meanings by themselves due to the fact that sign languages are also natural languages. Considering this character, we formulate sign language retrieval as a cross-lingual retrieval problem as well as a video-text retrieval task. Concretely, we take into account the linguistic properties of both sign languages and natural languages, and simultaneously identify the fine-grained cross-lingual (i.e., sign-to-word) mappings while contrasting the texts and the sign videos in a joint embedding space. This process is termed as cross-lingual contrastive learning. Another challenge is raised by the data scarcity issue-sign language datasets are orders of magnitude smaller in scale than that of speech recognition. We alleviate this issue by adopting a domain-agnostic sign encoder pre-trained on large-scale sign videos into the target domain via pseudo-labeling. Our framework, termed as domain-aware sign language retrieval via Cross-lingual Contrastive learning or CiCo for short, outperforms the pioneering method by large margins on various datasets, e.g., +22.4 T2V and +28.0 V2T R@1 improvements on How2Sign dataset, and +13.7 T2V and +17.1 V2T R@1 improvements on PHOENIX-2014T dataset. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT.
summary: This work focuses on sign language retrieval-a recently proposed task for sign language understanding. Sign language retrieval consists of two sub-tasks: text-to-sign-video (T2V) retrieval and sign-video-to-text (V2T) retrieval. Different from traditional video-text retrieval, sign language videos, not only contain visual signals but also carry abundant semantic meanings by themselves due to the fact that sign languages are also natural languages. Considering this character, we formulate sign language retrieval as a cross-lingual retrieval problem as well as a video-text retrieval task. Concretely, we take into account the linguistic properties of both sign languages and natural languages, and simultaneously identify the fine-grained cross-lingual (i.e., sign-to-word) mappings while contrasting the texts and the sign videos in a joint embedding space. This process is termed as cross-lingual contrastive learning. Another challenge is raised by the data scarcity issue-sign language datasets are orders of magnitude smaller in scale than that of speech recognition. We alleviate this issue by adopting a domain-agnostic sign encoder pre-trained on large-scale sign videos into the target domain via pseudo-labeling. Our framework, termed as domain-aware sign language retrieval via Cross-lingual Contrastive learning or CiCo for short, outperforms the pioneering method by large margins on various datasets, e.g., +22.4 T2V and +28.0 V2T R@1 improvements on How2Sign dataset, and +13.7 T2V and +17.1 V2T R@1 improvements on PHOENIX-2014T dataset. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是手语检索——最近提出的手语理解任务。手语检索由两个子任务组成：文本到手语视频（T2V）检索和手语视频到文本（V2T）检索。与传统的视频文本检索不同，手语视频不仅包含视觉信号，而且由于手语也是自然语言，其本身也承载着丰富的语义。考虑到这一特点，我们将手语检索制定为跨语言检索问题以及视频文本检索任务。具体来说，我们考虑手语和自然语言的语言特性，同时识别细粒度的跨语言（即手语到单词）映射，同时在联合嵌入空间中对比文本和手语视频。这个过程被称为跨语言对比学习。数据稀缺问题带来了另一个挑战——手语数据集的规模比语音识别的数据集小几个数量级。我们通过采用在大规模符号视频上通过伪标签预先训练到目标域的与域无关的符号编码器来缓解这个问题。我们的框架被称为通过跨语言对比学习或简称 CiCo 的领域感知手语检索，在各种数据集上都远远优于开创性方法，例如，How2Sign 数据集上的 +22.4 T2V 和 +28.0 V2T R@1 改进，以及 PHOENIX-2014T 数据集上的 +13.7 T2V 和 +17.1 V2T R@1 改进。代码和模型可参见：https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CiCo方法，通过跨语言对比学习解决手语检索任务，包括文本到手语视频（T2V）和手语视频到文本（V2T）的双向检索。
AI.motivation: 手语视频兼具视觉信号和语义信息，但现有方法难以有效建模其跨语言特性，且手语数据稀缺导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 构建联合嵌入空间实现文本与手语视频的跨语言对比学习，结合预训练的领域无关手语编码器并通过伪标签迁移至目标领域。
AI.result: 在How2Sign和PHOENIX-2014T数据集上分别实现T2V+22.4/V2T+28.0和T2V+13.7/V2T+17.1的R@1性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CiCo通过跨语言建模和领域迁移有效解决了手语检索的语义对齐与数据稀缺问题，显著优于现有方法。

search_text: CiCo: Domain-Aware Sign Language Retrieval via Cross-Lingual Contrastive Learning CiCo：通过跨语言对比学习进行领域感知手语检索 This work focuses on sign language retrieval-a recently proposed task for sign language understanding. Sign language retrieval consists of two sub-tasks: text-to-sign-video (T2V) retrieval and sign-video-to-text (V2T) retrieval. Different from traditional video-text retrieval, sign language videos, not only contain visual signals but also carry abundant semantic meanings by themselves due to the fact that sign languages are also natural languages. Considering this character, we formulate sign language retrieval as a cross-lingual retrieval problem as well as a video-text retrieval task. Concretely, we take into account the linguistic properties of both sign languages and natural languages, and simultaneously identify the fine-grained cross-lingual (i.e., sign-to-word) mappings while contrasting the texts and the sign videos in a joint embedding space. This process is termed as cross-lingual contrastive learning. Another challenge is raised by the data scarcity issue-sign language datasets are orders of magnitude smaller in scale than that of speech recognition. We alleviate this issue by adopting a domain-agnostic sign encoder pre-trained on large-scale sign videos into the target domain via pseudo-labeling. Our framework, termed as domain-aware sign language retrieval via Cross-lingual Contrastive learning or CiCo for short, outperforms the pioneering method by large margins on various datasets, e.g., +22.4 T2V and +28.0 V2T R@1 improvements on How2Sign dataset, and +13.7 T2V and +17.1 V2T R@1 improvements on PHOENIX-2014T dataset. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT. 这项工作的重点是手语检索——最近提出的手语理解任务。手语检索由两个子任务组成：文本到手语视频（T2V）检索和手语视频到文本（V2T）检索。与传统的视频文本检索不同，手语视频不仅包含视觉信号，而且由于手语也是自然语言，其本身也承载着丰富的语义。考虑到这一特点，我们将手语检索制定为跨语言检索问题以及视频文本检索任务。具体来说，我们考虑手语和自然语言的语言特性，同时识别细粒度的跨语言（即手语到单词）映射，同时在联合嵌入空间中对比文本和手语视频。这个过程被称为跨语言对比学习。数据稀缺问题带来了另一个挑战——手语数据集的规模比语音识别的数据集小几个数量级。我们通过采用在大规模符号视频上通过伪标签预先训练到目标域的与域无关的符号编码器来缓解这个问题。我们的框架被称为通过跨语言对比学习或简称 CiCo 的领域感知手语检索，在各种数据集上都远远优于开创性方法，例如，How2Sign 数据集上的 +22.4 T2V 和 +28.0 V2T R@1 改进，以及 PHOENIX-2014T 数据集上的 +13.7 T2V 和 +17.1 V2T R@1 改进。代码和模型可参见：https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT。 本文提出CiCo方法，通过跨语言对比学习解决手语检索任务，包括文本到手语视频（T2V）和手语视频到文本（V2T）的双向检索。 Yiting Cheng,Fangyun Wei,Jianmin Bao,Dong Chen,Wenqiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Shoukang Hu,Fangzhou Hong,Liang Pan,Haiyi Mei,Lei Yang,Ziwei Liu
title: SHERF: Generalizable Human NeRF from a Single Image
title_zh: SHERF：来自单个图像的可推广人类 NeRF
comment: Accepted by ICCV2023. Project webpage: https://skhu101.github.io/SHERF/
comments: Accepted by ICCV2023. Project webpage: https://skhu101.github.io/SHERF/
abstract: Existing Human NeRF methods for reconstructing 3D humans typically rely on multiple 2D images from multi-view cameras or monocular videos captured from fixed camera views. However, in real-world scenarios, human images are often captured from random camera angles, presenting challenges for high-quality 3D human reconstruction. In this paper, we propose SHERF, the first generalizable Human NeRF model for recovering animatable 3D humans from a single input image. SHERF extracts and encodes 3D human representations in canonical space, enabling rendering and animation from free views and poses. To achieve high-fidelity novel view and pose synthesis, the encoded 3D human representations should capture both global appearance and local fine-grained textures. To this end, we propose a bank of 3D-aware hierarchical features, including global, point-level, and pixel-aligned features, to facilitate informative encoding. Global features enhance the information extracted from the single input image and complement the information missing from the partial 2D observation. Point-level features provide strong clues of 3D human structure, while pixel-aligned features preserve more fine-grained details. To effectively integrate the 3D-aware hierarchical feature bank, we design a feature fusion transformer. Extensive experiments on THuman, RenderPeople, ZJU_MoCap, and HuMMan datasets demonstrate that SHERF achieves state-of-the-art performance, with better generalizability for novel view and pose synthesis.
summary: Existing Human NeRF methods for reconstructing 3D humans typically rely on multiple 2D images from multi-view cameras or monocular videos captured from fixed camera views. However, in real-world scenarios, human images are often captured from random camera angles, presenting challenges for high-quality 3D human reconstruction. In this paper, we propose SHERF, the first generalizable Human NeRF model for recovering animatable 3D humans from a single input image. SHERF extracts and encodes 3D human representations in canonical space, enabling rendering and animation from free views and poses. To achieve high-fidelity novel view and pose synthesis, the encoded 3D human representations should capture both global appearance and local fine-grained textures. To this end, we propose a bank of 3D-aware hierarchical features, including global, point-level, and pixel-aligned features, to facilitate informative encoding. Global features enhance the information extracted from the single input image and complement the information missing from the partial 2D observation. Point-level features provide strong clues of 3D human structure, while pixel-aligned features preserve more fine-grained details. To effectively integrate the 3D-aware hierarchical feature bank, we design a feature fusion transformer. Extensive experiments on THuman, RenderPeople, ZJU_MoCap, and HuMMan datasets demonstrate that SHERF achieves state-of-the-art performance, with better generalizability for novel view and pose synthesis.
abstract_zh: 现有的用于重建 3D 人体的 Human NeRF 方法通常依赖于来自多视图摄像机的多个 2D 图像或从固定摄像机视图捕获的单目视频。然而，在现实场景中，人体图像通常是从随机摄像机角度捕获的，这给高质量 3D 人体重建带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 SHERF，这是第一个可泛化的 Human NeRF 模型，用于从单个输入图像中恢复可动画的 3D 人体。 SHERF 在规范空间中提取和编码 3D 人体表示，从而实现自由视图和姿势的渲染和动画。为了实现高保真新颖的视图和姿势合成，编码的 3D 人体表示应该捕获全局外观和局部细粒度纹理。为此，我们提出了一组 3D 感知的分层特征，包括全局、点级和像素对齐特征，以促进信息编码。全局特征增强了从单个输入图像中提取的信息，并补充了部分 2D 观察中缺失的信息。点级特征提供了 3D 人体结构的有力线索，而像素对齐特征则保留了更细粒度的细节。为了有效地集成 3D 感知的分层特征库，我们设计了一个特征融合变压器。在 THuman、RenderPeople、ZJU_MoCap 和 HuMMan 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SHERF 实现了最先进的性能，对于新颖的视图和姿势合成具有更好的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHERF模型，从单张图像中重建可动画的3D人体，解决传统方法依赖多视角图像的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体重建方法依赖多视角图像或固定视角视频，难以应对实际场景中随机视角拍摄的图像，导致重建质量受限。
AI.method: 通过构建包含全局、点级和像素对齐特征的3D感知分层特征库，并设计特征融合Transformer，从单张图像中提取并编码人体的3D表示。
AI.result: 在THuman、RenderPeople等数据集上实现最先进的性能，显著提升新视角和新姿态合成的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SHERF是首个从单张图像生成可动画3D人体的通用模型，其分层特征库与融合机制有效解决了单视角重建的挑战。

search_text: SHERF: Generalizable Human NeRF from a Single Image SHERF：来自单个图像的可推广人类 NeRF Existing Human NeRF methods for reconstructing 3D humans typically rely on multiple 2D images from multi-view cameras or monocular videos captured from fixed camera views. However, in real-world scenarios, human images are often captured from random camera angles, presenting challenges for high-quality 3D human reconstruction. In this paper, we propose SHERF, the first generalizable Human NeRF model for recovering animatable 3D humans from a single input image. SHERF extracts and encodes 3D human representations in canonical space, enabling rendering and animation from free views and poses. To achieve high-fidelity novel view and pose synthesis, the encoded 3D human representations should capture both global appearance and local fine-grained textures. To this end, we propose a bank of 3D-aware hierarchical features, including global, point-level, and pixel-aligned features, to facilitate informative encoding. Global features enhance the information extracted from the single input image and complement the information missing from the partial 2D observation. Point-level features provide strong clues of 3D human structure, while pixel-aligned features preserve more fine-grained details. To effectively integrate the 3D-aware hierarchical feature bank, we design a feature fusion transformer. Extensive experiments on THuman, RenderPeople, ZJU_MoCap, and HuMMan datasets demonstrate that SHERF achieves state-of-the-art performance, with better generalizability for novel view and pose synthesis. 现有的用于重建 3D 人体的 Human NeRF 方法通常依赖于来自多视图摄像机的多个 2D 图像或从固定摄像机视图捕获的单目视频。然而，在现实场景中，人体图像通常是从随机摄像机角度捕获的，这给高质量 3D 人体重建带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 SHERF，这是第一个可泛化的 Human NeRF 模型，用于从单个输入图像中恢复可动画的 3D 人体。 SHERF 在规范空间中提取和编码 3D 人体表示，从而实现自由视图和姿势的渲染和动画。为了实现高保真新颖的视图和姿势合成，编码的 3D 人体表示应该捕获全局外观和局部细粒度纹理。为此，我们提出了一组 3D 感知的分层特征，包括全局、点级和像素对齐特征，以促进信息编码。全局特征增强了从单个输入图像中提取的信息，并补充了部分 2D 观察中缺失的信息。点级特征提供了 3D 人体结构的有力线索，而像素对齐特征则保留了更细粒度的细节。为了有效地集成 3D 感知的分层特征库，我们设计了一个特征融合变压器。在 THuman、RenderPeople、ZJU_MoCap 和 HuMMan 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SHERF 实现了最先进的性能，对于新颖的视图和姿势合成具有更好的通用性。 本文提出SHERF模型，从单张图像中重建可动画的3D人体，解决传统方法依赖多视角图像的局限性。 Shoukang Hu,Fangzhou Hong,Liang Pan,Haiyi Mei,Lei Yang,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yasiru Ranasinghe,Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel
title: $CrowdDiff$: Multi-hypothesis Crowd Density Estimation using Diffusion Models
title_zh: $CrowdDiff$：使用扩散模型进行多假设人群密度估计
comment: Accepted at CVPR'24. The project is available at https://dylran.github.io/crowddiff.github.io
comments: Accepted at CVPR'24. The project is available at https://dylran.github.io/crowddiff.github.io
abstract: Crowd counting is a fundamental problem in crowd analysis which is typically accomplished by estimating a crowd density map and summing over the density values. However, this approach suffers from background noise accumulation and loss of density due to the use of broad Gaussian kernels to create the ground truth density maps. This issue can be overcome by narrowing the Gaussian kernel. However, existing approaches perform poorly when trained with ground truth density maps with broad kernels. To deal with this limitation, we propose using conditional diffusion models to predict density maps, as diffusion models show high fidelity to training data during generation. With that, we present $CrowdDiff$ that generates the crowd density map as a reverse diffusion process. Furthermore, as the intermediate time steps of the diffusion process are noisy, we incorporate a regression branch for direct crowd estimation only during training to improve the feature learning. In addition, owing to the stochastic nature of the diffusion model, we introduce producing multiple density maps to improve the counting performance contrary to the existing crowd counting pipelines. We conduct extensive experiments on publicly available datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. $CrowdDiff$ outperforms existing state-of-the-art crowd counting methods on several public crowd analysis benchmarks with significant improvements.
summary: Crowd counting is a fundamental problem in crowd analysis which is typically accomplished by estimating a crowd density map and summing over the density values. However, this approach suffers from background noise accumulation and loss of density due to the use of broad Gaussian kernels to create the ground truth density maps. This issue can be overcome by narrowing the Gaussian kernel. However, existing approaches perform poorly when trained with ground truth density maps with broad kernels. To deal with this limitation, we propose using conditional diffusion models to predict density maps, as diffusion models show high fidelity to training data during generation. With that, we present $CrowdDiff$ that generates the crowd density map as a reverse diffusion process. Furthermore, as the intermediate time steps of the diffusion process are noisy, we incorporate a regression branch for direct crowd estimation only during training to improve the feature learning. In addition, owing to the stochastic nature of the diffusion model, we introduce producing multiple density maps to improve the counting performance contrary to the existing crowd counting pipelines. We conduct extensive experiments on publicly available datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. $CrowdDiff$ outperforms existing state-of-the-art crowd counting methods on several public crowd analysis benchmarks with significant improvements.
abstract_zh: 人群计数是人群分析中的一个基本问题，通常通过估计人群密度图并对密度值求和来完成。然而，由于使用宽高斯核来创建地面实况密度图，这种方法会受到背景噪声积累和密度损失的影响。这个问题可以通过缩小高斯核来解决。然而，现有方法在使用具有宽核的地面实况密度图进行训练时表现不佳。为了解决这个限制，我们建议使用条件扩散模型来预测密度图，因为扩散模型在生成过程中对训练数据表现出高保真度。这样，我们提出 $CrowdDiff$，它生成人群密度图作为反向扩散过程。此外，由于扩散过程的中间时间步长有噪声，因此我们仅在训练期间合并用于直接人群估计的回归分支，以改进特征学习。此外，由于扩散模型的随机性，我们引入了生成多个密度图来提高计数性能，这与现有的人群计数管道相反。我们对公开可用的数据集进行了广泛的实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。 $CrowdDiff$ 在多个公共人群分析基准上优于现有最先进的人群计数方法，并取得显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrowdDiff方法，利用扩散模型生成多假设人群密度图以解决传统计数方法的噪声积累与密度损失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统人群密度估计依赖宽高斯核生成密度图，导致背景噪声积累和密度值丢失；窄高斯核虽能缓解此问题，但现有方法训练效果不佳。
AI.method: 基于条件扩散模型逆向生成密度图，引入训练时的回归分支直接估计人数，并通过扩散过程的随机性生成多组密度图提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上验证，CrowdDiff显著优于现有先进方法，在人群计数任务中取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型结合多假设策略有效解决了密度估计中的噪声与精度问题，为人群计数提供了新思路。

search_text: $CrowdDiff$: Multi-hypothesis Crowd Density Estimation using Diffusion Models $CrowdDiff$：使用扩散模型进行多假设人群密度估计 Crowd counting is a fundamental problem in crowd analysis which is typically accomplished by estimating a crowd density map and summing over the density values. However, this approach suffers from background noise accumulation and loss of density due to the use of broad Gaussian kernels to create the ground truth density maps. This issue can be overcome by narrowing the Gaussian kernel. However, existing approaches perform poorly when trained with ground truth density maps with broad kernels. To deal with this limitation, we propose using conditional diffusion models to predict density maps, as diffusion models show high fidelity to training data during generation. With that, we present $CrowdDiff$ that generates the crowd density map as a reverse diffusion process. Furthermore, as the intermediate time steps of the diffusion process are noisy, we incorporate a regression branch for direct crowd estimation only during training to improve the feature learning. In addition, owing to the stochastic nature of the diffusion model, we introduce producing multiple density maps to improve the counting performance contrary to the existing crowd counting pipelines. We conduct extensive experiments on publicly available datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. $CrowdDiff$ outperforms existing state-of-the-art crowd counting methods on several public crowd analysis benchmarks with significant improvements. 人群计数是人群分析中的一个基本问题，通常通过估计人群密度图并对密度值求和来完成。然而，由于使用宽高斯核来创建地面实况密度图，这种方法会受到背景噪声积累和密度损失的影响。这个问题可以通过缩小高斯核来解决。然而，现有方法在使用具有宽核的地面实况密度图进行训练时表现不佳。为了解决这个限制，我们建议使用条件扩散模型来预测密度图，因为扩散模型在生成过程中对训练数据表现出高保真度。这样，我们提出 $CrowdDiff$，它生成人群密度图作为反向扩散过程。此外，由于扩散过程的中间时间步长有噪声，因此我们仅在训练期间合并用于直接人群估计的回归分支，以改进特征学习。此外，由于扩散模型的随机性，我们引入了生成多个密度图来提高计数性能，这与现有的人群计数管道相反。我们对公开可用的数据集进行了广泛的实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。 $CrowdDiff$ 在多个公共人群分析基准上优于现有最先进的人群计数方法，并取得显着改进。 本文提出CrowdDiff方法，利用扩散模型生成多假设人群密度图以解决传统计数方法的噪声积累与密度损失问题。 Yasiru Ranasinghe,Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV

authors_text: Ayaan Haque,Matthew Tancik,Alexei A. Efros,Aleksander Holynski,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: Instruct-NeRF2NeRF: Editing 3D Scenes with Instructions
title_zh: Instruct-NeRF2NeRF：使用说明编辑 3D 场景
comment: Project website: https://instruct-nerf2nerf.github.io; v1. Revisions to related work and discussion
comments: Project website: https://instruct-nerf2nerf.github.io; v1. Revisions to related work and discussion
abstract: We propose a method for editing NeRF scenes with text-instructions. Given a NeRF of a scene and the collection of images used to reconstruct it, our method uses an image-conditioned diffusion model (InstructPix2Pix) to iteratively edit the input images while optimizing the underlying scene, resulting in an optimized 3D scene that respects the edit instruction. We demonstrate that our proposed method is able to edit large-scale, real-world scenes, and is able to accomplish more realistic, targeted edits than prior work.
summary: We propose a method for editing NeRF scenes with text-instructions. Given a NeRF of a scene and the collection of images used to reconstruct it, our method uses an image-conditioned diffusion model (InstructPix2Pix) to iteratively edit the input images while optimizing the underlying scene, resulting in an optimized 3D scene that respects the edit instruction. We demonstrate that our proposed method is able to edit large-scale, real-world scenes, and is able to accomplish more realistic, targeted edits than prior work.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用文本指令编辑 NeRF 场景的方法。给定场景的 NeRF 和用于重建场景的图像集合，我们的方法使用图像条件扩散模型 (InstructPix2Pix) 迭代编辑输入图像，同时优化底层场景，从而产生尊重编辑指令的优化 3D 场景。我们证明了我们提出的方法能够编辑大规模的真实世界场景，并且能够比以前的工作完成更现实、更有针对性的编辑。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于文本指令编辑NeRF三维场景的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以对大规模真实场景进行精准、真实的编辑，需满足更复杂的指令驱动编辑需求。
AI.method: 结合图像条件扩散模型InstructPix2Pix与NeRF优化，通过迭代编辑输入图像并优化底层场景参数实现指令驱动的三维场景编辑。
AI.result: 成功编辑大规模真实场景，生成效果比现有方法更真实且符合指令要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为指令驱动的三维场景编辑提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: David Chanin
title: Open-source Frame Semantic Parsing
title_zh: 开源框架语义解析
abstract: While the state-of-the-art for frame semantic parsing has progressed dramatically in recent years, it is still difficult for end-users to apply state-of-the-art models in practice. To address this, we present Frame Semantic Transformer, an open-source Python library which achieves near state-of-the-art performance on FrameNet 1.7, while focusing on ease-of-use. We use a T5 model fine-tuned on Propbank and FrameNet exemplars as a base, and improve performance by using FrameNet lexical units to provide hints to T5 at inference time. We enhance robustness to real-world data by using textual data augmentations during training.
summary: While the state-of-the-art for frame semantic parsing has progressed dramatically in recent years, it is still difficult for end-users to apply state-of-the-art models in practice. To address this, we present Frame Semantic Transformer, an open-source Python library which achieves near state-of-the-art performance on FrameNet 1.7, while focusing on ease-of-use. We use a T5 model fine-tuned on Propbank and FrameNet exemplars as a base, and improve performance by using FrameNet lexical units to provide hints to T5 at inference time. We enhance robustness to real-world data by using textual data augmentations during training.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来最先进的帧语义解析取得了巨大进步，但最终用户在实践中应用最先进的模型仍然很困难。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Frame Semantic Transformer，这是一个开源 Python 库，它在 FrameNet 1.7 上实现了近乎最先进的性能，同时注重易用性。我们使用在 Propbank 和 FrameNet 示例上微调的 T5 模型作为基础，并通过使用 FrameNet 词汇单元在推理时向 T5 提供提示来提高性能。我们通过在训练期间使用文本数据增强来增强对现实世界数据的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 开发一个开源的框架语义解析库，解决实际应用中模型使用困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的框架语义解析模型难以被终端用户实际应用，需要更易用且高效的工具。
AI.method: 基于微调的T5模型，结合FrameNet词库单元提示，并通过文本数据增强提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在FrameNet 1.7数据集上达到接近最先进水平的性能，同时提升易用性与真实数据适应性。
AI.conclusion: 开源库为实际应用提供了高效易用的框架语义解析方案，推动相关技术发展。

authors_text: Hansheng Chen,Wei Tian,Pichao Wang,Fan Wang,Lu Xiong,Hao Li
title: EPro-PnP: Generalized End-to-End Probabilistic Perspective-n-Points for Monocular Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: EPro-PnP：用于单目物体姿态估计的广义端到端概率透视 n 点
comment: Code available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2. Revised and fixed typos. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.13254
comments: Code available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2. Revised and fixed typos. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.13254
abstract: Locating 3D objects from a single RGB image via Perspective-n-Point (PnP) is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, allowing for partial learning of 2D-3D point correspondences by backpropagating the gradients of pose loss. Yet, learning the entire correspondences from scratch is highly challenging, particularly for ambiguous pose solutions, where the globally optimal pose is theoretically non-differentiable w.r.t. the points. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose with differentiable probability density on the SE(3) manifold. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle generalizes previous approaches, and resembles the attention mechanism. EPro-PnP can enhance existing correspondence networks, closing the gap between PnP-based method and the task-specific leaders on the LineMOD 6DoF pose estimation benchmark. Furthermore, EPro-PnP helps to explore new possibilities of network design, as we demonstrate a novel deformable correspondence network with the state-of-the-art pose accuracy on the nuScenes 3D object detection benchmark. Our code is available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2.
summary: Locating 3D objects from a single RGB image via Perspective-n-Point (PnP) is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, allowing for partial learning of 2D-3D point correspondences by backpropagating the gradients of pose loss. Yet, learning the entire correspondences from scratch is highly challenging, particularly for ambiguous pose solutions, where the globally optimal pose is theoretically non-differentiable w.r.t. the points. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose with differentiable probability density on the SE(3) manifold. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle generalizes previous approaches, and resembles the attention mechanism. EPro-PnP can enhance existing correspondence networks, closing the gap between PnP-based method and the task-specific leaders on the LineMOD 6DoF pose estimation benchmark. Furthermore, EPro-PnP helps to explore new possibilities of network design, as we demonstrate a novel deformable correspondence network with the state-of-the-art pose accuracy on the nuScenes 3D object detection benchmark. Our code is available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2.
abstract_zh: 通过透视 n 点 (PnP) 从单个 RGB 图像中定位 3D 对象是计算机视觉中长期存在的问题。在端到端深度学习的推动下，最近的研究建议将 PnP 解释为可微层，允许通过反向传播姿态损失的梯度来部分学习 2D-3D 点对应关系。然而，从头开始学习整个对应关系非常具有挑战性，特别是对于模糊的姿势解决方案，其中全局最佳姿势理论上是不可微分的。点。在本文中，我们提出了 EPro-PnP，这是一种用于一般端到端姿态估计的概率 PnP 层，它输出在 SE(3) 流形上具有可微概率密度的姿态分布。 2D-3D 坐标和相应的权重被视为通过最小化预测姿态分布和目标姿态分布之间的 KL 散度来学习的中间变量。基本原理概括了以前的方法，并且类似于注意力机制。 EPro-PnP 可以增强现有的对应网络，缩小基于 PnP 的方法与 LineMOD 6DoF 位姿估计基准上特定任务领先者之间的差距。此外，EPro-PnP 有助于探索网络设计的新可能性，因为我们在 nuScenes 3D 对象检测基准上展示了一种具有最先进姿势精度的新型可变形对应网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPro-PnP，一种基于概率视角的端到端单目物体姿态估计方法，通过概率密度分布优化3D-2D点对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP方法在处理模糊姿态时存在全局最优解不可微的问题，且从头学习对应关系具有挑战性，需改进现有方法以提升姿态估计精度。
AI.method: 设计概率PnP层，在SE(3)流形上输出姿态分布，通过最小化预测与目标姿态分布的KL散度学习中间变量，结合注意力机制优化对应关系。
AI.result: 在LineMOD基准上缩小了PnP方法与任务专用模型的差距，并在nuScenes基准中通过可变形对应网络达到最先进的姿态精度。
AI.conclusion: EPro-PnP通过概率建模和可微分优化提升了单目姿态估计性能，为网络设计提供了新思路并验证了有效性。

search_text: EPro-PnP: Generalized End-to-End Probabilistic Perspective-n-Points for Monocular Object Pose Estimation EPro-PnP：用于单目物体姿态估计的广义端到端概率透视 n 点 Locating 3D objects from a single RGB image via Perspective-n-Point (PnP) is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, allowing for partial learning of 2D-3D point correspondences by backpropagating the gradients of pose loss. Yet, learning the entire correspondences from scratch is highly challenging, particularly for ambiguous pose solutions, where the globally optimal pose is theoretically non-differentiable w.r.t. the points. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose with differentiable probability density on the SE(3) manifold. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle generalizes previous approaches, and resembles the attention mechanism. EPro-PnP can enhance existing correspondence networks, closing the gap between PnP-based method and the task-specific leaders on the LineMOD 6DoF pose estimation benchmark. Furthermore, EPro-PnP helps to explore new possibilities of network design, as we demonstrate a novel deformable correspondence network with the state-of-the-art pose accuracy on the nuScenes 3D object detection benchmark. Our code is available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2. 通过透视 n 点 (PnP) 从单个 RGB 图像中定位 3D 对象是计算机视觉中长期存在的问题。在端到端深度学习的推动下，最近的研究建议将 PnP 解释为可微层，允许通过反向传播姿态损失的梯度来部分学习 2D-3D 点对应关系。然而，从头开始学习整个对应关系非常具有挑战性，特别是对于模糊的姿势解决方案，其中全局最佳姿势理论上是不可微分的。点。在本文中，我们提出了 EPro-PnP，这是一种用于一般端到端姿态估计的概率 PnP 层，它输出在 SE(3) 流形上具有可微概率密度的姿态分布。 2D-3D 坐标和相应的权重被视为通过最小化预测姿态分布和目标姿态分布之间的 KL 散度来学习的中间变量。基本原理概括了以前的方法，并且类似于注意力机制。 EPro-PnP 可以增强现有的对应网络，缩小基于 PnP 的方法与 LineMOD 6DoF 位姿估计基准上特定任务领先者之间的差距。此外，EPro-PnP 有助于探索网络设计的新可能性，因为我们在 nuScenes 3D 对象检测基准上展示了一种具有最先进姿势精度的新型可变形对应网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP-v2 获取。 本文提出EPro-PnP，一种基于概率视角的端到端单目物体姿态估计方法，通过概率密度分布优化3D-2D点对应关系。 Hansheng Chen,Wei Tian,Pichao Wang,Fan Wang,Lu Xiong,Hao Li cs.CV

authors_text: Jianglong Ye,Naiyan Wang,Xiaolong Wang
title: FeatureNeRF: Learning Generalizable NeRFs by Distilling Foundation Models
title_zh: FeatureNeRF：通过提炼基础模型来学习可推广的 NeRF
comment: Project page: https://jianglongye.com/featurenerf/
comments: Project page: https://jianglongye.com/featurenerf/
abstract: Recent works on generalizable NeRFs have shown promising results on novel view synthesis from single or few images. However, such models have rarely been applied on other downstream tasks beyond synthesis such as semantic understanding and parsing. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named FeatureNeRF to learn generalizable NeRFs by distilling pre-trained vision foundation models (e.g., DINO, Latent Diffusion). FeatureNeRF leverages 2D pre-trained foundation models to 3D space via neural rendering, and then extract deep features for 3D query points from NeRF MLPs. Consequently, it allows to map 2D images to continuous 3D semantic feature volumes, which can be used for various downstream tasks. We evaluate FeatureNeRF on tasks of 2D/3D semantic keypoint transfer and 2D/3D object part segmentation. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of FeatureNeRF as a generalizable 3D semantic feature extractor. Our project page is available at https://jianglongye.com/featurenerf/ .
summary: Recent works on generalizable NeRFs have shown promising results on novel view synthesis from single or few images. However, such models have rarely been applied on other downstream tasks beyond synthesis such as semantic understanding and parsing. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named FeatureNeRF to learn generalizable NeRFs by distilling pre-trained vision foundation models (e.g., DINO, Latent Diffusion). FeatureNeRF leverages 2D pre-trained foundation models to 3D space via neural rendering, and then extract deep features for 3D query points from NeRF MLPs. Consequently, it allows to map 2D images to continuous 3D semantic feature volumes, which can be used for various downstream tasks. We evaluate FeatureNeRF on tasks of 2D/3D semantic keypoint transfer and 2D/3D object part segmentation. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of FeatureNeRF as a generalizable 3D semantic feature extractor. Our project page is available at https://jianglongye.com/featurenerf/ .
abstract_zh: 最近关于可泛化 NeRF 的工作在从单个或少数图像合成新视图方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，此类模型很少应用于语义理解和解析等综合之外的其他下游任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FeatureNeRF 的新颖框架，通过提炼预先训练的视觉基础模型（例如 DINO、潜在扩散）来学习可泛化的 NeRF。 FeatureNeRF 通过神经渲染将 2D 预训练基础模型利用到 3D 空间，然后从 NeRF MLP 中提取 3D 查询点的深层特征。因此，它允许将 2D 图像映射到连续的 3D 语义特征量，这可用于各种下游任务。我们在 2D/3D 语义关键点转移和 2D/3D 对象部分分割任务上评估了 FeatureNeRF。我们广泛的实验证明了FeatureNeRF作为通用3D语义特征提取器的有效性。我们的项目页面位于 https://jianlongye.com/featurenerf/ 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FeatureNeRF框架，通过蒸馏预训练视觉基础模型，学习可泛化的3D语义特征，用于多种下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF模型主要聚焦于新视角合成，缺乏对语义理解等下游任务的泛化能力，需探索更通用的3D特征学习方法。
AI.method: 利用预训练2D模型（如DINO）通过神经渲染映射到3D空间，从NeRF MLP中提取3D查询点的深度特征，构建连续语义特征体。
AI.result: 在2D/3D语义关键点迁移和物体部分分割任务中验证了FeatureNeRF作为通用3D语义特征提取器的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FeatureNeRF通过蒸馏基础模型实现了可泛化的3D语义特征学习，为多任务应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: François Ged,Maria Han Veiga
title: Matryoshka Policy Gradient for Entropy-Regularized RL: Convergence and Global Optimality
title_zh: 熵正则强化学习的套娃策略梯度：收敛性和全局最优性
comment: :68T07ACM Class:I.2.0; I.2.6
comments: :68T07ACM Class:I.2.0; I.2.6
abstract: A novel Policy Gradient (PG) algorithm, called $\textit{Matryoshka Policy Gradient}$ (MPG), is introduced and studied, in the context of fixed-horizon max-entropy reinforcement learning, where an agent aims at maximizing entropy bonuses additional to its cumulative rewards. In the linear function approximation setting with softmax policies, we prove uniqueness and characterize the optimal policy of the entropy regularized objective, together with global convergence of MPG. These results are proved in the case of continuous state and action space. MPG is intuitive, theoretically sound and we furthermore show that the optimal policy of the infinite horizon max-entropy objective can be approximated arbitrarily well by the optimal policy of the MPG framework. Finally, we provide a criterion for global optimality when the policy is parametrized by a neural network in terms of the neural tangent kernel at convergence. As a proof of concept, we evaluate numerically MPG on standard test benchmarks.
summary: A novel Policy Gradient (PG) algorithm, called $\textit{Matryoshka Policy Gradient}$ (MPG), is introduced and studied, in the context of fixed-horizon max-entropy reinforcement learning, where an agent aims at maximizing entropy bonuses additional to its cumulative rewards. In the linear function approximation setting with softmax policies, we prove uniqueness and characterize the optimal policy of the entropy regularized objective, together with global convergence of MPG. These results are proved in the case of continuous state and action space. MPG is intuitive, theoretically sound and we furthermore show that the optimal policy of the infinite horizon max-entropy objective can be approximated arbitrarily well by the optimal policy of the MPG framework. Finally, we provide a criterion for global optimality when the policy is parametrized by a neural network in terms of the neural tangent kernel at convergence. As a proof of concept, we evaluate numerically MPG on standard test benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在固定范围最大熵强化学习的背景下，引入并研究了一种新颖的策略梯度（PG）算法，称为 $\textit{Matryoshka 策略梯度}$ (MPG)，其中代理的目标是在其累积奖励之外最大化熵奖励。在使用 softmax 策略的线性函数逼近设置中，我们证明了唯一性并描述了熵正则化目标的最优策略以及 MPG 的全局收敛。这些结果在状态和动作空间连续的情况下得到了证明。 MPG 是直观的，理论上是合理的，我们还表明，无限视野最大熵目标的最优策略可以通过 MPG 框架的最优策略任意很好地逼近。最后，当神经网络根据收敛时的神经正切核对策略进行参数化时，我们提供了全局最优性的标准。作为概念验证，我们在标准测试基准上对 MPG 进行数值评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Matryoshka Policy Gradient (MPG)的新策略梯度算法，用于固定时间范围的最大熵强化学习问题，旨在通过最大化熵奖励与累积回报的组合来优化策略。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度方法在连续状态和动作空间中可能存在收敛性与全局最优性问题，而熵正则化能提升探索效率，但缺乏理论保证。本文旨在设计一种兼具理论分析与实际效果的算法。
AI.method: 在软最大策略与线性函数逼近框架下，通过熵正则化目标函数的唯一性证明与全局收敛性分析，结合神经切线核理论，提出MPG算法并验证其在无限时间范围目标下的逼近能力。
AI.result: 证明了MPG在连续空间中的全局收敛性与最优策略唯一性，展示了其对无限时间范围目标的任意精度逼近能力，并通过数值实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: MPG算法在理论保证与实践性能上均表现优异，为熵正则化强化学习提供了新的分析框架与实现方法。

ai_content_json.conclusion: MPG算法在理论保证与实践性能上均表现优异，为熵正则化强化学习提供了新的分析框架与实现方法。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Matryoshka Policy Gradient (MPG)的新策略梯度算法，用于固定时间范围的最大熵强化学习问题，旨在通过最大化熵奖励与累积回报的组合来优化策略。
motivation: 传统策略梯度方法在连续状态和动作空间中可能存在收敛性与全局最优性问题，而熵正则化能提升探索效率，但缺乏理论保证。本文旨在设计一种兼具理论分析与实际效果的算法。
method: 在软最大策略与线性函数逼近框架下，通过熵正则化目标函数的唯一性证明与全局收敛性分析，结合神经切线核理论，提出MPG算法并验证其在无限时间范围目标下的逼近能力。
result: 证明了MPG在连续空间中的全局收敛性与最优策略唯一性，展示了其对无限时间范围目标的任意精度逼近能力，并通过数值实验验证了算法有效性。
conclusion: MPG算法在理论保证与实践性能上均表现优异，为熵正则化强化学习提供了新的分析框架与实现方法。
search_text: Matryoshka Policy Gradient for Entropy-Regularized RL: Convergence and Global Optimality 熵正则强化学习的套娃策略梯度：收敛性和全局最优性 A novel Policy Gradient (PG) algorithm, called $\textit{Matryoshka Policy Gradient}$ (MPG), is introduced and studied, in the context of fixed-horizon max-entropy reinforcement learning, where an agent aims at maximizing entropy bonuses additional to its cumulative rewards. In the linear function approximation setting with softmax policies, we prove uniqueness and characterize the optimal policy of the entropy regularized objective, together with global convergence of MPG. These results are proved in the case of continuous state and action space. MPG is intuitive, theoretically sound and we furthermore show that the optimal policy of the infinite horizon max-entropy objective can be approximated arbitrarily well by the optimal policy of the MPG framework. Finally, we provide a criterion for global optimality when the policy is parametrized by a neural network in terms of the neural tangent kernel at convergence. As a proof of concept, we evaluate numerically MPG on standard test benchmarks. 在固定范围最大熵强化学习的背景下，引入并研究了一种新颖的策略梯度（PG）算法，称为 $\textit{Matryoshka 策略梯度}$ (MPG)，其中代理的目标是在其累积奖励之外最大化熵奖励。在使用 softmax 策略的线性函数逼近设置中，我们证明了唯一性并描述了熵正则化目标的最优策略以及 MPG 的全局收敛。这些结果在状态和动作空间连续的情况下得到了证明。 MPG 是直观的，理论上是合理的，我们还表明，无限视野最大熵目标的最优策略可以通过 MPG 框架的最优策略任意很好地逼近。最后，当神经网络根据收敛时的神经正切核对策略进行参数化时，我们提供了全局最优性的标准。作为概念验证，我们在标准测试基准上对 MPG 进行数值评估。 本文提出了一种名为Matryoshka Policy Gradient (MPG)的新策略梯度算法，用于固定时间范围的最大熵强化学习问题，旨在通过最大化熵奖励与累积回报的组合来优化策略。 François Ged,Maria Han Veiga cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Andreas Auer,Martin Gauch,Daniel Klotz,Sepp Hochreiter
title: Conformal Prediction for Time Series with Modern Hopfield Networks
title_zh: 使用现代 Hopfield 网络对时间序列进行共形预测
comment: presented at NeurIPS 2023
comments: presented at NeurIPS 2023
abstract: To quantify uncertainty, conformal prediction methods are gaining continuously more interest and have already been successfully applied to various domains. However, they are difficult to apply to time series as the autocorrelative structure of time series violates basic assumptions required by conformal prediction. We propose HopCPT, a novel conformal prediction approach for time series that not only copes with temporal structures but leverages them. We show that our approach is theoretically well justified for time series where temporal dependencies are present. In experiments, we demonstrate that our new approach outperforms state-of-the-art conformal prediction methods on multiple real-world time series datasets from four different domains.
summary: To quantify uncertainty, conformal prediction methods are gaining continuously more interest and have already been successfully applied to various domains. However, they are difficult to apply to time series as the autocorrelative structure of time series violates basic assumptions required by conformal prediction. We propose HopCPT, a novel conformal prediction approach for time series that not only copes with temporal structures but leverages them. We show that our approach is theoretically well justified for time series where temporal dependencies are present. In experiments, we demonstrate that our new approach outperforms state-of-the-art conformal prediction methods on multiple real-world time series datasets from four different domains.
abstract_zh: 为了量化不确定性，共形预测方法越来越受到人们的关注，并已成功应用于各个领域。然而，它们很难应用于时间序列，因为时间序列的自相关结构违反了共形预测所需的基本假设。我们提出了 HopCPT，一种新颖的时间序列保形预测方法，它不仅可以处理时间结构，而且可以利用它们。我们表明，我们的方法在理论上对于存在时间依赖性的时间序列是合理的。在实验中，我们证明我们的新方法在来自四个不同领域的多个真实时间序列数据集上优于最先进的保形预测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HopCPT方法，利用现代霍普菲尔德网络解决时间序列的符合预测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统符合预测方法难以处理时间序列的自相关结构，导致无法准确量化预测不确定性。
AI.method: 设计基于现代霍普菲尔德网络的HopCPT框架，通过建模时间序列的时序依赖性改进符合预测。
AI.result: 在四个领域的真实时间序列数据集上，HopCPT显著优于现有最先进符合预测方法。
AI.conclusion: HopCPT理论成立且有效，为时间序列预测不确定性量化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiangtai Li,Haobo Yuan,Wenwei Zhang,Guangliang Cheng,Jiangmiao Pang,Chen Change Loy
title: Tube-Link: A Flexible Cross Tube Framework for Universal Video Segmentation
title_zh: Tube-Link：用于通用视频分割的灵活交叉管框架
comment: ICCV-2023, Project page: https://github.com/lxtGH/Tube-Link (fix typos and errors, update the results)
comments: ICCV-2023, Project page: https://github.com/lxtGH/Tube-Link (fix typos and errors, update the results)
abstract: Video segmentation aims to segment and track every pixel in diverse scenarios accurately. In this paper, we present Tube-Link, a versatile framework that addresses multiple core tasks of video segmentation with a unified architecture. Our framework is a near-online approach that takes a short subclip as input and outputs the corresponding spatial-temporal tube masks. To enhance the modeling of cross-tube relationships, we propose an effective way to perform tube-level linking via attention along the queries. In addition, we introduce temporal contrastive learning to instance-wise discriminative features for tube-level association. Our approach offers flexibility and efficiency for both short and long video inputs, as the length of each subclip can be varied according to the needs of datasets or scenarios. Tube-Link outperforms existing specialized architectures by a significant margin on five video segmentation datasets. Specifically, it achieves almost 13% relative improvements on VIPSeg and 4% improvements on KITTI-STEP over the strong baseline Video K-Net. When using a ResNet50 backbone on Youtube-VIS-2019 and 2021, Tube-Link boosts IDOL by 3% and 4%, respectively.
summary: Video segmentation aims to segment and track every pixel in diverse scenarios accurately. In this paper, we present Tube-Link, a versatile framework that addresses multiple core tasks of video segmentation with a unified architecture. Our framework is a near-online approach that takes a short subclip as input and outputs the corresponding spatial-temporal tube masks. To enhance the modeling of cross-tube relationships, we propose an effective way to perform tube-level linking via attention along the queries. In addition, we introduce temporal contrastive learning to instance-wise discriminative features for tube-level association. Our approach offers flexibility and efficiency for both short and long video inputs, as the length of each subclip can be varied according to the needs of datasets or scenarios. Tube-Link outperforms existing specialized architectures by a significant margin on five video segmentation datasets. Specifically, it achieves almost 13% relative improvements on VIPSeg and 4% improvements on KITTI-STEP over the strong baseline Video K-Net. When using a ResNet50 backbone on Youtube-VIS-2019 and 2021, Tube-Link boosts IDOL by 3% and 4%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 视频分割旨在准确分割和跟踪不同场景中的每个像素。在本文中，我们提出了 Tube-Link，这是一个多功能框架，它通过统一的架构解决视频分割的多个核心任务。我们的框架是一种近在线方法，以短子剪辑作为输入并输出相应的时空管掩模。为了增强跨管关系的建模，我们提出了一种通过查询中的注意力来执行管级链接的有效方法。此外，我们将时间对比学习引入到实例区分特征中，以实现管级关联。我们的方法为短视频和长视频输入提供了灵活性和效率，因为每个子剪辑的长度可以根据数据集或场景的需要而变化。 Tube-Link 在五个视频分割数据集上明显优于现有的专用架构。具体而言，与强基线 Video K-Net 相比，它在 VIPSeg 上实现了近 13% 的相对改进，在 KITTI-STEP 上实现了 4% 的相对改进。当在 Youtube-VIS-2019 和 2021 上使用 ResNet50 主干网时，Tube-Link 将 IDOL 分别提升了 3% 和 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tube-Link框架，通过统一架构解决视频分割中的多任务问题，实现灵活高效的像素级分割与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割方法多为专用架构，缺乏对短长视频的适应性及跨管关联建模能力，难以兼顾效率与精度。
AI.method: 采用近线性处理方式，以短子片段为输入生成时空管状掩码；通过查询注意力机制实现跨管关联，并引入时序对比学习增强实例特征区分度。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上显著超越现有方法，VIPSeg相对提升13%，KITTI-STEP提升4%，并在Youtube-VIS上提升IDOL指标3%-4%。
AI.conclusion: Tube-Link通过灵活子片段长度设计与跨管关联建模，证明了其在多场景视频分割任务中的优越性与通用性。
