authors_text: Arjun Karpur,Guilherme Perrotta,Ricardo Martin-Brualla,Howard Zhou,André Araujo
title: LFM-3D: Learnable Feature Matching Across Wide Baselines Using 3D Signals
title_zh: LFM-3D：使用 3D 信号跨宽基线进行可学习的特征匹配
comment: 3DV 2024, oral paper
comments: 3DV 2024, oral paper
abstract: Finding localized correspondences across different images of the same object is crucial to understand its geometry. In recent years, this problem has seen remarkable progress with the advent of deep learning-based local image features and learnable matchers. Still, learnable matchers often underperform when there exists only small regions of co-visibility between image pairs (i.e. wide camera baselines). To address this problem, we leverage recent progress in coarse single-view geometry estimation methods. We propose LFM-3D, a Learnable Feature Matching framework that uses models based on graph neural networks and enhances their capabilities by integrating noisy, estimated 3D signals to boost correspondence estimation. When integrating 3D signals into the matcher model, we show that a suitable positional encoding is critical to effectively make use of the low-dimensional 3D information. We experiment with two different 3D signals - normalized object coordinates and monocular depth estimates - and evaluate our method on large-scale (synthetic and real) datasets containing object-centric image pairs across wide baselines. We observe strong feature matching improvements compared to 2D-only methods, with up to +6% total recall and +28% precision at fixed recall. Additionally, we demonstrate that the resulting improved correspondences lead to much higher relative posing accuracy for in-the-wild image pairs - up to 8.6% compared to the 2D-only approach.
summary: Finding localized correspondences across different images of the same object is crucial to understand its geometry. In recent years, this problem has seen remarkable progress with the advent of deep learning-based local image features and learnable matchers. Still, learnable matchers often underperform when there exists only small regions of co-visibility between image pairs (i.e. wide camera baselines). To address this problem, we leverage recent progress in coarse single-view geometry estimation methods. We propose LFM-3D, a Learnable Feature Matching framework that uses models based on graph neural networks and enhances their capabilities by integrating noisy, estimated 3D signals to boost correspondence estimation. When integrating 3D signals into the matcher model, we show that a suitable positional encoding is critical to effectively make use of the low-dimensional 3D information. We experiment with two different 3D signals - normalized object coordinates and monocular depth estimates - and evaluate our method on large-scale (synthetic and real) datasets containing object-centric image pairs across wide baselines. We observe strong feature matching improvements compared to 2D-only methods, with up to +6% total recall and +28% precision at fixed recall. Additionally, we demonstrate that the resulting improved correspondences lead to much higher relative posing accuracy for in-the-wild image pairs - up to 8.6% compared to the 2D-only approach.
abstract_zh: 找到同一物体不同图像之间的局部对应关系对于理解其几何形状至关重要。近年来，随着基于深度学习的局部图像特征和可学习匹配器的出现，这个问题取得了显着的进展。尽管如此，当图像对之间仅存在较小的共同可见区域（即宽的相机基线）时，可学习的匹配器通常表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们利用粗略单视图几何估计方法的最新进展。我们提出了 LFM-3D，这是一种可学习的特征匹配框架，它使用基于图神经网络的模型，并通过集成噪声、估计的 3D 信号来增强对应估计来增强其功能。当将 3D 信号集成到匹配器模型中时，我们表明合适的位置编码对于有效利用低维 3D 信息至关重要。我们使用两种不同的 3D 信号（标准化对象坐标和单眼深度估计）进行实验，并在包含跨宽基线的以对象为中心的图像对的大规模（合成和真实）数据集上评估我们的方法。我们观察到与纯 2D 方法相比，特征匹配有了显着的改进，总召回率高达 +6%，固定召回率的精确度高达 +28%。此外，我们证明，由此产生的改进的对应关系可以使野外图像对的相对姿势精度更高——与纯 2D 方法相比，最高可达 8.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LFM-3D框架，通过整合3D信号提升跨大基线图像的可学习特征匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可学习匹配器在图像对存在小区域共视（大基线）时表现不佳，需借助3D信息增强匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于图神经网络构建匹配模型，引入位置编码处理噪声3D信号（归一化物体坐标与单目深度估计）以优化对应关系估计。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上相较2D方法提升总召回率+6%、固定召回下精确率+28%，并使真实场景相对位姿精度提升8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 融合3D信号能显著提升大基线图像特征匹配性能，为复杂场景下的几何理解提供有效解决方案。

search_text: LFM-3D: Learnable Feature Matching Across Wide Baselines Using 3D Signals LFM-3D：使用 3D 信号跨宽基线进行可学习的特征匹配 Finding localized correspondences across different images of the same object is crucial to understand its geometry. In recent years, this problem has seen remarkable progress with the advent of deep learning-based local image features and learnable matchers. Still, learnable matchers often underperform when there exists only small regions of co-visibility between image pairs (i.e. wide camera baselines). To address this problem, we leverage recent progress in coarse single-view geometry estimation methods. We propose LFM-3D, a Learnable Feature Matching framework that uses models based on graph neural networks and enhances their capabilities by integrating noisy, estimated 3D signals to boost correspondence estimation. When integrating 3D signals into the matcher model, we show that a suitable positional encoding is critical to effectively make use of the low-dimensional 3D information. We experiment with two different 3D signals - normalized object coordinates and monocular depth estimates - and evaluate our method on large-scale (synthetic and real) datasets containing object-centric image pairs across wide baselines. We observe strong feature matching improvements compared to 2D-only methods, with up to +6% total recall and +28% precision at fixed recall. Additionally, we demonstrate that the resulting improved correspondences lead to much higher relative posing accuracy for in-the-wild image pairs - up to 8.6% compared to the 2D-only approach. 找到同一物体不同图像之间的局部对应关系对于理解其几何形状至关重要。近年来，随着基于深度学习的局部图像特征和可学习匹配器的出现，这个问题取得了显着的进展。尽管如此，当图像对之间仅存在较小的共同可见区域（即宽的相机基线）时，可学习的匹配器通常表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们利用粗略单视图几何估计方法的最新进展。我们提出了 LFM-3D，这是一种可学习的特征匹配框架，它使用基于图神经网络的模型，并通过集成噪声、估计的 3D 信号来增强对应估计来增强其功能。当将 3D 信号集成到匹配器模型中时，我们表明合适的位置编码对于有效利用低维 3D 信息至关重要。我们使用两种不同的 3D 信号（标准化对象坐标和单眼深度估计）进行实验，并在包含跨宽基线的以对象为中心的图像对的大规模（合成和真实）数据集上评估我们的方法。我们观察到与纯 2D 方法相比，特征匹配有了显着的改进，总召回率高达 +6%，固定召回率的精确度高达 +28%。此外，我们证明，由此产生的改进的对应关系可以使野外图像对的相对姿势精度更高——与纯 2D 方法相比，最高可达 8.6%。 本文提出LFM-3D框架，通过整合3D信号提升跨大基线图像的可学习特征匹配性能。 Arjun Karpur,Guilherme Perrotta,Ricardo Martin-Brualla,Howard Zhou,André Araujo cs.CV

authors_text: Shilong Zhang,Xinjiang Wang,Jiaqi Wang,Jiangmiao Pang,Chengqi Lyu,Wenwei Zhang,Ping Luo,Kai Chen
title: Dense Distinct Query for End-to-End Object Detection
title_zh: 用于端到端对象检测的密集独特查询
comment: Accepted to CVPR2023. Code has been released at https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ
comments: Accepted to CVPR2023. Code has been released at https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ
abstract: One-to-one label assignment in object detection has successfully obviated the need for non-maximum suppression (NMS) as postprocessing and makes the pipeline end-to-end. However, it triggers a new dilemma as the widely used sparse queries cannot guarantee a high recall, while dense queries inevitably bring more similar queries and encounter optimization difficulties. As both sparse and dense queries are problematic, then what are the expected queries in end-to-end object detection? This paper shows that the solution should be Dense Distinct Queries (DDQ). Concretely, we first lay dense queries like traditional detectors and then select distinct ones for one-to-one assignments. DDQ blends the advantages of traditional and recent end-to-end detectors and significantly improves the performance of various detectors including FCN, R-CNN, and DETRs. Most impressively, DDQ-DETR achieves 52.1 AP on MS-COCO dataset within 12 epochs using a ResNet-50 backbone, outperforming all existing detectors in the same setting. DDQ also shares the benefit of end-to-end detectors in crowded scenes and achieves 93.8 AP on CrowdHuman. We hope DDQ can inspire researchers to consider the complementarity between traditional methods and end-to-end detectors. The source code can be found at \url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ}.
summary: One-to-one label assignment in object detection has successfully obviated the need for non-maximum suppression (NMS) as postprocessing and makes the pipeline end-to-end. However, it triggers a new dilemma as the widely used sparse queries cannot guarantee a high recall, while dense queries inevitably bring more similar queries and encounter optimization difficulties. As both sparse and dense queries are problematic, then what are the expected queries in end-to-end object detection? This paper shows that the solution should be Dense Distinct Queries (DDQ). Concretely, we first lay dense queries like traditional detectors and then select distinct ones for one-to-one assignments. DDQ blends the advantages of traditional and recent end-to-end detectors and significantly improves the performance of various detectors including FCN, R-CNN, and DETRs. Most impressively, DDQ-DETR achieves 52.1 AP on MS-COCO dataset within 12 epochs using a ResNet-50 backbone, outperforming all existing detectors in the same setting. DDQ also shares the benefit of end-to-end detectors in crowded scenes and achieves 93.8 AP on CrowdHuman. We hope DDQ can inspire researchers to consider the complementarity between traditional methods and end-to-end detectors. The source code can be found at \url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ}.
abstract_zh: 目标检测中的一对一标签分配成功地消除了对非极大值抑制（NMS）作为后处理的需要，并使管道端到端。然而，这引发了新的困境，广泛使用的稀疏查询无法保证高召回率，而密集查询不可避免地会带来更多的相似查询并遇到优化困难。由于稀疏查询和密集查询都有问题，那么端到端对象检测中的预期查询是什么？本文表明解决方案应该是密集不同查询（DDQ）。具体来说，我们首先像传统检测器一样进行密集查询，然后选择不同的查询进行一对一分配。 DDQ 融合了传统和最新端到端检测器的优点，显着提高了包括 FCN、R-CNN 和 DETR 在内的各种检测器的性能。最令人印象深刻的是，DDQ-DETR 使用 ResNet-50 主干在 12 个 epoch 内在 MS-COCO 数据集上实现了 52.1 AP，优于相同设置下的所有现有检测器。 DDQ 还分享了端到端检测器在拥挤场景中的优势，并在 CrowdHuman 上获得了 93.8 AP。我们希望 DDQ 能够启发研究人员考虑传统方法和端到端检测器之间的互补性。源代码可以在\url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ}找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense Distinct Query (DDQ)的新方法，用于端到端目标检测，旨在解决传统稀疏查询和密集查询在性能和优化上的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端目标检测方法中，稀疏查询难以保证高召回率，而密集查询则存在优化困难的问题，因此需要一种新的查询策略来兼顾性能和效率。
AI.method: DDQ首先像传统检测器一样布置密集查询，然后从中选择出具有代表性的不同查询进行一对一的分配，结合了传统和端到端检测器的优点。
AI.result: DDQ方法在多个检测器（如FCN、R-CNN、DETR等）上均显著提升了性能，其中DDQ-DETR在MS-COCO数据集上使用ResNet-50主干网络仅需12个epoch即可达到52.1 AP，且在CrowdHuman数据集上达到93.8 AP。
AI.conclusion: DDQ方法展示了传统方法与端到端检测器之间互补性的潜力，为未来的研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Marco Calautti,Ester Livshits,Andreas Pieris,Markus Schneider
title: The Complexity of Why-Provenance for Datalog Queries
title_zh: 数据记录查询的原因来源的复杂性
abstract: Explaining why a database query result is obtained is an essential task towards the goal of Explainable AI, especially nowadays where expressive database query languages such as Datalog play a critical role in the development of ontology-based applications. A standard way of explaining a query result is the so-called why-provenance, which essentially provides information about the witnesses to a query result in the form of subsets of the input database that are sufficient to derive that result. To our surprise, despite the fact that the notion of why-provenance for Datalog queries has been around for decades and intensively studied, its computational complexity remains unexplored. The goal of this work is to fill this apparent gap in the why-provenance literature. Towards this end, we pinpoint the data complexity of why-provenance for Datalog queries and key subclasses thereof. The takeaway of our work is that why-provenance for recursive queries, even if the recursion is limited to be linear, is an intractable problem, whereas for non-recursive queries is highly tractable. Having said that, we experimentally confirm, by exploiting SAT solvers, that making why-provenance for (recursive) Datalog queries work in practice is not an unrealistic goal.
summary: Explaining why a database query result is obtained is an essential task towards the goal of Explainable AI, especially nowadays where expressive database query languages such as Datalog play a critical role in the development of ontology-based applications. A standard way of explaining a query result is the so-called why-provenance, which essentially provides information about the witnesses to a query result in the form of subsets of the input database that are sufficient to derive that result. To our surprise, despite the fact that the notion of why-provenance for Datalog queries has been around for decades and intensively studied, its computational complexity remains unexplored. The goal of this work is to fill this apparent gap in the why-provenance literature. Towards this end, we pinpoint the data complexity of why-provenance for Datalog queries and key subclasses thereof. The takeaway of our work is that why-provenance for recursive queries, even if the recursion is limited to be linear, is an intractable problem, whereas for non-recursive queries is highly tractable. Having said that, we experimentally confirm, by exploiting SAT solvers, that making why-provenance for (recursive) Datalog queries work in practice is not an unrealistic goal.
abstract_zh: 解释为什么获得数据库查询结果是实现可解释人工智能目标的一项重要任务，尤其是在当今，诸如 Datalog 等表达性数据库查询语言在基于本体的应用程序的开发中发挥着至关重要的作用。解释查询结果的标准方法是所谓的原因来源，它本质上以足以导出该结果的输入数据库子集的形式提供有关查询结果的证人的信息。令我们惊讶的是，尽管数据记录查询的原因来源概念已经存在了数十年并且得到了深入研究，但其计算复杂性仍未得到探索。这项工作的目标是填补原因来源文献中的这一明显空白。为此，我们查明了数据记录查询及其关键子类的原因来源的数据复杂性。我们工作的要点是，即使递归仅限于线性，递归查询的原因来源也是一个棘手的问题，而对于非递归查询则非常容易处理。话虽如此，我们通过利用 SAT 求解器通过实验确认，使（递归）数据记录查询的原因来源在实践中发挥作用并不是一个不切实际的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Datalog查询的why-provenance（原因溯源）计算复杂性，分析了递归与非递归查询的复杂度差异。
AI.motivation: 随着Datalog在本体应用中的重要性提升，解释查询结果的可解释性需求增加，但why-provenance的计算复杂性长期未被系统研究。
AI.method: 通过理论复杂度分析和SAT求解器实验，评估Datalog及其子类查询的why-provenance计算难度。
AI.result: 递归查询（即使线性递归）的why-provenance计算是难解问题，而非递归查询则高度可解；实验表明实际应用中可通过SAT求解器实现。
AI.conclusion: 尽管递归查询的理论复杂度高，但借助现有工具仍可实现实用化的why-provenance计算。

search_text: The Complexity of Why-Provenance for Datalog Queries 数据记录查询的原因来源的复杂性 Explaining why a database query result is obtained is an essential task towards the goal of Explainable AI, especially nowadays where expressive database query languages such as Datalog play a critical role in the development of ontology-based applications. A standard way of explaining a query result is the so-called why-provenance, which essentially provides information about the witnesses to a query result in the form of subsets of the input database that are sufficient to derive that result. To our surprise, despite the fact that the notion of why-provenance for Datalog queries has been around for decades and intensively studied, its computational complexity remains unexplored. The goal of this work is to fill this apparent gap in the why-provenance literature. Towards this end, we pinpoint the data complexity of why-provenance for Datalog queries and key subclasses thereof. The takeaway of our work is that why-provenance for recursive queries, even if the recursion is limited to be linear, is an intractable problem, whereas for non-recursive queries is highly tractable. Having said that, we experimentally confirm, by exploiting SAT solvers, that making why-provenance for (recursive) Datalog queries work in practice is not an unrealistic goal. 解释为什么获得数据库查询结果是实现可解释人工智能目标的一项重要任务，尤其是在当今，诸如 Datalog 等表达性数据库查询语言在基于本体的应用程序的开发中发挥着至关重要的作用。解释查询结果的标准方法是所谓的原因来源，它本质上以足以导出该结果的输入数据库子集的形式提供有关查询结果的证人的信息。令我们惊讶的是，尽管数据记录查询的原因来源概念已经存在了数十年并且得到了深入研究，但其计算复杂性仍未得到探索。这项工作的目标是填补原因来源文献中的这一明显空白。为此，我们查明了数据记录查询及其关键子类的原因来源的数据复杂性。我们工作的要点是，即使递归仅限于线性，递归查询的原因来源也是一个棘手的问题，而对于非递归查询则非常容易处理。话虽如此，我们通过利用 SAT 求解器通过实验确认，使（递归）数据记录查询的原因来源在实践中发挥作用并不是一个不切实际的目标。 本文研究了Datalog查询的why-provenance（原因溯源）计算复杂性，分析了递归与非递归查询的复杂度差异。 Marco Calautti,Ester Livshits,Andreas Pieris,Markus Schneider cs.DB,cs.AI

authors_text: Ramisa Anan,Tasnim Sakib Apon,Zeba Tahsin Hossain,Elizabeth Antora Modhu,Sudipta Mondal,MD. Golam Rabiul Alam
title: Interpretable Bangla Sarcasm Detection using BERT and Explainable AI
title_zh: 使用 BERT 和可解释的人工智能进行可解释的孟加拉讽刺检测
abstract: A positive phrase or a sentence with an underlying negative motive is usually defined as sarcasm that is widely used in today's social media platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, Reddit, etc. In recent times active users in social media platforms are increasing dramatically which raises the need for an automated NLP-based system that can be utilized in various tasks such as determining market demand, sentiment analysis, threat detection, etc. However, since sarcasm usually implies the opposite meaning and its detection is frequently a challenging issue, data meaning extraction through an NLP-based model becomes more complicated. As a result, there has been a lot of study on sarcasm detection in English over the past several years, and there's been a noticeable improvement and yet sarcasm detection in the Bangla language's state remains the same. In this article, we present a BERT-based system that can achieve 99.60\% while the utilized traditional machine learning algorithms are only capable of achieving 89.93\%. Additionally, we have employed Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations that introduce explainability to our system. Moreover, we have utilized a newly collected bangla sarcasm dataset, BanglaSarc that was constructed specifically for the evaluation of this study. This dataset consists of fresh records of sarcastic and non-sarcastic comments, the majority of which are acquired from Facebook and YouTube comment sections.
summary: A positive phrase or a sentence with an underlying negative motive is usually defined as sarcasm that is widely used in today's social media platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, Reddit, etc. In recent times active users in social media platforms are increasing dramatically which raises the need for an automated NLP-based system that can be utilized in various tasks such as determining market demand, sentiment analysis, threat detection, etc. However, since sarcasm usually implies the opposite meaning and its detection is frequently a challenging issue, data meaning extraction through an NLP-based model becomes more complicated. As a result, there has been a lot of study on sarcasm detection in English over the past several years, and there's been a noticeable improvement and yet sarcasm detection in the Bangla language's state remains the same. In this article, we present a BERT-based system that can achieve 99.60\% while the utilized traditional machine learning algorithms are only capable of achieving 89.93\%. Additionally, we have employed Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations that introduce explainability to our system. Moreover, we have utilized a newly collected bangla sarcasm dataset, BanglaSarc that was constructed specifically for the evaluation of this study. This dataset consists of fresh records of sarcastic and non-sarcastic comments, the majority of which are acquired from Facebook and YouTube comment sections.
abstract_zh: 带有潜在负面动机的积极短语或句子通常被定义为讽刺，在当今的社交媒体平台（如 Facebook、Twitter、Reddit 等）中广泛使用。近年来，社交媒体平台上的活跃用户急剧增加，这提出了对基于 NLP 的自动化系统的需求，该系统可用于各种任务，例如确定市场需求、情绪分析、威胁检测等。然而，由于讽刺通常意味着相反的含义，并且其检测通常是一个具有挑战性的问题，因此通过基于 NLP 的模型变得更加复杂。因此，在过去的几年里，人们对英语中的讽刺检测进行了大量的研究，并且有了明显的改进，但孟加拉语中的讽刺检测仍然保持不变。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于 BERT 的系统，可以达到 99.60%，而使用的传统机器学习算法只能达到 89.93%。此外，我们还采用了本地可解释的与模型无关的解释，为我们的系统引入了可解释性。此外，我们还利用了新收集的孟加拉讽刺数据集 BanglaSarc，该数据集是专门为评估本研究而构建的。该数据集由讽刺和非讽刺评论的新记录组成，其中大部分来自 Facebook 和 YouTube 评论部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT和可解释AI的孟加拉语讽刺检测系统，并构建了专用数据集BanglaSarc。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中孟加拉语讽刺检测需求增长，但传统方法效果有限且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 采用BERT模型结合LIME解释框架，使用新收集的BanglaSarc数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: BERT模型达到99.60%准确率，显著优于传统机器学习方法的89.93%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升了孟加拉语讽刺检测性能，并通过可解释性分析增强了模型可信度。

authors_text: Zihan Tan,Tianyi Zhang
title: Almost-Optimal Sublinear Additive Spanners
title_zh: 几乎最优的次线性加法扳手
abstract: Given an undirected unweighted graph $G = (V, E)$ on $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, a subgraph $H\subseteq G$ is a spanner of $G$ with stretch function $f: \mathbb{R}_+ \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_+$, if for every pair $s, t$ of vertices in $V$, $\text{dist}_{H}(s, t)\le f(\text{dist}_{G}(s, t))$. When $f(d) = d + o(d)$, $H$ is called a sublinear additive spanner; when $f(d) = d + o(n)$, $H$ is called an \emph{additive spanner}, and $f(d) - d$ is usually called the \emph{additive stretch} of $H$. As our primary result, we show that for any constant $δ>0$ and constant integer $k\geq 2$, every graph on $n$ vertices has a sublinear additive spanner with stretch function $f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\big(n^{1+\frac{1+δ}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ edges. When $k = 2$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1/2})$ and $\tilde{O}(n^{1+3/17})$ edges; for any constant integer $k\geq 3$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\bigg(n^{1+\frac{(3/4)^{k-2}}{7 - 2\cdot (3/4)^{k-2}}}\bigg)$ edges. Most importantly, the size of our spanners almost matches the lower bound of $Ω\big(n^{1+\frac{1}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$, which holds for all compression schemes achieving the same stretch function. As our second result, we show a new construction of additive spanners with stretch $O(n^{0.403})$ and $\tilde{O}(n)$ edges, which slightly improves upon the previous stretch bound of $O(n^{3/7+\varepsilon})$ achieved by linear-size spanners. An additional advantage of our spanner is that it admits a subquadratic construction runtime of $\tilde{O}(m + n^{13/7})$, while the previous construction requires all-pairs shortest paths computation which takes $O(\min\{mn, n^{2.373}\})$ time.
summary: Given an undirected unweighted graph $G = (V, E)$ on $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, a subgraph $H\subseteq G$ is a spanner of $G$ with stretch function $f: \mathbb{R}_+ \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_+$, if for every pair $s, t$ of vertices in $V$, $\text{dist}_{H}(s, t)\le f(\text{dist}_{G}(s, t))$. When $f(d) = d + o(d)$, $H$ is called a sublinear additive spanner; when $f(d) = d + o(n)$, $H$ is called an \emph{additive spanner}, and $f(d) - d$ is usually called the \emph{additive stretch} of $H$. As our primary result, we show that for any constant $δ>0$ and constant integer $k\geq 2$, every graph on $n$ vertices has a sublinear additive spanner with stretch function $f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\big(n^{1+\frac{1+δ}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ edges. When $k = 2$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1/2})$ and $\tilde{O}(n^{1+3/17})$ edges; for any constant integer $k\geq 3$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\bigg(n^{1+\frac{(3/4)^{k-2}}{7 - 2\cdot (3/4)^{k-2}}}\bigg)$ edges. Most importantly, the size of our spanners almost matches the lower bound of $Ω\big(n^{1+\frac{1}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$, which holds for all compression schemes achieving the same stretch function. As our second result, we show a new construction of additive spanners with stretch $O(n^{0.403})$ and $\tilde{O}(n)$ edges, which slightly improves upon the previous stretch bound of $O(n^{3/7+\varepsilon})$ achieved by linear-size spanners. An additional advantage of our spanner is that it admits a subquadratic construction runtime of $\tilde{O}(m + n^{13/7})$, while the previous construction requires all-pairs shortest paths computation which takes $O(\min\{mn, n^{2.373}\})$ time.
abstract_zh: 给定 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边上的无向无权图 $G = (V, E)$，子图 $H\subseteq G$ 是 $G$ 的一个带有拉伸函数 $f 的扳手：\mathbb{R}_+ \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_+$，如果对于 $V$ 中的每对 $s, t$ 顶点，$\text{dist}_{H}(s, t)\le f(\text{dist}_{G}(s, t))$。当$f(d) = d + o(d)$时，$H$称为次线性加性扳手；当$f(d) = d + o(n)$时，$H$被称为\emph{加法扳手}，而$f(d) - d$通常被称为$H$的\emph{加法拉伸}。作为我们的主要结果，我们表明，对于任何常数 $δ>0$ 和常数整数 $k\geq 2$，$n$ 顶点上的每个图都有一个次线性加法扳手，其拉伸函数 $f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})$ 和 $O\big(n^{1+\frac{1+δ}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ 边。当 $k = 2$ 时，这改进了之前带有拉伸函数 $f(d) = d + O(d^{1/2})$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n^{1+3/17})$ 边的扳手构造；对于任何常量整数 $k\geq 3$，这改进了之前使用拉伸函数 $f(d) = d + O(d^{1-1/k})$ 和 $O\bigg(n^{1+\frac{(3/4)^{k-2}}{7 - 2\cdot (3/4)^{k-2}}}\bigg)$ 边的扳手构造。最重要的是，我们的扳手的大小几乎匹配 $Ω\big(n^{1+\frac{1}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ 的下限，这适用于实现相同拉伸功能的所有压缩方案。作为我们的第二个结果，我们展示了一种具有拉伸 $O(n^{0.403})$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 边的加法扳手的新构造，这稍微改进了之前通过线性尺寸扳手实现的 $O(n^{3/7+\varepsilon})$ 拉伸界限。我们的扳手的另一个优点是它允许次二次构造运行时间为 $\tilde{O}(m + n^{13/7})$，而之前的构造需要全对最短路径计算，这需要 $O(\min\{mn, n^{2.373}\})$ 时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无向无权图的子线性加法spanner的构造，旨在以更少的边数实现更优的拉伸函数。
AI.motivation: 传统的spanner构造在边数和拉伸函数之间存在权衡，本文旨在突破现有下界，提供接近最优的子线性加法spanner。
AI.method: 通过设计新的分层抽样与连接策略，结合参数k的递归优化，构造满足特定拉伸函数的spanner，并分析其边数与运行时间复杂度。
AI.result: 对于任意常数k≥2，构造出边数为O(n^{1+(1+δ)/(2^{k+1}-1)})且拉伸函数为f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})的spanner，同时提出边数为~O(n)且拉伸O(n^{0.403})的新构造方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文的spanner构造在边数和拉伸函数上均接近理论下界，为图的压缩与近似算法提供了更高效的工具。

search_text: Almost-Optimal Sublinear Additive Spanners 几乎最优的次线性加法扳手 Given an undirected unweighted graph $G = (V, E)$ on $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, a subgraph $H\subseteq G$ is a spanner of $G$ with stretch function $f: \mathbb{R}_+ \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_+$, if for every pair $s, t$ of vertices in $V$, $\text{dist}_{H}(s, t)\le f(\text{dist}_{G}(s, t))$. When $f(d) = d + o(d)$, $H$ is called a sublinear additive spanner; when $f(d) = d + o(n)$, $H$ is called an \emph{additive spanner}, and $f(d) - d$ is usually called the \emph{additive stretch} of $H$. As our primary result, we show that for any constant $δ>0$ and constant integer $k\geq 2$, every graph on $n$ vertices has a sublinear additive spanner with stretch function $f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\big(n^{1+\frac{1+δ}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ edges. When $k = 2$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1/2})$ and $\tilde{O}(n^{1+3/17})$ edges; for any constant integer $k\geq 3$, this improves upon the previous spanner construction with stretch function $f(d) = d + O(d^{1-1/k})$ and $O\bigg(n^{1+\frac{(3/4)^{k-2}}{7 - 2\cdot (3/4)^{k-2}}}\bigg)$ edges. Most importantly, the size of our spanners almost matches the lower bound of $Ω\big(n^{1+\frac{1}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$, which holds for all compression schemes achieving the same stretch function. As our second result, we show a new construction of additive spanners with stretch $O(n^{0.403})$ and $\tilde{O}(n)$ edges, which slightly improves upon the previous stretch bound of $O(n^{3/7+\varepsilon})$ achieved by linear-size spanners. An additional advantage of our spanner is that it admits a subquadratic construction runtime of $\tilde{O}(m + n^{13/7})$, while the previous construction requires all-pairs shortest paths computation which takes $O(\min\{mn, n^{2.373}\})$ time. 给定 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边上的无向无权图 $G = (V, E)$，子图 $H\subseteq G$ 是 $G$ 的一个带有拉伸函数 $f 的扳手：\mathbb{R}_+ \rightarrow \mathbb{R}_+$，如果对于 $V$ 中的每对 $s, t$ 顶点，$\text{dist}_{H}(s, t)\le f(\text{dist}_{G}(s, t))$。当$f(d) = d + o(d)$时，$H$称为次线性加性扳手；当$f(d) = d + o(n)$时，$H$被称为\emph{加法扳手}，而$f(d) - d$通常被称为$H$的\emph{加法拉伸}。作为我们的主要结果，我们表明，对于任何常数 $δ>0$ 和常数整数 $k\geq 2$，$n$ 顶点上的每个图都有一个次线性加法扳手，其拉伸函数 $f(d)=d+O(d^{1-1/k})$ 和 $O\big(n^{1+\frac{1+δ}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ 边。当 $k = 2$ 时，这改进了之前带有拉伸函数 $f(d) = d + O(d^{1/2})$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n^{1+3/17})$ 边的扳手构造；对于任何常量整数 $k\geq 3$，这改进了之前使用拉伸函数 $f(d) = d + O(d^{1-1/k})$ 和 $O\bigg(n^{1+\frac{(3/4)^{k-2}}{7 - 2\cdot (3/4)^{k-2}}}\bigg)$ 边的扳手构造。最重要的是，我们的扳手的大小几乎匹配 $Ω\big(n^{1+\frac{1}{2^{k+1}-1}}\big)$ 的下限，这适用于实现相同拉伸功能的所有压缩方案。作为我们的第二个结果，我们展示了一种具有拉伸 $O(n^{0.403})$ 和 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 边的加法扳手的新构造，这稍微改进了之前通过线性尺寸扳手实现的 $O(n^{3/7+\varepsilon})$ 拉伸界限。我们的扳手的另一个优点是它允许次二次构造运行时间为 $\tilde{O}(m + n^{13/7})$，而之前的构造需要全对最短路径计算，这需要 $O(\min\{mn, n^{2.373}\})$ 时间。 本文研究了无向无权图的子线性加法spanner的构造，旨在以更少的边数实现更优的拉伸函数。 Zihan Tan,Tianyi Zhang cs.DS

authors_text: Rachith Aiyappa,Jisun An,Haewoon Kwak,Yong-Yeol Ahn
title: Can we trust the evaluation on ChatGPT?
title_zh: ChatGPT 上的评价可以相信吗？
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 3rd Workshop on Trustworthy Natural Language Processing (TrustNLP 2023) (July 2023) 47-54
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 3rd Workshop on Trustworthy Natural Language Processing (TrustNLP 2023) (July 2023) 47-54
abstract: ChatGPT, the first large language model (LLM) with mass adoption, has demonstrated remarkable performance in numerous natural language tasks. Despite its evident usefulness, evaluating ChatGPT's performance in diverse problem domains remains challenging due to the closed nature of the model and its continuous updates via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). We highlight the issue of data contamination in ChatGPT evaluations, with a case study of the task of stance detection. We discuss the challenge of preventing data contamination and ensuring fair model evaluation in the age of closed and continuously trained models.
summary: ChatGPT, the first large language model (LLM) with mass adoption, has demonstrated remarkable performance in numerous natural language tasks. Despite its evident usefulness, evaluating ChatGPT's performance in diverse problem domains remains challenging due to the closed nature of the model and its continuous updates via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). We highlight the issue of data contamination in ChatGPT evaluations, with a case study of the task of stance detection. We discuss the challenge of preventing data contamination and ensuring fair model evaluation in the age of closed and continuously trained models.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 是第一个被大规模采用的大型语言模型 (LLM)，在众多自然语言任务中表现出了卓越的性能。尽管其明显有用，但由于模型的封闭性及其通过人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF) 的持续更新，评估 ChatGPT 在不同问题领域的性能仍然具有挑战性。我们通过立场检测任务的案例研究来强调 ChatGPT 评估中的数据污染问题。我们讨论了在封闭和持续训练的模型时代防止数据污染和确保公平模型评估的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在ChatGPT等封闭且持续更新的大型语言模型评估中，数据污染问题对评估结果可靠性的影响，并以立场检测任务为例进行案例研究。
AI.motivation: 由于ChatGPT的封闭性和通过人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）的持续更新机制，其性能评估面临挑战，尤其数据污染可能导致评估结果不准确，需解决这一问题以确保公平性。
AI.method: 通过立场检测任务的案例研究，分析数据污染在ChatGPT评估中的具体表现，并讨论防止数据污染及确保模型评估公平性的方法。
AI.result: 研究发现，数据污染显著影响ChatGPT评估的可靠性，现有评估方法可能因训练数据与测试数据重叠而产生偏差。
AI.conclusion: 封闭且持续训练的模型评估需特别注意数据污染问题，未来应开发更严格的评估框架以确保结果的公正性与可信度。

search_text: Can we trust the evaluation on ChatGPT? ChatGPT 上的评价可以相信吗？ ChatGPT, the first large language model (LLM) with mass adoption, has demonstrated remarkable performance in numerous natural language tasks. Despite its evident usefulness, evaluating ChatGPT's performance in diverse problem domains remains challenging due to the closed nature of the model and its continuous updates via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). We highlight the issue of data contamination in ChatGPT evaluations, with a case study of the task of stance detection. We discuss the challenge of preventing data contamination and ensuring fair model evaluation in the age of closed and continuously trained models. ChatGPT 是第一个被大规模采用的大型语言模型 (LLM)，在众多自然语言任务中表现出了卓越的性能。尽管其明显有用，但由于模型的封闭性及其通过人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF) 的持续更新，评估 ChatGPT 在不同问题领域的性能仍然具有挑战性。我们通过立场检测任务的案例研究来强调 ChatGPT 评估中的数据污染问题。我们讨论了在封闭和持续训练的模型时代防止数据污染和确保公平模型评估的挑战。 本文探讨了在ChatGPT等封闭且持续更新的大型语言模型评估中，数据污染问题对评估结果可靠性的影响，并以立场检测任务为例进行案例研究。 Rachith Aiyappa,Jisun An,Haewoon Kwak,Yong-Yeol Ahn cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Lai,Yukang Chen,Fanbin Lu,Jianhui Liu,Jiaya Jia
title: Spherical Transformer for LiDAR-based 3D Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于 LiDAR 的 3D 识别的球形变压器
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git
abstract: LiDAR-based 3D point cloud recognition has benefited various applications. Without specially considering the LiDAR point distribution, most current methods suffer from information disconnection and limited receptive field, especially for the sparse distant points. In this work, we study the varying-sparsity distribution of LiDAR points and present SphereFormer to directly aggregate information from dense close points to the sparse distant ones. We design radial window self-attention that partitions the space into multiple non-overlapping narrow and long windows. It overcomes the disconnection issue and enlarges the receptive field smoothly and dramatically, which significantly boosts the performance of sparse distant points. Moreover, to fit the narrow and long windows, we propose exponential splitting to yield fine-grained position encoding and dynamic feature selection to increase model representation ability. Notably, our method ranks 1st on both nuScenes and SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation benchmarks with 81.9% and 74.8% mIoU, respectively. Also, we achieve the 3rd place on nuScenes object detection benchmark with 72.8% NDS and 68.5% mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git.
summary: LiDAR-based 3D point cloud recognition has benefited various applications. Without specially considering the LiDAR point distribution, most current methods suffer from information disconnection and limited receptive field, especially for the sparse distant points. In this work, we study the varying-sparsity distribution of LiDAR points and present SphereFormer to directly aggregate information from dense close points to the sparse distant ones. We design radial window self-attention that partitions the space into multiple non-overlapping narrow and long windows. It overcomes the disconnection issue and enlarges the receptive field smoothly and dramatically, which significantly boosts the performance of sparse distant points. Moreover, to fit the narrow and long windows, we propose exponential splitting to yield fine-grained position encoding and dynamic feature selection to increase model representation ability. Notably, our method ranks 1st on both nuScenes and SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation benchmarks with 81.9% and 74.8% mIoU, respectively. Also, we achieve the 3rd place on nuScenes object detection benchmark with 72.8% NDS and 68.5% mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git.
abstract_zh: 基于LiDAR的3D点云识别已经使各种应用受益。在没有特别考虑激光雷达点分布的情况下，大多数当前方法都存在信息断开和感受野有限的问题，特别是对于稀疏的远点。在这项工作中，我们研究了 LiDAR 点的变稀疏分布，并提出 SphereFormer 来直接聚合从密集的近点到稀疏的远点的信息。我们设计了径向窗口自注意力，将空间划分为多个不重叠的窄长窗口。它克服了断开问题，平滑且显着地扩大了感受野，从而显着提高了稀疏远点的性能。此外，为了适应窄而长的窗口，我们提出指数分割以产生细粒度的位置编码和动态特征选择以提高模型表示能力。值得注意的是，我们的方法在 nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI 语义分割基准上分别以 81.9% 和 74.8% mIoU 排名第一。此外，我们在 nuScenes 对象检测基准测试中以 72.8% NDS 和 68.5% mAP 获得第三名。代码可在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR点云的3D识别方法SphereFormer，旨在解决现有方法在处理稀疏远距离点时的信息断层和感受野有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR点云识别方法未充分考虑点分布的稀疏性，导致远距离稀疏点信息获取不足，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计径向窗口自注意力机制，将空间划分为多个非重叠的狭长窗口，并引入指数分割策略生成细粒度位置编码与动态特征选择，增强模型表达能力。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI语义分割基准测试中分别达到81.9%和74.8%的mIoU，在nuScenes目标检测中位列第三，NDS为72.8%、mAP为68.5%。
AI.conclusion: SphereFormer通过优化空间注意力机制和位置编码策略，显著提升了LiDAR点云中稀疏远距离点的识别性能，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Spherical Transformer for LiDAR-based 3D Recognition 用于基于 LiDAR 的 3D 识别的球形变压器 LiDAR-based 3D point cloud recognition has benefited various applications. Without specially considering the LiDAR point distribution, most current methods suffer from information disconnection and limited receptive field, especially for the sparse distant points. In this work, we study the varying-sparsity distribution of LiDAR points and present SphereFormer to directly aggregate information from dense close points to the sparse distant ones. We design radial window self-attention that partitions the space into multiple non-overlapping narrow and long windows. It overcomes the disconnection issue and enlarges the receptive field smoothly and dramatically, which significantly boosts the performance of sparse distant points. Moreover, to fit the narrow and long windows, we propose exponential splitting to yield fine-grained position encoding and dynamic feature selection to increase model representation ability. Notably, our method ranks 1st on both nuScenes and SemanticKITTI semantic segmentation benchmarks with 81.9% and 74.8% mIoU, respectively. Also, we achieve the 3rd place on nuScenes object detection benchmark with 72.8% NDS and 68.5% mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git. 基于LiDAR的3D点云识别已经使各种应用受益。在没有特别考虑激光雷达点分布的情况下，大多数当前方法都存在信息断开和感受野有限的问题，特别是对于稀疏的远点。在这项工作中，我们研究了 LiDAR 点的变稀疏分布，并提出 SphereFormer 来直接聚合从密集的近点到稀疏的远点的信息。我们设计了径向窗口自注意力，将空间划分为多个不重叠的窄长窗口。它克服了断开问题，平滑且显着地扩大了感受野，从而显着提高了稀疏远点的性能。此外，为了适应窄而长的窗口，我们提出指数分割以产生细粒度的位置编码和动态特征选择以提高模型表示能力。值得注意的是，我们的方法在 nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI 语义分割基准上分别以 81.9% 和 74.8% mIoU 排名第一。此外，我们在 nuScenes 对象检测基准测试中以 72.8% NDS 和 68.5% mAP 获得第三名。代码可在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/SphereFormer.git 获取。 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR点云的3D识别方法SphereFormer，旨在解决现有方法在处理稀疏远距离点时的信息断层和感受野有限的问题。 Xin Lai,Yukang Chen,Fanbin Lu,Jianhui Liu,Jiaya Jia cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Gabriel Mittag,Babak Naderi,Vishak Gopal,Ross Cutler
title: LSTM-based Video Quality Prediction Accounting for Temporal Distortions in Videoconferencing Calls
title_zh: 基于 LSTM 的视频质量预测解决视频会议通话中的时间失真问题
comment: Accepted at ICASSP 2023
comments: Accepted at ICASSP 2023
abstract: Current state-of-the-art video quality models, such as VMAF, give excellent prediction results by comparing the degraded video with its reference video. However, they do not consider temporal distortions (e.g., frame freezes or skips) that occur during videoconferencing calls. In this paper, we present a data-driven approach for modeling such distortions automatically by training an LSTM with subjective quality ratings labeled via crowdsourcing. The videos were collected from live videoconferencing calls in 83 different network conditions. We applied QR codes as markers on the source videos to create aligned references and compute temporal features based on the alignment vectors. Using these features together with VMAF core features, our proposed model achieves a PCC of 0.99 on the validation set. Furthermore, our model outputs per-frame quality that gives detailed insight into the cause of video quality impairments. The VCM model and dataset are open-sourced at https://github.com/microsoft/Video_Call_MOS.
summary: Current state-of-the-art video quality models, such as VMAF, give excellent prediction results by comparing the degraded video with its reference video. However, they do not consider temporal distortions (e.g., frame freezes or skips) that occur during videoconferencing calls. In this paper, we present a data-driven approach for modeling such distortions automatically by training an LSTM with subjective quality ratings labeled via crowdsourcing. The videos were collected from live videoconferencing calls in 83 different network conditions. We applied QR codes as markers on the source videos to create aligned references and compute temporal features based on the alignment vectors. Using these features together with VMAF core features, our proposed model achieves a PCC of 0.99 on the validation set. Furthermore, our model outputs per-frame quality that gives detailed insight into the cause of video quality impairments. The VCM model and dataset are open-sourced at https://github.com/microsoft/Video_Call_MOS.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的视频质量模型（例如 VMAF）通过将降级视频与其参考视频进行比较，给出了出色的预测结果。然而，他们没有考虑视频会议通话期间发生的时间失真（例如，帧冻结或跳帧）。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法，通过众包标记的主观质量评级来训练 LSTM，自动对此类扭曲进行建模。这些视频是从 83 种不同网络条件下的实时视频会议通话中收集的。我们应用 QR 码作为源视频上的标记，以创建对齐参考并根据对齐向量计算时间特征。将这些功能与 VMAF 核心功能结合使用，我们提出的模型在验证集上实现了 0.99 的 PCC。此外，我们的模型输出每帧的质量，可以详细了解视频质量受损的原因。 VCM 模型和数据集在 https://github.com/microsoft/Video_Call_MOS 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM的视频质量预测模型，专门针对视频会议中的时间失真问题进行建模。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估模型（如VMAF）未考虑视频会议中常见的帧冻结或跳帧等时间失真问题，导致预测结果不准确。
AI.method: 通过众包标注主观质量评分训练LSTM网络，利用二维码标记对齐参考视频，提取时间特征并与VMAF核心特征结合进行预测。
AI.result: 在验证集上达到0.99的PCC指标，可输出逐帧质量评估结果，模型和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视频会议中时间失真带来的质量评估难题，为视频通信质量优化提供了新思路。

However, they do not consider temporal distortions (e.g., frame freezes or skips) that occur during videoconferencing calls. In this paper, we present a data-driven approach for modeling such distortions automatically by training an LSTM with subjective quality ratings labeled via crowdsourcing. Using these features together with VMAF core features, our proposed model achieves a PCC of 0.99 on the validation set. Furthermore, our model outputs per-frame quality that gives detailed insight into the cause of video quality impairments. authors_text: Jiaming Na,Varuna De-Silva
title: Uncertainty Aware Active Learning for Reconfiguration of Pre-trained Deep Object-Detection Networks for New Target Domains
title_zh: 用于重新配置新目标域的预训练深度对象检测网络的不确定性主动学习
abstract: Object detection is one of the most important and fundamental aspects of computer vision tasks, which has been broadly utilized in pose estimation, object tracking and instance segmentation models. To obtain training data for object detection model efficiently, many datasets opt to obtain their unannotated data in video format and the annotator needs to draw a bounding box around each object in the images. Annotating every frame from a video is costly and inefficient since many frames contain very similar information for the model to learn from. How to select the most informative frames from a video to annotate has become a highly practical task to solve but attracted little attention in research. In this paper, we proposed a novel active learning algorithm for object detection models to tackle this problem. In the proposed active learning algorithm, both classification and localization informativeness of unlabelled data are measured and aggregated. Utilizing the temporal information from video frames, two novel localization informativeness measurements are proposed. Furthermore, a weight curve is proposed to avoid querying adjacent frames. Proposed active learning algorithm with multiple configurations was evaluated on the MuPoTS dataset and FootballPD dataset.
summary: Object detection is one of the most important and fundamental aspects of computer vision tasks, which has been broadly utilized in pose estimation, object tracking and instance segmentation models. To obtain training data for object detection model efficiently, many datasets opt to obtain their unannotated data in video format and the annotator needs to draw a bounding box around each object in the images. Annotating every frame from a video is costly and inefficient since many frames contain very similar information for the model to learn from. How to select the most informative frames from a video to annotate has become a highly practical task to solve but attracted little attention in research. In this paper, we proposed a novel active learning algorithm for object detection models to tackle this problem. In the proposed active learning algorithm, both classification and localization informativeness of unlabelled data are measured and aggregated. Utilizing the temporal information from video frames, two novel localization informativeness measurements are proposed. Furthermore, a weight curve is proposed to avoid querying adjacent frames. Proposed active learning algorithm with multiple configurations was evaluated on the MuPoTS dataset and FootballPD dataset.
abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉任务最重要和最基本的方面之一，已广泛应用于姿态估计、目标跟踪和实例分割模型。为了有效地获取目标检测模型的训练数据，许多数据集选择以视频格式获取未注释的数据，并且注释器需要在图像中的每个对象周围绘制边界框。对视频中的每一帧进行注释既昂贵又低效，因为许多帧都包含非常相似的信息供模型学习。如何从视频中选择信息量最大的帧进行注释已成为一项非常实用的任务，但在研究中却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的目标检测模型主动学习算法来解决这个问题。在所提出的主动学习算法中，未标记数据的分类和定位信息都被测量和聚合。利用视频帧的时间信息，提出了两种新颖的定位信息量测量。此外，提出了权重曲线以避免查询相邻帧。所提出的具有多种配置的主动学习算法在 MuPoTS 数据集和 FootballPD 数据集上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性感知的主动学习算法，用于重新配置预训练的深度目标检测网络以适应新目标领域，通过选择视频中最信息量的帧进行标注以提高效率。
AI.motivation: 视频标注过程中，逐帧标注成本高且效率低，因为许多帧信息相似。现有研究对如何选择最具信息量的帧进行标注关注不足，亟需有效方法降低标注成本并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出结合分类与定位信息量的主动学习算法，利用视频帧的时序信息设计两种新的定位信息度量方法，并引入权重曲线避免连续帧查询，通过MuPoTS和FootballPD数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该算法能有效筛选出最具信息量的视频帧，减少标注工作量的同时提升目标检测模型在新领域中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合时序信息与不确定性感知机制，所提方法在降低标注成本和提升模型适应性方面具有显著优势，为视频数据驱动的目标检测模型优化提供了新思路。

method: 提出结合分类与定位信息量的主动学习算法，利用视频帧的时序信息设计两种新的定位信息度量方法，并引入权重曲线避免连续帧查询，通过MuPoTS和FootballPD数据集验证方法有效性。
result: 实验结果表明，该算法能有效筛选出最具信息量的视频帧，减少标注工作量的同时提升目标检测模型在新领域中的性能。
conclusion: 通过融合时序信息与不确定性感知机制，所提方法在降低标注成本和提升模型适应性方面具有显著优势，为视频数据驱动的目标检测模型优化提供了新思路。
search_text: Uncertainty Aware Active Learning for Reconfiguration of Pre-trained Deep Object-Detection Networks for New Target Domains 用于重新配置新目标域的预训练深度对象检测网络的不确定性主动学习 Object detection is one of the most important and fundamental aspects of computer vision tasks, which has been broadly utilized in pose estimation, object tracking and instance segmentation models. To obtain training data for object detection model efficiently, many datasets opt to obtain their unannotated data in video format and the annotator needs to draw a bounding box around each object in the images. Annotating every frame from a video is costly and inefficient since many frames contain very similar information for the model to learn from. How to select the most informative frames from a video to annotate has become a highly practical task to solve but attracted little attention in research. In this paper, we proposed a novel active learning algorithm for object detection models to tackle this problem. In the proposed active learning algorithm, both classification and localization informativeness of unlabelled data are measured and aggregated. Utilizing the temporal information from video frames, two novel localization informativeness measurements are proposed. Furthermore, a weight curve is proposed to avoid querying adjacent frames. Proposed active learning algorithm with multiple configurations was evaluated on the MuPoTS dataset and FootballPD dataset. 目标检测是计算机视觉任务最重要和最基本的方面之一，已广泛应用于姿态估计、目标跟踪和实例分割模型。为了有效地获取目标检测模型的训练数据，许多数据集选择以视频格式获取未注释的数据，并且注释器需要在图像中的每个对象周围绘制边界框。对视频中的每一帧进行注释既昂贵又低效，因为许多帧都包含非常相似的信息供模型学习。如何从视频中选择信息量最大的帧进行注释已成为一项非常实用的任务，但在研究中却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的目标检测模型主动学习算法来解决这个问题。在所提出的主动学习算法中，未标记数据的分类和定位信息都被测量和聚合。利用视频帧的时间信息，提出了两种新颖的定位信息量测量。此外，提出了权重曲线以避免查询相邻帧。所提出的具有多种配置的主动学习算法在 MuPoTS 数据集和 FootballPD 数据集上进行了评估。 本文提出了一种不确定性感知的主动学习算法，用于重新配置预训练的深度目标检测网络以适应新目标领域，通过选择视频中最信息量的帧进行标注以提高效率。 Jiaming Na,Varuna De-Silva cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Wolfgang Fuhl,Susanne Zabel,Theresa Harbig,Julia Astrid Moldt,Teresa Festl Wiete,Anne Herrmann Werner,Kay Nieselt
title: A temporally quantized distribution of pupil diameters as a new feature for cognitive load classification
title_zh: 瞳孔直径的时间量化分布作为认知负荷分类的新特征
abstract: In this paper, we present a new feature that can be used to classify cognitive load based on pupil information. The feature consists of a temporal segmentation of the eye tracking recordings. For each segment of the temporal partition, a probability distribution of pupil size is computed and stored. These probability distributions can then be used to classify the cognitive load. The presented feature significantly improves the classification accuracy of the cognitive load compared to other statistical values obtained from eye tracking data, which represent the state of the art in this field. The applications of determining Cognitive Load from pupil data are numerous and could lead, for example, to pre-warning systems for burnouts. Link: https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FCognitiveLoadFeature&mode=list
summary: In this paper, we present a new feature that can be used to classify cognitive load based on pupil information. The feature consists of a temporal segmentation of the eye tracking recordings. For each segment of the temporal partition, a probability distribution of pupil size is computed and stored. These probability distributions can then be used to classify the cognitive load. The presented feature significantly improves the classification accuracy of the cognitive load compared to other statistical values obtained from eye tracking data, which represent the state of the art in this field. The applications of determining Cognitive Load from pupil data are numerous and could lead, for example, to pre-warning systems for burnouts. Link: https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FCognitiveLoadFeature&mode=list
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新功能，可用于根据瞳孔信息对认知负荷进行分类。该功能包括眼睛跟踪记录的时间分割。对于时间分区的每个片段，计算并存储瞳孔大小的概率分布。然后可以使用这些概率分布对认知负荷进行分类。与从眼睛跟踪数据获得的其他统计值相比，所提出的特征显着提高了认知负荷的分类准确性，这代表了该领域的最新技术。根据学生数据确定认知负荷的应用有很多，例如可以用于倦怠预警系统。链接：https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FCognitiveLoadFeature&mode=list

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于瞳孔直径时间量化分布的新特征，用于认知负荷分类。
AI.motivation: 现有基于眼动数据的统计值在认知负荷分类中存在局限性，需探索更有效的特征以提升分类精度。
AI.method: 对眼动记录进行时间分段，计算每段内瞳孔尺寸的概率分布，并利用该分布进行认知负荷分类。
AI.result: 新特征显著优于现有统计方法，在认知负荷分类任务中取得更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 时间量化瞳孔分布特征为认知负荷检测提供了有效手段，可应用于预警系统等实际场景。

authors_text: Chen Feng,Ioannis Patras
title: MaskCon: Masked Contrastive Learning for Coarse-Labelled Dataset
title_zh: MaskCon：粗标记数据集的屏蔽对比学习
comment: CVPR 2023 camera-ready version. Codes are available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/MaskCon_CVPR2023
comments: CVPR 2023 camera-ready version. Codes are available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/MaskCon_CVPR2023
abstract: Deep learning has achieved great success in recent years with the aid of advanced neural network structures and large-scale human-annotated datasets. However, it is often costly and difficult to accurately and efficiently annotate large-scale datasets, especially for some specialized domains where fine-grained labels are required. In this setting, coarse labels are much easier to acquire as they do not require expert knowledge. In this work, we propose a contrastive learning method, called $\textbf{Mask}$ed $\textbf{Con}$trastive learning~($\textbf{MaskCon}$) to address the under-explored problem setting, where we learn with a coarse-labelled dataset in order to address a finer labelling problem. More specifically, within the contrastive learning framework, for each sample our method generates soft-labels with the aid of coarse labels against other samples and another augmented view of the sample in question. By contrast to self-supervised contrastive learning where only the sample's augmentations are considered hard positives, and in supervised contrastive learning where only samples with the same coarse labels are considered hard positives, we propose soft labels based on sample distances, that are masked by the coarse labels. This allows us to utilize both inter-sample relations and coarse labels. We demonstrate that our method can obtain as special cases many existing state-of-the-art works and that it provides tighter bounds on the generalization error. Experimentally, our method achieves significant improvement over the current state-of-the-art in various datasets, including CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1K, Standford Online Products and Stanford Cars196 datasets. Code and annotations are available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/MaskCon_CVPR2023.
summary: Deep learning has achieved great success in recent years with the aid of advanced neural network structures and large-scale human-annotated datasets. However, it is often costly and difficult to accurately and efficiently annotate large-scale datasets, especially for some specialized domains where fine-grained labels are required. In this setting, coarse labels are much easier to acquire as they do not require expert knowledge. In this work, we propose a contrastive learning method, called $\textbf{Mask}$ed $\textbf{Con}$trastive learning~($\textbf{MaskCon}$) to address the under-explored problem setting, where we learn with a coarse-labelled dataset in order to address a finer labelling problem. More specifically, within the contrastive learning framework, for each sample our method generates soft-labels with the aid of coarse labels against other samples and another augmented view of the sample in question. By contrast to self-supervised contrastive learning where only the sample's augmentations are considered hard positives, and in supervised contrastive learning where only samples with the same coarse labels are considered hard positives, we propose soft labels based on sample distances, that are masked by the coarse labels. This allows us to utilize both inter-sample relations and coarse labels. We demonstrate that our method can obtain as special cases many existing state-of-the-art works and that it provides tighter bounds on the generalization error. Experimentally, our method achieves significant improvement over the current state-of-the-art in various datasets, including CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1K, Standford Online Products and Stanford Cars196 datasets. Code and annotations are available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/MaskCon_CVPR2023.
abstract_zh: 近年来，借助先进的神经网络结构和大规模人工注释数据集，深度学习取得了巨大成功。然而，准确有效地注释大规模数据集通常成本高昂且困难，特别是对于一些需要细粒度标签的专业领域。在这种情况下，粗标签更容易获得，因为它们不需要专业知识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对比学习方法，称为 $\textbf{Mask}$ed $\textbf{Con}$trastivelearning~($\textbf{MaskCon}$) 来解决未充分探索的问题设置，我们使用粗标记数据集进行学习，以解决更精细的标记问题。更具体地说，在对比学习框架内，对于每个样本，我们的方法借助针对其他样本的粗标签和相关样本的另一个增强视图生成软标签。与自监督对比学习（仅样本的增强被视为硬阳性）和监督对比学习（仅具有相同粗标签的样本被视为硬阳性）相比，我们提出了基于样本距离的软标签，这些标签被粗标签掩盖。这使我们能够利用样本间关系和粗标签。我们证明，我们的方法可以作为特殊情况获得许多现有的最先进的作品，并且它为泛化误差提供了更严格的界限。通过实验，我们的方法在各种数据集（包括 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet-1K、Standford Online Products 和 Stanley Cars196 数据集）中实现了对当前最先进技术的显着改进。代码和注释可在 https://github.com/MrChenFeng/MaskCon_CVPR2023 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于粗标签数据集的对比学习方法，用于解决细粒度分类问题。
AI.motivation: 由于精细标注数据成本高且困难，而粗标签更易获取，但现有方法未能有效利用粗标签信息，故提出MaskCon以解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过结合样本间距离与粗标签生成软标签，并在对比学习框架中利用这些软标签，同时考虑样本间关系与粗标签信息。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet-1K、Standford Online Products和Stanford Cars196等数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MaskCon在多个数据集上优于现有方法，证明其有效性和泛化能力，并提供了更紧的泛化误差界。

However, it is often costly and difficult to accurately and efficiently annotate large-scale datasets, especially for some specialized domains where fine-grained labels are required. In this work, we propose a contrastive learning method, called $\textbf{Mask}$ed $\textbf{Con}$trastive learning~($\textbf{MaskCon}$) to address the under-explored problem setting, where we learn with a coarse-labelled dataset in order to address a finer labelling problem. By contrast to self-supervised contrastive learning where only the sample's augmentations are considered hard positives, and in supervised contrastive learning where only samples with the same coarse labels are considered hard positives, we propose soft labels based on sample distances, that are masked by the coarse labels. This allows us to utilize both inter-sample relations and coarse labels. We demonstrate that our method can obtain as special cases many existing state-of-the-art works and that it provides tighter bounds on the generalization error. Experimentally, our method achieves significant improvement over the current state-of-the-art in various datasets, including CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1K, Standford Online Products and Stanford Cars196 datasets. authors_text: Haoran Ma
title: Text Semantics to Image Generation: A method of building facades design base on Stable Diffusion model
title_zh: 文本语义到图像生成：一种基于稳定扩散模型的建筑立面设计方法
comment: data mistake
comments: data mistake
abstract: Stable Diffusion model has been extensively employed in the study of archi-tectural image generation, but there is still an opportunity to enhance in terms of the controllability of the generated image content. A multi-network combined text-to-building facade image generating method is proposed in this work. We first fine-tuned the Stable Diffusion model on the CMP Fa-cades dataset using the LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) approach, then we ap-ply the ControlNet model to further control the output. Finally, we contrast-ed the facade generating outcomes under various architectural style text con-tents and control strategies. The results demonstrate that the LoRA training approach significantly decreases the possibility of fine-tuning the Stable Dif-fusion large model, and the addition of the ControlNet model increases the controllability of the creation of text to building facade images. This pro-vides a foundation for subsequent studies on the generation of architectural images.
summary: Stable Diffusion model has been extensively employed in the study of archi-tectural image generation, but there is still an opportunity to enhance in terms of the controllability of the generated image content. A multi-network combined text-to-building facade image generating method is proposed in this work. We first fine-tuned the Stable Diffusion model on the CMP Fa-cades dataset using the LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) approach, then we ap-ply the ControlNet model to further control the output. Finally, we contrast-ed the facade generating outcomes under various architectural style text con-tents and control strategies. The results demonstrate that the LoRA training approach significantly decreases the possibility of fine-tuning the Stable Dif-fusion large model, and the addition of the ControlNet model increases the controllability of the creation of text to building facade images. This pro-vides a foundation for subsequent studies on the generation of architectural images.
abstract_zh: 稳定扩散模型已广泛应用于建筑图像生成的研究中，但在生成图像内容的可控性方面仍有机会增强。本文提出了一种多网络组合的文本到建筑物立面图像生成方法。我们首先使用 LoRA（低阶适应）方法在 CMP Fa-cades 数据集上微调稳定扩散模型，然后应用 ControlNet 模型进一步控制输出。最后，我们对比了不同建筑风格文本内容和控制策略下的立面生成结果。结果表明，LoRA 训练方法显着降低了对 Stable Dif-fusion 大模型进行微调的可能性，而 ControlNet 模型的添加增加了文本创建对建筑立面图像的可控性。这为后续建筑图像生成的研究提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Stable Diffusion模型的建筑立面生成方法，结合LoRA微调与ControlNet增强可控性。
AI.motivation: 尽管Stable Diffusion在建筑图像生成中广泛应用，但生成内容的可控性仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 首先使用LoRA方法在CMP Facades数据集上微调Stable Diffusion模型，再通过ControlNet增强输出控制，并对比不同文本内容与控制策略的生成效果。
AI.result: LoRA训练显著降低微调难度，ControlNet有效提升文本到建筑立面图像的生成可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为建筑图像生成研究提供了新的技术基础，未来可进一步优化控制策略与生成质量。

authors_text: Junhuan Yang,Yi Sheng,Yuzhou Zhang,Weiwen Jiang,Lei Yang
title: On-Device Unsupervised Image Segmentation
title_zh: 设备上无监督图像分割
comment: To be published in Design Automation Conference (DAC) 2023
comments: To be published in Design Automation Conference (DAC) 2023
abstract: Along with the breakthrough of convolutional neural networks, learning-based segmentation has emerged in many research works. Most of them are based on supervised learning, requiring plenty of annotated data; however, to support segmentation, a label for each pixel is required, which is obviously expensive. As a result, the issue of lacking annotated segmentation data commonly exists. Continuous learning is a promising way to deal with this issue; however, it still has high demands on human labor for annotation. What's more, privacy is highly required in segmentation data for real-world applications, which further calls for on-device learning. In this paper, we aim to resolve the above issue in an alternative way: Instead of supervised segmentation, we propose to develop efficient unsupervised segmentation that can be executed on edge devices. Based on our observation that segmentation can obtain high performance when pixels are mapped to a high-dimension space, we for the first time bring brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC) to the segmentation task. We build the HDC-based unsupervised segmentation framework, namely "SegHDC". In SegHDC, we devise a novel encoding approach that follows the Manhattan distance. A clustering algorithm is further developed on top of the encoded high-dimension vectors to obtain segmentation results. Experimental results show SegHDC can significantly surpass neural network-based unsupervised segmentation. On a standard segmentation dataset, DSB2018, SegHDC can achieve a 28.0% improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) score; meanwhile, it achieves over 300x speedup on Raspberry PI. What's more, for a larger size image in the BBBC005 dataset, the existing approach cannot be accommodated to Raspberry PI due to out of memory; on the other hand, SegHDC can obtain segmentation results within 3 minutes while achieving a 0.9587 IoU score.

abstract_zh: 随着卷积神经网络的突破，基于学习的分割已经出现在许多研究工作中。大部分都是基于监督学习，需要大量的标注数据；然而，为了支持分割，需要每个像素都有一个标签，这显然是昂贵的。因此，缺乏带注释的分割数据的问题普遍存在。持续学习是解决这个问题的一个有前途的方法；然而，它对人工标注仍然有很高的要求。更重要的是，现实应用中的分割数据对隐私的要求很高，这进一步需要设备上的学习。在本文中，我们旨在以另一种方式解决上述问题：我们建议开发可以在边缘设备上执行的高效无监督分割，而不是有监督分割。基于我们观察到当像素映射到高维空间时分割可以获得高性能，我们首次将类脑超维计算（HDC）引入分割任务中。我们构建了基于 HDC 的无监督分割框架，即“SegHDC”。在 SegHDC 中，我们设计了一种遵循曼哈顿距离的新颖编码方法。在编码的高维向量之上进一步开发聚类算法以获得分割结果。实验结果表明，SegHDC 可以显着超越基于神经网络的无监督分割。在标准分割数据集 DSB2018 上，SegHDC 的 Intersection over Union (IoU) 分数可以实现 28.0% 的提升；同时，它在 Raspberry PI 上实现了超过 300 倍的加速。更重要的是，对于BBBC005数据集中较大尺寸的图像，由于内存不足，现有方法无法适应Raspberry PI；另一方面，SegHDC可以在3分钟内获得分割结果，同时达到0.9587的IoU分数。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在边缘设备上执行的高效无监督图像分割方法。
AI.motivation: 解决标注数据不足、隐私需求高及设备端计算资源受限的挑战。
AI.method: 基于脑启发高维计算（HDC），设计曼哈顿距离编码与聚类算法，构建SegHDC框架。
AI.result: 在DSB2018数据集上IoU提升28%，树莓派加速300倍，BBBC005数据集处理成功率100%。
AI.conclusion: SegHDC在分割精度与设备端效率上显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Will LeVine,Benjamin Pikus,Pranav Raja,Fernando Amat Gil
title: Enabling Calibration In The Zero-Shot Inference of Large Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 在大型视觉语言模型的零样本推理中启用校准
abstract: Calibration of deep learning models is crucial to their trustworthiness and safe usage, and as such, has been extensively studied in supervised classification models, with methods crafted to decrease miscalibration. However, there has yet to be a comprehensive study of the calibration of vision-language models that are used for zero-shot inference, like CLIP. We measure calibration across relevant variables like prompt, dataset, and architecture, and find that zero-shot inference with CLIP is miscalibrated. Furthermore, we propose a modified version of temperature scaling that is aligned with the common use cases of CLIP as a zero-shot inference model, and show that a single learned temperature generalizes for each specific CLIP model (defined by a chosen pre-training dataset and architecture) across inference dataset and prompt choice.
summary: Calibration of deep learning models is crucial to their trustworthiness and safe usage, and as such, has been extensively studied in supervised classification models, with methods crafted to decrease miscalibration. However, there has yet to be a comprehensive study of the calibration of vision-language models that are used for zero-shot inference, like CLIP. We measure calibration across relevant variables like prompt, dataset, and architecture, and find that zero-shot inference with CLIP is miscalibrated. Furthermore, we propose a modified version of temperature scaling that is aligned with the common use cases of CLIP as a zero-shot inference model, and show that a single learned temperature generalizes for each specific CLIP model (defined by a chosen pre-training dataset and architecture) across inference dataset and prompt choice.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的校准对于其可信度和安全使用至关重要，因此在监督分类模型中得到了广泛的研究，并精心设计了减少错误校准的方法。然而，目前还没有对用于零样本推理的视觉语言模型（如 CLIP）的校准进行全面的研究。我们测量提示、数据集和架构等相关变量的校准，发现使用 CLIP 的零样本推理是错误校准的。此外，我们提出了一种温度缩放的修改版本，该版本与 CLIP 作为零样本推理模型的常见用例相一致，并表明单个学习温度可以泛化整个推理数据集和提示选择的每个特定 CLIP 模型（由所选的预训练数据集和架构定义）。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在零样本推理中提升大型视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的校准能力
AI.motivation: 校准对模型可靠性至关重要，但现有方法多针对监督分类模型，零样本视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的校准研究不足
AI.method: 提出改进的温度缩放方法，针对CLIP的使用场景，通过单一温度参数跨数据集和提示泛化
AI.result: 发现CLIP零样本推理存在校准问题，改进方法能有效提升校准性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为零样本视觉-语言模型的校准提供了有效解决方案

However, there has yet to be a comprehensive study of the calibration of vision-language models that are used for zero-shot inference, like CLIP. We measure calibration across relevant variables like prompt, dataset, and architecture, and find that zero-shot inference with CLIP is miscalibrated. Furthermore, we propose a modified version of temperature scaling that is aligned with the common use cases of CLIP as a zero-shot inference model, and show that a single learned temperature generalizes for each specific CLIP model (defined by a chosen pre-training dataset and architecture) across inference dataset and prompt choice. 深度学习模型的校准对于其可信度和安全使用至关重要，因此在监督分类模型中得到了广泛的研究，并精心设计了减少错误校准的方法。然而，目前还没有对用于零样本推理的视觉语言模型（如 CLIP）的校准进行全面的研究。我们测量提示、数据集和架构等相关变量的校准，发现使用 CLIP 的零样本推理是错误校准的。此外，我们提出了一种温度缩放的修改版本，该版本与 CLIP 作为零样本推理模型的常见用例相一致，并表明单个学习温度可以泛化整个推理数据集和提示选择的每个特定 CLIP 模型（由所选的预训练数据集和架构定义）。 研究如何在零样本推理中提升大型视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的校准能力 Will LeVine,Benjamin Pikus,Pranav Raja,Fernando Amat Gil cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaodan Xing,Giorgos Papanastasiou,Simon Walsh,Guang Yang
title: Less is More: Unsupervised Mask-guided Annotated CT Image Synthesis with Minimum Manual Segmentations
title_zh: 少即是多：无监督掩模引导带注释的 CT 图像合成，具有最少的手动分割
comment: 12 pages, 11 figures, accepted by IEEE TMI
comments: 12 pages, 11 figures, accepted by IEEE TMI
abstract: As a pragmatic data augmentation tool, data synthesis has generally returned dividends in performance for deep learning based medical image analysis. However, generating corresponding segmentation masks for synthetic medical images is laborious and subjective. To obtain paired synthetic medical images and segmentations, conditional generative models that use segmentation masks as synthesis conditions were proposed. However, these segmentation mask-conditioned generative models still relied on large, varied, and labeled training datasets, and they could only provide limited constraints on human anatomical structures, leading to unrealistic image features. Moreover, the invariant pixel-level conditions could reduce the variety of synthetic lesions and thus reduce the efficacy of data augmentation. To address these issues, in this work, we propose a novel strategy for medical image synthesis, namely Unsupervised Mask (UM)-guided synthesis, to obtain both synthetic images and segmentations using limited manual segmentation labels. We first develop a superpixel based algorithm to generate unsupervised structural guidance and then design a conditional generative model to synthesize images and annotations simultaneously from those unsupervised masks in a semi-supervised multi-task setting. In addition, we devise a multi-scale multi-task Fréchet Inception Distance (MM-FID) and multi-scale multi-task standard deviation (MM-STD) to harness both fidelity and variety evaluations of synthetic CT images. With multiple analyses on different scales, we could produce stable image quality measurements with high reproducibility. Compared with the segmentation mask guided synthesis, our UM-guided synthesis provided high-quality synthetic images with significantly higher fidelity, variety, and utility ($p<0.05$ by Wilcoxon Signed Ranked test).

However, generating corresponding segmentation masks for synthetic medical images is laborious and subjective. To obtain paired synthetic medical images and segmentations, conditional generative models that use segmentation masks as synthesis conditions were proposed. However, these segmentation mask-conditioned generative models still relied on large, varied, and labeled training datasets, and they could only provide limited constraints on human anatomical structures, leading to unrealistic image features. Moreover, the invariant pixel-level conditions could reduce the variety of synthetic lesions and thus reduce the efficacy of data augmentation. To address these issues, in this work, we propose a novel strategy for medical image synthesis, namely Unsupervised Mask (UM)-guided synthesis, to obtain both synthetic images and segmentations using limited manual segmentation labels. We first develop a superpixel based algorithm to generate unsupervised structural guidance and then design a conditional generative model to synthesize images and annotations simultaneously from those unsupervised masks in a semi-supervised multi-task setting. In addition, we devise a multi-scale multi-task Fréchet Inception Distance (MM-FID) and multi-scale multi-task standard deviation (MM-STD) to harness both fidelity and variety evaluations of synthetic CT images. With multiple analyses on different scales, we could produce stable image quality measurements with high reproducibility. Compared with the segmentation mask guided synthesis, our UM-guided synthesis provided high-quality synthetic images with significantly higher fidelity, variety, and utility ($p<0.05$ by Wilcoxon Signed Ranked test).
abstract_zh: 作为一种实用的数据增强工具，数据合成通常为基于深度学习的医学图像分析带来了性能红利。然而，为合成医学图像生成相应的分割掩模是费力且主观的。为了获得配对的合成医学图像和分割，提出了使用分割掩模作为合成条件的条件生成模型。然而，这些分割掩模条件生成模型仍然依赖于大量、多样化和标记的训练数据集，并且它们只能对人体解剖结构提供有限的约束，导致图像特征不切实际。此外，不变的像素级条件可能会减少合成病变的种类，从而降低数据增强的功效。为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的医学图像合成策略，即无监督掩模（UM）引导合成，以使用有限的手动分割标签获得合成图像和分割。我们首先开发一种基于超像素的算法来生成无监督结构指导，然后设计一个条件生成模型，在半监督多任务设置中从这些无监督掩模中同时合成图像和注释。此外，我们设计了多尺度多任务 Fréchet 起始距离 (MM-FID) 和多尺度多任务标准差 (MM-STD)，以利用合成 CT 图像的保真度和多样性评估。通过不同尺度的多次分析，我们可以产生具有高再现性的稳定的图像质量测量结果。与分割掩模引导合成相比，我们的 UM 引导合成提供了高质量的合成图像，具有显着更高的保真度、多样性和实用性（通过 Wilcoxon 签名排名测试，$p<0.05$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需大量标注数据的医学图像合成方法，通过最小化人工分割标签生成高质量的合成CT图像及其分割掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有条件生成模型依赖大量标注数据且生成的病变多样性不足，导致合成图像不够真实，数据增强效果有限。
AI.method: 设计基于超像素的无监督结构引导算法，结合半监督多任务条件生成模型，同时生成图像与分割掩码，并引入多尺度评价指标MM-FID和MM-STD评估合成效果。
AI.result: 相比传统分割掩码引导方法，UM引导合成在保真度、多样性及实用性上显著提升（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: UM引导合成策略以更少标注数据实现高质量医学图像生成，为数据增强提供了更高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaobao Guo,Nithish Muthuchamy Selvaraj,Zitong Yu,Adams Wai-Kin Kong,Bingquan Shen,Alex Kot
title: Audio-Visual Deception Detection: DOLOS Dataset and Parameter-Efficient Crossmodal Learning
title_zh: 视听欺骗检测：DOLOS 数据集和参数高效的跨模态学习
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Deception detection in conversations is a challenging yet important task, having pivotal applications in many fields such as credibility assessment in business, multimedia anti-frauds, and custom security. Despite this, deception detection research is hindered by the lack of high-quality deception datasets, as well as the difficulties of learning multimodal features effectively. To address this issue, we introduce DOLOS\footnote {The name ``DOLOS" comes from Greek mythology.}, the largest gameshow deception detection dataset with rich deceptive conversations. DOLOS includes 1,675 video clips featuring 213 subjects, and it has been labeled with audio-visual feature annotations. We provide train-test, duration, and gender protocols to investigate the impact of different factors. We benchmark our dataset on previously proposed deception detection approaches. To further improve the performance by fine-tuning fewer parameters, we propose Parameter-Efficient Crossmodal Learning (PECL), where a Uniform Temporal Adapter (UT-Adapter) explores temporal attention in transformer-based architectures, and a crossmodal fusion module, Plug-in Audio-Visual Fusion (PAVF), combines crossmodal information from audio-visual features. Based on the rich fine-grained audio-visual annotations on DOLOS, we also exploit multi-task learning to enhance performance by concurrently predicting deception and audio-visual features. Experimental results demonstrate the desired quality of the DOLOS dataset and the effectiveness of the PECL. The DOLOS dataset and the source codes are available at https://github.com/NMS05/Audio-Visual-Deception-Detection-DOLOS-Dataset-and-Parameter-Efficient-Crossmodal-Learning/tree/main.
summary: Deception detection in conversations is a challenging yet important task, having pivotal applications in many fields such as credibility assessment in business, multimedia anti-frauds, and custom security. Despite this, deception detection research is hindered by the lack of high-quality deception datasets, as well as the difficulties of learning multimodal features effectively. To address this issue, we introduce DOLOS\footnote {The name ``DOLOS" comes from Greek mythology.}, the largest gameshow deception detection dataset with rich deceptive conversations. DOLOS includes 1,675 video clips featuring 213 subjects, and it has been labeled with audio-visual feature annotations. We provide train-test, duration, and gender protocols to investigate the impact of different factors. We benchmark our dataset on previously proposed deception detection approaches. To further improve the performance by fine-tuning fewer parameters, we propose Parameter-Efficient Crossmodal Learning (PECL), where a Uniform Temporal Adapter (UT-Adapter) explores temporal attention in transformer-based architectures, and a crossmodal fusion module, Plug-in Audio-Visual Fusion (PAVF), combines crossmodal information from audio-visual features. Based on the rich fine-grained audio-visual annotations on DOLOS, we also exploit multi-task learning to enhance performance by concurrently predicting deception and audio-visual features. Experimental results demonstrate the desired quality of the DOLOS dataset and the effectiveness of the PECL. The DOLOS dataset and the source codes are available at https://github.com/NMS05/Audio-Visual-Deception-Detection-DOLOS-Dataset-and-Parameter-Efficient-Crossmodal-Learning/tree/main.
abstract_zh: 对话中的欺骗检测是一项具有挑战性但又重要的任务，在商业可信度评估、多媒体反欺诈和自定义安全等许多领域具有关键应用。尽管如此，欺骗检测研究仍因缺乏高质量的欺骗数据集以及有效学习多模态特征的困难而受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DOLOS\footnote {名字“DOLOS”来自希腊神话。}，最大的游戏节目欺骗检测数据集，具有丰富的欺骗性对话。DOLOS 包括 1,675 个视频剪辑，涉及 213 个主题，并带有视听特征注释。我们提供训练测试、持续时间和性别协议来研究不同因素的影响。我们对之前提出的欺骗检测方法的数据集进行基准测试。通过微调进一步提高性能由于参数较少，我们提出了参数高效跨模态学习（PECL），其中统一时间适配器（UT-Adapter）探索基于变压器的架构中的时间注意力，而跨模态融合模块插件视听融合（PAVF）则结合了来自视听特征的跨模态信息。基于 DOLOS 上丰富的细粒度视听注释，我们还利用多任务学习通过同时预测欺骗和视听特征来提高性能。结果证明了 DOLOS 数据集的预期质量和 PECL 的有效性。 DOLOS 数据集和源代码可在 https://github.com/NMS05/Audio-Visual-Deception-Detection-DOLOS-Dataset-and-Parameter-Efficient-Crossmodal-Learning/tree/main 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOLOS数据集和参数高效的跨模态学习方法PECL，用于提升音频-视觉欺骗检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有欺骗检测研究受限于高质量数据集的缺乏及多模态特征学习困难，亟需新的数据集和高效模型。
AI.method: 构建包含1,675个视频片段的DOLOS数据集，并设计PECL方法，包含时序适配器（UT-Adapter）和跨模态融合模块（PAVF），结合多任务学习联合预测欺骗行为与多模态特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了DOLOS数据集的高质量和PECL方法的有效性，代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: DOLOS数据集和PECL方法为欺骗检测提供了新基准，通过参数高效跨模态学习显著提升检测性能。

The DOLOS dataset and the source codes are available at https://github.com/NMS05/Audio-Visual-Deception-Detection-DOLOS-Dataset-and-Parameter-Efficient-Crossmodal-Learning/tree/main. 对话中的欺骗检测是一项具有挑战性但又重要的任务，在商业可信度评估、多媒体反欺诈和自定义安全等许多领域具有关键应用。尽管如此，欺骗检测研究仍因缺乏高质量的欺骗数据集以及有效学习多模态特征的困难而受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DOLOS\footnote {名字“DOLOS”来自希腊神话。}，最大的游戏节目欺骗检测数据集，具有丰富的欺骗性对话。DOLOS 包括 1,675 个视频剪辑，涉及 213 个主题，并带有视听特征注释。我们提供训练测试、持续时间和性别协议来研究不同因素的影响。我们对之前提出的欺骗检测方法的数据集进行基准测试。通过微调进一步提高性能由于参数较少，我们提出了参数高效跨模态学习（PECL），其中统一时间适配器（UT-Adapter）探索基于变压器的架构中的时间注意力，而跨模态融合模块插件视听融合（PAVF）则结合了来自视听特征的跨模态信息。基于 DOLOS 上丰富的细粒度视听注释，我们还利用多任务学习通过同时预测欺骗和视听特征来提高性能。结果证明了 DOLOS 数据集的预期质量和 PECL 的有效性。 DOLOS 数据集和源代码可在 https://github.com/NMS05/Audio-Visual-Deception-Detection-DOLOS-Dataset-and-Parameter-Efficient-Crossmodal-Learning/tree/main 上获取。 本文提出DOLOS数据集和参数高效的跨模态学习方法PECL，用于提升音频-视觉欺骗检测性能。 Xiaobao Guo,Nithish Muthuchamy Selvaraj,Zitong Yu,Adams Wai-Kin Kong,Bingquan Shen,Alex Kot cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Wolfgang Fuhl,Susanne Zabel,Theresa Harbig,Julia Astrid Moldt,Teresa Festl Wiete,Anne Herrmann Werner,Kay Nieselt
title: Area of interest adaption using feature importance
title_zh: 使用特征重要性的兴趣区域自适应
abstract: In this paper, we present two approaches and algorithms that adapt areas of interest (AOI) or regions of interest (ROI), respectively, to the eye tracking data quality and classification task. The first approach uses feature importance in a greedy way and grows or shrinks AOIs in all directions. The second approach is an extension of the first approach, which divides the AOIs into areas and calculates a direction of growth, i.e. a gradient. Both approaches improve the classification results considerably in the case of generalized AOIs, but can also be used for qualitative analysis. In qualitative analysis, the algorithms presented allow the AOIs to be adapted to the data, which means that errors and inaccuracies in eye tracking data can be better compensated for. A good application example is abstract art, where manual AOIs annotation is hardly possible, and data-driven approaches are mainly used for initial AOIs. Link: https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FAOIGradient&mode=list
summary: In this paper, we present two approaches and algorithms that adapt areas of interest (AOI) or regions of interest (ROI), respectively, to the eye tracking data quality and classification task. The first approach uses feature importance in a greedy way and grows or shrinks AOIs in all directions. The second approach is an extension of the first approach, which divides the AOIs into areas and calculates a direction of growth, i.e. a gradient. Both approaches improve the classification results considerably in the case of generalized AOIs, but can also be used for qualitative analysis. In qualitative analysis, the algorithms presented allow the AOIs to be adapted to the data, which means that errors and inaccuracies in eye tracking data can be better compensated for. A good application example is abstract art, where manual AOIs annotation is hardly possible, and data-driven approaches are mainly used for initial AOIs. Link: https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FAOIGradient&mode=list
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了两种方法和算法，分别使感兴趣区域（AOI）或感兴趣区域（ROI）适应眼动追踪数据质量和分类任务。第一种方法以贪婪的方式使用特征重要性，并在各个方向上增大或缩小 AOI。第二种方法是第一种方法的扩展，它将 AOI 划分为区域并计算增长方向，即梯度。在广义 AOI 的情况下，这两种方法都大大提高了分类结果，但也可用于定性分析。在定性分析中，所提出的算法允许 AOI 适应数据，这意味着可以更好地补偿眼动追踪数据中的错误和不准确。一个很好的应用示例是抽象艺术，其中手动 AOI 注释几乎不可能，数据驱动的方法主要用于初始 AOI。链接：https://es-cloud.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/?p=%2FAOIGradient&mode=list

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于特征重要性的方法，通过眼动数据质量和分类任务动态调整感兴趣区域（AOI/ROI）。
AI.motivation: 传统手动标注AOI存在主观性和局限性，尤其在抽象艺术等场景下难以应用，需数据驱动方法提升分类准确性并补偿眼动数据误差。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过贪心策略利用特征重要性全局扩展/收缩AOI；第二种方法将AOI分区域计算梯度方向进行定向调整。
AI.result: 两种方法显著提升泛化AOI的分类效果，同时支持定性分析中对数据误差的补偿，适用于抽象艺术等手动标注困难的场景。
AI.conclusion: 基于特征重要性的AOI自适应方法有效提升了眼动数据分析的准确性，为数据驱动的视觉研究提供了新工具。
