authors_text: Jungwook Shin,Jaeill Kim,Kyungeun Lee,Hyunghun Cho,Wonjong Rhee
title: DR.CPO: Diversified and Realistic 3D Augmentation via Iterative Construction, Random Placement, and HPR Occlusion
title_zh: DR.CPO：通过迭代构建、随机放置和 HPR 遮挡实现多样化且逼真的 3D 增强
abstract: In autonomous driving, data augmentation is commonly used for improving 3D object detection. The most basic methods include insertion of copied objects and rotation and scaling of the entire training frame. Numerous variants have been developed as well. The existing methods, however, are considerably limited when compared to the variety of the real world possibilities. In this work, we develop a diversified and realistic augmentation method that can flexibly construct a whole-body object, freely locate and rotate the object, and apply self-occlusion and external-occlusion accordingly. To improve the diversity of the whole-body object construction, we develop an iterative method that stochastically combines multiple objects observed from the real world into a single object. Unlike the existing augmentation methods, the constructed objects can be randomly located and rotated in the training frame because proper occlusions can be reflected to the whole-body objects in the final step. Finally, proper self-occlusion at each local object level and external-occlusion at the global frame level are applied using the Hidden Point Removal (HPR) algorithm that is computationally efficient. HPR is also used for adaptively controlling the point density of each object according to the object's distance from the LiDAR. Experiment results show that the proposed DR.CPO algorithm is data-efficient and model-agnostic without incurring any computational overhead. Also, DR.CPO can improve mAP performance by 2.08% when compared to the best 3D detection result known for KITTI dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/SNU-DRL/DRCPO.git
summary: In autonomous driving, data augmentation is commonly used for improving 3D object detection. The most basic methods include insertion of copied objects and rotation and scaling of the entire training frame. Numerous variants have been developed as well. The existing methods, however, are considerably limited when compared to the variety of the real world possibilities. In this work, we develop a diversified and realistic augmentation method that can flexibly construct a whole-body object, freely locate and rotate the object, and apply self-occlusion and external-occlusion accordingly. To improve the diversity of the whole-body object construction, we develop an iterative method that stochastically combines multiple objects observed from the real world into a single object. Unlike the existing augmentation methods, the constructed objects can be randomly located and rotated in the training frame because proper occlusions can be reflected to the whole-body objects in the final step. Finally, proper self-occlusion at each local object level and external-occlusion at the global frame level are applied using the Hidden Point Removal (HPR) algorithm that is computationally efficient. HPR is also used for adaptively controlling the point density of each object according to the object's distance from the LiDAR. Experiment results show that the proposed DR.CPO algorithm is data-efficient and model-agnostic without incurring any computational overhead. Also, DR.CPO can improve mAP performance by 2.08% when compared to the best 3D detection result known for KITTI dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/SNU-DRL/DRCPO.git
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，数据增强通常用于改进 3D 对象检测。最基本的方法包括插入复制的对象以及整个训练帧的旋转和缩放。还开发了许多变体。然而，与现实世界的可能性相比，现有方法相当有限。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种多样化且逼真的增强方法，可以灵活地构造全身对象，自由定位和旋转对象，并相应地应用自遮挡和外部遮挡。为了提高全身对象构造的多样性，我们开发了一种迭代方法，将从现实世界观察到的多个对象随机组合成单个对象。与现有的增强方法不同，构造的对象可以在训练框架中随机定位和旋转，因为在最后一步中可以将适当的遮挡反映到全身对象。最后，使用计算效率高的隐藏点去除 (HPR) 算法在每个局部对象级别应用适当的自遮挡，并在全局帧级别应用外部遮挡。 HPR 还用于根据物体与 LiDAR 的距离自适应控制每个物体的点密度。实验结果表明，所提出的 DR.CPO 算法具有数据效率高且与模型无关的特点，不会产生任何计算开销。此外，与 KITTI 数据集已知的最佳 3D 检测结果相比，DR.CPO 可以将 mAP 性能提高 2.08%。代码可在 https://github.com/SNU-DRL/DRCPO.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出DR.CPO方法，通过迭代构建、随机放置和HPR遮挡技术，实现更真实多样化的3D数据增强，以提升自动驾驶中的3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D数据增强方法在真实世界多样性上存在局限，难以生成灵活构造的全身物体及合理遮挡效果，限制了检测模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用迭代方法随机组合多真实物体生成新物体，结合随机定位旋转及HPR算法实现自遮挡与全局遮挡，利用HPR根据LiDAR距离自适应调整点云密度。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，DR.CPO使3D检测mAP提升2.08%，且无需额外计算开销，适用于多种模型且数据高效。
AI.conclusion: DR.CPO通过真实多样化的数据增强策略有效提升了3D目标检测性能，为自动驾驶场景提供了更鲁棒的训练数据生成方案。

authors_text: Priyanka Das,Richard Plesh,Veeru Talreja,Natalia Schmid,Matthew Valenti,Joseph Skufca,Stephanie Schuckers
title: Empirical Assessment of End-to-End Iris Recognition System Capacity
title_zh: 端到端虹膜识别系统能力的实证评估
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science 2023
abstract: Iris is an established modality in biometric recognition applications including consumer electronics, e-commerce, border security, forensics, and de-duplication of identity at a national scale. In light of the expanding usage of biometric recognition, identity clash (when templates from two different people match) is an imperative factor of consideration for a system's deployment. This study explores system capacity estimation by empirically estimating the constrained capacity of an end-to-end iris recognition system (NIR systems with Daugman-based feature extraction) operating at an acceptable error rate i.e. the number of subjects a system can resolve before encountering an error. We study the impact of six system parameters on an iris recognition system's constrained capacity -- number of enrolled identities, image quality, template dimension, random feature elimination, filter resolution, and system operating point. In our assessment, we analyzed 13.2 million comparisons from 5158 unique identities for each of 24 different system configurations. This work provides a framework to better understand iris recognition system capacity as a function of biometric system configurations beyond the operating point, for large-scale applications.
summary: Iris is an established modality in biometric recognition applications including consumer electronics, e-commerce, border security, forensics, and de-duplication of identity at a national scale. In light of the expanding usage of biometric recognition, identity clash (when templates from two different people match) is an imperative factor of consideration for a system's deployment. This study explores system capacity estimation by empirically estimating the constrained capacity of an end-to-end iris recognition system (NIR systems with Daugman-based feature extraction) operating at an acceptable error rate i.e. the number of subjects a system can resolve before encountering an error. We study the impact of six system parameters on an iris recognition system's constrained capacity -- number of enrolled identities, image quality, template dimension, random feature elimination, filter resolution, and system operating point. In our assessment, we analyzed 13.2 million comparisons from 5158 unique identities for each of 24 different system configurations. This work provides a framework to better understand iris recognition system capacity as a function of biometric system configurations beyond the operating point, for large-scale applications.
abstract_zh: 虹膜是生物识别应用中的一种既定模式，包括消费电子、电子商务、边境安全、取证和全国范围内的重复身份删除。鉴于生物特征识别的使用不断扩大，身份冲突（当两个不同人的模板匹配时）是系统部署时必须考虑的因素。本研究通过经验估计端到端虹膜识别系统（具有基于 Daugman 的特征提取的 NIR 系统）的受限容量来探索系统容量估计，该系统以可接受的错误率运行，即系统在遇到错误之前可以解决的主题数量。我们研究了六个系统参数对虹膜识别系统受限容量的影响——注册身份数量、图像质量、模板尺寸、随机特征消除、滤波器分辨率和系统工作点。在我们的评估中，我们分析了 24 种不同系统配置中每一种的 5158 个唯一身份的 1320 万次比较。这项工作提供了一个框架，可以更好地理解虹膜识别系统的容量作为超出操作点的生物识别系统配置的函数，适用于大规模应用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证方法评估端到端虹膜识别系统的容量，分析不同系统参数对身份冲突概率的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着虹膜识别技术在多个领域的广泛应用，系统在大规模部署时可能面临身份误匹配问题，需量化系统容量以确保可靠性。
AI.method: 基于近红外虹膜系统和Daugman特征提取算法，通过调整六类参数（如注册人数、图像质量等）进行24种配置测试，分析1320万次对比数据。
AI.result: 发现系统容量与注册身份数、图像质量呈负相关，而与模板维度、滤波器分辨率呈正相关，且存在最佳操作点平衡准确率与容量。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种评估虹膜系统容量的框架，为大规模生物识别场景的系统配置优化提供理论依据。

authors_text: Harrison Jesse Smith,Qingyuan Zheng,Yifei Li,Somya Jain,Jessica K. Hodgins
title: A Method for Animating Children's Drawings of the Human Figure
title_zh: 儿童人物画动画制作方法
abstract: Children's drawings have a wonderful inventiveness, creativity, and variety to them. We present a system that automatically animates children's drawings of the human figure, is robust to the variance inherent in these depictions, and is simple and straightforward enough for anyone to use. We demonstrate the value and broad appeal of our approach by building and releasing the Animated Drawings Demo, a freely available public website that has been used by millions of people around the world. We present a set of experiments exploring the amount of training data needed for fine-tuning, as well as a perceptual study demonstrating the appeal of a novel twisted perspective retargeting technique. Finally, we introduce the Amateur Drawings Dataset, a first-of-its-kind annotated dataset, collected via the public demo, containing over 178,000 amateur drawings and corresponding user-accepted character bounding boxes, segmentation masks, and joint location annotations.
summary: Children's drawings have a wonderful inventiveness, creativity, and variety to them. We present a system that automatically animates children's drawings of the human figure, is robust to the variance inherent in these depictions, and is simple and straightforward enough for anyone to use. We demonstrate the value and broad appeal of our approach by building and releasing the Animated Drawings Demo, a freely available public website that has been used by millions of people around the world. We present a set of experiments exploring the amount of training data needed for fine-tuning, as well as a perceptual study demonstrating the appeal of a novel twisted perspective retargeting technique. Finally, we introduce the Amateur Drawings Dataset, a first-of-its-kind annotated dataset, collected via the public demo, containing over 178,000 amateur drawings and corresponding user-accepted character bounding boxes, segmentation masks, and joint location annotations.
abstract_zh: 儿童绘画具有奇妙的创造力、创造力和多样性。我们提出了一个系统，可以自动为儿童的人物画制作动画，对这些描绘中固有的差异具有鲁棒性，并且简单明了，任何人都可以使用。我们通过构建和发布动画绘图演示来展示我们方法的价值和广泛吸引力，这是一个免费的公共网站，已被世界各地数百万人使用。我们提出了一组实验，探索微调所需的训练数据量，以及一项感知研究，展示了新颖的扭曲视角重定向技术的吸引力。最后，我们介绍业余绘图数据集，这是通过公共演示收集的首个带注释数据集，包含超过 178,000 张业余绘图以及相应的用户接受的字符边界框、分割掩码和关节位置注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动动画化儿童人体素描的方法，系统具备鲁棒性和易用性，并构建了公开演示网站与业余绘画数据集。
AI.motivation: 儿童绘画具有高度创造性和多样性，但现有方法难以处理其表现差异，需开发通用且易用的动画系统以激发广泛参与。
AI.method: 设计自动动画系统，采用扭曲视角重定向技术，结合用户标注数据构建Amateur Drawings Dataset，并通过公共网站验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 公开网站获全球数百万用户使用，实验验证了训练数据需求与技术吸引力，发布包含178,000幅绘画的首个业余数据集。
AI.conclusion: 方法成功实现儿童绘画动画化，技术具有广泛吸引力，数据集为未来研究提供重要资源。

authors_text: Jannes Elstner,Raoul G. C. Schönhof,Steffen Tauber,Marco F Huber
title: Optimizing CAD Models with Latent Space Manipulation
title_zh: 通过潜在空间操作优化 CAD 模型
abstract: When it comes to the optimization of CAD models in the automation domain, neural networks currently play only a minor role. Optimizing abstract features such as automation capability is challenging, since they can be very difficult to simulate, are too complex for rule-based systems, and also have little to no data available for machine-learning methods. On the other hand, image manipulation methods that can manipulate abstract features in images such as StyleCLIP have seen much success. They rely on the latent space of pretrained generative adversarial networks, and could therefore also make use of the vast amount of unlabeled CAD data. In this paper, we show that such an approach is also suitable for optimizing abstract automation-related features of CAD parts. We achieved this by extending StyleCLIP to work with CAD models in the form of voxel models, which includes using a 3D StyleGAN and a custom classifier. Finally, we demonstrate the ability of our system for the optimiziation of automation-related features by optimizing the grabability of various CAD models. This is an open access article under the CC BY-NC-ND license (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/) Peer review under the responsibility of the scientific committee of the 33rd CIRP Design Conference.
summary: When it comes to the optimization of CAD models in the automation domain, neural networks currently play only a minor role. Optimizing abstract features such as automation capability is challenging, since they can be very difficult to simulate, are too complex for rule-based systems, and also have little to no data available for machine-learning methods. On the other hand, image manipulation methods that can manipulate abstract features in images such as StyleCLIP have seen much success. They rely on the latent space of pretrained generative adversarial networks, and could therefore also make use of the vast amount of unlabeled CAD data. In this paper, we show that such an approach is also suitable for optimizing abstract automation-related features of CAD parts. We achieved this by extending StyleCLIP to work with CAD models in the form of voxel models, which includes using a 3D StyleGAN and a custom classifier. Finally, we demonstrate the ability of our system for the optimiziation of automation-related features by optimizing the grabability of various CAD models. This is an open access article under the CC BY-NC-ND license (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/) Peer review under the responsibility of the scientific committee of the 33rd CIRP Design Conference.
abstract_zh: 当谈到自动化领域 CAD 模型的优化时，神经网络目前只发挥很小的作用。优化自动化功能等抽象特征具有挑战性，因为它们可能非常难以模拟，对于基于规则的系统来说过于复杂，并且可用于机器学习方法的数据很少甚至没有。另一方面，可以操纵图像中抽象特征的图像操纵方法（例如 StyleCLIP）已经取得了很大成功。它们依赖于预训练的生成对抗网络的潜在空间，因此也可以利用大量未标记的 CAD 数据。在本文中，我们表明这种方法也适用于优化 CAD 零件的抽象自动化相关功能。我们通过扩展 StyleCLIP 以使用体素模型形式的 CAD 模型来实现这一目标，其中包括使用 3D StyleGAN 和自定义分类器。最后，我们通过优化各种 CAD 模型的可抓取性来展示我们的系统优化自动化相关功能的能力。这是一篇遵循 CC BY-NC-ND 许可证 (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/) 的开放获取文章，由第 33 届 CIRP 设计会议科学委员会负责同行评审。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过潜空间操作优化CAD模型的抽象自动化特性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以优化CAD模型的抽象自动化特征（如自动化能力），因模拟复杂、数据稀缺且规则系统效率低。
AI.method: 扩展StyleCLIP框架以处理CAD模型的体素表示，结合3D StyleGAN和自定义分类器进行潜空间操作。
AI.result: 成功优化了多种CAD模型的抓取性等自动化相关特征，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 潜空间操作为CAD模型抽象特征优化提供了可行方案，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过潜空间操作优化CAD模型的抽象自动化特性。

ai_content.result: 成功优化了多种CAD模型的抓取性等自动化相关特征，验证了方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 潜空间操作为CAD模型抽象特征优化提供了可行方案，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

search_text: Optimizing CAD Models with Latent Space Manipulation 通过潜在空间操作优化 CAD 模型 When it comes to the optimization of CAD models in the automation domain, neural networks currently play only a minor role. Optimizing abstract features such as automation capability is challenging, since they can be very difficult to simulate, are too complex for rule-based systems, and also have little to no data available for machine-learning methods. On the other hand, image manipulation methods that can manipulate abstract features in images such as StyleCLIP have seen much success. They rely on the latent space of pretrained generative adversarial networks, and could therefore also make use of the vast amount of unlabeled CAD data. In this paper, we show that such an approach is also suitable for optimizing abstract automation-related features of CAD parts. We achieved this by extending StyleCLIP to work with CAD models in the form of voxel models, which includes using a 3D StyleGAN and a custom classifier. Finally, we demonstrate the ability of our system for the optimiziation of automation-related features by optimizing the grabability of various CAD models. This is an open access article under the CC BY-NC-ND license (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/) Peer review under the responsibility of the scientific committee of the 33rd CIRP Design Conference. 当谈到自动化领域 CAD 模型的优化时，神经网络目前只发挥很小的作用。优化自动化功能等抽象特征具有挑战性，因为它们可能非常难以模拟，对于基于规则的系统来说过于复杂，并且可用于机器学习方法的数据很少甚至没有。另一方面，可以操纵图像中抽象特征的图像操纵方法（例如 StyleCLIP）已经取得了很大成功。它们依赖于预训练的生成对抗网络的潜在空间，因此也可以利用大量未标记的 CAD 数据。在本文中，我们表明这种方法也适用于优化 CAD 零件的抽象自动化相关功能。我们通过扩展 StyleCLIP 以使用体素模型形式的 CAD 模型来实现这一目标，其中包括使用 3D StyleGAN 和自定义分类器。最后，我们通过优化各种 CAD 模型的可抓取性来展示我们的系统优化自动化相关功能的能力。这是一篇遵循 CC BY-NC-ND 许可证 (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/) 的开放获取文章，由第 33 届 CIRP 设计会议科学委员会负责同行评审。 本文提出通过潜空间操作优化CAD模型的抽象自动化特性。 Jannes Elstner,Raoul G. C. Schönhof,Steffen Tauber,Marco F Huber cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CE,cs.LG

authors_text: Marc Baltes,Nidal Abujahar,Ye Yue,Charles D. Smith,Jundong Liu
title: Joint ANN-SNN Co-training for Object Localization and Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于对象定位和图像分割的联合 ANN-SNN 联合训练
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2023
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2023
abstract: The field of machine learning has been greatly transformed with the advancement of deep artificial neural networks (ANNs) and the increased availability of annotated data. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have recently emerged as a low-power alternative to ANNs due to their sparsity nature. In this work, we propose a novel hybrid ANN-SNN co-training framework to improve the performance of converted SNNs. Our approach is a fine-tuning scheme, conducted through an alternating, forward-backward training procedure. We apply our framework to object detection and image segmentation tasks. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in achieving the design goals.
summary: The field of machine learning has been greatly transformed with the advancement of deep artificial neural networks (ANNs) and the increased availability of annotated data. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have recently emerged as a low-power alternative to ANNs due to their sparsity nature. In this work, we propose a novel hybrid ANN-SNN co-training framework to improve the performance of converted SNNs. Our approach is a fine-tuning scheme, conducted through an alternating, forward-backward training procedure. We apply our framework to object detection and image segmentation tasks. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in achieving the design goals.
abstract_zh: 随着深度人工神经网络（ANN）的进步和注释数据可用性的增加，机器学习领域发生了巨大的变化。由于其稀疏性，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 最近已成为 ANN 的低功耗替代品。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合 ANN-SNN 协同训练框架来提高转换后的 SNN 的性能。我们的方法是一种微调方案，通过交替的前向-后向训练程序进行。我们将我们的框架应用于对象检测和图像分割任务。实验证明了我们的方法在实现设计目标方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合ANN-SNN协同训练框架，用于目标定位和图像分割，以提升转换后SNN的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ANNs在机器学习中表现优异，但其高功耗限制了应用；SNNs因稀疏性具有低功耗优势，但转换后的性能需提升，故需新方法。
AI.method: 采用交替前向-反向微调训练方法，构建混合ANN-SNN协同训练框架，应用于目标检测和图像分割任务。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在目标检测和图像分割任务中有效提升转换后SNN的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的协同训练框架有效提升SNN性能，展示了ANN-SNN结合在低功耗视觉任务中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Dylan Ebert,Chen Sun,Ellie Pavlick
title: Comparing Trajectory and Vision Modalities for Verb Representation
title_zh: 比较动词表示的轨迹和视觉方式
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure
comments: 4 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Three-dimensional trajectories, or the 3D position and rotation of objects over time, have been shown to encode key aspects of verb semantics (e.g., the meanings of roll vs. slide). However, most multimodal models in NLP use 2D images as representations of the world. Given the importance of 3D space in formal models of verb semantics, we expect that these 2D images would result in impoverished representations that fail to capture nuanced differences in meaning. This paper tests this hypothesis directly in controlled experiments. We train self-supervised image and trajectory encoders, and then evaluate them on the extent to which each learns to differentiate verb concepts. Contrary to our initial expectations, we find that 2D visual modalities perform similarly well to 3D trajectories. While further work should be conducted on this question, our initial findings challenge the conventional wisdom that richer environment representations necessarily translate into better representation learning for language.
summary: Three-dimensional trajectories, or the 3D position and rotation of objects over time, have been shown to encode key aspects of verb semantics (e.g., the meanings of roll vs. slide). However, most multimodal models in NLP use 2D images as representations of the world. Given the importance of 3D space in formal models of verb semantics, we expect that these 2D images would result in impoverished representations that fail to capture nuanced differences in meaning. This paper tests this hypothesis directly in controlled experiments. We train self-supervised image and trajectory encoders, and then evaluate them on the extent to which each learns to differentiate verb concepts. Contrary to our initial expectations, we find that 2D visual modalities perform similarly well to 3D trajectories. While further work should be conducted on this question, our initial findings challenge the conventional wisdom that richer environment representations necessarily translate into better representation learning for language.
abstract_zh: 三维轨迹，或者物体随时间的 3D 位置和旋转，已被证明可以编码动词语义的关键方面（例如，滚动与滑动的含义）。然而，NLP 中的大多数多模态模型都使用 2D 图像作为世界的表示。鉴于 3D 空间在动词语义正式模型中的重要性，我们预计这些 2D 图像将导致贫乏的表示，无法捕捉含义的细微差别。本文直接在对照实验中检验了这一假设。我们训练自监督图像和轨迹编码器，然后根据每个编码器学习区分动词概念的程度来评估它们。与我们最初的预期相反，我们发现 2D 视觉模式的表现与 3D 轨迹相似。虽然应该对这个问题进行进一步的研究，但我们的初步发现挑战了传统观点，即更丰富的环境表征必然转化为更好的语言表征学习。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了二维视觉模态与三维轨迹模态在动词表征中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管三维轨迹能编码动词语义的关键信息，但现有自然语言处理模型多依赖二维图像，可能无法捕捉语义的细微差别。
AI.method: 训练自监督的图像和轨迹编码器，并评估其区分动词概念的能力。
AI.result: 实验发现二维视觉模态与三维轨迹模态在表征动词概念时表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 丰富环境表征（如三维轨迹）未必能提升语言表征学习效果，挑战了传统认知。

authors_text: Junde Xu,Zikai Lin,Donghao Zhou,Yaodong Yang,Xiangyun Liao,Bian Wu,Guangyong Chen,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: DPPMask: Masked Image Modeling with Determinantal Point Processes
title_zh: DPPMask：具有行列式点处理的掩模图像建模
abstract: Masked Image Modeling (MIM) has achieved impressive representative performance with the aim of reconstructing randomly masked images. Despite the empirical success, most previous works have neglected the important fact that it is unreasonable to force the model to reconstruct something beyond recovery, such as those masked objects. In this work, we show that uniformly random masking widely used in previous works unavoidably loses some key objects and changes original semantic information, resulting in a misalignment problem and hurting the representative learning eventually. To address this issue, we augment MIM with a new masking strategy namely the DPPMask by substituting the random process with Determinantal Point Process (DPPs) to reduce the semantic change of the image after masking. Our method is simple yet effective and requires no extra learnable parameters when implemented within various frameworks. In particular, we evaluate our method on two representative MIM frameworks, MAE and iBOT. We show that DPPMask surpassed random sampling under both lower and higher masking ratios, indicating that DPPMask makes the reconstruction task more reasonable. We further test our method on the background challenge and multi-class classification tasks, showing that our method is more robust at various tasks.
summary: Masked Image Modeling (MIM) has achieved impressive representative performance with the aim of reconstructing randomly masked images. Despite the empirical success, most previous works have neglected the important fact that it is unreasonable to force the model to reconstruct something beyond recovery, such as those masked objects. In this work, we show that uniformly random masking widely used in previous works unavoidably loses some key objects and changes original semantic information, resulting in a misalignment problem and hurting the representative learning eventually. To address this issue, we augment MIM with a new masking strategy namely the DPPMask by substituting the random process with Determinantal Point Process (DPPs) to reduce the semantic change of the image after masking. Our method is simple yet effective and requires no extra learnable parameters when implemented within various frameworks. In particular, we evaluate our method on two representative MIM frameworks, MAE and iBOT. We show that DPPMask surpassed random sampling under both lower and higher masking ratios, indicating that DPPMask makes the reconstruction task more reasonable. We further test our method on the background challenge and multi-class classification tasks, showing that our method is more robust at various tasks.
abstract_zh: 掩模图像建模（MIM）以重建随机掩模图像为目标，取得了令人印象深刻的代表性性能。尽管在经验上取得了成功，但大多数先前的工作都忽略了一个重要事实，即强迫模型重建无法恢复的东西是不合理的，例如那些被掩盖的物体。在这项工作中，我们表明，先前工作中广泛使用的均匀随机掩蔽不可避免地会丢失一些关键对象并改变原始语义信息，导致错位问题并最终损害代表性学习。为了解决这个问题，我们用一种新的掩蔽策略（即 DPPMask）增强 MIM，用行列式点过程（DPP）代替随机过程，以减少掩蔽后图像的语义变化。我们的方法简单而有效，并且在各种框架中实现时不需要额外的可学习参数。特别是，我们在两个代表性的 MIM 框架 MAE 和 iBOT 上评估了我们的方法。我们表明，DPPMask 在较低和较高掩蔽率下都优于随机采样，这表明 DPPMask 使重建任务更加合理。我们进一步在背景挑战和多类分类任务上测试我们的方法，表明我们的方法在各种任务上更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPPMask方法，通过确定性点过程改进图像掩码建模，解决传统随机掩码导致的语义信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统随机掩码策略会丢失关键物体并改变图像语义信息，导致重建任务与原始数据对齐失败，影响模型表征学习效果。
AI.method: 用确定性点过程(DPPs)替代随机掩码策略，在保持框架原有参数不变的前提下，通过数学建模实现更合理的掩码分布。
AI.result: 在MAE和iBOT框架下，DPPMask在高低掩码比例场景均优于随机采样，且在背景挑战和分类任务中展现更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DPPMask通过优化掩码策略有效提升了图像重建任务的合理性，为掩码图像建模提供了简单有效的改进方案。

search_text: DPPMask: Masked Image Modeling with Determinantal Point Processes DPPMask：具有行列式点处理的掩模图像建模 Masked Image Modeling (MIM) has achieved impressive representative performance with the aim of reconstructing randomly masked images. Despite the empirical success, most previous works have neglected the important fact that it is unreasonable to force the model to reconstruct something beyond recovery, such as those masked objects. In this work, we show that uniformly random masking widely used in previous works unavoidably loses some key objects and changes original semantic information, resulting in a misalignment problem and hurting the representative learning eventually. To address this issue, we augment MIM with a new masking strategy namely the DPPMask by substituting the random process with Determinantal Point Process (DPPs) to reduce the semantic change of the image after masking. Our method is simple yet effective and requires no extra learnable parameters when implemented within various frameworks. In particular, we evaluate our method on two representative MIM frameworks, MAE and iBOT. We show that DPPMask surpassed random sampling under both lower and higher masking ratios, indicating that DPPMask makes the reconstruction task more reasonable. We further test our method on the background challenge and multi-class classification tasks, showing that our method is more robust at various tasks. 掩模图像建模（MIM）以重建随机掩模图像为目标，取得了令人印象深刻的代表性性能。尽管在经验上取得了成功，但大多数先前的工作都忽略了一个重要事实，即强迫模型重建无法恢复的东西是不合理的，例如那些被掩盖的物体。在这项工作中，我们表明，先前工作中广泛使用的均匀随机掩蔽不可避免地会丢失一些关键对象并改变原始语义信息，导致错位问题并最终损害代表性学习。为了解决这个问题，我们用一种新的掩蔽策略（即 DPPMask）增强 MIM，用行列式点过程（DPP）代替随机过程，以减少掩蔽后图像的语义变化。我们的方法简单而有效，并且在各种框架中实现时不需要额外的可学习参数。特别是，我们在两个代表性的 MIM 框架 MAE 和 iBOT 上评估了我们的方法。我们表明，DPPMask 在较低和较高掩蔽率下都优于随机采样，这表明 DPPMask 使重建任务更加合理。我们进一步在背景挑战和多类分类任务上测试我们的方法，表明我们的方法在各种任务上更加稳健。 本文提出DPPMask方法，通过确定性点过程改进图像掩码建模，解决传统随机掩码导致的语义信息丢失问题。 Junde Xu,Zikai Lin,Donghao Zhou,Yaodong Yang,Xiangyun Liao,Bian Wu,Guangyong Chen,Pheng-Ann Heng cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hui Li,Jinghan Jia,Shijun Liang,Yuguang Yao,Saiprasad Ravishankar,Sijia Liu
title: SMUG: Towards robust MRI reconstruction by smoothed unrolling
title_zh: SMUG：通过平滑展开实现稳健的 MRI 重建
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2023
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2023
abstract: Although deep learning (DL) has gained much popularity for accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), recent studies have shown that DL-based MRI reconstruction models could be oversensitive to tiny input perturbations (that are called 'adversarial perturbations'), which cause unstable, low-quality reconstructed images. This raises the question of how to design robust DL methods for MRI reconstruction. To address this problem, we propose a novel image reconstruction framework, termed SMOOTHED UNROLLING (SMUG), which advances a deep unrolling-based MRI reconstruction model using a randomized smoothing (RS)-based robust learning operation. RS, which improves the tolerance of a model against input noises, has been widely used in the design of adversarial defense for image classification. Yet, we find that the conventional design that applies RS to the entire DL process is ineffective for MRI reconstruction. We show that SMUG addresses the above issue by customizing the RS operation based on the unrolling architecture of the DL-based MRI reconstruction model. Compared to the vanilla RS approach and several variants of SMUG, we show that SMUG improves the robustness of MRI reconstruction with respect to a diverse set of perturbation sources, including perturbations to the input measurements, different measurement sampling rates, and different unrolling steps. Code for SMUG will be available at https://github.com/LGM70/SMUG.
summary: Although deep learning (DL) has gained much popularity for accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), recent studies have shown that DL-based MRI reconstruction models could be oversensitive to tiny input perturbations (that are called 'adversarial perturbations'), which cause unstable, low-quality reconstructed images. This raises the question of how to design robust DL methods for MRI reconstruction. To address this problem, we propose a novel image reconstruction framework, termed SMOOTHED UNROLLING (SMUG), which advances a deep unrolling-based MRI reconstruction model using a randomized smoothing (RS)-based robust learning operation. RS, which improves the tolerance of a model against input noises, has been widely used in the design of adversarial defense for image classification. Yet, we find that the conventional design that applies RS to the entire DL process is ineffective for MRI reconstruction. We show that SMUG addresses the above issue by customizing the RS operation based on the unrolling architecture of the DL-based MRI reconstruction model. Compared to the vanilla RS approach and several variants of SMUG, we show that SMUG improves the robustness of MRI reconstruction with respect to a diverse set of perturbation sources, including perturbations to the input measurements, different measurement sampling rates, and different unrolling steps. Code for SMUG will be available at https://github.com/LGM70/SMUG.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习 (DL) 在加速磁共振成像 (MRI) 领域广受欢迎，但最近的研究表明，基于 DL 的 MRI 重建模型可能对微小的输入扰动（称为“对抗性扰动”）过于敏感，从而导致不稳定、低质量的重建图像。这就提出了如何设计用于 MRI 重建的鲁棒深度学习方法的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的图像重建框架，称为平滑展开（SMUG），该框架使用基于随机平滑（RS）的鲁棒学习操作来改进基于深度展开的 MRI 重建模型。 RS 提高了模型对输入噪声的容忍度，已广泛应用于图像分类的对抗性防御设计中。然而，我们发现将RS应用于整个深度学习过程的传统设计对于MRI重建来说是无效的。我们表明，SMUG 通过基于基于 DL 的 MRI 重建模型的展开架构定制 RS 操作来解决上述问题。与普通 RS 方法和 SMUG 的几种变体相比，我们表明 SMUG 提高了 MRI 重建对于各种扰动源的鲁棒性，包括对输入测量的扰动、不同的测量采样率和不同的展开步骤。 SMUG 的代码可在 https://github.com/LGM70/SMUG 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMUG框架，通过随机平滑技术提升MRI重建模型的鲁棒性，解决深度学习模型对输入扰动敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习MRI重建模型对输入微小扰动（如对抗扰动）敏感，导致重建图像质量下降，需设计更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 基于解卷积架构设计SMUG框架，将随机平滑（RS）操作定制化集成到MRI重建模型中，而非全量应用RS。
AI.result: SMUG在多种扰动场景（输入测量扰动、采样率变化、解卷积步数差异）下均表现出优于传统RS方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SMUG通过结构化随机平滑有效提升了MRI重建的稳定性，为鲁棒医学影像重建提供了新思路。

To address this problem, we propose a novel image reconstruction framework, termed SMOOTHED UNROLLING (SMUG), which advances a deep unrolling-based MRI reconstruction model using a randomized smoothing (RS)-based robust learning operation. RS, which improves the tolerance of a model against input noises, has been widely used in the design of adversarial defense for image classification. Yet, we find that the conventional design that applies RS to the entire DL process is ineffective for MRI reconstruction. We show that SMUG addresses the above issue by customizing the RS operation based on the unrolling architecture of the DL-based MRI reconstruction model. Compared to the vanilla RS approach and several variants of SMUG, we show that SMUG improves the robustness of MRI reconstruction with respect to a diverse set of perturbation sources, including perturbations to the input measurements, different measurement sampling rates, and different unrolling steps. authors_text: Sepehr Janghorbani,Gerard de Melo
title: MultiModal Bias: Introducing a Framework for Stereotypical Bias Assessment beyond Gender and Race in Vision Language Models
title_zh: 多模态偏见：在视觉语言模型中引入超越性别和种族的刻板偏见评估框架
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in self supervised training have led to a new class of pretrained vision language models. While there have been investigations of bias in multimodal models, they have mostly focused on gender and racial bias, giving much less attention to other relevant groups, such as minorities with regard to religion, nationality, sexual orientation, or disabilities. This is mainly due to lack of suitable benchmarks for such groups. We seek to address this gap by providing a visual and textual bias benchmark called MMBias, consisting of around 3,800 images and phrases covering 14 population subgroups. We utilize this dataset to assess bias in several prominent self supervised multimodal models, including CLIP, ALBEF, and ViLT. Our results show that these models demonstrate meaningful bias favoring certain groups. Finally, we introduce a debiasing method designed specifically for such large pre-trained models that can be applied as a post-processing step to mitigate bias, while preserving the remaining accuracy of the model.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in self supervised training have led to a new class of pretrained vision language models. While there have been investigations of bias in multimodal models, they have mostly focused on gender and racial bias, giving much less attention to other relevant groups, such as minorities with regard to religion, nationality, sexual orientation, or disabilities. This is mainly due to lack of suitable benchmarks for such groups. We seek to address this gap by providing a visual and textual bias benchmark called MMBias, consisting of around 3,800 images and phrases covering 14 population subgroups. We utilize this dataset to assess bias in several prominent self supervised multimodal models, including CLIP, ALBEF, and ViLT. Our results show that these models demonstrate meaningful bias favoring certain groups. Finally, we introduce a debiasing method designed specifically for such large pre-trained models that can be applied as a post-processing step to mitigate bias, while preserving the remaining accuracy of the model.
abstract_zh: 自监督训练的最新突破催生了一类新的预训练视觉语言模型。虽然对多模式模型中的偏见进行了调查，但它们主要关注性别和种族偏见，而很少关注其他相关群体，例如宗教、国籍、性取向或残疾方面的少数群体。这主要是由于缺乏针对此类群体的合适基准。我们寻求通过提供名为 MMBias 的视觉和文本偏差基准来解决这一差距，该基准由涵盖 14 个人口亚组的约 3,800 张图像和短语组成。我们利用该数据集来评估几个著名的自监督多模态模型的偏差，包括 CLIP、ALBEF 和 ViLT。我们的结果表明，这些模型表现出有利于某些群体的有意义的偏见。最后，我们引入了一种专为此类大型预训练模型设计的去偏差方法，该方法可以用作后处理步骤以减轻偏差，同时保留模型的剩余准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估视觉语言模型中除性别和种族外其他刻板印象偏见的框架，并构建了包含3800张图像和短语的MMBias基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对视觉语言模型中宗教、国籍、性取向等群体的偏见关注不足，缺乏相应评估基准，导致这些群体的偏见问题未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建覆盖14个子群体的MMBias数据集，评估CLIP、ALBEF、ViLT等模型的偏见，并提出一种针对大模型的后处理去偏方法。
AI.result: 实验发现主流模型对特定群体存在显著偏见，所提去偏方法能在保持模型精度的同时有效缓解偏见。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多模态偏见研究提供了新基准和去偏方案，为更全面的公平性评估奠定了基础。

search_text: MultiModal Bias: Introducing a Framework for Stereotypical Bias Assessment beyond Gender and Race in Vision Language Models 多模态偏见：在视觉语言模型中引入超越性别和种族的刻板偏见评估框架 Recent breakthroughs in self supervised training have led to a new class of pretrained vision language models. While there have been investigations of bias in multimodal models, they have mostly focused on gender and racial bias, giving much less attention to other relevant groups, such as minorities with regard to religion, nationality, sexual orientation, or disabilities. This is mainly due to lack of suitable benchmarks for such groups. We seek to address this gap by providing a visual and textual bias benchmark called MMBias, consisting of around 3,800 images and phrases covering 14 population subgroups. We utilize this dataset to assess bias in several prominent self supervised multimodal models, including CLIP, ALBEF, and ViLT. Our results show that these models demonstrate meaningful bias favoring certain groups. Finally, we introduce a debiasing method designed specifically for such large pre-trained models that can be applied as a post-processing step to mitigate bias, while preserving the remaining accuracy of the model. 自监督训练的最新突破催生了一类新的预训练视觉语言模型。虽然对多模式模型中的偏见进行了调查，但它们主要关注性别和种族偏见，而很少关注其他相关群体，例如宗教、国籍、性取向或残疾方面的少数群体。这主要是由于缺乏针对此类群体的合适基准。我们寻求通过提供名为 MMBias 的视觉和文本偏差基准来解决这一差距，该基准由涵盖 14 个人口亚组的约 3,800 张图像和短语组成。我们利用该数据集来评估几个著名的自监督多模态模型的偏差，包括 CLIP、ALBEF 和 ViLT。我们的结果表明，这些模型表现出有利于某些群体的有意义的偏见。最后，我们引入了一种专为此类大型预训练模型设计的去偏差方法，该方法可以用作后处理步骤以减轻偏差，同时保留模型的剩余准确性。 本文提出一种评估视觉语言模型中除性别和种族外其他刻板印象偏见的框架，并构建了包含3800张图像和短语的MMBias基准数据集。 Sepehr Janghorbani,Gerard de Melo cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Ryan Webster,Julien Rabin,Loic Simon,Frederic Jurie
title: On the De-duplication of LAION-2B
title_zh: 关于LAION-2B的重复数据删除
abstract: Generative models, such as DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion, have societal implications that extend beyond the field of computer science. These models require large image databases like LAION-2B, which contain two billion images. At this scale, manual inspection is difficult and automated analysis is challenging. In addition, recent studies show that duplicated images pose copyright problems for models trained on LAION2B, which hinders its usability. This paper proposes an algorithmic chain that runs with modest compute, that compresses CLIP features to enable efficient duplicate detection, even for vast image volumes. Our approach demonstrates that roughly 700 million images, or about 30\%, of LAION-2B's images are likely duplicated. Our method also provides the histograms of duplication on this dataset, which we use to reveal more examples of verbatim copies by Stable Diffusion and further justify the approach. The current version of the de-duplicated set will be distributed online.
summary: Generative models, such as DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion, have societal implications that extend beyond the field of computer science. These models require large image databases like LAION-2B, which contain two billion images. At this scale, manual inspection is difficult and automated analysis is challenging. In addition, recent studies show that duplicated images pose copyright problems for models trained on LAION2B, which hinders its usability. This paper proposes an algorithmic chain that runs with modest compute, that compresses CLIP features to enable efficient duplicate detection, even for vast image volumes. Our approach demonstrates that roughly 700 million images, or about 30\%, of LAION-2B's images are likely duplicated. Our method also provides the histograms of duplication on this dataset, which we use to reveal more examples of verbatim copies by Stable Diffusion and further justify the approach. The current version of the de-duplicated set will be distributed online.
abstract_zh: 生成模型，例如 DALL-E、Midjourney 和 Stable Diffusion，其社会影响超出了计算机科学领域。这些模型需要像 LAION-2B 这样包含 20 亿图像的大型图像数据库。在这种规模下，手动检查很困难，自动分析也具有挑战性。此外，最近的研究表明，重复的图像会给 LAION2B 上​​训练的模型带来版权问题，从而阻碍其可用性。本文提出了一种以适度计算运行的算法链，该算法链压缩 CLIP 特征以实现高效的重复检测，即使对于大量图像也是如此。我们的方法表明，LAION-2B 图像中大约 7 亿张图像（约 30%）可能是重复的。我们的方法还提供了该数据集上的重复直方图，我们用它来揭示稳定扩散逐字复制的更多示例，并进一步证明该方法的合理性。当前版本的重复数据删除集将在线分发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种算法链，用于压缩CLIP特征以高效检测LAION-2B数据集中的重复图像，解决其版权问题并提升数据集可用性。
AI.motivation: LAION-2B数据集包含20亿张图像，其中重复图像引发版权争议且影响模型训练质量，手动检查效率低下，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 通过压缩CLIP特征并构建算法链，在计算资源有限的情况下实现大规模图像重复检测，生成重复分布直方图以验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 检测出约7亿张重复图像（占30%），揭示Stable Diffusion等模型存在直接复制案例，并发布去重后的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效识别大规模图像重复问题，为改进训练数据质量提供可行方案，凸显去重在大型图像数据集中的必要性。

authors_text: Elena Merino-Gómez,Pedro Reviriego,Fernando Moral
title: Unfinished Architectures: A Perspective from Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 未完成的架构：人工智能的视角
comment: Accepted for publication in EGA (https://polipapers.upv.es/index.php/EGA)
comments: Accepted for publication in EGA (https://polipapers.upv.es/index.php/EGA)
abstract: Unfinished buildings are a constant throughout the history of architecture and have given rise to intense debates on the opportuneness of their completion, in addition to offering alibis for theorizing about the compositional possibilities in coherence with the finished parts. The development of Artificial Intelligence (AI) opens new avenues for the proposal of possibilities for the completion of unfinished architectures. Specifically, with the recent appearance of tools such as DALL-E, capable of completing images guided by a textual description, it is possible to count on the help of AI for architectural design tasks. In this article we explore the use of these new AI tools for the completion of unfinished facades of historical temples and analyse the still germinal stadium in the field of architectural graphic composition.
summary: Unfinished buildings are a constant throughout the history of architecture and have given rise to intense debates on the opportuneness of their completion, in addition to offering alibis for theorizing about the compositional possibilities in coherence with the finished parts. The development of Artificial Intelligence (AI) opens new avenues for the proposal of possibilities for the completion of unfinished architectures. Specifically, with the recent appearance of tools such as DALL-E, capable of completing images guided by a textual description, it is possible to count on the help of AI for architectural design tasks. In this article we explore the use of these new AI tools for the completion of unfinished facades of historical temples and analyse the still germinal stadium in the field of architectural graphic composition.
abstract_zh: 未完工的建筑在整个建筑史上屡见不鲜，除了为与已完成部分相一致的构图可能性提供理论依据外，还引发了对其竣工时机的激烈争论。人工智能（AI）的发展为完成未完成的建筑的可能性开辟了新的途径。具体来说，随着最近 DALL-E 等工具的出现，能够在文本描述的指导下完成图像，可以依靠人工智能来完成建筑设计任务。在本文中，我们探讨了如何使用这些新的人工智能工具来完成历史寺庙未完工的外墙，并在建筑图形构图领域分析仍在萌芽的体育场。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能工具在完成历史建筑未完成立面设计中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 未完成建筑引发关于其完成必要性的争论，同时AI图像生成技术为建筑创作提供新方法。
AI.method: 利用DALL-E等AI工具，基于文本描述生成历史寺庙未完成立面的图像化设计方案。
AI.result: 验证了AI在建筑图形创作中的初步可行性，但指出该领域仍处于萌芽阶段，存在技术与理论局限。
AI.conclusion: AI为建筑完成提供新视角，但需进一步探索技术成熟度与设计伦理边界。

authors_text: Sabrina Osmany
title: Visualizing Semiotics in Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 生成对抗网络中的符号学可视化
abstract: We perform a set of experiments to demonstrate that images generated using a Generative Adversarial Network can be modified using 'semiotics.' We show that just as physical attributes such as the hue and saturation of an image can be modified, so too can its non-physical, abstract properties using our method. For example, the design of a flight attendant's uniform may be modified to look more 'alert,' less 'austere,' or more 'practical.' The form of a house can be modified to appear more 'futuristic,' a car more 'friendly' a pair of sneakers, 'evil.' Our method uncovers latent visual iconography associated with the semiotic property of interest, enabling a process of visual form-finding using abstract concepts. Our approach is iterative and allows control over the degree of attribute presence and can be used to aid the design process to yield emergent visual concepts.
summary: We perform a set of experiments to demonstrate that images generated using a Generative Adversarial Network can be modified using 'semiotics.' We show that just as physical attributes such as the hue and saturation of an image can be modified, so too can its non-physical, abstract properties using our method. For example, the design of a flight attendant's uniform may be modified to look more 'alert,' less 'austere,' or more 'practical.' The form of a house can be modified to appear more 'futuristic,' a car more 'friendly' a pair of sneakers, 'evil.' Our method uncovers latent visual iconography associated with the semiotic property of interest, enabling a process of visual form-finding using abstract concepts. Our approach is iterative and allows control over the degree of attribute presence and can be used to aid the design process to yield emergent visual concepts.
abstract_zh: 我们进行了一组实验来证明使用生成对抗网络生成的图像可以使用“符号学”进行修改。我们证明，正如图像的色调和饱和度等物理属性可以修改一样，使用我们的方法也可以修改其非物理、抽象属性。例如，空乘人员制服的设计可以修改为看起来更“警觉”、不那么“严肃”或更“实用”。房子的形状可以修​​改得更“未来主义”，汽车更“友好”，一双运动鞋更“邪恶”。我们的方法揭示了与感兴趣的符号学属性相关的潜在视觉图像，从而实现了使用抽象概念进行视觉形式寻找的过程。我们的方法是迭代的，允许控制属性存在的程度，并可用于帮助设计过程产生紧急的视觉概念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验展示生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像可以通过'符号学'方法进行修改，实现对图像非物理抽象属性的调整。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成方法主要关注物理属性（如色彩、饱和度）的修改，而缺乏对图像抽象符号属性（如'警觉性'、'未来感'）的控制能力，限制了设计领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 提出一种迭代方法，通过挖掘与目标符号属性相关的潜在视觉符号学特征，实现对生成图像抽象属性的可控调整，允许调节属性强度并支持设计过程中的概念探索。
AI.result: 成功修改了制服、房屋、汽车等物体的符号属性（如使制服更'警觉'、房屋更'未来感'），验证了方法在视觉形式探索中的有效性，可生成新颖的视觉概念。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过符号学属性的可控调整，为设计领域提供了新的视觉形式探索工具，使生成模型能够基于抽象概念进行创造性设计。

search_text: Visualizing Semiotics in Generative Adversarial Networks 生成对抗网络中的符号学可视化 We perform a set of experiments to demonstrate that images generated using a Generative Adversarial Network can be modified using 'semiotics.' We show that just as physical attributes such as the hue and saturation of an image can be modified, so too can its non-physical, abstract properties using our method. For example, the design of a flight attendant's uniform may be modified to look more 'alert,' less 'austere,' or more 'practical.' The form of a house can be modified to appear more 'futuristic,' a car more 'friendly' a pair of sneakers, 'evil.' Our method uncovers latent visual iconography associated with the semiotic property of interest, enabling a process of visual form-finding using abstract concepts. Our approach is iterative and allows control over the degree of attribute presence and can be used to aid the design process to yield emergent visual concepts. 我们进行了一组实验来证明使用生成对抗网络生成的图像可以使用“符号学”进行修改。我们证明，正如图像的色调和饱和度等物理属性可以修改一样，使用我们的方法也可以修改其非物理、抽象属性。例如，空乘人员制服的设计可以修改为看起来更“警觉”、不那么“严肃”或更“实用”。房子的形状可以修​​改得更“未来主义”，汽车更“友好”，一双运动鞋更“邪恶”。我们的方法揭示了与感兴趣的符号学属性相关的潜在视觉图像，从而实现了使用抽象概念进行视觉形式寻找的过程。我们的方法是迭代的，允许控制属性存在的程度，并可用于帮助设计过程产生紧急的视觉概念。 本文通过实验展示生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像可以通过'符号学'方法进行修改，实现对图像非物理抽象属性的调整。 Sabrina Osmany cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Joshua Power,Derek Jacoby,Marc-Antoine Drouin,Guillaume Durand,Yvonne Coady,Julian Meng
title: Toward Data-Driven Glare Classification and Prediction for Marine Megafauna Survey
title_zh: 针对海洋巨型动物调查的数据驱动眩光分类和预测
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 5th ICPR Workshop on Computer Vison for Automated Analysis of Underwater Imagery (CVAUI 2022)
comments: 15 pages, 4 figures, 5th ICPR Workshop on Computer Vison for Automated Analysis of Underwater Imagery (CVAUI 2022)
abstract: Critically endangered species in Canadian North Atlantic waters are systematically surveyed to estimate species populations which influence governing policies. Due to its impact on policy, population accuracy is important. This paper lays the foundation towards a data-driven glare modelling system, which will allow surveyors to preemptively minimize glare. Surveyors use a detection function to estimate megafauna populations which are not explicitly seen. A goal of the research is to maximize useful imagery collected, to that end we will use our glare model to predict glare and optimize for glare-free data collection. To build this model, we leverage a small labelled dataset to perform semi-supervised learning. The large dataset is labelled with a Cascading Random Forest Model using a naïve pseudo-labelling approach. A reflectance model is used, which pinpoints features of interest, to populate our datasets which allows for context-aware machine learning models. The pseudo-labelled dataset is used on two models: a Multilayer Perceptron and a Recurrent Neural Network. With this paper, we lay the foundation for data-driven mission planning; a glare modelling system which allows surveyors to preemptively minimize glare and reduces survey reliance on the detection function as an estimator of whale populations during periods of poor subsurface visibility.

abstract_zh: 对加拿大北大西洋水域的极度濒危物种进行了系统调查，以估计影响管理政策的物种数量。由于其对政策的影响，人口准确性非常重要。本文为数据驱动的眩光建模系统奠定了基础，该系统将使测量人员能够先发制人地最大限度地减少眩光。测量员使用检测功能来估计未明确看到的巨型动物种群。该研究的目标是最大限度地收集有用的图像，为此，我们将使用眩光模型来预测眩光并优化无眩光数据收集。为了构建这个模型，我们利用一个小的标记数据集来执行半监督学习。使用简单的伪标记方法使用级联随机森林模型对大型数据集进行标记。使用反射率模型来精确定位感兴趣的特征，以填充我们的数据集，从而允许上下文感知的机器学习模型。伪标记数据集用于两个模型：多层感知器和循环神经网络。通过这篇论文，我们为数据驱动的任务规划奠定了基础；眩光建模系统，使测量员能够先发制人地最大限度地减少眩光，并减少测量对探测功能的依赖，作为在地下能见度较差期间对鲸鱼种群进行估计的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的眩光分类与预测系统，用于海洋巨兽调查，以提高种群数量估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 加拿大北 Atlantic 水域濒危物种的调查数据直接影响政策制定，而眩光导致的图像质量下降会降低种群统计准确性，需优化数据采集。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习，结合小规模标注数据与大规模伪标签数据，利用反射模型增强特征，并通过多层感知机和循环神经网络训练眩光预测模型。
AI.result: 建立了数据驱动的眩光建模系统基础，可预测眩光并优化无眩光数据采集，减少对传统检测函数的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为海洋巨兽调查提供更高效的数据采集方案，支持未来基于数据驱动的任务规划与政策制定。

authors_text: Somsukla Maiti,Akshansh Gupta
title: LocalEyenet: Deep Attention framework for Localization of Eyes
title_zh: LocalEyenet：眼睛定位的深度注意力框架
abstract: Development of human machine interface has become a necessity for modern day machines to catalyze more autonomy and more efficiency. Gaze driven human intervention is an effective and convenient option for creating an interface to alleviate human errors. Facial landmark detection is very crucial for designing a robust gaze detection system. Regression based methods capacitate good spatial localization of the landmarks corresponding to different parts of the faces. But there are still scope of improvements which have been addressed by incorporating attention. In this paper, we have proposed a deep coarse-to-fine architecture called LocalEyenet for localization of only the eye regions that can be trained end-to-end. The model architecture, build on stacked hourglass backbone, learns the self-attention in feature maps which aids in preserving global as well as local spatial dependencies in face image. We have incorporated deep layer aggregation in each hourglass to minimize the loss of attention over the depth of architecture. Our model shows good generalization ability in cross-dataset evaluation and in real-time localization of eyes.
summary: Development of human machine interface has become a necessity for modern day machines to catalyze more autonomy and more efficiency. Gaze driven human intervention is an effective and convenient option for creating an interface to alleviate human errors. Facial landmark detection is very crucial for designing a robust gaze detection system. Regression based methods capacitate good spatial localization of the landmarks corresponding to different parts of the faces. But there are still scope of improvements which have been addressed by incorporating attention. In this paper, we have proposed a deep coarse-to-fine architecture called LocalEyenet for localization of only the eye regions that can be trained end-to-end. The model architecture, build on stacked hourglass backbone, learns the self-attention in feature maps which aids in preserving global as well as local spatial dependencies in face image. We have incorporated deep layer aggregation in each hourglass to minimize the loss of attention over the depth of architecture. Our model shows good generalization ability in cross-dataset evaluation and in real-time localization of eyes.
abstract_zh: 人机界面的开发已成为现代机器催化更多自主性和更高效率的必要条件。凝视驱动的人工干预是创建界面以减少人为错误的有效且方便的选择。面部标志检测对于设计强大的注视检测系统非常重要。基于回归的方法能够对与面部不同部分相对应的标志进行良好的空间定位。但仍然存在通过纳入注意力来解决的改进范围。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 LocalEyenet 的深度从粗到精的架构，用于仅定位可以端到端训练的眼睛区域。该模型架构建立在堆叠沙漏主干上，学习特征图中的自注意力，这有助于保留面部图像中的全局和局部空间依赖性。我们在每个沙漏中融入了深层聚合，以尽量减少对架构深度的注意力损失。我们的模型在跨数据集评估和眼睛实时定位方面表现出良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LocalEyenet的深度注意力框架，用于精准定位人眼区域。
AI.motivation: 面部特征点检测对构建鲁棒的凝视检测系统至关重要，传统回归方法在空间定位上存在改进空间，需引入注意力机制提升性能。
AI.method: 基于堆叠沙漏网络构建端到端可训练的粗到细架构，通过特征图自注意力机制保留全局与局部空间依赖关系，并采用深度层聚合减少网络深度导致的注意力损失。
AI.result: 模型在跨数据集评估和实时人眼定位任务中展现出良好的泛化能力与定位精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的注意力驱动框架有效提升了眼区定位性能，为凝视交互系统提供了可靠的技术支持。

Our model shows good generalization ability in cross-dataset evaluation and in real-time localization of eyes. 人机界面的开发已成为现代机器催化更多自主性和更高效率的必要条件。凝视驱动的人工干预是创建界面以减少人为错误的有效且方便的选择。面部标志检测对于设计强大的注视检测系统非常重要。基于回归的方法能够对与面部不同部分相对应的标志进行良好的空间定位。但仍然存在通过纳入注意力来解决的改进范围。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 LocalEyenet 的深度从粗到精的架构，用于仅定位可以端到端训练的眼睛区域。该模型架构建立在堆叠沙漏主干上，学习特征图中的自注意力，这有助于保留面部图像中的全局和局部空间依赖性。我们在每个沙漏中融入了深层聚合，以尽量减少对架构深度的注意力损失。我们的模型在跨数据集评估和眼睛实时定位方面表现出良好的泛化能力。 本文提出一种名为LocalEyenet的深度注意力框架，用于精准定位人眼区域。 Somsukla Maiti,Akshansh Gupta cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xinrui Chen,Bingquan Zhang
title: A XGBoost Algorithm-based Fatigue Recognition Model Using Face Detection
title_zh: 基于 XGBoost 算法的人脸检测疲劳识别模型
comment: 6 pages;2 fiqures
comments: 6 pages;2 fiqures
abstract: As fatigue is normally revealed in the eyes and mouth of a person's face, this paper tried to construct a XGBoost Algorithm-Based fatigue recognition model using the two indicators, EAR (Eye Aspect Ratio) and MAR(Mouth Aspect Ratio). With an accuracy rate of 87.37% and sensitivity rate of 89.14%, the model was proved to be efficient and valid for further applications.
summary: As fatigue is normally revealed in the eyes and mouth of a person's face, this paper tried to construct a XGBoost Algorithm-Based fatigue recognition model using the two indicators, EAR (Eye Aspect Ratio) and MAR(Mouth Aspect Ratio). With an accuracy rate of 87.37% and sensitivity rate of 89.14%, the model was proved to be efficient and valid for further applications.
abstract_zh: 由于疲劳通常表现在人脸的眼睛和嘴巴上，本文尝试利用EAR（眼睛长宽比）和MAR（嘴长宽比）两个指标构建基于XGBoost算法的疲劳识别模型。该模型的准确率为87.37%，敏感率为89.14%，证明该模型是高效的，有利于进一步应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于XGBoost算法和面部检测的疲劳识别模型，利用眼睑和嘴巴的特征指标进行疲劳状态判断。
AI.motivation: 疲劳状态通常通过面部眼部和口部特征表现，现有方法需改进准确率和实用性。
AI.method: 采用XGBoost算法，结合眼睑纵横比（EAR）和嘴巴纵横比（MAR）两个关键指标构建分类模型。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到87.37%的准确率和89.14%的灵敏度，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为疲劳检测提供了高效可行的解决方案，具备实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yunbo Zhang,Alexander Clegg,Sehoon Ha,Greg Turk,Yuting Ye
title: Learning to Transfer In-Hand Manipulations Using a Greedy Shape Curriculum
title_zh: 学习使用贪心形状课程转移手动操作
comment: Published as a conference paper at EuroGraphics 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at EuroGraphics 2023
abstract: In-hand object manipulation is challenging to simulate due to complex contact dynamics, non-repetitive finger gaits, and the need to indirectly control unactuated objects. Further adapting a successful manipulation skill to new objects with different shapes and physical properties is a similarly challenging problem. In this work, we show that natural and robust in-hand manipulation of simple objects in a dynamic simulation can be learned from a high quality motion capture example via deep reinforcement learning with careful designs of the imitation learning problem. We apply our approach on both single-handed and two-handed dexterous manipulations of diverse object shapes and motions. We then demonstrate further adaptation of the example motion to a more complex shape through curriculum learning on intermediate shapes morphed between the source and target object. While a naive curriculum of progressive morphs often falls short, we propose a simple greedy curriculum search algorithm that can successfully apply to a range of objects such as a teapot, bunny, bottle, train, and elephant.
summary: In-hand object manipulation is challenging to simulate due to complex contact dynamics, non-repetitive finger gaits, and the need to indirectly control unactuated objects. Further adapting a successful manipulation skill to new objects with different shapes and physical properties is a similarly challenging problem. In this work, we show that natural and robust in-hand manipulation of simple objects in a dynamic simulation can be learned from a high quality motion capture example via deep reinforcement learning with careful designs of the imitation learning problem. We apply our approach on both single-handed and two-handed dexterous manipulations of diverse object shapes and motions. We then demonstrate further adaptation of the example motion to a more complex shape through curriculum learning on intermediate shapes morphed between the source and target object. While a naive curriculum of progressive morphs often falls short, we propose a simple greedy curriculum search algorithm that can successfully apply to a range of objects such as a teapot, bunny, bottle, train, and elephant.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的接触动力学、非重复的手指步态以及间接控制未驱动物体的需要，手动物体操纵的模拟具有挑战性。进一步使成功的操纵技能适应不同形状和物理属性的新物体也是一个同样具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们表明，可以通过深度强化学习和精心设计的模仿学习问题，从高质量的运动捕捉示例中学习动态模拟中简单对象的自然且鲁棒的手动操作。我们将我们的方法应用于不同物体形状和运动的单手和双手灵巧操作。然后，我们通过对源对象和目标对象之间变形的中间形状的课程学习，演示将示例运动进一步适应更复杂的形状。虽然渐进变形的朴素课程常常达不到要求，但我们提出了一种简单的贪婪课程搜索算法，可以成功应用于茶壶、兔子、瓶子、火车和大象等一系列物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过贪心形状课程学习，实现手部操作技能在不同形状物体间的迁移，解决动态模拟中复杂接触动力学和适应性问题。
AI.motivation: 手部物体操作模拟面临接触动力学复杂、手指动作非重复及间接控制未驱动物体等挑战，而将现有技能迁移至新形状物体同样困难。
AI.method: 基于深度强化学习和模仿学习，设计高质量动作捕捉示例，并通过中间形状的贪心课程搜索算法逐步适应目标物体。
AI.result: 方法成功应用于茶壶、兔子、瓶子等多样化物体的单手/双手操作，验证了贪心课程在复杂形状迁移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 贪心形状课程算法能有效解决跨物体操作迁移问题，为复杂手部操作任务提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Zhipeng Chang,Ruiling Ma,Wenliang Jia
title: Pedestrain detection for low-light vision proposal
title_zh: 低光视觉建议的行人检测
abstract: The demand for pedestrian detection has created a challenging problem for various visual tasks such as image fusion. As infrared images can capture thermal radiation information, image fusion between infrared and visible images could significantly improve target detection under environmental limitations. In our project, we would approach by preprocessing our dataset with image fusion technique, then using Vision Transformer model to detect pedestrians from the fused images. During the evaluation procedure, a comparison would be made between YOLOv5 and the revised ViT model performance on our fused images
summary: The demand for pedestrian detection has created a challenging problem for various visual tasks such as image fusion. As infrared images can capture thermal radiation information, image fusion between infrared and visible images could significantly improve target detection under environmental limitations. In our project, we would approach by preprocessing our dataset with image fusion technique, then using Vision Transformer model to detect pedestrians from the fused images. During the evaluation procedure, a comparison would be made between YOLOv5 and the revised ViT model performance on our fused images
abstract_zh: 行人检测的需求给图像融合等各种视觉任务带来了挑战性的问题。由于红外图像可以捕获热辐射信息，红外和可见光图像之间的图像融合可以显着改善环境限制下的目标检测。在我们的项目中，我们将使用图像融合技术预处理数据集，然后使用 Vision Transformer 模型从融合图像中检测行人。在评估过程中，将在我们的融合图像上对 YOLOv5 和修订后的 ViT 模型性能进行比较

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过红外与可见光图像融合技术结合Vision Transformer模型，提升低光环境下行人检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 低光环境下行人检测面临挑战，传统方法效果有限，而红外图像融合可见光图像可增强目标特征，从而提升检测性能。
AI.method: 采用图像融合技术预处理数据集，利用Vision Transformer模型对融合后的图像进行行人检测，并与YOLOv5模型进行性能对比。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于图像融合的Vision Transformer模型在低光环境下行人检测任务中优于YOLOv5模型。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了图像融合技术与Vision Transformer结合在低光行人检测中的有效性，为相关视觉任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yulong Zhang,Shuhao Chen,Yu Zhang,Jiangang Lu
title: Diffusion-based Target Sampler for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于无监督域适应的基于扩散的目标采样器
abstract: Limited transferability hinders the performance of deep learning models when applied to new application scenarios. Recently, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has achieved significant progress in addressing this issue via learning domain-invariant features. However, large domain shifts and the sample scarcity in the target domain make existing UDA methods achieve suboptimal performance. To alleviate these issues, we propose a plug-and-play Diffusion-based Target Sampler (DTS) to generate high fidelity and diversity pseudo target samples. By introducing class-conditional information, the labels of the generated target samples can be controlled. The generated samples can well simulate the data distribution of the target domain and help existing UDA methods transfer from the source domain to the target domain more easily, thus improving the transfer performance. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that the performance of existing UDA methods can be greatly improved through the proposed DTS method.
summary: Limited transferability hinders the performance of deep learning models when applied to new application scenarios. Recently, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has achieved significant progress in addressing this issue via learning domain-invariant features. However, large domain shifts and the sample scarcity in the target domain make existing UDA methods achieve suboptimal performance. To alleviate these issues, we propose a plug-and-play Diffusion-based Target Sampler (DTS) to generate high fidelity and diversity pseudo target samples. By introducing class-conditional information, the labels of the generated target samples can be controlled. The generated samples can well simulate the data distribution of the target domain and help existing UDA methods transfer from the source domain to the target domain more easily, thus improving the transfer performance. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that the performance of existing UDA methods can be greatly improved through the proposed DTS method.
abstract_zh: 有限的可移植性阻碍了深度学习模型应用于新应用场景时的性能。最近，无监督域适应（UDA）通过学习域不变特征在解决这个问题方面取得了重大进展。然而，大的域转移和目标域中的样本稀缺使得现有的 UDA 方法实现了次优性能。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种即插即用的基于扩散的目标采样器（DTS）来生成高保真度和多样性的伪目标样本。通过引入类条件信息，可以控制生成的目标样本的标签。生成的样本可以很好地模拟目标域的数据分布，帮助现有的UDA方法更容易地从源域转移到目标域，从而提高转移性​​能。对各种基准的大量实验表明，通过所提出的 DTS 方法可以极大地提高现有 UDA 方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的无监督域适应目标样本生成方法DTS，通过生成高质量伪样本提升域适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在面对大域转移和目标域样本稀缺时表现不佳，难以生成有效伪样本影响模型迁移效果。
AI.method: 设计扩散模型生成器结合类别条件控制，生成符合目标域分布的高保真伪样本，增强现有UDA方法的域适应能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证表明，DTS能显著提升主流UDA方法的性能，尤其在样本稀缺场景下效果更突出。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的伪样本生成策略有效缓解域适应中的样本不足问题，为UDA研究提供新思路和实用工具。

authors_text: Wenqian Zhao,Xufeng Yao,Ziyang Yu,Guojin Chen,Yuzhe Ma,Bei Yu,Martin D. F. Wong
title: AdaOPC: A Self-Adaptive Mask Optimization Framework For Real Design Patterns
title_zh: AdaOPC：真实设计模式的自适应掩模优化框架
abstract: Optical proximity correction (OPC) is a widely-used resolution enhancement technique (RET) for printability optimization. Recently, rigorous numerical optimization and fast machine learning are the research focus of OPC in both academia and industry, each of which complements the other in terms of robustness or efficiency. We inspect the pattern distribution on a design layer and find that different sub-regions have different pattern complexity. Besides, we also find that many patterns repetitively appear in the design layout, and these patterns may possibly share optimized masks. We exploit these properties and propose a self-adaptive OPC framework to improve efficiency. Firstly we choose different OPC solvers adaptively for patterns of different complexity from an extensible solver pool to reach a speed/accuracy co-optimization. Apart from that, we prove the feasibility of reusing optimized masks for repeated patterns and hence, build a graph-based dynamic pattern library reusing stored masks to further speed up the OPC flow. Experimental results show that our framework achieves substantial improvement in both performance and efficiency.
summary: Optical proximity correction (OPC) is a widely-used resolution enhancement technique (RET) for printability optimization. Recently, rigorous numerical optimization and fast machine learning are the research focus of OPC in both academia and industry, each of which complements the other in terms of robustness or efficiency. We inspect the pattern distribution on a design layer and find that different sub-regions have different pattern complexity. Besides, we also find that many patterns repetitively appear in the design layout, and these patterns may possibly share optimized masks. We exploit these properties and propose a self-adaptive OPC framework to improve efficiency. Firstly we choose different OPC solvers adaptively for patterns of different complexity from an extensible solver pool to reach a speed/accuracy co-optimization. Apart from that, we prove the feasibility of reusing optimized masks for repeated patterns and hence, build a graph-based dynamic pattern library reusing stored masks to further speed up the OPC flow. Experimental results show that our framework achieves substantial improvement in both performance and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 光学邻近校正 (OPC) 是一种广泛使用的用于优化印刷适性的分辨率增强技术 (RET)。近年来，严格的数值优化和快速机器学习是OPC在学术界和工业界的研究重点，两者在鲁棒性或效率方面相辅相成。我们检查设计层上的图案分布，发现不同的子区域具有不同的图案复杂度。此外，我们还发现许多图案重复出现在设计布局中，并且这些图案可能共享优化的掩模。我们利用这些特性并提出了一种自适应 OPC 框架来提高效率。首先，我们从可扩展的求解器池中针对不同复杂度的模式自适应地选择不同的 OPC 求解器，以达到速度/精度协同优化。除此之外，我们证明了重复使用优化掩码的可行性，因此，构建一个基于图形的动态模式库，重用存储的掩码来进一步加速 OPC 流程。实验结果表明，我们的框架在性能和效率上都取得了实质性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaOPC框架，通过自适应选择OPC求解器和重复模式掩模复用，提升光刻工艺优化效率。
AI.motivation: 传统OPC方法在处理复杂设计时存在效率与精度难以平衡的问题，而设计中不同区域的图案复杂度差异及重复图案特性未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 构建可扩展的求解器池根据图案复杂度动态选择求解器，并建立基于图结构的动态图案库实现重复图案掩模复用。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在保持精度的同时显著提升了OPC流程的效率，尤其在处理大规模重复图案设计时效果突出。
AI.conclusion: AdaOPC通过自适应优化策略与掩模复用机制，为复杂光刻设计提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Cheng-Hao Tu,Hong-You Chen,David Carlyn,Wei-Lun Chao
title: Learning Fractals by Gradient Descent
title_zh: 通过梯度下降学习分形
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2023
abstract: Fractals are geometric shapes that can display complex and self-similar patterns found in nature (e.g., clouds and plants). Recent works in visual recognition have leveraged this property to create random fractal images for model pre-training. In this paper, we study the inverse problem -- given a target image (not necessarily a fractal), we aim to generate a fractal image that looks like it. We propose a novel approach that learns the parameters underlying a fractal image via gradient descent. We show that our approach can find fractal parameters of high visual quality and be compatible with different loss functions, opening up several potentials, e.g., learning fractals for downstream tasks, scientific understanding, etc.
summary: Fractals are geometric shapes that can display complex and self-similar patterns found in nature (e.g., clouds and plants). Recent works in visual recognition have leveraged this property to create random fractal images for model pre-training. In this paper, we study the inverse problem -- given a target image (not necessarily a fractal), we aim to generate a fractal image that looks like it. We propose a novel approach that learns the parameters underlying a fractal image via gradient descent. We show that our approach can find fractal parameters of high visual quality and be compatible with different loss functions, opening up several potentials, e.g., learning fractals for downstream tasks, scientific understanding, etc.
abstract_zh: 分形是几何形状，可以显示自然界中发现的复杂且自相似的图案（例如云和植物）。最近的视觉识别工作利用这一特性为模型预训练创建随机分形图像。在本文中，我们研究逆问题——给定目标图像（不一定是分形），我们的目标是生成看起来像它的分形图像。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过梯度下降来学习分形图像背后的参数。我们表明，我们的方法可以找到高视觉质量的分形参数，并且与不同的损失函数兼容，开辟了多种潜力，例如，学习下游任务的分形、科学理解等。

AI.tldr: 给定目标图像，生成具有相似视觉效果的分形图像
AI.motivation: 现有研究利用分形图像进行模型预训练，但如何生成与目标图像相似的分形图像仍存在挑战，需探索新方法以提升视觉质量和适用性
AI.method: 通过梯度下降优化分形参数，结合不同损失函数生成高质量分形图像
AI.result: 成功生成高视觉质量的分形图像，且适用于多种损失函数，具备下游任务应用潜力
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决分形生成逆问题，为下游任务和科学理解提供新途径

In this paper, we study the inverse problem -- given a target image (not necessarily a fractal), we aim to generate a fractal image that looks like it. We propose a novel approach that learns the parameters underlying a fractal image via gradient descent. We show that our approach can find fractal parameters of high visual quality and be compatible with different loss functions, opening up several potentials, e.g., learning fractals for downstream tasks, scientific understanding, etc. 分形是几何形状，可以显示自然界中发现的复杂且自相似的图案（例如云和植物）。最近的视觉识别工作利用这一特性为模型预训练创建随机分形图像。在本文中，我们研究逆问题——给定目标图像（不一定是分形），我们的目标是生成看起来像它的分形图像。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过梯度下降来学习分形图像背后的参数。我们表明，我们的方法可以找到高视觉质量的分形参数，并且与不同的损失函数兼容，开辟了多种潜力，例如，学习下游任务的分形、科学理解等。 给定目标图像，生成具有相似视觉效果的分形图像 Cheng-Hao Tu,Hong-You Chen,David Carlyn,Wei-Lun Chao cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Tan,Longxiu Huang,HanQin Cai,Yifei Lou
title: Non-convex approaches for low-rank tensor completion under tubal sampling
title_zh: 输卵管采样下低秩张量完成的非凸方法
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), pp. 1-5. IEEE, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), pp. 1-5. IEEE, 2023
abstract: Tensor completion is an important problem in modern data analysis. In this work, we investigate a specific sampling strategy, referred to as tubal sampling. We propose two novel non-convex tensor completion frameworks that are easy to implement, named tensor $L_1$-$L_2$ (TL12) and tensor completion via CUR (TCCUR). We test the efficiency of both methods on synthetic data and a color image inpainting problem. Empirical results reveal a trade-off between the accuracy and time efficiency of these two methods in a low sampling ratio. Each of them outperforms some classical completion methods in at least one aspect.
summary: Tensor completion is an important problem in modern data analysis. In this work, we investigate a specific sampling strategy, referred to as tubal sampling. We propose two novel non-convex tensor completion frameworks that are easy to implement, named tensor $L_1$-$L_2$ (TL12) and tensor completion via CUR (TCCUR). We test the efficiency of both methods on synthetic data and a color image inpainting problem. Empirical results reveal a trade-off between the accuracy and time efficiency of these two methods in a low sampling ratio. Each of them outperforms some classical completion methods in at least one aspect.
abstract_zh: 张量补全是现代数据分析中的一个重要问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种特定的采样策略，称为输卵管采样。我们提出了两种易于实现的新型非凸张量补全框架，名为张量 $L_1$-$L_2$ (TL12) 和通过 CUR (TCCUR) 的张量补全。我们测试了两种方法在合成数据和彩色图像修复问题上的效率。经验结果揭示了在低采样率下这两种方法的准确性和时间效率之间的权衡。它们中的每一种都至少在一个方面优于一些经典的完成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在管采样策略下低秩张量补全问题，提出两种非凸方法TL12和TCCUR。
AI.motivation: 现有张量补全方法在管采样场景下存在效率与精度难以兼顾的问题，需探索更优的非凸求解框架。
AI.method: 设计两种非凸张量补全框架：基于L1-L2正则化的TL12方法，以及利用CUR分解的TCCUR方法。
AI.result: 实验表明两种方法在低采样率下呈现精度与时间效率的权衡，且各自优于经典方法至少一个方面。
AI.conclusion: 非凸方法在管采样张量补全中有效，未来可进一步优化算法权衡或拓展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Priyanka Das,Naveen G Venkataswamy,Laura Holsopple,Masudul H Imtiaz,Michael Schuckers,Stephanie Schuckers
title: Longitudinal Performance of Iris Recognition in Children: Time Intervals up to Six years
title_zh: 儿童虹膜识别的纵向表现：时间间隔长达六年
comment: Accepted for presentation at International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics 2023 (IWBF)
comments: Accepted for presentation at International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics 2023 (IWBF)
abstract: The temporal stability of iris recognition performance is core to its success as a biometric modality. With the expanding horizon of applications for children, gaps in the knowledge base on the temporal stability of iris recognition performance in children have impacted decision-making during applications at the global scale. This report presents the most extensive analysis of longitudinal iris recognition performance in children with data from the same 230 children over 6.5 years between enrollment and query for ages 4 to 17 years. Assessment of match scores, statistical modelling of variability factors impacting match scores and in-depth assessment of the root causes of the false rejections concludes no impact on iris recognition performance due to aging.
summary: The temporal stability of iris recognition performance is core to its success as a biometric modality. With the expanding horizon of applications for children, gaps in the knowledge base on the temporal stability of iris recognition performance in children have impacted decision-making during applications at the global scale. This report presents the most extensive analysis of longitudinal iris recognition performance in children with data from the same 230 children over 6.5 years between enrollment and query for ages 4 to 17 years. Assessment of match scores, statistical modelling of variability factors impacting match scores and in-depth assessment of the root causes of the false rejections concludes no impact on iris recognition performance due to aging.
abstract_zh: 虹膜识别性能的时间稳定性是其作为生物识别模式取得成功的核心。随着儿童应用范围的不断扩大，儿童虹膜识别性能时间稳定性知识库的差距影响了全球范围内应用的决策。该报告对儿童的纵向虹膜识别性能进行了最广泛的分析，数据来自 4 至 17 岁的 6.5 岁以上的 230 名儿童的登记和查询。对匹配分数的评估、影响匹配分数的变异因素的统计建模以及对错误拒绝根本原因的深入评估得出结论，老化不会对虹膜识别性能产生影响。

AI.tldr: 研究儿童虹膜识别性能在长达6.5年时间内的纵向表现，分析年龄增长对识别准确性的影响。
AI.motivation: 儿童应用场景扩展导致虹膜识别技术在儿童群体中的时序稳定性研究存在知识缺口，需填补以支持全球应用决策。
AI.method: 追踪230名儿童6.5年数据（年龄4-17岁），评估匹配分数、建模变异性因素并分析假拒绝根本原因。
AI.result: 发现年龄增长未对虹膜识别性能产生负面影响，假拒绝原因与年龄无关。
AI.conclusion: 儿童虹膜特征具有长期稳定性，支持虹膜识别作为儿童生物特征应用的可靠技术。

authors_text: Jurdana Masuma Iqrah,Younghyun Koo,Wei Wang,Hongjie Xie,Sushil Prasad
title: Toward Polar Sea-Ice Classification using Color-based Segmentation and Auto-labeling of Sentinel-2 Imagery to Train an Efficient Deep Learning Model
title_zh: 使用 Sentinel-2 图像的基于颜色的分割和自动标记进行极地海冰分类，以训练高效的深度学习模型
comment: 2nd Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE), February 2023
comments: 2nd Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE), February 2023
abstract: Global warming is an urgent issue that is generating catastrophic environmental changes, such as the melting of sea ice and glaciers, particularly in the polar regions. The melting pattern and retreat of polar sea ice cover is an essential indicator of global warming. The Sentinel-2 satellite (S2) captures high-resolution optical imagery over the polar regions. This research aims at developing a robust and effective system for classifying polar sea ice as thick or snow-covered, young or thin, or open water using S2 images. A key challenge is the lack of labeled S2 training data to serve as the ground truth. We demonstrate a method with high precision to segment and automatically label the S2 images based on suitably determined color thresholds and employ these auto-labeled data to train a U-Net machine model (a fully convolutional neural network), yielding good classification accuracy. Evaluation results over S2 data from the polar summer season in the Ross Sea region of the Antarctic show that the U-Net model trained on auto-labeled data has an accuracy of 90.18% over the original S2 images, whereas the U-Net model trained on manually labeled data has an accuracy of 91.39%. Filtering out the thin clouds and shadows from the S2 images further improves U-Net's accuracy, respectively, to 98.97% for auto-labeled and 98.40% for manually labeled training datasets.
summary: Global warming is an urgent issue that is generating catastrophic environmental changes, such as the melting of sea ice and glaciers, particularly in the polar regions. The melting pattern and retreat of polar sea ice cover is an essential indicator of global warming. The Sentinel-2 satellite (S2) captures high-resolution optical imagery over the polar regions. This research aims at developing a robust and effective system for classifying polar sea ice as thick or snow-covered, young or thin, or open water using S2 images. A key challenge is the lack of labeled S2 training data to serve as the ground truth. We demonstrate a method with high precision to segment and automatically label the S2 images based on suitably determined color thresholds and employ these auto-labeled data to train a U-Net machine model (a fully convolutional neural network), yielding good classification accuracy. Evaluation results over S2 data from the polar summer season in the Ross Sea region of the Antarctic show that the U-Net model trained on auto-labeled data has an accuracy of 90.18% over the original S2 images, whereas the U-Net model trained on manually labeled data has an accuracy of 91.39%. Filtering out the thin clouds and shadows from the S2 images further improves U-Net's accuracy, respectively, to 98.97% for auto-labeled and 98.40% for manually labeled training datasets.
abstract_zh: 全球变暖是一个紧迫的问题，正在引发灾难性的环境变化，例如海冰和冰川融化，特别是在极地地区。极地海冰覆盖的融化模式和消退是全球变暖的重要指标。 Sentinel-2 卫星 (S2) 捕获极地地区的高分辨率光学图像。这项研究旨在开发一个强大而有效的系统，使用 S2 图像将极地海冰分类为厚海冰或冰雪覆盖、年轻海冰或薄海冰或开放水域。一个关键的挑战是缺乏标记的 S2 训练数据来作为基本事实。我们展示了一种高精度的方法，可以根据适当确定的颜色阈值对 S2 图像进行分割和自动标记，并利用这些自动标记的数据来训练 U-Net 机器模型（全卷积神经网络），从而产生良好的分类精度。对南极罗斯海地区极地夏季S2数据的评估结果表明，自动标记数据训练的U-Net模型比原始S2图像的准确率达到90.18%，而手动标记数据训练的U-Net模型准确率达到91.39%。从 S2 图像中过滤掉薄云和阴影进一步提高了 U-Net 的准确率，自动标记的训练数据集的准确率达到 98.97%，手动标记的训练数据集的准确率达到 98.40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Sentinel-2影像的颜色分割与自动标注方法，用于训练深度学习模型实现极地海冰分类。
AI.motivation: 全球变暖导致极地海冰加速消融，但缺乏足够的标注数据制约了海冰分类模型的训练与应用。
AI.method: 通过设定颜色阈值对Sentinel-2影像进行分割与自动标注，利用生成的数据训练U-Net模型，并通过滤除云层和阴影进一步提升分类精度。
AI.result: 自动标注数据训练的U-Net模型在原始影像上准确率达90.18%，手动标注数据达91.39%；滤除云影后分别提升至98.97%和98.40%。
AI.conclusion: 自动标注方法可有效替代人工标注，结合影像预处理后模型性能接近人工标注水平，为极地海冰监测提供了高效解决方案。
