motivation: 全球变暖导致极地海冰加速消融，但缺乏足够的标注数据制约了海冰分类模型的训练与应用。
method: 通过设定颜色阈值对Sentinel-2影像进行分割与自动标注，利用生成的数据训练U-Net模型，并通过滤除云层和阴影进一步提升分类精度。
result: 自动标注数据训练的U-Net模型在原始影像上准确率达90.18%，手动标注数据达91.39%；滤除云影后分别提升至98.97%和98.40%。
conclusion: 自动标注方法可有效替代人工标注，结合影像预处理后模型性能接近人工标注水平，为极地海冰监测提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Toward Polar Sea-Ice Classification using Color-based Segmentation and Auto-labeling of Sentinel-2 Imagery to Train an Efficient Deep Learning Model 使用 Sentinel-2 图像的基于颜色的分割和自动标记进行极地海冰分类，以训练高效的深度学习模型 Global warming is an urgent issue that is generating catastrophic environmental changes, such as the melting of sea ice and glaciers, particularly in the polar regions. The melting pattern and retreat of polar sea ice cover is an essential indicator of global warming. The Sentinel-2 satellite (S2) captures high-resolution optical imagery over the polar regions. This research aims at developing a robust and effective system for classifying polar sea ice as thick or snow-covered, young or thin, or open water using S2 images. A key challenge is the lack of labeled S2 training data to serve as the ground truth. We demonstrate a method with high precision to segment and automatically label the S2 images based on suitably determined color thresholds and employ these auto-labeled data to train a U-Net machine model (a fully convolutional neural network), yielding good classification accuracy. Evaluation results over S2 data from the polar summer season in the Ross Sea region of the Antarctic show that the U-Net model trained on auto-labeled data has an accuracy of 90.18% over the original S2 images, whereas the U-Net model trained on manually labeled data has an accuracy of 91.39%. Filtering out the thin clouds and shadows from the S2 images further improves U-Net's accuracy, respectively, to 98.97% for auto-labeled and 98.40% for manually labeled training datasets. 全球变暖是一个紧迫的问题，正在引发灾难性的环境变化，例如海冰和冰川融化，特别是在极地地区。极地海冰覆盖的融化模式和消退是全球变暖的重要指标。 Sentinel-2 卫星 (S2) 捕获极地地区的高分辨率光学图像。这项研究旨在开发一个强大而有效的系统，使用 S2 图像将极地海冰分类为厚海冰或冰雪覆盖、年轻海冰或薄海冰或开放水域。一个关键的挑战是缺乏标记的 S2 训练数据来作为基本事实。我们展示了一种高精度的方法，可以根据适当确定的颜色阈值对 S2 图像进行分割和自动标记，并利用这些自动标记的数据来训练 U-Net 机器模型（全卷积神经网络），从而产生良好的分类精度。对南极罗斯海地区极地夏季S2数据的评估结果表明，自动标记数据训练的U-Net模型比原始S2图像的准确率达到90.18%，而手动标记数据训练的U-Net模型准确率达到91.39%。从 S2 图像中过滤掉薄云和阴影进一步提高了 U-Net 的准确率，自动标记的训练数据集的准确率达到 98.97%，手动标记的训练数据集的准确率达到 98.40%。 本文提出一种基于Sentinel-2影像的颜色分割与自动标注方法，用于训练深度学习模型实现极地海冰分类。 Jurdana Masuma Iqrah,Younghyun Koo,Wei Wang,Hongjie Xie,Sushil Prasad cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Sébastien Bubeck,Varun Chandrasekaran,Ronen Eldan,Johannes Gehrke,Eric Horvitz,Ece Kamar,Peter Lee,Yin Tat Lee,Yuanzhi Li,Scott Lundberg,Harsha Nori,Hamid Palangi,Marco Tulio Ribeiro,Yi Zhang
title: Sparks of Artificial General Intelligence: Early experiments with GPT-4
title_zh: 通用人工智能的火花：GPT-4 的早期实验
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) researchers have been developing and refining large language models (LLMs) that exhibit remarkable capabilities across a variety of domains and tasks, challenging our understanding of learning and cognition. The latest model developed by OpenAI, GPT-4, was trained using an unprecedented scale of compute and data. In this paper, we report on our investigation of an early version of GPT-4, when it was still in active development by OpenAI. We contend that (this early version of) GPT-4 is part of a new cohort of LLMs (along with ChatGPT and Google's PaLM for example) that exhibit more general intelligence than previous AI models. We discuss the rising capabilities and implications of these models. We demonstrate that, beyond its mastery of language, GPT-4 can solve novel and difficult tasks that span mathematics, coding, vision, medicine, law, psychology and more, without needing any special prompting. Moreover, in all of these tasks, GPT-4's performance is strikingly close to human-level performance, and often vastly surpasses prior models such as ChatGPT. Given the breadth and depth of GPT-4's capabilities, we believe that it could reasonably be viewed as an early (yet still incomplete) version of an artificial general intelligence (AGI) system. In our exploration of GPT-4, we put special emphasis on discovering its limitations, and we discuss the challenges ahead for advancing towards deeper and more comprehensive versions of AGI, including the possible need for pursuing a new paradigm that moves beyond next-word prediction. We conclude with reflections on societal influences of the recent technological leap and future research directions.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) researchers have been developing and refining large language models (LLMs) that exhibit remarkable capabilities across a variety of domains and tasks, challenging our understanding of learning and cognition. The latest model developed by OpenAI, GPT-4, was trained using an unprecedented scale of compute and data. In this paper, we report on our investigation of an early version of GPT-4, when it was still in active development by OpenAI. We contend that (this early version of) GPT-4 is part of a new cohort of LLMs (along with ChatGPT and Google's PaLM for example) that exhibit more general intelligence than previous AI models. We discuss the rising capabilities and implications of these models. We demonstrate that, beyond its mastery of language, GPT-4 can solve novel and difficult tasks that span mathematics, coding, vision, medicine, law, psychology and more, without needing any special prompting. Moreover, in all of these tasks, GPT-4's performance is strikingly close to human-level performance, and often vastly surpasses prior models such as ChatGPT. Given the breadth and depth of GPT-4's capabilities, we believe that it could reasonably be viewed as an early (yet still incomplete) version of an artificial general intelligence (AGI) system. In our exploration of GPT-4, we put special emphasis on discovering its limitations, and we discuss the challenges ahead for advancing towards deeper and more comprehensive versions of AGI, including the possible need for pursuing a new paradigm that moves beyond next-word prediction. We conclude with reflections on societal influences of the recent technological leap and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 研究人员一直在开发和完善大型语言模型 (LLM)，这些模型在各种领域和任务中展现出卓越的能力，挑战着我们对学习和认知的理解。 OpenAI 开发的最新模型 GPT-4 使用前所未有的计算和数据规模进行训练。在本文中，我们报告了对 GPT-4 早期版本的调查，当时 OpenAI 仍在积极开发该版本。我们认为（这个早期版本的）GPT-4 是新一批 LLM（例如 ChatGPT 和 Google 的 PaLM）的一部分，它们比以前的 AI 模型表现出更通用的智能。我们讨论这些模型不断增强的功能和影响。我们证明，除了掌握语言之外，GPT-4 还可以解决涵盖数学、编码、视觉、医学、法律、心理学等领域的新颖且困难的任务，而无需任何特殊提示。此外，在所有这些任务中，GPT-4 的性能惊人地接近人类水平，并且常常远远超过 ChatGPT 等先前模型。鉴于 GPT-4 功能的广度和深度，我们相信它可以合理地被视为通用人工智能 (AGI) 系统的早期（但仍不完整）版本。在我们对 GPT-4 的探索中，我们特别强调发现其局限性，并讨论了推进更深入、更全面的 AGI 版本所面临的挑战，包括可能需要追求超越下一个单词预测的新范式。最后，我们反思了近期技术飞跃的社会影响和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了GPT-4早期版本的通用人工智能潜力，通过多领域任务测试其能力并探讨其局限性。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型是否具备超越特定任务的通用智能，推动人工智能向人工通用智能（AGI）发展。
AI.method: 对GPT-4早期版本进行跨领域（数学、编程、视觉、医学等）任务测试，无需特殊提示即可评估其表现。
AI.result: GPT-4在多数任务中表现接近人类水平，显著优于先前模型，但存在局限性，需新范式突破当前预测机制。
AI.conclusion: GPT-4可视为早期AGI雏形，但需解决现有局限并探索超越下一个词预测的新方法以实现更全面的AGI。

authors_text: Vivien van Veldhuizen,Sharvaree Vadgama,Onno J. de Boer,Sybren Meijer,Erik J. Bekkers
title: Modeling Barrett's Esophagus Progression using Geometric Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用几何变分自编码器对巴雷特食管进展进行建模
abstract: Early detection of Barrett's Esophagus (BE), the only known precursor to Esophageal adenocarcinoma (EAC), is crucial for effectively preventing and treating esophageal cancer. In this work, we investigate the potential of geometric Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) to learn a meaningful latent representation that captures the progression of BE. We show that hyperspherical VAE (S-VAE) and Kendall Shape VAE show improved classification accuracy, reconstruction loss, and generative capacity. Additionally, we present a novel autoencoder architecture that can generate qualitative images without the need for a variational framework while retaining the benefits of an autoencoder, such as improved stability and reconstruction quality.
summary: Early detection of Barrett's Esophagus (BE), the only known precursor to Esophageal adenocarcinoma (EAC), is crucial for effectively preventing and treating esophageal cancer. In this work, we investigate the potential of geometric Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) to learn a meaningful latent representation that captures the progression of BE. We show that hyperspherical VAE (S-VAE) and Kendall Shape VAE show improved classification accuracy, reconstruction loss, and generative capacity. Additionally, we present a novel autoencoder architecture that can generate qualitative images without the need for a variational framework while retaining the benefits of an autoencoder, such as improved stability and reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 巴雷特食管（BE）是食管腺癌（EAC）唯一已知的前兆，早期发现对于有效预防和治疗食管癌至关重要。在这项工作中，我们研究了几何变分自动编码器（VAE）的潜力，以学习捕获 BE 进展的有意义的潜在表示。我们表明，超球面 VAE (S-VAE) 和 Kendall 形状 VAE 显示出改进的分类精度、重建损失和生成能力。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的自动编码器架构，可以生成定性图像，而不需要变分框架，同时保留自动编码器的优点，例如提高稳定性和重建质量。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究使用几何变分自编码器（VAEs）来建模巴雷特食管（BE）的进展，以提高早期检测和预测能力。
AI.motivation: 巴雷特食管是食管腺癌的唯一已知前兆，早期检测对其预防和治疗至关重要，但现有方法在捕捉疾病进展方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用超球面VAE（S-VAE）和Kendall形状VAE，并提出一种无需变分框架的新自编码器架构，以生成高质量图像并提升稳定性。
AI.result: S-VAE和Kendall形状VAE在分类准确率、重建损失和生成能力上表现更优，新架构在保持重建质量的同时实现了定性图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 几何VAE有效捕捉BE进展特征，未来可进一步优化模型以提升临床应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究使用几何变分自编码器（VAEs）来建模巴雷特食管（BE）的进展，以提高早期检测和预测能力。

authors_text: Yuxin Zhang,Fan Tang,Weiming Dong,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Tong-Yee Lee,Changsheng Xu
title: A Unified Arbitrary Style Transfer Framework via Adaptive Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过自适应对比学习的统一任意风格迁移框架
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.09542
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.09542
abstract: We present Unified Contrastive Arbitrary Style Transfer (UCAST), a novel style representation learning and transfer framework, which can fit in most existing arbitrary image style transfer models, e.g., CNN-based, ViT-based, and flow-based methods. As the key component in image style transfer tasks, a suitable style representation is essential to achieve satisfactory results. Existing approaches based on deep neural network typically use second-order statistics to generate the output. However, these hand-crafted features computed from a single image cannot leverage style information sufficiently, which leads to artifacts such as local distortions and style inconsistency. To address these issues, we propose to learn style representation directly from a large amount of images based on contrastive learning, by taking the relationships between specific styles and the holistic style distribution into account. Specifically, we present an adaptive contrastive learning scheme for style transfer by introducing an input-dependent temperature. Our framework consists of three key components, i.e., a parallel contrastive learning scheme for style representation and style transfer, a domain enhancement module for effective learning of style distribution, and a generative network for style transfer. We carry out qualitative and quantitative evaluations to show that our approach produces superior results than those obtained via state-of-the-art methods.

Existing approaches based on deep neural network typically use second-order statistics to generate the output. To address these issues, we propose to learn style representation directly from a large amount of images based on contrastive learning, by taking the relationships between specific styles and the holistic style distribution into account. Specifically, we present an adaptive contrastive learning scheme for style transfer by introducing an input-dependent temperature. Our framework consists of three key components, i.e., a parallel contrastive learning scheme for style representation and style transfer, a domain enhancement module for effective learning of style distribution, and a generative network for style transfer. We carry out qualitative and quantitative evaluations to show that our approach produces superior results than those obtained via state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了统一对比任意风格迁移（UCAST），一种新颖的风格表示学习和迁移框架，它可以适合大多数现有的任意图像风格迁移模型，例如基于 CNN、基于 ViT 和基于流的方法。作为图像风格迁移任务的关键组成部分，合适的风格表示对于获得满意的结果至关重要。基于深度神经网络的现有方法通常使用二阶统计量来生成输出。然而，这些从单个图像计算得出的手工特征无法充分利用风格信息，从而导致局部扭曲和风格不一致等伪影。为了解决这些问题，我们建议通过考虑特定风格和整体风格分布之间的关系，直接从基于对比学习的大量图像中学习风格表示。具体来说，我们通过引入依赖于输入的温度，提出了一种用于风格迁移的自适应对比学习方案。我们的框架由三个关键组件组成，即用于风格表示和风格迁移的并行对比学习方案、用于有效学习风格分布的领域增强模块以及用于风格迁移的生成网络。我们进行定性和定量评估，以表明我们的方法产生的结果优于通过最先进的方法获得的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应对比学习的统一任意风格迁移框架UCAST，适用于多种现有风格迁移模型。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法依赖手工设计的二阶统计特征，难以充分捕捉风格信息，导致局部失真和风格不一致问题。
AI.method: 通过对比学习直接从大规模图像中学习风格表示，引入输入相关温度参数，包含并行对比学习、领域增强模块和生成网络三个核心组件。
AI.result: 在定性和定量评估中，该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，生成更一致且高质量的风格迁移结果。
AI.conclusion: 自适应对比学习有效提升了风格表示能力，所提框架具有良好的泛化性，可适配多种风格迁移模型架构。

authors_text: Tommaso Calò,Luigi De Russis
title: Evaluation of Sketch-Based and Semantic-Based Modalities for Mockup Generation
title_zh: 基于草图和基于语义的模型生成模式的评估
abstract: Design mockups are essential instruments for visualizing and testing design ideas. However, the process of generating mockups can be time-consuming and challenging for designers. In this article, we present and evaluate two different modalities for generating mockup ideas to support designers in their work: (1) a sketch-based approach to generate mockups based on hand-drawn sketches, and (2) a semantic-based approach to generate interfaces based on a set of predefined design elements. To evaluate the effectiveness of these two approaches, we conducted a series of experiments with 13 participants in which we asked them to generate mockups using each modality. Our results show that sketch-based generation was more intuitive and expressive, while semantic-based generative AI obtained better results in terms of quality and fidelity. Both methods can be valuable tools for UI designers looking to increase their creativity and efficiency.
summary: Design mockups are essential instruments for visualizing and testing design ideas. However, the process of generating mockups can be time-consuming and challenging for designers. In this article, we present and evaluate two different modalities for generating mockup ideas to support designers in their work: (1) a sketch-based approach to generate mockups based on hand-drawn sketches, and (2) a semantic-based approach to generate interfaces based on a set of predefined design elements. To evaluate the effectiveness of these two approaches, we conducted a series of experiments with 13 participants in which we asked them to generate mockups using each modality. Our results show that sketch-based generation was more intuitive and expressive, while semantic-based generative AI obtained better results in terms of quality and fidelity. Both methods can be valuable tools for UI designers looking to increase their creativity and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 设计模型是可视化和测试设计理念的重要工具。然而，生成模型的过程对于设计师来说可能非常耗时且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出并评估了两种不同的生成模型想法的方式，以支持设计师的工作：（1）基于草图的方法，用于根据手绘草图生成模型；（2）基于语义的方法，用于基于一组预定义的设计元素生成界面。为了评估这两种方法的有效性，我们对 13 名参与者进行了一系列实验，要求他们使用每种模式生成模型。我们的结果表明，基于草图的生成更加直观和富有表现力，而基于语义的生成人工智能在质量和保真度方面获得了更好的结果。对于希望提高创造力和效率的 UI 设计师来说，这两种方法都是很有价值的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于草图和基于语义的两种模态在生成设计原型中的效果。
AI.motivation: 设计原型生成过程耗时且具有挑战性，需探索更高效的支持工具以提升设计师的创造力和效率。
AI.method: 通过13名参与者的实验，分别使用基于手绘草图和预定义设计元素的语义生成方法生成原型，并对比两种方法的效果。
AI.result: 基于草图的方法更直观且表达性强，而基于语义的生成方法在质量和保真度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法各有优势，均可作为UI设计师提升创意和效率的辅助工具。

authors_text: Godfrin Ismail,Kenneth Chesoli,Golda Moni,Kinyua Gikunda
title: Comparison of Probabilistic Deep Learning Methods for Autism Detection
title_zh: 自闭症检测的概率深度学习方法比较
abstract: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is one neuro developmental disorder that is now widespread in the world. ASD persists throughout the life of an individual, impacting the way they behave and communicate, resulting to notable deficits consisting of social life retardation, repeated behavioural traits and a restriction in their interests. Early detection of the disorder helps in the onset treatment and helps one to lead a normal life. There are clinical approaches used in detection of autism, relying on behavioural data and in worst cases, neuroimaging. Quantitative methods involving machine learning have been studied and developed to overcome issues with clinical approaches. These quantitative methods rely on machine learning, with some complex methods based on deep learning developed to accelerate detection and diagnosis of ASD. These literature is aimed at exploring most state-of-the-art probabilistic methods in use today, characterizing them with the type of dataset they're most applied on, their accuracy according to their novel research and how well they are suited in ASD classification. The findings will purposely serve as a benchmark in selection of the model to use when performing ASD detection.
summary: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is one neuro developmental disorder that is now widespread in the world. ASD persists throughout the life of an individual, impacting the way they behave and communicate, resulting to notable deficits consisting of social life retardation, repeated behavioural traits and a restriction in their interests. Early detection of the disorder helps in the onset treatment and helps one to lead a normal life. There are clinical approaches used in detection of autism, relying on behavioural data and in worst cases, neuroimaging. Quantitative methods involving machine learning have been studied and developed to overcome issues with clinical approaches. These quantitative methods rely on machine learning, with some complex methods based on deep learning developed to accelerate detection and diagnosis of ASD. These literature is aimed at exploring most state-of-the-art probabilistic methods in use today, characterizing them with the type of dataset they're most applied on, their accuracy according to their novel research and how well they are suited in ASD classification. The findings will purposely serve as a benchmark in selection of the model to use when performing ASD detection.
abstract_zh: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）是一种目前在世界范围内广泛传播的神经发育障碍。自闭症谱系障碍在人的一生中持续存在，影响他们的行为和沟通方式，导致显着的缺陷，包括社交生活迟缓、重复的行为特征和兴趣限制。早期发现这种疾病有助于发病治疗并帮助人们过上正常的生活。有一些临床方法可用于检测自闭症，这些方法依赖于行为数据，在最坏的情况下还依赖于神经影像学。人们已经研究和开发了涉及机器学习的定量方法，以克服临床方法的问题。这些定量方法依赖于机器学习，并开发了一些基于深度学习的复杂方法来加速 ASD 的检测和诊断。这些文献旨在探索当今使用的最先进的概率方法，根据它们最常应用的数据集类型、根据其新颖研究得出的准确性以及它们在 ASD 分类中的适用程度来描述它们。研究结果将特意作为选择执行 ASD 检测时使用的模型的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了当前最先进的概率深度学习方法在自闭症检测中的应用效果，分析其数据集适用性、准确性及分类能力，为模型选择提供基准。
AI.motivation: 传统临床检测方法存在主观性及效率问题，需借助定量机器学习方法提升自闭症早期检测的准确性与可推广性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理并比较主流概率深度学习模型在自闭症分类任务中的数据集类型、算法特性及实验结果。
AI.result: 确定了不同概率深度学习方法在自闭症检测中的性能差异，明确了其在特定数据集上的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 概率深度学习方法在自闭症检测中展现出潜力，但需进一步优化模型架构与数据预处理策略以提升泛化能力。

search_text: Comparison of Probabilistic Deep Learning Methods for Autism Detection 自闭症检测的概率深度学习方法比较 Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is one neuro developmental disorder that is now widespread in the world. ASD persists throughout the life of an individual, impacting the way they behave and communicate, resulting to notable deficits consisting of social life retardation, repeated behavioural traits and a restriction in their interests. Early detection of the disorder helps in the onset treatment and helps one to lead a normal life. There are clinical approaches used in detection of autism, relying on behavioural data and in worst cases, neuroimaging. Quantitative methods involving machine learning have been studied and developed to overcome issues with clinical approaches. These quantitative methods rely on machine learning, with some complex methods based on deep learning developed to accelerate detection and diagnosis of ASD. These literature is aimed at exploring most state-of-the-art probabilistic methods in use today, characterizing them with the type of dataset they're most applied on, their accuracy according to their novel research and how well they are suited in ASD classification. The findings will purposely serve as a benchmark in selection of the model to use when performing ASD detection. 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）是一种目前在世界范围内广泛传播的神经发育障碍。自闭症谱系障碍在人的一生中持续存在，影响他们的行为和沟通方式，导致显着的缺陷，包括社交生活迟缓、重复的行为特征和兴趣限制。早期发现这种疾病有助于发病治疗并帮助人们过上正常的生活。有一些临床方法可用于检测自闭症，这些方法依赖于行为数据，在最坏的情况下还依赖于神经影像学。人们已经研究和开发了涉及机器学习的定量方法，以克服临床方法的问题。这些定量方法依赖于机器学习，并开发了一些基于深度学习的复杂方法来加速 ASD 的检测和诊断。这些文献旨在探索当今使用的最先进的概率方法，根据它们最常应用的数据集类型、根据其新颖研究得出的准确性以及它们在 ASD 分类中的适用程度来描述它们。研究结果将特意作为选择执行 ASD 检测时使用的模型的基准。 本文比较了当前最先进的概率深度学习方法在自闭症检测中的应用效果，分析其数据集适用性、准确性及分类能力，为模型选择提供基准。 Godfrin Ismail,Kenneth Chesoli,Golda Moni,Kinyua Gikunda cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ana Lawry Aguila,James Chapman,Andre Altmann
title: Multi-modal Variational Autoencoders for normative modelling across multiple imaging modalities
title_zh: 用于跨多种成像模式的规范建模的多模态变分自动编码器
abstract: One of the challenges of studying common neurological disorders is disease heterogeneity including differences in causes, neuroimaging characteristics, comorbidities, or genetic variation. Normative modelling has become a popular method for studying such cohorts where the 'normal' behaviour of a physiological system is modelled and can be used at subject level to detect deviations relating to disease pathology. For many heterogeneous diseases, we expect to observe abnormalities across a range of neuroimaging and biological variables. However, thus far, normative models have largely been developed for studying a single imaging modality. We aim to develop a multi-modal normative modelling framework where abnormality is aggregated across variables of multiple modalities and is better able to detect deviations than uni-modal baselines. We propose two multi-modal VAE normative models to detect subject level deviations across T1 and DTI data. Our proposed models were better able to detect diseased individuals, capture disease severity, and correlate with patient cognition than baseline approaches. We also propose a multivariate latent deviation metric, measuring deviations from the joint latent space, which outperformed feature-based metrics.
summary: One of the challenges of studying common neurological disorders is disease heterogeneity including differences in causes, neuroimaging characteristics, comorbidities, or genetic variation. Normative modelling has become a popular method for studying such cohorts where the 'normal' behaviour of a physiological system is modelled and can be used at subject level to detect deviations relating to disease pathology. For many heterogeneous diseases, we expect to observe abnormalities across a range of neuroimaging and biological variables. However, thus far, normative models have largely been developed for studying a single imaging modality. We aim to develop a multi-modal normative modelling framework where abnormality is aggregated across variables of multiple modalities and is better able to detect deviations than uni-modal baselines. We propose two multi-modal VAE normative models to detect subject level deviations across T1 and DTI data. Our proposed models were better able to detect diseased individuals, capture disease severity, and correlate with patient cognition than baseline approaches. We also propose a multivariate latent deviation metric, measuring deviations from the joint latent space, which outperformed feature-based metrics.
abstract_zh: 研究常见神经系统疾病的挑战之一是疾病异质性，包括病因、神经影像特征、合并症或遗传变异的差异。规范建模已成为研究此类群体的流行方法，其中对生理系统的“正常”行为进行建模，并可在受试者水平上用于检测与疾病病理学相关的偏差。对于许多异质性疾病，我们期望观察一系列神经影像和生物学变量的异常。然而，到目前为止，规范模型主要是为了研究单一成像模式而开发的。我们的目标是开发一个多模态规范建模框架，其中异常情况在多种模态的变量之间聚合，并且比单模态基线能够更好地检测偏差。我们提出了两种多模态 VAE 规范模型来检测 T1 和 DTI 数据中的受试者水平偏差。与基线方法相比，我们提出的模型能够更好地检测患病个体、捕获疾病严重程度并与患者认知相关。我们还提出了一种多变量潜在偏差度量，测量联合潜在空间的偏差，其性能优于基于特征的度量。

AI.tldr: 开发多模态变分自编码器框架，用于跨多种神经影像模态的规范建模，以更有效地检测疾病偏离。
AI.motivation: 现有规范建模方法主要针对单一成像模态，难以全面捕捉异质性疾病在多种神经影像和生物变量中的异常，需开发多模态整合方法以提高疾病检测和严重程度评估能力。
AI.method: 提出两种多模态变分自编码器（VAE）规范模型，整合T1和DTI数据，引入多变量潜在空间偏离度量，以跨模态聚合异常信息。
AI.result: 模型在检测疾病患者、评估疾病严重程度及与患者认知能力的相关性方面优于单一模态基线方法，且多变量潜在偏离度量优于基于特征的指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模态规范建模框架能有效整合多源数据，提升疾病偏离检测性能，为异质性神经系统疾病的分析提供新方法。

authors_text: Charles Y Zhang,Ashish Shrivastava
title: AptSim2Real: Approximately-Paired Sim-to-Real Image Translation
title_zh: AptSim2Real：近似配对的模拟到真实图像转换
abstract: Advancements in graphics technology has increased the use of simulated data for training machine learning models. However, the simulated data often differs from real-world data, creating a distribution gap that can decrease the efficacy of models trained on simulation data in real-world applications. To mitigate this gap, sim-to-real domain transfer modifies simulated images to better match real-world data, enabling the effective use of simulation data in model training. Sim-to-real transfer utilizes image translation methods, which are divided into two main categories: paired and unpaired image-to-image translation. Paired image translation requires a perfect pixel match, making it difficult to apply in practice due to the lack of pixel-wise correspondence between simulation and real-world data. Unpaired image translation, while more suitable for sim-to-real transfer, is still challenging to learn for complex natural scenes. To address these challenges, we propose a third category: approximately-paired sim-to-real translation, where the source and target images do not need to be exactly paired. Our approximately-paired method, AptSim2Real, exploits the fact that simulators can generate scenes loosely resembling real-world scenes in terms of lighting, environment, and composition. Our novel training strategy results in significant qualitative and quantitative improvements, with up to a 24% improvement in FID score compared to the state-of-the-art unpaired image-translation methods.
summary: Advancements in graphics technology has increased the use of simulated data for training machine learning models. However, the simulated data often differs from real-world data, creating a distribution gap that can decrease the efficacy of models trained on simulation data in real-world applications. To mitigate this gap, sim-to-real domain transfer modifies simulated images to better match real-world data, enabling the effective use of simulation data in model training. Sim-to-real transfer utilizes image translation methods, which are divided into two main categories: paired and unpaired image-to-image translation. Paired image translation requires a perfect pixel match, making it difficult to apply in practice due to the lack of pixel-wise correspondence between simulation and real-world data. Unpaired image translation, while more suitable for sim-to-real transfer, is still challenging to learn for complex natural scenes. To address these challenges, we propose a third category: approximately-paired sim-to-real translation, where the source and target images do not need to be exactly paired. Our approximately-paired method, AptSim2Real, exploits the fact that simulators can generate scenes loosely resembling real-world scenes in terms of lighting, environment, and composition. Our novel training strategy results in significant qualitative and quantitative improvements, with up to a 24% improvement in FID score compared to the state-of-the-art unpaired image-translation methods.
abstract_zh: 图形技术的进步增加了模拟数据在训练机器学习模型中的使用。然而，模拟数据通常与现实世界数据不同，从而产生分布差距，从而降低在现实应用中根据模拟数据训练的模型的效率。为了缩小这一差距，模拟到真实的域迁移会修改模拟图像，以更好地匹配现实世界的数据，从而在模型训练中有效利用模拟数据。模拟到真实的传输利用图像转换方法，该方法分为两大类：配对和不配对的图像到图像转换。配对图像翻译需要完美的像素匹配，由于模拟和真实数据之间缺乏像素级的对应关系，因此很难在实践中应用。不成对的图像翻译虽然更适合模拟到真实的迁移，但对于复杂的自然场景来说仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了第三类：近似配对的模拟到真实的翻译，其中源图像和目标图像不需要完全配对。我们的近似配对方法 AptSim2Real 利用了这样一个事实：模拟器可以生成在光照、环境和构图方面与现实世界场景大致相似的场景。我们新颖的训练策略带来了显着的定性和定量改进，与最先进的未配对图像翻译方法相比，FID 分数提高了 24%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AptSim2Real方法，通过近似配对的仿真到现实图像翻译技术，解决仿真数据与真实数据分布差异问题。
AI.motivation: 仿真数据与真实数据存在分布差异导致模型性能下降，现有配对翻译需精确像素对应（难以实现）且非配对方法在复杂场景中效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出近似配对翻译框架AptSim2Real，利用仿真器生成的光照、环境等松散匹配的真实场景特征，设计新型训练策略实现无需精确配对的图像翻译。
AI.result: 在质性和量化指标上均优于现有方法，FID分数提升最高达24%。
AI.conclusion: 近似配对方法有效缓解仿真到现实的分布差异，为复杂场景下的域适应提供新解决方案。

To address these challenges, we propose a third category: approximately-paired sim-to-real translation, where the source and target images do not need to be exactly paired. Our approximately-paired method, AptSim2Real, exploits the fact that simulators can generate scenes loosely resembling real-world scenes in terms of lighting, environment, and composition. Our novel training strategy results in significant qualitative and quantitative improvements, with up to a 24% improvement in FID score compared to the state-of-the-art unpaired image-translation methods. 图形技术的进步增加了模拟数据在训练机器学习模型中的使用。然而，模拟数据通常与现实世界数据不同，从而产生分布差距，从而降低在现实应用中根据模拟数据训练的模型的效率。为了缩小这一差距，模拟到真实的域迁移会修改模拟图像，以更好地匹配现实世界的数据，从而在模型训练中有效利用模拟数据。模拟到真实的传输利用图像转换方法，该方法分为两大类：配对和不配对的图像到图像转换。配对图像翻译需要完美的像素匹配，由于模拟和真实数据之间缺乏像素级的对应关系，因此很难在实践中应用。不成对的图像翻译虽然更适合模拟到真实的迁移，但对于复杂的自然场景来说仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了第三类：近似配对的模拟到真实的翻译，其中源图像和目标图像不需要完全配对。我们的近似配对方法 AptSim2Real 利用了这样一个事实：模拟器可以生成在光照、环境和构图方面与现实世界场景大致相似的场景。我们新颖的训练策略带来了显着的定性和定量改进，与最先进的未配对图像翻译方法相比，FID 分数提高了 24%。 本文提出AptSim2Real方法，通过近似配对的仿真到现实图像翻译技术，解决仿真数据与真实数据分布差异问题。 Charles Y Zhang,Ashish Shrivastava cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Utkarsh A. Mishra,Yongxin Chen
title: ReorientDiff: Diffusion Model based Reorientation for Object Manipulation
title_zh: ReorientDiff：基于扩散模型的对象操作重定向
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures; More details here: https://utkarshmishra04.github.io/ReorientDiff
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures; More details here: https://utkarshmishra04.github.io/ReorientDiff
abstract: The ability to manipulate objects in a desired configurations is a fundamental requirement for robots to complete various practical applications. While certain goals can be achieved by picking and placing the objects of interest directly, object reorientation is needed for precise placement in most of the tasks. In such scenarios, the object must be reoriented and re-positioned into intermediate poses that facilitate accurate placement at the target pose. To this end, we propose a reorientation planning method, ReorientDiff, that utilizes a diffusion model-based approach. The proposed method employs both visual inputs from the scene, and goal-specific language prompts to plan intermediate reorientation poses. Specifically, the scene and language-task information are mapped into a joint scene-task representation feature space, which is subsequently leveraged to condition the diffusion model. The diffusion model samples intermediate poses based on the representation using classifier-free guidance and then uses gradients of learned feasibility-score models for implicit iterative pose-refinement. The proposed method is evaluated using a set of YCB-objects and a suction gripper, demonstrating a success rate of 95.2% in simulation. Overall, our study presents a promising approach to address the reorientation challenge in manipulation by learning a conditional distribution, which is an effective way to move towards more generalizable object manipulation. For more results, checkout our website: https://utkarshmishra04.github.io/ReorientDiff.

While certain goals can be achieved by picking and placing the objects of interest directly, object reorientation is needed for precise placement in most of the tasks. The proposed method employs both visual inputs from the scene, and goal-specific language prompts to plan intermediate reorientation poses. The diffusion model samples intermediate poses based on the representation using classifier-free guidance and then uses gradients of learned feasibility-score models for implicit iterative pose-refinement. The proposed method is evaluated using a set of YCB-objects and a suction gripper, demonstrating a success rate of 95.2% in simulation. Overall, our study presents a promising approach to address the reorientation challenge in manipulation by learning a conditional distribution, which is an effective way to move towards more generalizable object manipulation. For more results, checkout our website: https://utkarshmishra04.github.io/ReorientDiff.
abstract_zh: 以所需配置操纵物体的能力是机器人完成各种实际应用的基本要求。虽然可以通过直接拾取和放置感兴趣的对象来实现某些目标，但在大多数任务中需要重新定向对象才能精确放置。在这种情况下，必须将对象重新定向并重新定位到中间姿势，以促进准确放置在目标姿势。为此，我们提出了一种重新定向规划方法 ReorientDiff，它利用基于扩散模型的方法。所提出的方法采用来自场景的视觉输入和特定于目标的语言提示来规划中间重新定向姿势。具体来说，场景和语言任务信息被映射到联合场景任务表示特征空间，随后利用该空间来调节扩散模型。扩散模型使用无分类器指导根据表示对中间姿势进行采样，然后使用学习的可行性评分模型的梯度进行隐式迭代姿势细化。使用一组 YCB 物体和吸力夹具对所提出的方法进行了评估，表明模拟成功率为 95.2%。总的来说，我们的研究提出了一种有前途的方法，通过学习条件分布来解决操纵中的重新定向挑战，这是迈向更通用的对象操纵的有效方法。如需更多结果，请访问我们的网站：https://utkarshmishra04.github.io/ReorientDiff。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReorientDiff方法，利用扩散模型结合视觉输入和语言提示，解决机器人操作中物体再定向的挑战。
AI.motivation: 精确放置物体需要复杂的再定向操作，而现有方法难以处理多样化的任务需求和环境变化，亟需一种通用且高效的再定向规划方法。
AI.method: 通过融合场景视觉信息与任务语言提示生成联合特征表示，以无分类器引导扩散模型采样中间姿态，并利用可行性评分模型梯度进行隐式迭代优化。
AI.result: 在YCB物体集和吸盘夹爪的仿真测试中达到95.2%的成功率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的条件分布学习为机器人操作中的再定向问题提供了可推广的解决方案，展示了面向通用操作任务的潜力。

authors_text: Chen Zhao,Dawei Du,Anthony Hoogs,Christopher Funk
title: Open Set Action Recognition via Multi-Label Evidential Learning
title_zh: 通过多标签证据学习进行开集动作识别
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: Existing methods for open-set action recognition focus on novelty detection that assumes video clips show a single action, which is unrealistic in the real world. We propose a new method for open set action recognition and novelty detection via MUlti-Label Evidential learning (MULE), that goes beyond previous novel action detection methods by addressing the more general problems of single or multiple actors in the same scene, with simultaneous action(s) by any actor. Our Beta Evidential Neural Network estimates multi-action uncertainty with Beta densities based on actor-context-object relation representations. An evidence debiasing constraint is added to the objective function for optimization to reduce the static bias of video representations, which can incorrectly correlate predictions and static cues. We develop a learning algorithm based on a primal-dual average scheme update to optimize the proposed problem. Theoretical analysis of the optimization algorithm demonstrates the convergence of the primal solution sequence and bounds for both the loss function and the debiasing constraint. Uncertainty and belief-based novelty estimation mechanisms are formulated to detect novel actions. Extensive experiments on two real-world video datasets show that our proposed approach achieves promising performance in single/multi-actor, single/multi-action settings.
summary: Existing methods for open-set action recognition focus on novelty detection that assumes video clips show a single action, which is unrealistic in the real world. We propose a new method for open set action recognition and novelty detection via MUlti-Label Evidential learning (MULE), that goes beyond previous novel action detection methods by addressing the more general problems of single or multiple actors in the same scene, with simultaneous action(s) by any actor. Our Beta Evidential Neural Network estimates multi-action uncertainty with Beta densities based on actor-context-object relation representations. An evidence debiasing constraint is added to the objective function for optimization to reduce the static bias of video representations, which can incorrectly correlate predictions and static cues. We develop a learning algorithm based on a primal-dual average scheme update to optimize the proposed problem. Theoretical analysis of the optimization algorithm demonstrates the convergence of the primal solution sequence and bounds for both the loss function and the debiasing constraint. Uncertainty and belief-based novelty estimation mechanisms are formulated to detect novel actions. Extensive experiments on two real-world video datasets show that our proposed approach achieves promising performance in single/multi-actor, single/multi-action settings.
abstract_zh: 现有的开放集动作识别方法侧重于新颖性检测，假设视频剪辑显示单个动作，这在现实世界中是不现实的。我们提出了一种通过多标签证据学习（MULE）进行开放集动作识别和新颖性检测的新方法，该方法超越了以前的新颖动作检测方法，解决了同一场景中单个或多个演员的更普遍问题，以及任何演员同时采取的动作。我们的 Beta 证据神经网络根据参与者-上下文-对象关系表示来估计具有 Beta 密度的多动作不确定性。将证据去偏差约束添加到优化的目标函数中，以减少视频表示的静态偏差，这可能会错误地将预测和静态线索关联起来。我们开发了一种基于原始对偶平均方案更新的学习算法来优化所提出的问题。优化算法的理论分析证明了损失函数和去偏约束的原始解序列和边界的收敛性。制定不确定性和基于信念的新颖性估计机制来检测新颖的动作。对两个真实世界视频数据集的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法在单/多演员、单/多动作设置中实现了有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多标签证据学习方法（MULE），用于解决开放集动作识别中的多演员、多动作场景下的新颖动作检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设视频仅包含单一动作，无法应对现实场景中多演员同时执行多个动作的复杂情况，且存在静态线索导致的预测偏差问题。
AI.method: 构建基于演员-上下文-物体关系表示的Beta证据神经网络，通过Beta分布估计多动作不确定性；引入证据去偏约束优化目标函数，采用对偶平均优化算法，并建立理论收敛性分析。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界视频数据集上实验表明，该方法在单/多演员、单/多动作场景下均取得优于现有方法的开放集动作识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多模态关系表示与证据理论，结合去偏优化算法，有效解决了开放集动作识别中复杂场景下的不确定性建模与新颖动作检测问题。

authors_text: Marco Costanzo
title: Visual motion analysis of the player's finger
title_zh: 玩家手指的视觉运动分析
comment: 34 pages, 49 figures
comments: 34 pages, 49 figures
abstract: This work is about the extraction of the motion of fingers, in their three articulations, of a keyboard player from a video sequence. The relevance of the problem involves several aspects, in fact, the extraction of the movements of the fingers may be used to compute the keystroke efficiency and individual joint contributions, as showed by Werner Goebl and Caroline Palmer in the paper 'Temporal Control and Hand Movement Efficiency in Skilled Music Performance'. Those measures are directly related to the precision in timing and force measures. A very good approach to the hand gesture recognition problem has been presented in the paper ' Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition Using Finger Segmentation'. Detecting the keys pressed on a keyboard is a task that can be complex because of the shadows that can degrade the quality of the result and possibly cause the detection of not pressed keys. Among the several approaches that already exist, a great amount of them is based on the subtraction of frames in order to detect the movements of the keys caused by their pressure. Detecting the keys that are pressed could be useful to automatically evaluate the performance of a pianist or to automatically write sheet music of the melody that is being played.

The relevance of the problem involves several aspects, in fact, the extraction of the movements of the fingers may be used to compute the keystroke efficiency and individual joint contributions, as showed by Werner Goebl and Caroline Palmer in the paper 'Temporal Control and Hand Movement Efficiency in Skilled Music Performance'. Those measures are directly related to the precision in timing and force measures. A very good approach to the hand gesture recognition problem has been presented in the paper ' Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition Using Finger Segmentation'. Detecting the keys pressed on a keyboard is a task that can be complex because of the shadows that can degrade the quality of the result and possibly cause the detection of not pressed keys. Among the several approaches that already exist, a great amount of them is based on the subtraction of frames in order to detect the movements of the keys caused by their pressure. Detecting the keys that are pressed could be useful to automatically evaluate the performance of a pianist or to automatically write sheet music of the melody that is being played.
abstract_zh: 这项工作是关于从视频序列中提取键盘手的三个关节中的手指运动。这个问题的相关性涉及几个方面，事实上，手指运动的提取可以用来计算击键效率和个体关节贡献，正如Werner Goebl和Caroline Palmer在论文《熟练音乐表演中的时间控制和手部运动效率》中所表明的那样。这些措施与计时和力量测量的精度直接相关。 “使用手指分割的实时手势识别”论文提出了一种解决手势识别问题的非常好的方法。检测键盘上按下的按键是一项复杂的任务，因为阴影会降低结果的质量，并可能导致检测到未按下的按键。在现有的几种方法中，大部分都是基于帧减法来检测按键由压力引起的运动。检测按下的琴键对于自动评估钢琴家的演奏或自动编写正在演奏的旋律的乐谱可能很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过视频序列分析钢琴演奏者手指的三维关节运动，以评估按键效率和个体关节贡献。
AI.motivation: 手指运动分析可计算按键效率及精度，对音乐表演评估和乐谱自动生成具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于视频序列分析技术，结合现有手势识别与帧差法检测按键状态，克服阴影干扰等挑战。
AI.result: 实现对钢琴演奏者手指运动的可视化分析，为自动评估演奏表现和乐谱记录提供技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为音乐表演分析提供新思路，但需进一步优化阴影处理等关键技术以提升检测精度。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Hu,Yunsheng Li,Jiancheng Lyu,Dashan Gao,Nuno Vasconcelos
title: Dense Network Expansion for Class Incremental Learning
title_zh: 用于课堂增量学习的密集网络扩展
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: The problem of class incremental learning (CIL) is considered. State-of-the-art approaches use a dynamic architecture based on network expansion (NE), in which a task expert is added per task. While effective from a computational standpoint, these methods lead to models that grow quickly with the number of tasks. A new NE method, dense network expansion (DNE), is proposed to achieve a better trade-off between accuracy and model complexity. This is accomplished by the introduction of dense connections between the intermediate layers of the task expert networks, that enable the transfer of knowledge from old to new tasks via feature sharing and reusing. This sharing is implemented with a cross-task attention mechanism, based on a new task attention block (TAB), that fuses information across tasks. Unlike traditional attention mechanisms, TAB operates at the level of the feature mixing and is decoupled with spatial attentions. This is shown more effective than a joint spatial-and-task attention for CIL. The proposed DNE approach can strictly maintain the feature space of old classes while growing the network and feature scale at a much slower rate than previous methods. In result, it outperforms the previous SOTA methods by a margin of 4\% in terms of accuracy, with similar or even smaller model scale.
summary: The problem of class incremental learning (CIL) is considered. State-of-the-art approaches use a dynamic architecture based on network expansion (NE), in which a task expert is added per task. While effective from a computational standpoint, these methods lead to models that grow quickly with the number of tasks. A new NE method, dense network expansion (DNE), is proposed to achieve a better trade-off between accuracy and model complexity. This is accomplished by the introduction of dense connections between the intermediate layers of the task expert networks, that enable the transfer of knowledge from old to new tasks via feature sharing and reusing. This sharing is implemented with a cross-task attention mechanism, based on a new task attention block (TAB), that fuses information across tasks. Unlike traditional attention mechanisms, TAB operates at the level of the feature mixing and is decoupled with spatial attentions. This is shown more effective than a joint spatial-and-task attention for CIL. The proposed DNE approach can strictly maintain the feature space of old classes while growing the network and feature scale at a much slower rate than previous methods. In result, it outperforms the previous SOTA methods by a margin of 4\% in terms of accuracy, with similar or even smaller model scale.
abstract_zh: 考虑班级增量学习（CIL）问题。最先进的方法使用基于网络扩展（NE）的动态架构，其中每个任务都添加一个任务专家。虽然从计算的角度来看是有效的，但这些方法导致模型随着任务数量的增加而快速增长。提出了一种新的NE方法——密集网络扩展（DNE），以实现精度和模型复杂性之间的更好权衡。这是通过在任务专家网络的中间层之间引入密集连接来实现的，从而能够通过特征共享和重用将知识从旧任务转移到新任务。这种共享是通过跨任务注意力机制实现的，该机制基于新的任务注意力块（TAB），融合了任务之间的信息。与传统的注意力机制不同，TAB 在特征混合层面运行，并与空间注意力解耦。这被证明比 CIL 的空间和任务联合注意力更有效。所提出的 DNE 方法可以严格维护旧类的特征空间，同时以比以前的方法慢得多的速度增长网络和特征规模。结果，在模型规模相似甚至更小的情况下，它的准确率比之前的 SOTA 方法高出 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为密集网络扩展（DNE）的新方法，用于解决类别增量学习（CIL）中模型复杂度与准确率之间的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于网络扩展（NE）的方法虽计算高效，但模型随任务数量快速膨胀，导致复杂度高。需寻找更优的特征共享机制以减缓模型增长并提升准确率。
AI.method: 通过在任务专家网络的中间层引入密集连接，结合跨任务注意力机制（TAB）实现特征共享与复用，TAB在特征混合层面操作，独立于空间注意力。
AI.result: DNE方法在保持旧类别特征空间的同时，模型扩展速度较之前方法显著减缓，并在准确率上超越现有最优方法4%。
AI.conclusion: DNE通过密集连接与TAB机制有效平衡了CIL中的准确率与模型复杂度，为增量学习提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yukang Cui,Lingbo Cao,Michael V. Basin,Jun Shen,Tingwen Huang,Xin Gong
title: Resilient Output Containment Control of Heterogeneous Multiagent Systems Against Composite Attacks: A Digital Twin Approach
title_zh: 异构多智能体系统抵御复合攻击的弹性输出遏制控制：数字孪生方法
abstract: This paper studies the distributed resilient output containment control of heterogeneous multiagent systems against composite attacks, including denial-of-services (DoS) attacks, false-data injection (FDI) attacks, camouflage attacks, and actuation attacks. Inspired by digital twins, a twin layer (TL) with higher security and privacy is used to decouple the above problem into two tasks: defense protocols against DoS attacks on TL and defense protocols against actuation attacks on cyber-physical layer (CPL). First, considering modeling errors of leader dynamics, we introduce distributed observers to reconstruct the leader dynamics for each follower on TL under DoS attacks. Second, distributed estimators are used to estimate follower states according to the reconstructed leader dynamics on the TL. Third, according to the reconstructed leader dynamics, we design decentralized solvers that calculate the output regulator equations on CPL. Fourth, decentralized adaptive attack-resilient control schemes that resist unbounded actuation attacks are provided on CPL. Furthermore, we apply the above control protocols to prove that the followers can achieve uniformly ultimately bounded (UUB) convergence, and the upper bound of the UUB convergence is determined explicitly. Finally, two simulation examples are provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed control protocols.
summary: This paper studies the distributed resilient output containment control of heterogeneous multiagent systems against composite attacks, including denial-of-services (DoS) attacks, false-data injection (FDI) attacks, camouflage attacks, and actuation attacks. Inspired by digital twins, a twin layer (TL) with higher security and privacy is used to decouple the above problem into two tasks: defense protocols against DoS attacks on TL and defense protocols against actuation attacks on cyber-physical layer (CPL). First, considering modeling errors of leader dynamics, we introduce distributed observers to reconstruct the leader dynamics for each follower on TL under DoS attacks. Second, distributed estimators are used to estimate follower states according to the reconstructed leader dynamics on the TL. Third, according to the reconstructed leader dynamics, we design decentralized solvers that calculate the output regulator equations on CPL. Fourth, decentralized adaptive attack-resilient control schemes that resist unbounded actuation attacks are provided on CPL. Furthermore, we apply the above control protocols to prove that the followers can achieve uniformly ultimately bounded (UUB) convergence, and the upper bound of the UUB convergence is determined explicitly. Finally, two simulation examples are provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed control protocols.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了异构多智能体系统针对复合攻击的分布式弹性输出遏制控制，包括拒绝服务（DoS）攻击、虚假数据注入（FDI）攻击、伪装攻击和驱动攻击。受数字孪生的启发，采用具有更高安全性和隐私性的孪生层（TL）将上述问题解耦为两个任务：针对TL的DoS攻击的防御协议和针对网络物理层（CPL）的驱动攻击的防御协议。首先，考虑到领导者动态的建模误差，我们引入分布式观察者来重建 TL 上每个跟随者在 DoS 攻击下的领导者动态。其次，分布式估计器用于根据 TL 上重建的领导者动态来估计跟随者状态。第三，根据重构的领导者动力学，我们设计了去中心化求解器，用于计算 CPL 上的输出调节器方程。第四，CPL上提供了抵抗无界驱动攻击的分散式自适应抗攻击控制方案。此外，我们应用上述控制协议来证明跟随者可以实现一致最终有界（UUB）收敛，并且UUB收敛的上限是明确确定的。最后，提供了两个仿真例子来展示所提出的控制协议的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对复合攻击的异构多智能体系统鲁棒输出包含控制问题，提出基于数字孪生的方法实现攻击防御。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时应对拒绝服务、虚假数据注入等多种复合攻击，需设计兼顾安全与隐私的分布式控制策略。
AI.method: 构建双层架构（数字孪生层与网络物理层），通过分布式观测器重构领导者动态，设计自适应控制方案抵御执行攻击。
AI.result: 证明跟随者可实现统一最终有界收敛，明确收敛上界，并通过仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效应对复合攻击，为异构多智能体系统的安全控制提供新思路。

search_text: Resilient Output Containment Control of Heterogeneous Multiagent Systems Against Composite Attacks: A Digital Twin Approach 异构多智能体系统抵御复合攻击的弹性输出遏制控制：数字孪生方法 This paper studies the distributed resilient output containment control of heterogeneous multiagent systems against composite attacks, including denial-of-services (DoS) attacks, false-data injection (FDI) attacks, camouflage attacks, and actuation attacks. Inspired by digital twins, a twin layer (TL) with higher security and privacy is used to decouple the above problem into two tasks: defense protocols against DoS attacks on TL and defense protocols against actuation attacks on cyber-physical layer (CPL). First, considering modeling errors of leader dynamics, we introduce distributed observers to reconstruct the leader dynamics for each follower on TL under DoS attacks. Second, distributed estimators are used to estimate follower states according to the reconstructed leader dynamics on the TL. Third, according to the reconstructed leader dynamics, we design decentralized solvers that calculate the output regulator equations on CPL. Fourth, decentralized adaptive attack-resilient control schemes that resist unbounded actuation attacks are provided on CPL. Furthermore, we apply the above control protocols to prove that the followers can achieve uniformly ultimately bounded (UUB) convergence, and the upper bound of the UUB convergence is determined explicitly. Finally, two simulation examples are provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed control protocols. 本文研究了异构多智能体系统针对复合攻击的分布式弹性输出遏制控制，包括拒绝服务（DoS）攻击、虚假数据注入（FDI）攻击、伪装攻击和驱动攻击。受数字孪生的启发，采用具有更高安全性和隐私性的孪生层（TL）将上述问题解耦为两个任务：针对TL的DoS攻击的防御协议和针对网络物理层（CPL）的驱动攻击的防御协议。首先，考虑到领导者动态的建模误差，我们引入分布式观察者来重建 TL 上每个跟随者在 DoS 攻击下的领导者动态。其次，分布式估计器用于根据 TL 上重建的领导者动态来估计跟随者状态。第三，根据重构的领导者动力学，我们设计了去中心化求解器，用于计算 CPL 上的输出调节器方程。第四，CPL上提供了抵抗无界驱动攻击的分散式自适应抗攻击控制方案。此外，我们应用上述控制协议来证明跟随者可以实现一致最终有界（UUB）收敛，并且UUB收敛的上限是明确确定的。最后，提供了两个仿真例子来展示所提出的控制协议的有效性。 本文研究了针对复合攻击的异构多智能体系统鲁棒输出包含控制问题，提出基于数字孪生的方法实现攻击防御。 Yukang Cui,Lingbo Cao,Michael V. authors_text: Benjamin Kenwright
title: Dual-Quaternions: Theory and Applications in Sound
title_zh: 双四元数：声音理论与应用
abstract: Sound is a fundamental and rich source of information; playing a key role in many areas from humanities and social sciences through to engineering and mathematics. Sound is more than just data 'signals'. It encapsulates physical, sensorial and emotional, as well as social, cultural and environmental factors. Sound contributes to the transformation of our experiences, environments and beliefs. Sound is all around us and everywhere. Hence, it should come as no surprise that sound is a complex multicomponent entity with a vast assortment of characteristics and applications. Of course, an important question is, what is the best way to store and represent sound digitally to capture these characteristics? What model or method is best for manipulating, extracting and filtering sounds? There are a large number of representations and models, however, one approach that has yet to be used with sound is dual-quaternions. While dual-quaternions have established themselves in many fields of science and computing as an efficient mathematical model for providing an unambiguous, un-cumbersome, computationally effective means of representing multi-component data. Sound is one area that has yet to explore and reap the benefits of dual-quaternions (using sound and audio-related dual-quaternion models). This article aims to explore the exciting potential and possibilities dual-quaternions offer when applied and combined with sound-based models (including but not limited to the applications, tools, machine-learning, statistical and computational sound-related algorithms).

abstract_zh: 声音是基本且丰富的信息来源；在从人文社会科学到工程和数学的许多领域发挥着关键作用。声音不仅仅是数据“信号”。它囊括了身体、感官和情感，以及社会、文化和环境因素。声音有助于改变我们的经验、环境和信仰。声音就在我们周围，无处不在。因此，毫不奇怪，声音是一个复杂的多成分实体，具有各种各样的特征和应用。当然，一个重要的问题是，以数字方式存储和表示声音以捕捉这些特征的最佳方式是什么？什么模型或方法最适合操纵、提取和过滤声音？有大量的表示和模型，然而，一种尚未用于声音的方法是对偶四元数。虽然双四元数已经在科学和计算的许多领域中确立了自己的地位，作为一种有效的数学模型，为表示多分量数据提供了一种明确的、不麻烦的、计算上有效的方法。声音是尚未探索并获得双四元数优势的领域（使用声音和音频相关的双四元数模型）。本文旨在探索双四元数在应用并与基于声音的模型（包括但不限于应用程序、工具、机器学习、统计和计算声音相关算法）结合时所提供的令人兴奋的潜力和可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将双四元数理论应用于声音处理的潜力，分析其在声音建模、分析及算法中的可能优势。
AI.motivation: 声音作为多维复杂实体，现有数字表示方法未能充分挖掘双四元数在多组件数据建模中的高效性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与跨领域模型对比，结合声音处理相关工具与算法进行可行性探讨。
AI.result: 提出双四元数在声音处理中的理论框架，展示其在多维特征表示与计算效率上的潜在优势。
AI.conclusion: 双四元数为声音处理提供了新颖的数学工具，未来研究可进一步验证其在具体应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Duygu Ceylan,Chun-Hao Paul Huang,Niloy J. Mitra
title: Pix2Video: Video Editing using Image Diffusion
title_zh: Pix2Video：使用图像扩散进行视频编辑
abstract: Image diffusion models, trained on massive image collections, have emerged as the most versatile image generator model in terms of quality and diversity. They support inverting real images and conditional (e.g., text) generation, making them attractive for high-quality image editing applications. We investigate how to use such pre-trained image models for text-guided video editing. The critical challenge is to achieve the target edits while still preserving the content of the source video. Our method works in two simple steps: first, we use a pre-trained structure-guided (e.g., depth) image diffusion model to perform text-guided edits on an anchor frame; then, in the key step, we progressively propagate the changes to the future frames via self-attention feature injection to adapt the core denoising step of the diffusion model. We then consolidate the changes by adjusting the latent code for the frame before continuing the process. Our approach is training-free and generalizes to a wide range of edits. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach by extensive experimentation and compare it against four different prior and parallel efforts (on ArXiv). We demonstrate that realistic text-guided video edits are possible, without any compute-intensive preprocessing or video-specific finetuning.
summary: Image diffusion models, trained on massive image collections, have emerged as the most versatile image generator model in terms of quality and diversity. They support inverting real images and conditional (e.g., text) generation, making them attractive for high-quality image editing applications. We investigate how to use such pre-trained image models for text-guided video editing. The critical challenge is to achieve the target edits while still preserving the content of the source video. Our method works in two simple steps: first, we use a pre-trained structure-guided (e.g., depth) image diffusion model to perform text-guided edits on an anchor frame; then, in the key step, we progressively propagate the changes to the future frames via self-attention feature injection to adapt the core denoising step of the diffusion model. We then consolidate the changes by adjusting the latent code for the frame before continuing the process. Our approach is training-free and generalizes to a wide range of edits. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach by extensive experimentation and compare it against four different prior and parallel efforts (on ArXiv). We demonstrate that realistic text-guided video edits are possible, without any compute-intensive preprocessing or video-specific finetuning.
abstract_zh: 在大量图像集合上进行训练的图像扩散模型在质量和多样性方面已成为最通用的图像生成模型。它们支持反转真实图像和条件（例如文本）生成，这使得它们对于高质量图像编辑应用程序很有吸引力。我们研究如何使用此类预先训练的图像模型进行文本引导视频编辑。关键的挑战是实现目标编辑，同时仍然保留源视频的内容。我们的方法分为两个简单步骤：首先，我们使用预先训练的结构引导（例如深度）图像扩散模型在锚帧上执行文本引导编辑；然后，在关键步骤中，我们通过自注意力特征注入逐步将变化传播到未来的帧，以适应扩散模型的核心去噪步骤。然后，在继续该过程之前，我们通过调整框架的潜在代码来巩固更改。我们的方法无需培训，可推广到广泛的编辑。我们通过广泛的实验证明了该方法的有效性，并将其与四种不同的先前和并行工作（在 ArXiv 上）进行比较。我们证明了真实的文本引导视频编辑是可能的，无需任何计算密集型预处理或视频特定的微调。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的文本引导视频编辑方法，利用预训练图像扩散模型实现内容保留的视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 图像扩散模型在图像编辑领域表现出色，但视频编辑需在保持原有内容的同时实现目标编辑，存在技术挑战。
AI.method: 分两步进行：1) 使用结构引导图像扩散模型对锚定帧进行文本编辑；2) 通过自注意力特征注入逐步传播编辑到后续帧并调整潜在代码。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能生成高质量文本引导视频编辑结果，优于四个对比方法且无需视频特定微调或计算密集型预处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了预训练图像扩散模型在视频编辑中的有效性，为训练-free的视频编辑提供了通用解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的文本引导视频编辑方法，利用预训练图像扩散模型实现内容保留的视频编辑。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法验证了预训练图像扩散模型在视频编辑中的有效性，为训练-free的视频编辑提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Pix2Video: Video Editing using Image Diffusion Pix2Video：使用图像扩散进行视频编辑 Image diffusion models, trained on massive image collections, have emerged as the most versatile image generator model in terms of quality and diversity. They support inverting real images and conditional (e.g., text) generation, making them attractive for high-quality image editing applications. We investigate how to use such pre-trained image models for text-guided video editing. The critical challenge is to achieve the target edits while still preserving the content of the source video. Our method works in two simple steps: first, we use a pre-trained structure-guided (e.g., depth) image diffusion model to perform text-guided edits on an anchor frame; then, in the key step, we progressively propagate the changes to the future frames via self-attention feature injection to adapt the core denoising step of the diffusion model. We then consolidate the changes by adjusting the latent code for the frame before continuing the process. Our approach is training-free and generalizes to a wide range of edits. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach by extensive experimentation and compare it against four different prior and parallel efforts (on ArXiv). We demonstrate that realistic text-guided video edits are possible, without any compute-intensive preprocessing or video-specific finetuning. 在大量图像集合上进行训练的图像扩散模型在质量和多样性方面已成为最通用的图像生成模型。它们支持反转真实图像和条件（例如文本）生成，这使得它们对于高质量图像编辑应用程序很有吸引力。我们研究如何使用此类预先训练的图像模型进行文本引导视频编辑。关键的挑战是实现目标编辑，同时仍然保留源视频的内容。我们的方法分为两个简单步骤：首先，我们使用预先训练的结构引导（例如深度）图像扩散模型在锚帧上执行文本引导编辑；然后，在关键步骤中，我们通过自注意力特征注入逐步将变化传播到未来的帧，以适应扩散模型的核心去噪步骤。然后，在继续该过程之前，我们通过调整框架的潜在代码来巩固更改。我们的方法无需培训，可推广到广泛的编辑。我们通过广泛的实验证明了该方法的有效性，并将其与四种不同的先前和并行工作（在 ArXiv 上）进行比较。我们证明了真实的文本引导视频编辑是可能的，无需任何计算密集型预处理或视频特定的微调。 本文提出一种无需训练的文本引导视频编辑方法，利用预训练图像扩散模型实现内容保留的视频编辑。 Duygu Ceylan,Chun-Hao Paul Huang,Niloy J. Mitra cs.CV

authors_text: Yijun Yuan,Andreas Nuechter
title: Uni-Fusion: Universal Continuous Mapping
title_zh: Uni-Fusion：通用连续映射
comment: Published on IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Project page: https://jarrome.github.io/Uni-Fusion/
comments: Published on IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Project page: https://jarrome.github.io/Uni-Fusion/
abstract: We present Uni-Fusion, a universal continuous mapping framework for surfaces, surface properties (color, infrared, etc.) and more (latent features in CLIP embedding space, etc.). We propose the first universal implicit encoding model that supports encoding of both geometry and different types of properties (RGB, infrared, features, etc.) without requiring any training. Based on this, our framework divides the point cloud into regular grid voxels and generates a latent feature in each voxel to form a Latent Implicit Map (LIM) for geometries and arbitrary properties. Then, by fusing a local LIM frame-wisely into a global LIM, an incremental reconstruction is achieved. Encoded with corresponding types of data, our Latent Implicit Map is capable of generating continuous surfaces, surface property fields, surface feature fields, and all other possible options. To demonstrate the capabilities of our model, we implement three applications: (1) incremental reconstruction for surfaces and color (2) 2D-to-3D transfer of fabricated properties (3) open-vocabulary scene understanding by creating a text CLIP feature field on surfaces. We evaluate Uni-Fusion by comparing it in corresponding applications, from which Uni-Fusion shows high-flexibility in various applications while performing best or being competitive. The project page of Uni-Fusion is available at https://jarrome.github.io/Uni-Fusion/ .
summary: We present Uni-Fusion, a universal continuous mapping framework for surfaces, surface properties (color, infrared, etc.) and more (latent features in CLIP embedding space, etc.). We propose the first universal implicit encoding model that supports encoding of both geometry and different types of properties (RGB, infrared, features, etc.) without requiring any training. Based on this, our framework divides the point cloud into regular grid voxels and generates a latent feature in each voxel to form a Latent Implicit Map (LIM) for geometries and arbitrary properties. Then, by fusing a local LIM frame-wisely into a global LIM, an incremental reconstruction is achieved. Encoded with corresponding types of data, our Latent Implicit Map is capable of generating continuous surfaces, surface property fields, surface feature fields, and all other possible options. To demonstrate the capabilities of our model, we implement three applications: (1) incremental reconstruction for surfaces and color (2) 2D-to-3D transfer of fabricated properties (3) open-vocabulary scene understanding by creating a text CLIP feature field on surfaces. We evaluate Uni-Fusion by comparing it in corresponding applications, from which Uni-Fusion shows high-flexibility in various applications while performing best or being competitive. The project page of Uni-Fusion is available at https://jarrome.github.io/Uni-Fusion/ .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Uni-Fusion，这是一种通用的连续映射框架，适用于表面、表面属性（颜色、红外等）等（CLIP 嵌入空间中的潜在特征等）。我们提出了第一个通用隐式编码模型，支持几何和不同类型属性（RGB、红外、特征等）的编码，无需任何训练。基于此，我们的框架将点云划分为规则的网格体素，并在每个体素中生成潜在特征，以形成几何和任意属性的潜在隐式映射（LIM）。然后，通过将局部 LIM 逐帧融合到全局 LIM 中，实现增量重建。我们的潜在隐式地图使用相应类型的数据进行编码，能够生成连续表面、表面属性字段、表面特征字段和所有其他可能的选项。为了演示我们模型的功能，我们实现了三个应用程序：(1) 表面和颜色的增量重建 (2) 制造属性的 2D 到 3D 转换 (3) 通过在表面上创建文本 CLIP 特征字段来理解开放词汇场景。我们通过在相应应用中比较Uni-Fusion来评估Uni-Fusion，从中可以看出Uni-Fusion在各种应用中表现出高度灵活性，同时表现最佳或具有竞争力。 Uni-Fusion 的项目页面位于 https://jarrome.github.io/Uni-Fusion/ 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Uni-Fusion框架，通过统一的隐式编码实现对几何形状、表面属性（如颜色、红外等）及CLIP嵌入特征的连续映射与重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要针对不同属性（如几何、颜色、特征）分别训练模型，缺乏通用性和灵活性，难以处理多模态数据融合与开放场景理解任务。
AI.method: 将点云分割为规则体素网格，每个体素生成隐式特征（LIM），通过局部LIM逐帧融合为全局LIM，实现增量重建。支持几何、颜色、红外、CLIP特征等多类型数据的联合编码。
AI.result: 在表面增量重建、2D-3D属性迁移、基于CLIP的开放词汇场景理解三类任务中均表现优异，性能优于或接近现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Uni-Fusion通过无需训练的通用隐式映射框架，实现了多模态数据的灵活建模与跨任务应用，为复杂场景理解提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zeqing Xia,Bojun Xiong,Zhouhui Lian
title: VecFontSDF: Learning to Reconstruct and Synthesize High-quality Vector Fonts via Signed Distance Functions
title_zh: VecFontSDF：学习通过有符号距离函数重建和合成高质量矢量字体
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF
abstract: Font design is of vital importance in the digital content design and modern printing industry. Developing algorithms capable of automatically synthesizing vector fonts can significantly facilitate the font design process. However, existing methods mainly concentrate on raster image generation, and only a few approaches can directly synthesize vector fonts. This paper proposes an end-to-end trainable method, VecFontSDF, to reconstruct and synthesize high-quality vector fonts using signed distance functions (SDFs). Specifically, based on the proposed SDF-based implicit shape representation, VecFontSDF learns to model each glyph as shape primitives enclosed by several parabolic curves, which can be precisely converted to quadratic Bézier curves that are widely used in vector font products. In this manner, most image generation methods can be easily extended to synthesize vector fonts. Qualitative and quantitative experiments conducted on a publicly-available dataset demonstrate that our method obtains high-quality results on several tasks, including vector font reconstruction, interpolation, and few-shot vector font synthesis, markedly outperforming the state of the art. Our code and trained models are available at https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF.
summary: Font design is of vital importance in the digital content design and modern printing industry. Developing algorithms capable of automatically synthesizing vector fonts can significantly facilitate the font design process. However, existing methods mainly concentrate on raster image generation, and only a few approaches can directly synthesize vector fonts. This paper proposes an end-to-end trainable method, VecFontSDF, to reconstruct and synthesize high-quality vector fonts using signed distance functions (SDFs). Specifically, based on the proposed SDF-based implicit shape representation, VecFontSDF learns to model each glyph as shape primitives enclosed by several parabolic curves, which can be precisely converted to quadratic Bézier curves that are widely used in vector font products. In this manner, most image generation methods can be easily extended to synthesize vector fonts. Qualitative and quantitative experiments conducted on a publicly-available dataset demonstrate that our method obtains high-quality results on several tasks, including vector font reconstruction, interpolation, and few-shot vector font synthesis, markedly outperforming the state of the art. Our code and trained models are available at https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF.
abstract_zh: 字体设计在数字内容设计和现代印刷行业中至关重要。开发能够自动合成矢量字体的算法可以显着促进字体设计过程。然而，现有的方法主要集中在光栅图像生成上，只有少数方法可以直接合成矢量字体。本文提出了一种端到端可训练方法 VecFontSDF，使用符号距离函数（SDF）重建和合成高质量矢量字体。具体来说，基于所提出的基于 SDF 的隐式形状表示，VecFontSDF 学习将每个字形建模为由多个抛物线包围的形状基元，这些抛物线可以精确地转换为广泛用于矢量字体产品的二次贝塞尔曲线。通过这种方式，大多数图像生成方法可以很容易地扩展到合成矢量字体。在公开数据集上进行的定性和定量实验表明，我们的方法在多项任务上获得了高质量的结果，包括矢量字体重建、插值和少样本矢量字体合成，明显优于现有技术。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有符号距离函数（SDF）的端到端方法VecFontSDF，用于重建和合成高质量矢量字体。
AI.motivation: 现有字体合成方法主要集中在栅格图像生成，难以直接合成矢量字体，而矢量字体在数字内容设计和印刷行业具有重要价值。
AI.method: 通过SDF隐式形状表示，将每个字形建模为由抛物线曲线包围的形状基元，并精确转换为二次Bézier曲线，从而扩展图像生成方法至矢量字体合成。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在矢量字体重建、插值和少样本合成任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VecFontSDF为高质量矢量字体的自动合成提供了有效解决方案，并开源了代码和模型。

result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在矢量字体重建、插值和少样本合成任务中显著优于现有方法。
conclusion: VecFontSDF为高质量矢量字体的自动合成提供了有效解决方案，并开源了代码和模型。
search_text: VecFontSDF: Learning to Reconstruct and Synthesize High-quality Vector Fonts via Signed Distance Functions VecFontSDF：学习通过有符号距离函数重建和合成高质量矢量字体 Font design is of vital importance in the digital content design and modern printing industry. Developing algorithms capable of automatically synthesizing vector fonts can significantly facilitate the font design process. However, existing methods mainly concentrate on raster image generation, and only a few approaches can directly synthesize vector fonts. This paper proposes an end-to-end trainable method, VecFontSDF, to reconstruct and synthesize high-quality vector fonts using signed distance functions (SDFs). Specifically, based on the proposed SDF-based implicit shape representation, VecFontSDF learns to model each glyph as shape primitives enclosed by several parabolic curves, which can be precisely converted to quadratic Bézier curves that are widely used in vector font products. In this manner, most image generation methods can be easily extended to synthesize vector fonts. Qualitative and quantitative experiments conducted on a publicly-available dataset demonstrate that our method obtains high-quality results on several tasks, including vector font reconstruction, interpolation, and few-shot vector font synthesis, markedly outperforming the state of the art. Our code and trained models are available at https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF. 字体设计在数字内容设计和现代印刷行业中至关重要。开发能够自动合成矢量字体的算法可以显着促进字体设计过程。然而，现有的方法主要集中在光栅图像生成上，只有少数方法可以直接合成矢量字体。本文提出了一种端到端可训练方法 VecFontSDF，使用符号距离函数（SDF）重建和合成高质量矢量字体。具体来说，基于所提出的基于 SDF 的隐式形状表示，VecFontSDF 学习将每个字形建模为由多个抛物线包围的形状基元，这些抛物线可以精确地转换为广泛用于矢量字体产品的二次贝塞尔曲线。通过这种方式，大多数图像生成方法可以很容易地扩展到合成矢量字体。在公开数据集上进行的定性和定量实验表明，我们的方法在多项任务上获得了高质量的结果，包括矢量字体重建、插值和少样本矢量字体合成，明显优于现有技术。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://xiazeqing.github.io/VecFontSDF 获取。 本文提出了一种基于有符号距离函数（SDF）的端到端方法VecFontSDF，用于重建和合成高质量矢量字体。 Zeqing Xia,Bojun Xiong,Zhouhui Lian cs.CV

authors_text: Triet Minh Thai,Son T. Luu
title: Integrating Image Features with Convolutional Sequence-to-sequence Network for Multilingual Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 将图像特征与卷积序列到序列网络相结合以实现多语言视觉问答
comment: VLSP2022-EVJVQA
comments: VLSP2022-EVJVQA
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a task that requires computers to give correct answers for the input questions based on the images. This task can be solved by humans with ease but is a challenge for computers. The VLSP2022-EVJVQA shared task carries the Visual Question Answering task in the multilingual domain on a newly released dataset: UIT-EVJVQA, in which the questions and answers are written in three different languages: English, Vietnamese and Japanese. We approached the challenge as a sequence-to-sequence learning task, in which we integrated hints from pre-trained state-of-the-art VQA models and image features with Convolutional Sequence-to-Sequence network to generate the desired answers. Our results obtained up to 0.3442 by F1 score on the public test set, 0.4210 on the private test set, and placed 3rd in the competition.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a task that requires computers to give correct answers for the input questions based on the images. This task can be solved by humans with ease but is a challenge for computers. The VLSP2022-EVJVQA shared task carries the Visual Question Answering task in the multilingual domain on a newly released dataset: UIT-EVJVQA, in which the questions and answers are written in three different languages: English, Vietnamese and Japanese. We approached the challenge as a sequence-to-sequence learning task, in which we integrated hints from pre-trained state-of-the-art VQA models and image features with Convolutional Sequence-to-Sequence network to generate the desired answers. Our results obtained up to 0.3442 by F1 score on the public test set, 0.4210 on the private test set, and placed 3rd in the competition.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）是一项要求计算机根据图像对输入问题给出正确答案的任务。这项任务可以由人类轻松解决，但对计算机来说是一个挑战。 VLSP2022-EVJVQA共享任务在新发布的数据集UIT-EVJVQA上承载了多语言领域的视觉问答任务，其中问题和答案以三种不同的语言编写：英语、越南语和日语。我们将这一挑战视为序列到序列的学习任务，其中我们将预先训练的最先进的 VQA 模型和图像特征的提示与卷积序列到序列网络相结合，以生成所需的答案。我们的结果在公共测试集上的 F1 分数达到了 0.3442，在私人测试集上达到了 0.4210，并在比赛中排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积序列到序列网络的多语言视觉问答方法，用于处理包含英语、越南语和日语的UIT-EVJVQA数据集。
AI.motivation: 多语言视觉问答任务在实际应用中具有挑战性，现有模型难以有效处理多种语言的问答对。
AI.method: 将预训练VQA模型的提示与图像特征结合，采用卷积序列到序列网络生成答案。
AI.result: 在公共测试集上取得0.3442的F1分数，在私有测试集上达到0.4210，并在竞赛中排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合多模态特征和序列生成技术，在多语言视觉问答任务中展现出有效性和竞争力。

authors_text: Wei Li,Jiahao Xie,Chen Change Loy
title: Correlational Image Modeling for Self-Supervised Visual Pre-Training
title_zh: 用于自监督视觉预训练的相关图像建模
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: We introduce Correlational Image Modeling (CIM), a novel and surprisingly effective approach to self-supervised visual pre-training. Our CIM performs a simple pretext task: we randomly crop image regions (exemplars) from an input image (context) and predict correlation maps between the exemplars and the context. Three key designs enable correlational image modeling as a nontrivial and meaningful self-supervisory task. First, to generate useful exemplar-context pairs, we consider cropping image regions with various scales, shapes, rotations, and transformations. Second, we employ a bootstrap learning framework that involves online and target encoders. During pre-training, the former takes exemplars as inputs while the latter converts the context. Third, we model the output correlation maps via a simple cross-attention block, within which the context serves as queries and the exemplars offer values and keys. We show that CIM performs on par or better than the current state of the art on self-supervised and transfer benchmarks.
summary: We introduce Correlational Image Modeling (CIM), a novel and surprisingly effective approach to self-supervised visual pre-training. Our CIM performs a simple pretext task: we randomly crop image regions (exemplars) from an input image (context) and predict correlation maps between the exemplars and the context. Three key designs enable correlational image modeling as a nontrivial and meaningful self-supervisory task. First, to generate useful exemplar-context pairs, we consider cropping image regions with various scales, shapes, rotations, and transformations. Second, we employ a bootstrap learning framework that involves online and target encoders. During pre-training, the former takes exemplars as inputs while the latter converts the context. Third, we model the output correlation maps via a simple cross-attention block, within which the context serves as queries and the exemplars offer values and keys. We show that CIM performs on par or better than the current state of the art on self-supervised and transfer benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了相关图像建模（CIM），这是一种新颖且非常有效的自监督视觉预训练方法。我们的 CIM 执行一个简单的借口任务：我们从输入图像（上下文）中随机裁剪图像区域（样本），并预测样本和上下文之间的相关性图。三个关键设计使相关图像建模成为一项重要且有意义的自我监督任务。首先，为了生成有用的样本-上下文对，我们考虑裁剪具有各种尺度、形状、旋转和变换的图像区域。其次，我们采用涉及在线和目标编码器的引导学习框架。在预训练过程中，前者将样本作为输入，而后者则转换上下文。第三，我们通过一个简单的交叉注意块对输出相关图进行建模，其中上下文充当查询，样本提供值和键。我们表明，CIM 在自我监督和传输基准方面的表现与当前最先进技术相当或更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为关联图像建模（CIM）的新方法，用于自监督视觉预训练，通过预测图像区域与原始图像之间的关联图来实现。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督预训练方法在捕捉图像区域间语义关联方面存在不足，需设计更有效的预训练任务以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过随机裁剪多尺度、多形状的图像区域生成样本对，结合在线与目标编码器的引导学习框架，并利用交叉注意力机制建模上下文与样本间的关联图。
AI.result: CIM在自监督和迁移基准测试中表现优于或等于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CIM通过建模图像区域与上下文的关联关系，为自监督视觉预训练提供了简单而有效的新型预训练任务。

Our CIM performs a simple pretext task: we randomly crop image regions (exemplars) from an input image (context) and predict correlation maps between the exemplars and the context. Three key designs enable correlational image modeling as a nontrivial and meaningful self-supervisory task. First, to generate useful exemplar-context pairs, we consider cropping image regions with various scales, shapes, rotations, and transformations. Second, we employ a bootstrap learning framework that involves online and target encoders. During pre-training, the former takes exemplars as inputs while the latter converts the context. Third, we model the output correlation maps via a simple cross-attention block, within which the context serves as queries and the exemplars offer values and keys. We show that CIM performs on par or better than the current state of the art on self-supervised and transfer benchmarks. 我们介绍了相关图像建模（CIM），这是一种新颖且非常有效的自监督视觉预训练方法。我们的 CIM 执行一个简单的借口任务：我们从输入图像（上下文）中随机裁剪图像区域（样本），并预测样本和上下文之间的相关性图。三个关键设计使相关图像建模成为一项重要且有意义的自我监督任务。首先，为了生成有用的样本-上下文对，我们考虑裁剪具有各种尺度、形状、旋转和变换的图像区域。其次，我们采用涉及在线和目标编码器的引导学习框架。在预训练过程中，前者将样本作为输入，而后者则转换上下文。第三，我们通过一个简单的交叉注意块对输出相关图进行建模，其中上下文充当查询，样本提供值和键。我们表明，CIM 在自我监督和传输基准方面的表现与当前最先进技术相当或更好。 本文提出了一种名为关联图像建模（CIM）的新方法，用于自监督视觉预训练，通过预测图像区域与原始图像之间的关联图来实现。 Wei Li,Jiahao Xie,Chen Change Loy cs.CV

authors_text: Paul Gavrikov,Janis Keuper,Margret Keuper
title: An Extended Study of Human-like Behavior under Adversarial Training
title_zh: 对抗性训练下类人行为的扩展研究
comment: 6 pages, accepted at the CVPR 2023 Workshop "The 3rd Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness"
comments: 6 pages, accepted at the CVPR 2023 Workshop "The 3rd Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness"
abstract: Neural networks have a number of shortcomings. Amongst the severest ones is the sensitivity to distribution shifts which allows models to be easily fooled into wrong predictions by small perturbations to inputs that are often imperceivable to humans and do not have to carry semantic meaning. Adversarial training poses a partial solution to address this issue by training models on worst-case perturbations. Yet, recent work has also pointed out that the reasoning in neural networks is different from humans. Humans identify objects by shape, while neural nets mainly employ texture cues. Exemplarily, a model trained on photographs will likely fail to generalize to datasets containing sketches. Interestingly, it was also shown that adversarial training seems to favorably increase the shift toward shape bias. In this work, we revisit this observation and provide an extensive analysis of this effect on various architectures, the common $\ell_2$- and $\ell_\infty$-training, and Transformer-based models. Further, we provide a possible explanation for this phenomenon from a frequency perspective.
summary: Neural networks have a number of shortcomings. Amongst the severest ones is the sensitivity to distribution shifts which allows models to be easily fooled into wrong predictions by small perturbations to inputs that are often imperceivable to humans and do not have to carry semantic meaning. Adversarial training poses a partial solution to address this issue by training models on worst-case perturbations. Yet, recent work has also pointed out that the reasoning in neural networks is different from humans. Humans identify objects by shape, while neural nets mainly employ texture cues. Exemplarily, a model trained on photographs will likely fail to generalize to datasets containing sketches. Interestingly, it was also shown that adversarial training seems to favorably increase the shift toward shape bias. In this work, we revisit this observation and provide an extensive analysis of this effect on various architectures, the common $\ell_2$- and $\ell_\infty$-training, and Transformer-based models. Further, we provide a possible explanation for this phenomenon from a frequency perspective.
abstract_zh: 神经网络有许多缺点。其中最严重的是对分布变化的敏感性，这使得模型很容易通过对人类通常无法感知且不必携带语义的输入的小扰动而做出错误的预测。对抗性训练通过训练最坏情况扰动模型来解决这个问题。然而，最近的研究也指出，神经网络的推理与人类不同。人类通过形状来识别物体，而神经网络主要利用纹理线索。例如，在照片上训练的模型可能无法推广到包含草图的数据集。有趣的是，研究还表明，对抗性训练似乎有利于增加形状偏见的转变。在这项工作中，我们重新审视这一观察结果，并对各种架构、常见的 $\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$ 训练以及基于 Transformer 的模型的影响进行了广泛的分析。此外，我们从频率角度为这种现象提供了可能的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗训练如何使神经网络更接近人类的形状感知行为，并分析其在不同模型和训练方法中的效果。
AI.motivation: 神经网络对输入扰动敏感且依赖纹理而非形状进行推理，而对抗训练可能增强形状偏向性，但其机制和范围尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析多种网络架构、常见ℓ₂/ℓ∞对抗训练及Transformer模型，结合频率视角解释形状偏向性增强的可能原因。
AI.result: 对抗训练显著提升模型对形状的依赖性，且该效应在不同架构和训练方法中普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练可通过抑制纹理依赖促进神经网络向人类形状感知行为的靠拢，为提升模型鲁棒性与人类认知一致性提供新思路。
