search_text: An Extended Study of Human-like Behavior under Adversarial Training 对抗性训练下类人行为的扩展研究 Neural networks have a number of shortcomings. Amongst the severest ones is the sensitivity to distribution shifts which allows models to be easily fooled into wrong predictions by small perturbations to inputs that are often imperceivable to humans and do not have to carry semantic meaning. Adversarial training poses a partial solution to address this issue by training models on worst-case perturbations. Yet, recent work has also pointed out that the reasoning in neural networks is different from humans. Humans identify objects by shape, while neural nets mainly employ texture cues. Exemplarily, a model trained on photographs will likely fail to generalize to datasets containing sketches. Interestingly, it was also shown that adversarial training seems to favorably increase the shift toward shape bias. In this work, we revisit this observation and provide an extensive analysis of this effect on various architectures, the common $\ell_2$- and $\ell_\infty$-training, and Transformer-based models. Further, we provide a possible explanation for this phenomenon from a frequency perspective. 神经网络有许多缺点。其中最严重的是对分布变化的敏感性，这使得模型很容易通过对人类通常无法感知且不必携带语义的输入的小扰动而做出错误的预测。对抗性训练通过训练最坏情况扰动模型来解决这个问题。然而，最近的研究也指出，神经网络的推理与人类不同。人类通过形状来识别物体，而神经网络主要利用纹理线索。例如，在照片上训练的模型可能无法推广到包含草图的数据集。有趣的是，研究还表明，对抗性训练似乎有利于增加形状偏见的转变。在这项工作中，我们重新审视这一观察结果，并对各种架构、常见的 $\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$ 训练以及基于 Transformer 的模型的影响进行了广泛的分析。此外，我们从频率角度为这种现象提供了可能的解释。 本文研究对抗训练如何使神经网络更接近人类的形状感知行为，并分析其在不同模型和训练方法中的效果。 Paul Gavrikov,Janis Keuper,Margret Keuper cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Francesco Paissan,Cem Subakan,Mirco Ravanelli
title: Posthoc Interpretation via Quantization
title_zh: 通过量化进行事后解释
comment: Francesco Paissan and Cem Subakan contributed equally
comments: Francesco Paissan and Cem Subakan contributed equally
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new approach, called Posthoc Interpretation via Quantization (PIQ), for interpreting decisions made by trained classifiers. Our method utilizes vector quantization to transform the representations of a classifier into a discrete, class-specific latent space. The class-specific codebooks act as a bottleneck that forces the interpreter to focus on the parts of the input data deemed relevant by the classifier for making a prediction. Our model formulation also enables learning concepts by incorporating the supervision of pretrained annotation models such as state-of-the-art image segmentation models. We evaluated our method through quantitative and qualitative studies involving black-and-white images, color images, and audio. As a result of these studies we found that PIQ generates interpretations that are more easily understood by participants to our user studies when compared to several other interpretation methods in the literature.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new approach, called Posthoc Interpretation via Quantization (PIQ), for interpreting decisions made by trained classifiers. Our method utilizes vector quantization to transform the representations of a classifier into a discrete, class-specific latent space. The class-specific codebooks act as a bottleneck that forces the interpreter to focus on the parts of the input data deemed relevant by the classifier for making a prediction. Our model formulation also enables learning concepts by incorporating the supervision of pretrained annotation models such as state-of-the-art image segmentation models. We evaluated our method through quantitative and qualitative studies involving black-and-white images, color images, and audio. As a result of these studies we found that PIQ generates interpretations that are more easily understood by participants to our user studies when compared to several other interpretation methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了一种新方法，称为通过量化进行事后解释（PIQ），用于解释经过训练的分类器做出的决策。我们的方法利用矢量量化将分类器的表示转换为离散的、特定于类的潜在空间。特定于类的码本充当瓶颈，迫使解释器将注意力集中在分类器认为相关的输入数据部分以进行预测。我们的模型公式还通过结合预训练注释模型（例如最先进的图像分割模型）的监督来实现学习概念。我们通过涉及黑白图像、彩色图像和音频的定量和定性研究评估了我们的方法。这些研究的结果是，我们发现与文献中的其他几种解释方法相比，PIQ 生成的解释更容易被我们的用户研究参与者理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过量化进行事后解释的新方法（PIQ），将分类器的表示转换为离散的类别特定潜在空间以生成更易理解的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法可能难以直观呈现分类器决策依据，需通过结构化约束提升解释的可理解性并结合预训练模型增强语义关联。
AI.method: 利用向量量化构建类别特定代码本作为信息瓶颈，强制聚焦分类器关注的输入特征，同时引入预训练注释模型（如图像分割模型）进行监督学习。
AI.result: 在黑白图像、彩色图像和音频数据上的实验表明，PIQ生成的解释在用户研究中比其他方法更易被理解。
AI.conclusion: PIQ通过量化约束与预训练模型结合，有效生成语义清晰的解释，为分类器事后解释提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xunguang Wang,Jiawang Bai,Xinyue Xu,Xiaomeng Li
title: Reliable and Efficient Evaluation of Adversarial Robustness for Deep Hashing-Based Retrieval
title_zh: 可靠且高效地评估基于深度哈希的检索的对抗鲁棒性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.10779
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.10779
abstract: Deep hashing has been extensively applied to massive image retrieval due to its efficiency and effectiveness. Recently, several adversarial attacks have been presented to reveal the vulnerability of deep hashing models against adversarial examples. However, existing attack methods suffer from degraded performance or inefficiency because they underutilize the semantic relations between original samples or spend a lot of time learning these relations with a deep neural network. In this paper, we propose a novel Pharos-guided Attack, dubbed PgA, to evaluate the adversarial robustness of deep hashing networks reliably and efficiently. Specifically, we design pharos code to represent the semantics of the benign image, which preserves the similarity to semantically relevant samples and dissimilarity to irrelevant ones. It is proven that we can quickly calculate the pharos code via a simple math formula. Accordingly, PgA can directly conduct a reliable and efficient attack on deep hashing-based retrieval by maximizing the similarity between the hash code of the adversarial example and the pharos code. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets verify that the proposed algorithm outperforms the prior state-of-the-arts in both attack strength and speed.
summary: Deep hashing has been extensively applied to massive image retrieval due to its efficiency and effectiveness. Recently, several adversarial attacks have been presented to reveal the vulnerability of deep hashing models against adversarial examples. However, existing attack methods suffer from degraded performance or inefficiency because they underutilize the semantic relations between original samples or spend a lot of time learning these relations with a deep neural network. In this paper, we propose a novel Pharos-guided Attack, dubbed PgA, to evaluate the adversarial robustness of deep hashing networks reliably and efficiently. Specifically, we design pharos code to represent the semantics of the benign image, which preserves the similarity to semantically relevant samples and dissimilarity to irrelevant ones. It is proven that we can quickly calculate the pharos code via a simple math formula. Accordingly, PgA can directly conduct a reliable and efficient attack on deep hashing-based retrieval by maximizing the similarity between the hash code of the adversarial example and the pharos code. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets verify that the proposed algorithm outperforms the prior state-of-the-arts in both attack strength and speed.
abstract_zh: 深度哈希由于其高效性和有效性而被广泛应用于海量图像检索。最近，出现了几种对抗性攻击，揭示了深度哈希模型针对对抗性示例的脆弱性。然而，现有的攻击方法由于未充分利用原始样本之间的语义关系或花费大量时间通过深度神经网络学习这些关系而导致性能下降或效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Pharos 引导攻击，称为 PgA，以可靠有效地评估深度哈希网络的对抗鲁棒性。具体来说，我们设计了 pharos 代码来表示良性图像的语义，它保留了与语义相关样本的相似性和与不相关样本的相异性。事实证明，我们可以通过简单的数学公式快速计算出pharos代码。因此，PgA可以通过最大化对抗样本的哈希码与pharos码之间的相似度，直接对基于深度哈希的检索进行可靠且高效的攻击。对基准数据集的大量实验验证了所提出的算法在攻击强度和速度方面均优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PgA的新型Pharos引导攻击方法，用于可靠且高效地评估基于深度哈希的检索模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法因未充分利用样本语义关系或依赖深度网络学习关系而导致性能下降或效率低下，需设计更高效利用语义关系的攻击方法。
AI.method: 设计Pharos码表示良性图像语义，通过数学公式快速计算，使对抗样本哈希码与Pharos码相似度最大化，直接实现高效可靠攻击。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，PgA在攻击强度和速度上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Pharos码有效捕捉语义关系，PgA通过数学公式快速生成对抗样本，为评估深度哈希模型鲁棒性提供了可靠高效的解决方案。

It is proven that we can quickly calculate the pharos code via a simple math formula. Accordingly, PgA can directly conduct a reliable and efficient attack on deep hashing-based retrieval by maximizing the similarity between the hash code of the adversarial example and the pharos code. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets verify that the proposed algorithm outperforms the prior state-of-the-arts in both attack strength and speed. 深度哈希由于其高效性和有效性而被广泛应用于海量图像检索。最近，出现了几种对抗性攻击，揭示了深度哈希模型针对对抗性示例的脆弱性。然而，现有的攻击方法由于未充分利用原始样本之间的语义关系或花费大量时间通过深度神经网络学习这些关系而导致性能下降或效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Pharos 引导攻击，称为 PgA，以可靠有效地评估深度哈希网络的对抗鲁棒性。具体来说，我们设计了 pharos 代码来表示良性图像的语义，它保留了与语义相关样本的相似性和与不相关样本的相异性。事实证明，我们可以通过简单的数学公式快速计算出pharos代码。因此，PgA可以通过最大化对抗样本的哈希码与pharos码之间的相似度，直接对基于深度哈希的检索进行可靠且高效的攻击。对基准数据集的大量实验验证了所提出的算法在攻击强度和速度方面均优于现有技术。 本文提出一种名为PgA的新型Pharos引导攻击方法，用于可靠且高效地评估基于深度哈希的检索模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Xunguang Wang,Jiawang Bai,Xinyue Xu,Xiaomeng Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Yuan Bi,Zhongliang Jiang,Ricarda Clarenbach,Reza Ghotbi,Angelos Karlas,Nassir Navab
title: MI-SegNet: Mutual Information-Based US Segmentation for Unseen Domain Generalization
title_zh: MI-SegNet：基于互信息的美国分割，用于看不见的领域泛化
abstract: Generalization capabilities of learning-based medical image segmentation across domains are currently limited by the performance degradation caused by the domain shift, particularly for ultrasound (US) imaging. The quality of US images heavily relies on carefully tuned acoustic parameters, which vary across sonographers, machines, and settings. To improve the generalizability on US images across domains, we propose MI-SegNet, a novel mutual information (MI) based framework to explicitly disentangle the anatomical and domain feature representations; therefore, robust domain-independent segmentation can be expected. Two encoders are employed to extract the relevant features for the disentanglement. The segmentation only uses the anatomical feature map for its prediction. In order to force the encoders to learn meaningful feature representations a cross-reconstruction method is used during training. Transformations, specific to either domain or anatomy are applied to guide the encoders in their respective feature extraction task. Additionally, any MI present in both feature maps is punished to further promote separate feature spaces. We validate the generalizability of the proposed domain-independent segmentation approach on several datasets with varying parameters and machines. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MI-SegNet serving as a pre-trained model by comparing it with state-of-the-art networks.
summary: Generalization capabilities of learning-based medical image segmentation across domains are currently limited by the performance degradation caused by the domain shift, particularly for ultrasound (US) imaging. The quality of US images heavily relies on carefully tuned acoustic parameters, which vary across sonographers, machines, and settings. To improve the generalizability on US images across domains, we propose MI-SegNet, a novel mutual information (MI) based framework to explicitly disentangle the anatomical and domain feature representations; therefore, robust domain-independent segmentation can be expected. Two encoders are employed to extract the relevant features for the disentanglement. The segmentation only uses the anatomical feature map for its prediction. In order to force the encoders to learn meaningful feature representations a cross-reconstruction method is used during training. Transformations, specific to either domain or anatomy are applied to guide the encoders in their respective feature extraction task. Additionally, any MI present in both feature maps is punished to further promote separate feature spaces. We validate the generalizability of the proposed domain-independent segmentation approach on several datasets with varying parameters and machines. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MI-SegNet serving as a pre-trained model by comparing it with state-of-the-art networks.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的跨领域医学图像分割的泛化能力目前受到域转移引起的性能下降的限制，特别是对于超声（US）成像。 US 图像的质量在很大程度上依赖于精心调整的声学参数，这些参数因超声医师、机器和设置而异。为了提高跨领域的美国图像的通用性，我们提出了 MI-SegNet，这是一种基于互信息（MI）的新型框架，可以明确地解开解剖和领域特征表示；因此，可以预期鲁棒的与域无关的分割。采用两个编码器来提取相关特征以进行解开。分割仅使用解剖特征图进行预测。为了迫使编码器学习有意义的特征表示，在训练期间使用交叉重建方法。应用特定于领域或解剖学的转换来指导编码器完成各自的特征提取任务。此外，两个特征图中出现的任何 MI 都会受到惩罚，以进一步促进单独的特征空间。我们在具有不同参数和机器的多个数据集上验证了所提出的与域无关的分割方法的通用性。此外，我们通过与最先进的网络进行比较，证明了所提出的 MI-SegNet 作为预训练模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MI-SegNet框架，通过互信息方法提升超声图像跨域分割的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 超声图像质量受声学参数影响，不同设备、操作者和环境导致域偏移，现有分割模型在跨域场景下性能下降。
AI.method: 采用双编码器结构分离解剖特征与域特征，仅使用解剖特征进行分割；通过交叉重建、域特定变换及互信息惩罚机制强化特征解耦。
AI.result: 在多参数、多设备数据集验证中，MI-SegNet优于现有方法，且作为预训练模型有效提升下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: MI-SegNet通过显式特征解耦和互信息约束，实现了跨域超声图像分割的鲁棒性，为域泛化分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Chinmay Kulkarni,Stefania Druga,Minsuk Chang,Alex Fiannaca,Carrie Cai,Michael Terry
title: A Word is Worth a Thousand Pictures: Prompts as AI Design Material
title_zh: 一言胜千图：作为AI设计素材的提示
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures
comments: 22 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Recent advances in Machine-Learning have led to the development of models that generate images based on a text description.Such large prompt-based text to image models (TTIs), trained on a considerable amount of data, allow the creation of high-quality images by users with no graphics or design training. This paper examines the role such TTI models can playin collaborative, goal-oriented design. Through a within-subjects study with 14 non-professional designers, we find that such models can help participants explore a design space rapidly and allow for fluid collaboration. We also find that text inputs to such models ("prompts") act as reflective design material, facilitating exploration, iteration, and reflection in pair design. This work contributes to the future of collaborative design supported by generative AI by providing an account of how text-to-image models influence the design process and the social dynamics around design and suggesting implications for tool design
summary: Recent advances in Machine-Learning have led to the development of models that generate images based on a text description.Such large prompt-based text to image models (TTIs), trained on a considerable amount of data, allow the creation of high-quality images by users with no graphics or design training. This paper examines the role such TTI models can playin collaborative, goal-oriented design. Through a within-subjects study with 14 non-professional designers, we find that such models can help participants explore a design space rapidly and allow for fluid collaboration. We also find that text inputs to such models ("prompts") act as reflective design material, facilitating exploration, iteration, and reflection in pair design. This work contributes to the future of collaborative design supported by generative AI by providing an account of how text-to-image models influence the design process and the social dynamics around design and suggesting implications for tool design
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新进展促进了基于文本描述生成图像的模型的发展。这种基于提示的大型文本到图像模型（TTI）经过大量数据的训练，允许没有图形或设计培训的用户创建高质量的图像。本文探讨了此类 TTI 模型在协作、面向目标的设计中可以发挥的作用。通过对 14 名非专业设计师进行的受试者内研究，我们发现此类模型可以帮助参与者快速探索设计空间并实现流畅的协作。我们还发现此类模型的文本输入（“提示”）充当反思性设计材料，促进结对设计中的探索、迭代和反思。这项工作通过说明文本到图像模型如何影响设计过程和围绕设计的社会动态，并提出对工具设计的影响，为生成人工智能支持的协作设计的未来做出了贡献

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了文本到图像生成模型（TTI）在协作设计中的作用，特别是提示词（prompts）作为设计材料如何影响设计过程与社会动态。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI的发展，研究旨在理解非专业设计师如何利用TTI模型进行协作设计，并分析提示词在设计探索与迭代中的作用。
AI.method: 通过14名非专业设计师的组内实验，观察他们使用TTI模型进行协作设计的过程，分析提示词的使用及其对设计流程的影响。
AI.result: TTI模型帮助参与者快速探索设计空间并实现流畅协作，提示词作为反思性设计材料，促进了设计迭代与反思。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了TTI模型对设计流程及协作动态的影响，为未来生成式AI支持的协作设计工具开发提供了理论依据与实践启示。

authors_text: Hadrien Reynaud,Mengyun Qiao,Mischa Dombrowski,Thomas Day,Reza Razavi,Alberto Gomez,Paul Leeson,Bernhard Kainz
title: Feature-Conditioned Cascaded Video Diffusion Models for Precise Echocardiogram Synthesis
title_zh: 用于精确超声心动图合成的特征条件级联视频扩散模型
comment: Published in MICCAI 2023 proceedings. https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-43999-5_14
comments: Published in MICCAI 2023 proceedings. https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-43999-5_14
abstract: Image synthesis is expected to provide value for the translation of machine learning methods into clinical practice. Fundamental problems like model robustness, domain transfer, causal modelling, and operator training become approachable through synthetic data. Especially, heavily operator-dependant modalities like Ultrasound imaging require robust frameworks for image and video generation. So far, video generation has only been possible by providing input data that is as rich as the output data, e.g., image sequence plus conditioning in, video out. However, clinical documentation is usually scarce and only single images are reported and stored, thus retrospective patient-specific analysis or the generation of rich training data becomes impossible with current approaches. In this paper, we extend elucidated diffusion models for video modelling to generate plausible video sequences from single images and arbitrary conditioning with clinical parameters. We explore this idea within the context of echocardiograms by looking into the variation of the Left Ventricle Ejection Fraction, the most essential clinical metric gained from these examinations. We use the publicly available EchoNet-Dynamic dataset for all our experiments. Our image to sequence approach achieves an $R^2$ score of 93%, which is 38 points higher than recently proposed sequence to sequence generation methods. Code and models will be available at: https://github.com/HReynaud/EchoDiffusion.
summary: Image synthesis is expected to provide value for the translation of machine learning methods into clinical practice. Fundamental problems like model robustness, domain transfer, causal modelling, and operator training become approachable through synthetic data. Especially, heavily operator-dependant modalities like Ultrasound imaging require robust frameworks for image and video generation. So far, video generation has only been possible by providing input data that is as rich as the output data, e.g., image sequence plus conditioning in, video out. However, clinical documentation is usually scarce and only single images are reported and stored, thus retrospective patient-specific analysis or the generation of rich training data becomes impossible with current approaches. In this paper, we extend elucidated diffusion models for video modelling to generate plausible video sequences from single images and arbitrary conditioning with clinical parameters. We explore this idea within the context of echocardiograms by looking into the variation of the Left Ventricle Ejection Fraction, the most essential clinical metric gained from these examinations. We use the publicly available EchoNet-Dynamic dataset for all our experiments. Our image to sequence approach achieves an $R^2$ score of 93%, which is 38 points higher than recently proposed sequence to sequence generation methods. Code and models will be available at: https://github.com/HReynaud/EchoDiffusion.
abstract_zh: 图像合成有望为机器学习方法转化为临床实践提供价值。通过合成数据，模型鲁棒性、领域转移、因果建模和操作员培训等基本问题变得可以解决。特别是，超声波成像等高度依赖操作员的模式需要强大的图像和视频生成框架。到目前为止，视频生成只能通过提供与输出数据一样丰富的输入数据来实现，例如图像序列加上调节输入、视频输出。然而，临床文档通常很少，并且仅报告和存储单个图像，因此当前的方法不可能进行针对患者的回顾性分析或生成丰富的训练数据。在本文中，我们扩展了用于视频建模的阐明的扩散模型，以从单个图像和临床参数的任意条件生成合理的视频序列。我们通过研究左心室射血分数（从这些检查中获得的最重要的临床指标）的变化，在超声心动图的背景下探索这一想法。我们使用公开可用的 EchoNet-Dynamic 数据集进行所有实验。我们的图像到序列方法获得了 93% 的 $R^2$ 分数，比最近提出的序列到序列生成方法高了 38 分。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/HReynaud/EchoDiffusion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征条件级联视频扩散模型的方法，用于从单张图像和临床参数生成合理的超声心动图视频序列。
AI.motivation: 临床超声影像数据稀缺且仅存储单帧图像，导致难以进行回顾性分析和生成丰富的训练数据，而现有方法需输入与输出同样丰富的数据。
AI.method: 扩展扩散模型以处理视频生成，通过单张图像和临床参数（如左心室射血分数）作为条件输入，利用EchoNet-Dynamic数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 图像到序列的方法在R²评分上达到93%，比最近的序列到序列生成方法高出38分。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了临床数据稀缺问题，为生成高质量超声心动图视频提供了可行方案，推动了合成数据在医学领域的应用。

search_text: Feature-Conditioned Cascaded Video Diffusion Models for Precise Echocardiogram Synthesis 用于精确超声心动图合成的特征条件级联视频扩散模型 Image synthesis is expected to provide value for the translation of machine learning methods into clinical practice. Fundamental problems like model robustness, domain transfer, causal modelling, and operator training become approachable through synthetic data. Especially, heavily operator-dependant modalities like Ultrasound imaging require robust frameworks for image and video generation. So far, video generation has only been possible by providing input data that is as rich as the output data, e.g., image sequence plus conditioning in, video out. However, clinical documentation is usually scarce and only single images are reported and stored, thus retrospective patient-specific analysis or the generation of rich training data becomes impossible with current approaches. In this paper, we extend elucidated diffusion models for video modelling to generate plausible video sequences from single images and arbitrary conditioning with clinical parameters. We explore this idea within the context of echocardiograms by looking into the variation of the Left Ventricle Ejection Fraction, the most essential clinical metric gained from these examinations. We use the publicly available EchoNet-Dynamic dataset for all our experiments. Our image to sequence approach achieves an $R^2$ score of 93%, which is 38 points higher than recently proposed sequence to sequence generation methods. Code and models will be available at: https://github.com/HReynaud/EchoDiffusion. 图像合成有望为机器学习方法转化为临床实践提供价值。通过合成数据，模型鲁棒性、领域转移、因果建模和操作员培训等基本问题变得可以解决。特别是，超声波成像等高度依赖操作员的模式需要强大的图像和视频生成框架。到目前为止，视频生成只能通过提供与输出数据一样丰富的输入数据来实现，例如图像序列加上调节输入、视频输出。然而，临床文档通常很少，并且仅报告和存储单个图像，因此当前的方法不可能进行针对患者的回顾性分析或生成丰富的训练数据。在本文中，我们扩展了用于视频建模的阐明的扩散模型，以从单个图像和临床参数的任意条件生成合理的视频序列。我们通过研究左心室射血分数（从这些检查中获得的最重要的临床指标）的变化，在超声心动图的背景下探索这一想法。我们使用公开可用的 EchoNet-Dynamic 数据集进行所有实验。我们的图像到序列方法获得了 93% 的 $R^2$ 分数，比最近提出的序列到序列生成方法高了 38 分。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/HReynaud/EchoDiffusion。 本文提出了一种基于特征条件级联视频扩散模型的方法，用于从单张图像和临床参数生成合理的超声心动图视频序列。 Hadrien Reynaud,Mengyun Qiao,Mischa Dombrowski,Thomas Day,Reza Razavi,Alberto Gomez,Paul Leeson,Bernhard Kainz cs.CV

authors_text: Elizabeth Seger,Aviv Ovadya,Ben Garfinkel,Divya Siddarth,Allan Dafoe
title: Democratising AI: Multiple Meanings, Goals, and Methods
title_zh: 人工智能民主化：多重含义、目标和方法
comment: V2 Changed second author affiliation; added citation to section 5.2; edit to author contribution statement; V3 camera ready version for conference proceedings. Minor content changes in response to reviewer comments
comments: V2 Changed second author affiliation; added citation to section 5.2; edit to author contribution statement; V3 camera ready version for conference proceedings. Minor content changes in response to reviewer comments
abstract: Numerous parties are calling for the democratisation of AI, but the phrase is used to refer to a variety of goals, the pursuit of which sometimes conflict. This paper identifies four kinds of AI democratisation that are commonly discussed: (1) the democratisation of AI use, (2) the democratisation of AI development, (3) the democratisation of AI profits, and (4) the democratisation of AI governance. Numerous goals and methods of achieving each form of democratisation are discussed. The main takeaway from this paper is that AI democratisation is a multifarious and sometimes conflicting concept that should not be conflated with improving AI accessibility. If we want to move beyond ambiguous commitments to democratising AI, to productive discussions of concrete policies and trade-offs, then we need to recognise the principal role of the democratisation of AI governance in navigating tradeoffs and risks across decisions around use, development, and profits.
summary: Numerous parties are calling for the democratisation of AI, but the phrase is used to refer to a variety of goals, the pursuit of which sometimes conflict. This paper identifies four kinds of AI democratisation that are commonly discussed: (1) the democratisation of AI use, (2) the democratisation of AI development, (3) the democratisation of AI profits, and (4) the democratisation of AI governance. Numerous goals and methods of achieving each form of democratisation are discussed. The main takeaway from this paper is that AI democratisation is a multifarious and sometimes conflicting concept that should not be conflated with improving AI accessibility. If we want to move beyond ambiguous commitments to democratising AI, to productive discussions of concrete policies and trade-offs, then we need to recognise the principal role of the democratisation of AI governance in navigating tradeoffs and risks across decisions around use, development, and profits.
abstract_zh: 许多团体都在呼吁人工智能的民主化，但这个词被用来指代多种目标，而这些目标的追求有时会发生冲突。本文识别了常见讨论的四种人工智能民主化：（1）人工智能使用的民主化，（2）人工智能开发的民主化，（3）人工智能利润的民主化，以及（4）人工智能治理的民主化。讨论了实现每种形式的民主化的众多目标和方法。本文的主要结论是，人工智能民主化是一个多种多样且有时相互冲突的概念，不应与提高人工智能的可及性混为一谈。如果我们想要超越对人工智能民主化的模糊承诺，转而对具体政策和权衡进行富有成效的讨论，那么我们需要认识到人工智能治理民主化在围绕使用、开发和利润决策进行权衡和风险方面的主要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了人工智能（AI）民主化的多种含义、目标和方法，指出其概念的复杂性和潜在冲突。
AI.motivation: 当前对AI民主化的呼吁存在模糊性，不同利益相关方对其目标和实现路径的理解存在分歧，需明确其核心内涵以推动具体政策讨论。
AI.method: 通过概念分析，识别出AI民主化的四种主要形式（使用、开发、利润分配、治理），并探讨其对应的目标与实现方法。
AI.result: 发现AI民主化涉及多重目标且可能相互冲突，强调AI治理民主化在协调使用、开发与利润分配等决策中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: AI民主化不应简单等同于提升技术可及性，需通过治理机制设计来平衡多方利益与风险，推动具体政策制定。

authors_text: Frederik Pahde,Maximilian Dreyer,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin
title: Reveal to Revise: An Explainable AI Life Cycle for Iterative Bias Correction of Deep Models
title_zh: Reveal to Revise：用于深度模型迭代偏差校正的可解释人工智能生命周期
abstract: State-of-the-art machine learning models often learn spurious correlations embedded in the training data. This poses risks when deploying these models for high-stake decision-making, such as in medical applications like skin cancer detection. To tackle this problem, we propose Reveal to Revise (R2R), a framework entailing the entire eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) life cycle, enabling practitioners to iteratively identify, mitigate, and (re-)evaluate spurious model behavior with a minimal amount of human interaction. In the first step (1), R2R reveals model weaknesses by finding outliers in attributions or through inspection of latent concepts learned by the model. Secondly (2), the responsible artifacts are detected and spatially localized in the input data, which is then leveraged to (3) revise the model behavior. Concretely, we apply the methods of RRR, CDEP and ClArC for model correction, and (4) (re-)evaluate the model's performance and remaining sensitivity towards the artifact. Using two medical benchmark datasets for Melanoma detection and bone age estimation, we apply our R2R framework to VGG, ResNet and EfficientNet architectures and thereby reveal and correct real dataset-intrinsic artifacts, as well as synthetic variants in a controlled setting. Completing the XAI life cycle, we demonstrate multiple R2R iterations to mitigate different biases. Code is available on https://github.com/maxdreyer/Reveal2Revise.
summary: State-of-the-art machine learning models often learn spurious correlations embedded in the training data. This poses risks when deploying these models for high-stake decision-making, such as in medical applications like skin cancer detection. To tackle this problem, we propose Reveal to Revise (R2R), a framework entailing the entire eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) life cycle, enabling practitioners to iteratively identify, mitigate, and (re-)evaluate spurious model behavior with a minimal amount of human interaction. In the first step (1), R2R reveals model weaknesses by finding outliers in attributions or through inspection of latent concepts learned by the model. Secondly (2), the responsible artifacts are detected and spatially localized in the input data, which is then leveraged to (3) revise the model behavior. Concretely, we apply the methods of RRR, CDEP and ClArC for model correction, and (4) (re-)evaluate the model's performance and remaining sensitivity towards the artifact. Using two medical benchmark datasets for Melanoma detection and bone age estimation, we apply our R2R framework to VGG, ResNet and EfficientNet architectures and thereby reveal and correct real dataset-intrinsic artifacts, as well as synthetic variants in a controlled setting. Completing the XAI life cycle, we demonstrate multiple R2R iterations to mitigate different biases. Code is available on https://github.com/maxdreyer/Reveal2Revise.
abstract_zh: 最先进的机器学习模型通常会学习训练数据中嵌入的虚假相关性。当部署这些模型进行高风险决策时（例如皮肤癌检测等医疗应用），这会带来风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Reveal to Revise (R2R)，这是一个涵盖整个可解释人工智能 (XAI) 生命周期的框架，使从业者能够通过最少的人机交互迭代地识别、减轻和（重新）评估虚假模型行为。在第一步 (1) 中，R2R 通过查找归因中的异常值或通过检查模型学到的潜在概念来揭示模型的弱点。其次，(2) 检测输入数据中的相关伪影并进行空间定位，然后利用该信息来 (3) 修改模型行为。具体来说，我们应用 RRR、CDEP 和 ClArC 的方法进行模型校正，并且（4）（重新）评估模型的性能和对伪影的剩余敏感性。使用两个用于黑色素瘤检测和骨龄估计的医学基准数据集，我们将 R2R 框架应用于 VGG、ResNet 和 EfficientNet 架构，从而揭示和纠正真实数据集固有的伪影，以及受控设置中的合成变体。完成 XAI 生命周期后，我们演示了多个 R2R 迭代来减轻不同的偏差。代码可在 https://github.com/maxdreyer/Reveal2Revise 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释人工智能（XAI）生命周期框架R2R，用于迭代修正深度模型中的偏差，特别是在医疗等高风险领域。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习模型易受训练数据中虚假相关性影响，导致在医疗等关键决策场景中出现偏差，需通过可解释性方法进行迭代修正。
AI.method: R2R框架包含四个步骤：通过归因分析或潜在概念检测模型弱点；定位输入数据中的偏差源；采用RRR、CDEP和ClArC等方法修正模型；重新评估模型性能与偏差敏感性。
AI.result: 在黑色素瘤检测和骨龄估计医疗数据集上验证，成功揭示并修正了真实数据固有偏差及合成偏差，通过多轮迭代显著降低模型偏差。
AI.conclusion: R2R通过完整的XAI生命周期实现深度模型偏差的迭代修正，为高风险领域模型可靠性提升提供了有效方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释人工智能（XAI）生命周期框架R2R，用于迭代修正深度模型中的偏差，特别是在医疗等高风险领域。

search_text: Reveal to Revise: An Explainable AI Life Cycle for Iterative Bias Correction of Deep Models Reveal to Revise：用于深度模型迭代偏差校正的可解释人工智能生命周期 State-of-the-art machine learning models often learn spurious correlations embedded in the training data. This poses risks when deploying these models for high-stake decision-making, such as in medical applications like skin cancer detection. To tackle this problem, we propose Reveal to Revise (R2R), a framework entailing the entire eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) life cycle, enabling practitioners to iteratively identify, mitigate, and (re-)evaluate spurious model behavior with a minimal amount of human interaction. In the first step (1), R2R reveals model weaknesses by finding outliers in attributions or through inspection of latent concepts learned by the model. Secondly (2), the responsible artifacts are detected and spatially localized in the input data, which is then leveraged to (3) revise the model behavior. Concretely, we apply the methods of RRR, CDEP and ClArC for model correction, and (4) (re-)evaluate the model's performance and remaining sensitivity towards the artifact. Using two medical benchmark datasets for Melanoma detection and bone age estimation, we apply our R2R framework to VGG, ResNet and EfficientNet architectures and thereby reveal and correct real dataset-intrinsic artifacts, as well as synthetic variants in a controlled setting. Completing the XAI life cycle, we demonstrate multiple R2R iterations to mitigate different biases. Code is available on https://github.com/maxdreyer/Reveal2Revise. 最先进的机器学习模型通常会学习训练数据中嵌入的虚假相关性。当部署这些模型进行高风险决策时（例如皮肤癌检测等医疗应用），这会带来风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Reveal to Revise (R2R)，这是一个涵盖整个可解释人工智能 (XAI) 生命周期的框架，使从业者能够通过最少的人机交互迭代地识别、减轻和（重新）评估虚假模型行为。在第一步 (1) 中，R2R 通过查找归因中的异常值或通过检查模型学到的潜在概念来揭示模型的弱点。其次，(2) 检测输入数据中的相关伪影并进行空间定位，然后利用该信息来 (3) 修改模型行为。具体来说，我们应用 RRR、CDEP 和 ClArC 的方法进行模型校正，并且（4）（重新）评估模型的性能和对伪影的剩余敏感性。使用两个用于黑色素瘤检测和骨龄估计的医学基准数据集，我们将 R2R 框架应用于 VGG、ResNet 和 EfficientNet 架构，从而揭示和纠正真实数据集固有的伪影，以及受控设置中的合成变体。完成 XAI 生命周期后，我们演示了多个 R2R 迭代来减轻不同的偏差。代码可在 https://github.com/maxdreyer/Reveal2Revise 上找到。 本文提出一种可解释人工智能（XAI）生命周期框架R2R，用于迭代修正深度模型中的偏差，特别是在医疗等高风险领域。 Frederik Pahde,Maximilian Dreyer,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Antoine Dizet,Ubbo Visser,Cedric Buche
title: RoboCupSoccer Review: The Goalkeeper, a Distinctive Player
title_zh: RoboCupSoccer 评论：守门员，一位独特的球员
comment: 10 pages, 2 tables
comments: 10 pages, 2 tables
abstract: This article offers a literature review of goalkeeper robots in the context of the RoboCupSoccer competition. The latter is one of the various league categories hosted by the RoboCup Federation, which fosters AI and Robotics with their landmark challenges. Despite the number of articles on the subject of the goalkeeper, there is a lack of studies offering a comprehensive and up-to-date analysis. We propose to provide a review of research related to goalkeepers within the RoboCupSoccer leagues in order to extract possible improvements and scientific issues. The goalkeeper, although being a specific player, has many skills in common with other players. Therefore, this review is divided into three parts: perception, cognition and action, where the perception and action parts are common to all players and the cognition part focuses on goalkeepers. The discussion will open up on the possible improvements of the developments made for these goalkeepers.

The discussion will open up on the possible improvements of the developments made for these goalkeepers.
abstract_zh: 本文对 RoboCupSoccer 比赛中的守门员机器人进行了文献综述。后者是 RoboCup 联合会主办的各种联赛类别之一，该联合会通过其具有里程碑意义的挑战来促进人工智能和机器人技术的发展。尽管有关守门员主题的文章很多，但缺乏提供全面且最新分析的研究。我们建议对 RoboCupSoccer 联赛中与守门员相关的研究进行回顾，以找出可能的改进和科学问题。守门员虽然是一名特定的球员，但与其他球员有许多共同的技能。因此，本次回顾分为三个部分：感知、认知和行动，其中感知和行动部分是所有球员共有的，认知部分重点关注守门员。讨论将围绕这些守门员的发展可能进行的改进展开。

AI.tldr: 本文对RoboCupSoccer比赛中守门员机器人的研究进行文献综述，分析现有技术并提出可能的改进方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量关于守门员机器人的研究，但缺乏全面且最新的综述，本文旨在填补这一空白，识别科学问题并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 通过分三个部分（感知、认知、行动）进行文献综述，其中感知与行动适用于所有球员，认知部分专门针对守门员进行分析。
AI.result: 总结了守门员机器人在感知、认知和行动方面的研究现状，并提出了未来可能的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 守门员机器人研究在RoboCupSoccer中具有重要意义，未来需进一步优化其认知能力与协同策略。

authors_text: Shravan Kumar Sajja,Sumanta Mukherjee,Satyam Dwivedi
title: Semi-supervised counterfactual explanations
title_zh: 半监督反事实解释
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
comments: 12 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Counterfactual explanations for machine learning models are used to find minimal interventions to the feature values such that the model changes the prediction to a different output or a target output. A valid counterfactual explanation should have likely feature values. Here, we address the challenge of generating counterfactual explanations that lie in the same data distribution as that of the training data and more importantly, they belong to the target class distribution. This requirement has been addressed through the incorporation of auto-encoder reconstruction loss in the counterfactual search process. Connecting the output behavior of the classifier to the latent space of the auto-encoder has further improved the speed of the counterfactual search process and the interpretability of the resulting counterfactual explanations. Continuing this line of research, we show further improvement in the interpretability of counterfactual explanations when the auto-encoder is trained in a semi-supervised fashion with class tagged input data. We empirically evaluate our approach on several datasets and show considerable improvement in-terms of several metrics.
summary: Counterfactual explanations for machine learning models are used to find minimal interventions to the feature values such that the model changes the prediction to a different output or a target output. A valid counterfactual explanation should have likely feature values. Here, we address the challenge of generating counterfactual explanations that lie in the same data distribution as that of the training data and more importantly, they belong to the target class distribution. This requirement has been addressed through the incorporation of auto-encoder reconstruction loss in the counterfactual search process. Connecting the output behavior of the classifier to the latent space of the auto-encoder has further improved the speed of the counterfactual search process and the interpretability of the resulting counterfactual explanations. Continuing this line of research, we show further improvement in the interpretability of counterfactual explanations when the auto-encoder is trained in a semi-supervised fashion with class tagged input data. We empirically evaluate our approach on several datasets and show considerable improvement in-terms of several metrics.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型的反事实解释用于找到对特征值的最小干预，以便模型将预测更改为不同的输出或目标输出。有效的反事实解释应该具有可能的特征值。在这里，我们解决了生成反事实解释的挑战，这些解释与训练数据具有相同的数据分布，更重要的是，它们属于目标类分布。这一要求已通过在反事实搜索过程中纳入自动编码器重建损失来解决。将分类器的输出行为连接到自动编码器的潜在空间进一步提高了反事实搜索过程的速度以及所得反事实解释的可解释性。继续这一研究方向，我们展示了当自动编码器使用类标记输入数据以半监督方式进行训练时，反事实解释的可解释性进一步提高。我们在几个数据集上对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并在几个指标方面显示出相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法生成符合目标类别分布的反事实解释，通过结合自编码器重建损失和分类器输出行为优化反事实搜索过程。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法生成的样本可能偏离目标类别分布，导致解释不可靠。需确保反事实样本既符合数据分布又属于目标类别，同时提升可解释性。
AI.method: 在自编码器中引入重建损失约束数据分布，通过连接分类器输出与潜在空间加速搜索，并采用半监督训练方式利用带标签数据优化反事实生成。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在反事实解释的可解释性、搜索效率及分布匹配度等指标上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 半监督自编码器框架有效提升了反事实解释的质量与可解释性，为生成符合目标分布的可信解释提供了新思路。

Connecting the output behavior of the classifier to the latent space of the auto-encoder has further improved the speed of the counterfactual search process and the interpretability of the resulting counterfactual explanations. We empirically evaluate our approach on several datasets and show considerable improvement in-terms of several metrics. 机器学习模型的反事实解释用于找到对特征值的最小干预，以便模型将预测更改为不同的输出或目标输出。有效的反事实解释应该具有可能的特征值。在这里，我们解决了生成反事实解释的挑战，这些解释与训练数据具有相同的数据分布，更重要的是，它们属于目标类分布。这一要求已通过在反事实搜索过程中纳入自动编码器重建损失来解决。将分类器的输出行为连接到自动编码器的潜在空间进一步提高了反事实搜索过程的速度以及所得反事实解释的可解释性。继续这一研究方向，我们展示了当自动编码器使用类标记输入数据以半监督方式进行训练时，反事实解释的可解释性进一步提高。我们在几个数据集上对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并在几个指标方面显示出相当大的改进。 本文提出一种半监督方法生成符合目标类别分布的反事实解释，通过结合自编码器重建损失和分类器输出行为优化反事实搜索过程。 Shravan Kumar Sajja,Sumanta Mukherjee,Satyam Dwivedi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chao Zhou,Yanan Zhang,Jiaxin Chen,Di Huang
title: OcTr: Octree-based Transformer for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: OcTr：用于 3D 对象检测的基于八叉树的转换器
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: A key challenge for LiDAR-based 3D object detection is to capture sufficient features from large scale 3D scenes especially for distant or/and occluded objects. Albeit recent efforts made by Transformers with the long sequence modeling capability, they fail to properly balance the accuracy and efficiency, suffering from inadequate receptive fields or coarse-grained holistic correlations. In this paper, we propose an Octree-based Transformer, named OcTr, to address this issue. It first constructs a dynamic octree on the hierarchical feature pyramid through conducting self-attention on the top level and then recursively propagates to the level below restricted by the octants, which captures rich global context in a coarse-to-fine manner while maintaining the computational complexity under control. Furthermore, for enhanced foreground perception, we propose a hybrid positional embedding, composed of the semantic-aware positional embedding and attention mask, to fully exploit semantic and geometry clues. Extensive experiments are conducted on the Waymo Open Dataset and KITTI Dataset, and OcTr reaches newly state-of-the-art results.
summary: A key challenge for LiDAR-based 3D object detection is to capture sufficient features from large scale 3D scenes especially for distant or/and occluded objects. Albeit recent efforts made by Transformers with the long sequence modeling capability, they fail to properly balance the accuracy and efficiency, suffering from inadequate receptive fields or coarse-grained holistic correlations. In this paper, we propose an Octree-based Transformer, named OcTr, to address this issue. It first constructs a dynamic octree on the hierarchical feature pyramid through conducting self-attention on the top level and then recursively propagates to the level below restricted by the octants, which captures rich global context in a coarse-to-fine manner while maintaining the computational complexity under control. Furthermore, for enhanced foreground perception, we propose a hybrid positional embedding, composed of the semantic-aware positional embedding and attention mask, to fully exploit semantic and geometry clues. Extensive experiments are conducted on the Waymo Open Dataset and KITTI Dataset, and OcTr reaches newly state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的一个关键挑战是从大规模 3D 场景中捕获足够的特征，特别是对于远处或/和遮挡的物体。尽管 Transformers 最近在长序列建模能力方面做出了努力，但由于感受野不足或粗粒度整体相关性，它们未能正确平衡准确性和效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于八叉树的 Transformer，名为 OcTr，来解决这个问题。它首先通过在顶层进行自注意力在分层特征金字塔上构建动态八叉树，然后递归地传播到受八分圆限制的下层，以从粗到细的方式捕获丰富的全局上下文，同时保持计算复杂性可控。此外，为了增强前景感知，我们提出了一种混合位置嵌入，由语义感知位置嵌入和注意掩模组成，以充分利用语义和几何线索。在 Waymo 开放数据集和 KITTI 数据集上进行了大量实验，OcTr 达到了最新的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OcTr，一种基于八叉树的Transformer模型，用于解决LiDAR-based 3D目标检测中远距离和遮挡物体特征提取不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在3D目标检测中难以平衡准确性与计算效率，存在感受野不足或整体关联粗糙的问题，尤其对远距离/遮挡物体检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建动态八叉树层次特征金字塔，通过顶层自注意力递归传播至下层八叉树节点，结合语义感知位置嵌入与注意力掩码增强前景感知能力。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset和KITTI Dataset上达到新的状态-of-the-art检测性能。
AI.conclusion: OcTr通过八叉树结构与混合位置编码有效提升了3D目标检测的全局上下文建模能力，尤其在复杂场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Chunyi Li,Wei Sun,Xiaohong Liu,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai
title: A Perceptual Quality Assessment Exploration for AIGC Images
title_zh: AIGC 图像的感知质量评估探索
abstract: \underline{AI} \underline{G}enerated \underline{C}ontent (\textbf{AIGC}) has gained widespread attention with the increasing efficiency of deep learning in content creation. AIGC, created with the assistance of artificial intelligence technology, includes various forms of content, among which the AI-generated images (AGIs) have brought significant impact to society and have been applied to various fields such as entertainment, education, social media, etc. However, due to hardware limitations and technical proficiency, the quality of AIGC images (AGIs) varies, necessitating refinement and filtering before practical use. Consequently, there is an urgent need for developing objective models to assess the quality of AGIs. Unfortunately, no research has been carried out to investigate the perceptual quality assessment for AGIs specifically. Therefore, in this paper, we first discuss the major evaluation aspects such as technical issues, AI artifacts, unnaturalness, discrepancy, and aesthetics for AGI quality assessment. Then we present the first perceptual AGI quality assessment database, AGIQA-1K, which consists of 1,080 AGIs generated from diffusion models. A well-organized subjective experiment is followed to collect the quality labels of the AGIs. Finally, we conduct a benchmark experiment to evaluate the performance of current image quality assessment (IQA) models.
summary: \underline{AI} \underline{G}enerated \underline{C}ontent (\textbf{AIGC}) has gained widespread attention with the increasing efficiency of deep learning in content creation. AIGC, created with the assistance of artificial intelligence technology, includes various forms of content, among which the AI-generated images (AGIs) have brought significant impact to society and have been applied to various fields such as entertainment, education, social media, etc. However, due to hardware limitations and technical proficiency, the quality of AIGC images (AGIs) varies, necessitating refinement and filtering before practical use. Consequently, there is an urgent need for developing objective models to assess the quality of AGIs. Unfortunately, no research has been carried out to investigate the perceptual quality assessment for AGIs specifically. Therefore, in this paper, we first discuss the major evaluation aspects such as technical issues, AI artifacts, unnaturalness, discrepancy, and aesthetics for AGI quality assessment. Then we present the first perceptual AGI quality assessment database, AGIQA-1K, which consists of 1,080 AGIs generated from diffusion models. A well-organized subjective experiment is followed to collect the quality labels of the AGIs. Finally, we conduct a benchmark experiment to evaluate the performance of current image quality assessment (IQA) models.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在内容创建中效率的不断提高，\underline{AI}\underline{G}生成的\underline{C}内容（\textbf{AIGC}）受到了广泛的关注。借助人工智能技术创建的AIGC包含多种形式的内容，其中AI生成图像（AGI）给社会带来了重大影响，已应用于娱乐、教育、社交媒体等各个领域。然而，由于硬件限制和技术熟练程度，AIGC图像（AGI）的质量参差不齐，需要在实际使用前进行细化和过滤。因此，迫切需要开发客观模型来评估 AGI 的质量。不幸的是，目前还没有专门研究 AGI 感知质量评估的研究。因此，在本文中，我们首先讨论AGI质量评估的主要评估方面，例如技术问题、人工智能伪影、不自然性、差异性和美观性。然后我们提出了第一个感知 AGI 质量评估数据库 AGIQA-1K，它由扩散模型生成的 1,080 个 AGI 组成。随后进行了组织良好的主观实验来收集 AGI 的质量标签。最后，我们进行了基准实验来评估当前图像质量评估（IQA）模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨AI生成图像（AGI）的感知质量评估方法，构建首个AGI质量评估数据库AGIQA-1K，并验证现有图像质量评估模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着AGI在各领域的应用，其质量差异显著，但缺乏专门针对AGI的感知质量评估研究，亟需开发客观评估模型。
AI.method: 分析AGI质量评估的关键维度（技术问题、AI伪影等），构建包含1,080张扩散模型生成图像的AGIQA-1K数据库，并通过主观实验获取质量标签，最后进行IQA模型基准测试。
AI.result: 提出AGIQA-1K数据库及主观质量标签，实验表明现有IQA模型在AGI评估上存在性能局限。
AI.conclusion: 当前IQA模型难以有效评估AGI质量，需针对AGI特性开发专用评估方法。

authors_text: Hongjie Zhang
title: Multi-view Feature Extraction based on Triple Contrastive Heads
title_zh: 基于三重头的多视角特征提取
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.03932
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.03932
abstract: Multi-view feature extraction is an efficient approach for alleviating the issue of dimensionality in highdimensional multi-view data. Contrastive learning (CL), which is a popular self-supervised learning method, has recently attracted considerable attention. In this study, we propose a novel multi-view feature extraction method based on triple contrastive heads, which combines the sample-, recovery- , and feature-level contrastive losses to extract the sufficient yet minimal subspace discriminative information in compliance with information bottleneck principle. In MFETCH, we construct the feature-level contrastive loss, which removes the redundent information in the consistency information to achieve the minimality of the subspace discriminative information. Moreover, the recovery-level contrastive loss is also constructed in MFETCH, which captures the view-specific discriminative information to achieve the sufficiency of the subspace discriminative information.The numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method offers a strong advantage for multi-view feature extraction.
summary: Multi-view feature extraction is an efficient approach for alleviating the issue of dimensionality in highdimensional multi-view data. Contrastive learning (CL), which is a popular self-supervised learning method, has recently attracted considerable attention. In this study, we propose a novel multi-view feature extraction method based on triple contrastive heads, which combines the sample-, recovery- , and feature-level contrastive losses to extract the sufficient yet minimal subspace discriminative information in compliance with information bottleneck principle. In MFETCH, we construct the feature-level contrastive loss, which removes the redundent information in the consistency information to achieve the minimality of the subspace discriminative information. Moreover, the recovery-level contrastive loss is also constructed in MFETCH, which captures the view-specific discriminative information to achieve the sufficiency of the subspace discriminative information.The numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method offers a strong advantage for multi-view feature extraction.
abstract_zh: 多视图特征提取是缓解高维多视图数据维数问题的有效方法。对比学习（CL）是一种流行的自监督学习方法，最近引起了相当大的关注。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于三重对比头的新颖的多视图特征提取方法，该方法结合了样本级、恢复级和特征级对比损失，以符合信息瓶颈原则提取足够但最小的子空间判别信息。在MFETCH中，我们构造了特征级对比损失，去除了一致性信息中的冗余信息，以实现子空间判别信息的最小化。此外，MFETCH还构建了恢复级对比损失，捕获视图特定的判别信息，以实现子空间判别信息的充分性。数值实验表明，该方法在多视图特征提取方面具有很强的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三重对比头的多视图特征提取方法（MFETCH），通过结合样本级、恢复级和特征级对比损失，实现符合信息瓶颈原则的判别性子空间信息提取。
AI.motivation: 高维多视图数据存在维度灾难问题，传统方法难以有效提取判别性特征，而对比学习在自监督学习中展现出潜力，需设计更有效的多视图特征提取框架。
AI.method: 构建MFETCH框架，融合三重对比损失：特征级损失去除冗余信息实现最小化，恢复级损失捕捉视图特异性信息实现充分性，样本级损失增强跨视图一致性，共同符合信息瓶颈原则。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在多视图特征提取任务中相比现有方法具有显著优势，能更有效提取判别性子空间信息。
AI.conclusion: 通过三重对比头的协同作用，MFETCH实现了多视图特征提取的充分性与最小化平衡，为高维多视图数据分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-view Feature Extraction based on Triple Contrastive Heads 基于三重头的多视角特征提取 Multi-view feature extraction is an efficient approach for alleviating the issue of dimensionality in highdimensional multi-view data. Contrastive learning (CL), which is a popular self-supervised learning method, has recently attracted considerable attention. In this study, we propose a novel multi-view feature extraction method based on triple contrastive heads, which combines the sample-, recovery- , and feature-level contrastive losses to extract the sufficient yet minimal subspace discriminative information in compliance with information bottleneck principle. In MFETCH, we construct the feature-level contrastive loss, which removes the redundent information in the consistency information to achieve the minimality of the subspace discriminative information. Moreover, the recovery-level contrastive loss is also constructed in MFETCH, which captures the view-specific discriminative information to achieve the sufficiency of the subspace discriminative information.The numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method offers a strong advantage for multi-view feature extraction. 多视图特征提取是缓解高维多视图数据维数问题的有效方法。对比学习（CL）是一种流行的自监督学习方法，最近引起了相当大的关注。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于三重对比头的新颖的多视图特征提取方法，该方法结合了样本级、恢复级和特征级对比损失，以符合信息瓶颈原则提取足够但最小的子空间判别信息。在MFETCH中，我们构造了特征级对比损失，去除了一致性信息中的冗余信息，以实现子空间判别信息的最小化。此外，MFETCH还构建了恢复级对比损失，捕获视图特定的判别信息，以实现子空间判别信息的充分性。数值实验表明，该方法在多视图特征提取方面具有很强的优势。 本文提出一种基于三重对比头的多视图特征提取方法（MFETCH），通过结合样本级、恢复级和特征级对比损失，实现符合信息瓶颈原则的判别性子空间信息提取。 Hongjie Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Jie Luo,Carlo Longhi,Agoston E. Eiben
title: A Comparative Study of Brain Reproduction Methods for Morphologically Evolving Robots
title_zh: 形态进化机器人大脑复制方法的比较研究
comment: 8 pages, ALife
comments: 8 pages, ALife
abstract: In the most extensive robot evolution systems, both the bodies and the brains of the robots undergo evolution and the brains of 'infant' robots are also optimized by a learning process immediately after 'birth'. This paper is concerned with the brain evolution mechanism in such a system. In particular, we compare four options obtained by combining asexual or sexual brain reproduction with Darwinian or Lamarckian evolution mechanisms. We conduct experiments in simulation with a system of evolvable modular robots on two different tasks. The results show that sexual reproduction of the robots' brains is preferable in the Darwinian framework, but the effect is the opposite in the Lamarckian system (both using the same infant learning method). Our experiments suggest that the overall best option is asexual reproduction combined with the Lamarckian framework, as it obtains better robots in terms of fitness than the other three. Considering the evolved morphologies, the different brain reproduction methods do not lead to differences. This result indicates that the morphology of the robot is mainly determined by the task and the environment, not by the brain reproduction methods.
summary: In the most extensive robot evolution systems, both the bodies and the brains of the robots undergo evolution and the brains of 'infant' robots are also optimized by a learning process immediately after 'birth'. This paper is concerned with the brain evolution mechanism in such a system. In particular, we compare four options obtained by combining asexual or sexual brain reproduction with Darwinian or Lamarckian evolution mechanisms. We conduct experiments in simulation with a system of evolvable modular robots on two different tasks. The results show that sexual reproduction of the robots' brains is preferable in the Darwinian framework, but the effect is the opposite in the Lamarckian system (both using the same infant learning method). Our experiments suggest that the overall best option is asexual reproduction combined with the Lamarckian framework, as it obtains better robots in terms of fitness than the other three. Considering the evolved morphologies, the different brain reproduction methods do not lead to differences. This result indicates that the morphology of the robot is mainly determined by the task and the environment, not by the brain reproduction methods.
abstract_zh: 在最广泛的机器人进化系统中，机器人的身体和大脑都在经历进化，“婴儿”机器人的大脑也在“出生”后立即通过学习过程进行优化。本文关注的是这样一个系统中的大脑进化机制。特别是，我们比较了将无性或有性大脑生殖与达尔文或拉马克进化机制相结合所获得的四种选择。我们使用可进化模块化机器人系统针对两项不同的任务进行了模拟实验。结果表明，机器人大脑的有性繁殖在达尔文框架中是更可取的，但在拉马克系统中效果却相反（两者都使用相同的婴儿学习方法）。我们的实验表明，总体上最好的选择是无性繁殖与拉马克框架相结合，因为它比其他三种机器人在适应度方面获得了更好的机器人。考虑到进化的形态，不同的大脑复制方式不会导致差异。这一结果表明，机器人的形态主要由任务和环境决定，而不是由大脑再现方法决定。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了形态演化机器人中四种不同大脑繁殖方法的效果，探讨其在达尔文主义和拉马克主义框架下的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 在机器人演化系统中，身体和大脑均需演化，而婴儿机器人出生后还需学习优化。现有研究缺乏对大脑繁殖机制与演化框架组合效果的系统比较。
AI.method: 通过模拟可演化模块化机器人系统，在两种任务中对比四种组合方法：无性/有性繁殖与达尔文主义/拉马克主义演化机制的交叉组合。
AI.result: 在达尔文框架中，有性繁殖更优；在拉马克框架中，无性繁殖更优。综合表现最佳的是无性繁殖结合拉马克主义框架，且形态差异与大脑繁殖方法无关。
AI.conclusion: 机器人形态主要由任务和环境决定，大脑繁殖方法对形态影响有限，但拉马克框架下无性繁殖能更高效提升适应性。

authors_text: Emanuele Marconato,Stefano Teso,Andrea Passerini
title: Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning Shortcuts: Mitigation Strategies and their Limitations
title_zh: 神经符号推理捷径：缓解策略及其局限性
abstract: Neuro-symbolic predictors learn a mapping from sub-symbolic inputs to higher-level concepts and then carry out (probabilistic) logical inference on this intermediate representation. This setup offers clear advantages in terms of consistency to symbolic prior knowledge, and is often believed to provide interpretability benefits in that - by virtue of complying with the knowledge - the learned concepts can be better understood by human stakeholders. However, it was recently shown that this setup is affected by reasoning shortcuts whereby predictions attain high accuracy by leveraging concepts with unintended semantics, yielding poor out-of-distribution performance and compromising interpretability. In this short paper, we establish a formal link between reasoning shortcuts and the optima of the loss function, and identify situations in which reasoning shortcuts can arise. Based on this, we discuss limitations of natural mitigation strategies such as reconstruction and concept supervision.
summary: Neuro-symbolic predictors learn a mapping from sub-symbolic inputs to higher-level concepts and then carry out (probabilistic) logical inference on this intermediate representation. This setup offers clear advantages in terms of consistency to symbolic prior knowledge, and is often believed to provide interpretability benefits in that - by virtue of complying with the knowledge - the learned concepts can be better understood by human stakeholders. However, it was recently shown that this setup is affected by reasoning shortcuts whereby predictions attain high accuracy by leveraging concepts with unintended semantics, yielding poor out-of-distribution performance and compromising interpretability. In this short paper, we establish a formal link between reasoning shortcuts and the optima of the loss function, and identify situations in which reasoning shortcuts can arise. Based on this, we discuss limitations of natural mitigation strategies such as reconstruction and concept supervision.
abstract_zh: 神经符号预测器学习从子符号输入到更高级别概念的映射，然后对此中间表示进行（概率）逻辑推理。这种设置在与符号先验知识的一致性方面提供了明显的优势，并且通常被认为提供了可解释性的好处，因为通过遵守知识，人类利益相关者可以更好地理解所学到的概念。然而，最近的研究表明，这种设置受到推理捷径的影响，即通过利用具有非预期语义的概念来获得高精度的预测，从而产生较差的分布外性能并损害可解释性。在这篇简短的论文中，我们在推理捷径和损失函数的最优值之间建立了正式的联系，并确定了推理捷径可能出现的情况。在此基础上，我们讨论了重建和概念监督等自然缓解策略的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经符号推理系统中的'推理捷径'现象，分析其成因并探讨缓解策略的局限性。
AI.motivation: 神经符号方法虽具可解释性优势，但存在依赖非预期语义概念导致泛化能力下降的推理捷径问题，需明确其机制与应对方案。
AI.method: 建立推理捷径与损失函数极值的数学关联，通过理论分析识别捷径产生条件，并评估重建损失与概念监督等缓解策略的有效性边界。
AI.result: 形式化证明推理捷径源于损失函数优化方向，发现现有缓解策略在复杂分布场景下无法根本解决问题。
AI.conclusion: 需重新设计损失函数结构或引入新约束条件，才能有效消除神经符号系统的推理捷径现象。

search_text: Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning Shortcuts: Mitigation Strategies and their Limitations 神经符号推理捷径：缓解策略及其局限性 Neuro-symbolic predictors learn a mapping from sub-symbolic inputs to higher-level concepts and then carry out (probabilistic) logical inference on this intermediate representation. This setup offers clear advantages in terms of consistency to symbolic prior knowledge, and is often believed to provide interpretability benefits in that - by virtue of complying with the knowledge - the learned concepts can be better understood by human stakeholders. However, it was recently shown that this setup is affected by reasoning shortcuts whereby predictions attain high accuracy by leveraging concepts with unintended semantics, yielding poor out-of-distribution performance and compromising interpretability. In this short paper, we establish a formal link between reasoning shortcuts and the optima of the loss function, and identify situations in which reasoning shortcuts can arise. Based on this, we discuss limitations of natural mitigation strategies such as reconstruction and concept supervision. 神经符号预测器学习从子符号输入到更高级别概念的映射，然后对此中间表示进行（概率）逻辑推理。这种设置在与符号先验知识的一致性方面提供了明显的优势，并且通常被认为提供了可解释性的好处，因为通过遵守知识，人类利益相关者可以更好地理解所学到的概念。然而，最近的研究表明，这种设置受到推理捷径的影响，即通过利用具有非预期语义的概念来获得高精度的预测，从而产生较差的分布外性能并损害可解释性。在这篇简短的论文中，我们在推理捷径和损失函数的最优值之间建立了正式的联系，并确定了推理捷径可能出现的情况。在此基础上，我们讨论了重建和概念监督等自然缓解策略的局限性。 本文研究神经符号推理系统中的'推理捷径'现象，分析其成因并探讨缓解策略的局限性。 Emanuele Marconato,Stefano Teso,Andrea Passerini cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Fengji Zhang,Bei Chen,Yue Zhang,Jacky Keung,Jin Liu,Daoguang Zan,Yi Mao,Jian-Guang Lou,Weizhu Chen
title: RepoCoder: Repository-Level Code Completion Through Iterative Retrieval and Generation
title_zh: RepoCoder：通过迭代检索和生成完成存储库级代码
comment: accepted by EMNLP 2023 main conference
comments: accepted by EMNLP 2023 main conference
abstract: The task of repository-level code completion is to continue writing the unfinished code based on a broader context of the repository. While for automated code completion tools, it is difficult to utilize the useful information scattered in different files. We propose RepoCoder, a simple, generic, and effective framework to address the challenge. It streamlines the repository-level code completion process by incorporating a similarity-based retriever and a pre-trained code language model in an iterative retrieval-generation pipeline. RepoCoder makes effective utilization of repository-level information for code completion and has the ability to generate code at various levels of granularity. Moreover, we propose a new benchmark RepoEval, which consists of the latest and high-quality real-world repositories covering line, API invocation, and function body completion scenarios. Experimental results indicate that RepoCoder significantly improves the In-File completion baseline by over 10% in all settings and consistently outperforms the vanilla retrieval-augmented code completion approach. Furthermore, we validate the effectiveness of RepoCoder through comprehensive analysis, providing valuable insights for future research. Our source code and benchmark are publicly available: https://github.com/microsoft/CodeT/tree/main/RepoCoder

Moreover, we propose a new benchmark RepoEval, which consists of the latest and high-quality real-world repositories covering line, API invocation, and function body completion scenarios. Experimental results indicate that RepoCoder significantly improves the In-File completion baseline by over 10% in all settings and consistently outperforms the vanilla retrieval-augmented code completion approach. Furthermore, we validate the effectiveness of RepoCoder through comprehensive analysis, providing valuable insights for future research. Our source code and benchmark are publicly available: https://github.com/microsoft/CodeT/tree/main/RepoCoder
abstract_zh: 存储库级代码完成的任务是基于存储库更广泛的上下文继续编写未完成的代码。而对于自动代码补全工具来说，很难利用分散在不同文件中的有用信息。我们提出 RepoCoder，一个简单、通用且有效的框架来应对这一挑战。它通过将基于相似性的检索器和预训练的代码语言模型合并到迭代检索生成管道中，简化了存储库级代码完成过程。 RepoCoder 有效利用存储库级信息来完成代码，并能够生成各种粒度级别的代码。此外，我们提出了一个新的基准RepoEval，它由最新的、高质量的真实世界存储库组成，涵盖线路、API调用和函数体完成场景。实验结果表明，RepoCoder 在所有设置中将文件内完成基线显着提高了 10% 以上，并且始终优于普通检索增强代码完成方法。此外，我们通过综合分析验证了 RepoCoder 的有效性，为未来的研究提供了宝贵的见解。我们的源代码和基准测试是公开的：https://github.com/microsoft/CodeT/tree/main/RepoCoder

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepoCoder，一种通过迭代检索和生成实现仓库级代码补全的框架，并构建了新的评估基准RepoEval。
AI.motivation: 现有代码补全工具难以有效利用仓库中分散在不同文件中的有用信息，导致补全效果受限。
AI.method: 结合基于相似度的检索器与预训练代码语言模型，设计迭代式检索-生成流水线，利用仓库级上下文信息进行多粒度代码生成。
AI.result: 在所有场景下 RepoCoder 相比单文件补全基线提升超10%，且优于传统检索增强型方法，通过RepoEval基准验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: RepoCoder 有效提升了仓库级代码补全性能，开源代码和基准为未来研究提供重要参考。

authors_text: Zhongjin Luo,Shengcai Cai,Jinguo Dong,Ruibo Ming,Liangdong Qiu,Xiaohang Zhan,Xiaoguang Han
title: RaBit: Parametric Modeling of 3D Biped Cartoon Characters with a Topological-consistent Dataset
title_zh: RaBit：使用拓扑一致的数据集对 3D Biped 卡通人物进行参数化建模
comment: CVPR 2023, Project page: https://gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit/
comments: CVPR 2023, Project page: https://gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit/
abstract: Assisting people in efficiently producing visually plausible 3D characters has always been a fundamental research topic in computer vision and computer graphics. Recent learning-based approaches have achieved unprecedented accuracy and efficiency in the area of 3D real human digitization. However, none of the prior works focus on modeling 3D biped cartoon characters, which are also in great demand in gaming and filming. In this paper, we introduce 3DBiCar, the first large-scale dataset of 3D biped cartoon characters, and RaBit, the corresponding parametric model. Our dataset contains 1,500 topologically consistent high-quality 3D textured models which are manually crafted by professional artists. Built upon the data, RaBit is thus designed with a SMPL-like linear blend shape model and a StyleGAN-based neural UV-texture generator, simultaneously expressing the shape, pose, and texture. To demonstrate the practicality of 3DBiCar and RaBit, various applications are conducted, including single-view reconstruction, sketch-based modeling, and 3D cartoon animation. For the single-view reconstruction setting, we find a straightforward global mapping from input images to the output UV-based texture maps tends to lose detailed appearances of some local parts (e.g., nose, ears). Thus, a part-sensitive texture reasoner is adopted to make all important local areas perceived. Experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method both qualitatively and quantitatively. 3DBiCar and RaBit are available at gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit.
summary: Assisting people in efficiently producing visually plausible 3D characters has always been a fundamental research topic in computer vision and computer graphics. Recent learning-based approaches have achieved unprecedented accuracy and efficiency in the area of 3D real human digitization. However, none of the prior works focus on modeling 3D biped cartoon characters, which are also in great demand in gaming and filming. In this paper, we introduce 3DBiCar, the first large-scale dataset of 3D biped cartoon characters, and RaBit, the corresponding parametric model. Our dataset contains 1,500 topologically consistent high-quality 3D textured models which are manually crafted by professional artists. Built upon the data, RaBit is thus designed with a SMPL-like linear blend shape model and a StyleGAN-based neural UV-texture generator, simultaneously expressing the shape, pose, and texture. To demonstrate the practicality of 3DBiCar and RaBit, various applications are conducted, including single-view reconstruction, sketch-based modeling, and 3D cartoon animation. For the single-view reconstruction setting, we find a straightforward global mapping from input images to the output UV-based texture maps tends to lose detailed appearances of some local parts (e.g., nose, ears). Thus, a part-sensitive texture reasoner is adopted to make all important local areas perceived. Experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method both qualitatively and quantitatively. 3DBiCar and RaBit are available at gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit.
abstract_zh: 帮助人们高效地生成视觉上可信的 3D 角色一直是计算机视觉和计算机图形学的基础研究课题。最近基于学习的方法在 3D 真人数字化领域取得了前所未有的准确性和效率。然而，之前的作品都没有专注于对 3D 双足卡通人物进行建模，而这在游戏和电影中也有很大的需求。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个大规模 3D Biped 卡通人物数据集 3DBiCar 和相应的参数化模型 RaBit。我们的数据集包含 1,500 个拓扑一致的高质量 3D 纹理模型，这些模型由专业艺术家手工制作。因此，RaBit 基于数据而设计，采用类似 SMPL 的线性混合形状模型和基于 StyleGAN 的神经 UV 纹理生成器，同时表达形状、姿势和纹理。为了展示 3DBiCar 和 RaBit 的实用性，进行了各种应用，包括单视图重建、基于草图的建模和 3D 卡通动画。对于单视图重建设置，我们发现从输入图像到输出基于 UV 的纹理图的直接全局映射往往会丢失某些局部部分（例如鼻子、耳朵）的详细外观。因此，采用部分敏感纹理推理器来感知所有重要的局部区域。实验进一步从定性和定量两个方面证明了我们方法的有效性。 3DBiCar和RaBit可在gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DBiCar数据集和RaBit参数化模型，用于高效生成高质量3D双足卡通角色。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于3D真实人体建模，缺乏针对需求旺盛的3D卡通角色的系统性研究，亟需专用数据集和生成方法。
AI.method: 构建包含1500个拓扑一致模型的3DBiCar数据集，基于SMPL线性混合形状模型和StyleGAN纹理生成器设计RaBit，并引入局部敏感纹理推理模块优化细节表现。
AI.result: 在单视角重建、草图建模和动画生成等任务中均取得优异效果，定量实验验证了方法有效性，数据集和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为游戏影视行业提供了首个大规模3D卡通角色生成方案，推动了参数化卡通角色建模领域的发展。

In this paper, we introduce 3DBiCar, the first large-scale dataset of 3D biped cartoon characters, and RaBit, the corresponding parametric model. Our dataset contains 1,500 topologically consistent high-quality 3D textured models which are manually crafted by professional artists. Built upon the data, RaBit is thus designed with a SMPL-like linear blend shape model and a StyleGAN-based neural UV-texture generator, simultaneously expressing the shape, pose, and texture. To demonstrate the practicality of 3DBiCar and RaBit, various applications are conducted, including single-view reconstruction, sketch-based modeling, and 3D cartoon animation. For the single-view reconstruction setting, we find a straightforward global mapping from input images to the output UV-based texture maps tends to lose detailed appearances of some local parts (e.g., nose, ears). Thus, a part-sensitive texture reasoner is adopted to make all important local areas perceived. Experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method both qualitatively and quantitatively. 3DBiCar and RaBit are available at gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit. 帮助人们高效地生成视觉上可信的 3D 角色一直是计算机视觉和计算机图形学的基础研究课题。最近基于学习的方法在 3D 真人数字化领域取得了前所未有的准确性和效率。然而，之前的作品都没有专注于对 3D 双足卡通人物进行建模，而这在游戏和电影中也有很大的需求。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个大规模 3D Biped 卡通人物数据集 3DBiCar 和相应的参数化模型 RaBit。我们的数据集包含 1,500 个拓扑一致的高质量 3D 纹理模型，这些模型由专业艺术家手工制作。因此，RaBit 基于数据而设计，采用类似 SMPL 的线性混合形状模型和基于 StyleGAN 的神经 UV 纹理生成器，同时表达形状、姿势和纹理。为了展示 3DBiCar 和 RaBit 的实用性，进行了各种应用，包括单视图重建、基于草图的建模和 3D 卡通动画。对于单视图重建设置，我们发现从输入图像到输出基于 UV 的纹理图的直接全局映射往往会丢失某些局部部分（例如鼻子、耳朵）的详细外观。因此，采用部分敏感纹理推理器来感知所有重要的局部区域。实验进一步从定性和定量两个方面证明了我们方法的有效性。 3DBiCar和RaBit可在gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/RaBit获取。 本文提出3DBiCar数据集和RaBit参数化模型，用于高效生成高质量3D双足卡通角色。 Zhongjin Luo,Shengcai Cai,Jinguo Dong,Ruibo Ming,Liangdong Qiu,Xiaohang Zhan,Xiaoguang Han cs.CV

authors_text: Shmuel Onn
title: Degree Sequence Optimization in Bounded Treewidth
title_zh: 有界树宽中的度数序列优化
abstract: We consider the problem of finding a subgraph of a given graph which minimizes the sum of given functions at vertices evaluated at their subgraph degrees. While the problem is NP-hard already when all functions are the same, we show that it can be solved for arbitrary functions in polynomial time over graphs of bounded treewidth. Its complexity remains widely open, in particular over complete graphs and complete bipartite graphs.
summary: We consider the problem of finding a subgraph of a given graph which minimizes the sum of given functions at vertices evaluated at their subgraph degrees. While the problem is NP-hard already when all functions are the same, we show that it can be solved for arbitrary functions in polynomial time over graphs of bounded treewidth. Its complexity remains widely open, in particular over complete graphs and complete bipartite graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑寻找给定图的子图的问题，该子图最小化在子图度数处评估的顶点处的给定函数的总和。虽然当所有函数都相同时，这个问题已经是 NP 难问题，但我们表明，可以在有界树宽图上以多项式时间求解任意函数。它的复杂性仍然是广泛开放的，特别是在完全图和完全二部图上。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在给定图中寻找子图以最小化顶点度数相关函数和的问题，重点分析了有界树宽图的求解方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管该问题在通用图中已知为NP难，但针对特定结构（如树宽有界图）可能存在高效算法，这对理论研究和实际应用均具重要意义。
AI.method: 通过利用图的树分解特性，结合动态规划技术，在有界树宽图上设计多项式时间算法以处理任意形式的顶点函数。
AI.result: 证明了对于任意顶点函数，该问题可在有界树宽图中多项式时间内求解，但完全图和完全二分图的复杂度仍待进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 有界树宽图的结构特性为解决此类优化问题提供了有效途径，但更一般图结构的复杂度分析仍是开放性挑战。

authors_text: Florent Delgrange,Ann Nowé,Guillermo A. Pérez
title: Wasserstein Auto-encoded MDPs: Formal Verification of Efficiently Distilled RL Policies with Many-sided Guarantees
title_zh: Wasserstein 自动编码的 MDP：具有多方面保证的高效蒸馏 RL 策略的形式验证
comment: ICLR 2023, 10 pages main text, 14 pages appendix (excluding references)
comments: ICLR 2023, 10 pages main text, 14 pages appendix (excluding references)
abstract: Although deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has many success stories, the large-scale deployment of policies learned through these advanced techniques in safety-critical scenarios is hindered by their lack of formal guarantees. Variational Markov Decision Processes (VAE-MDPs) are discrete latent space models that provide a reliable framework for distilling formally verifiable controllers from any RL policy. While the related guarantees address relevant practical aspects such as the satisfaction of performance and safety properties, the VAE approach suffers from several learning flaws (posterior collapse, slow learning speed, poor dynamics estimates), primarily due to the absence of abstraction and representation guarantees to support latent optimization. We introduce the Wasserstein auto-encoded MDP (WAE-MDP), a latent space model that fixes those issues by minimizing a penalized form of the optimal transport between the behaviors of the agent executing the original policy and the distilled policy, for which the formal guarantees apply. Our approach yields bisimulation guarantees while learning the distilled policy, allowing concrete optimization of the abstraction and representation model quality. Our experiments show that, besides distilling policies up to 10 times faster, the latent model quality is indeed better in general. Moreover, we present experiments from a simple time-to-failure verification algorithm on the latent space. The fact that our approach enables such simple verification techniques highlights its applicability.
summary: Although deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has many success stories, the large-scale deployment of policies learned through these advanced techniques in safety-critical scenarios is hindered by their lack of formal guarantees. Variational Markov Decision Processes (VAE-MDPs) are discrete latent space models that provide a reliable framework for distilling formally verifiable controllers from any RL policy. While the related guarantees address relevant practical aspects such as the satisfaction of performance and safety properties, the VAE approach suffers from several learning flaws (posterior collapse, slow learning speed, poor dynamics estimates), primarily due to the absence of abstraction and representation guarantees to support latent optimization. We introduce the Wasserstein auto-encoded MDP (WAE-MDP), a latent space model that fixes those issues by minimizing a penalized form of the optimal transport between the behaviors of the agent executing the original policy and the distilled policy, for which the formal guarantees apply. Our approach yields bisimulation guarantees while learning the distilled policy, allowing concrete optimization of the abstraction and representation model quality. Our experiments show that, besides distilling policies up to 10 times faster, the latent model quality is indeed better in general. Moreover, we present experiments from a simple time-to-failure verification algorithm on the latent space. The fact that our approach enables such simple verification techniques highlights its applicability.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度强化学习（DRL）有许多成功案例，但通过这些先进技术学习到的策略在安全关键场景中的大规模部署却因缺乏正式保证而受到阻碍。变分马尔可夫决策过程 (VAE-MDP) 是离散潜在空间模型，为从任何 RL 策略中提取可形式验证的控制器提供了可靠的框架。虽然相关保证解决了相关的实际问题，例如性能和安全属性的满足，但 VAE 方法存在一些学习缺陷（后验崩溃、学习速度慢、动态估计差），这主要是由于缺乏支持潜在优化的抽象和表示保证。我们引入了 Wasserstein 自动编码 MDP (WAE-MDP)，这是一种潜在空间模型，它通过最小化执行原始策略和蒸馏策略的代理行为之间的最优传输的惩罚形式来解决这些问题，正式保证适用于此。我们的方法在学习蒸馏策略的同时产生了互模拟保证，从而允许对抽象和表示模型质量进行具体优化。我们的实验表明，除了提炼策略速度提高 10 倍之外，潜在模型质量总体上确实更好。此外，我们在潜在空间上进行了简单的故障时间验证算法的实验。我们的方法能够实现如此简单的验证技术，这一事实凸显了它的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Wasserstein自编码马尔可夫决策过程（WAE-MDP），通过形式化验证实现高效蒸馏的强化学习策略，提供多方面的保证。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习（DRL）策略缺乏形式化保证，限制了其在安全关键场景中的部署。现有变分自编码器马尔可夫决策过程（VAE-MDP）存在后验崩溃、学习速度慢等问题，需改进其抽象与表示保证。
AI.method: 通过最小化代理执行原始策略与蒸馏策略之间的惩罚最优运输形式，构建WAE-MDP模型，实现行为保真度与形式化保证的统一，并优化潜在空间表示质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，WAE-MDP在策略蒸馏速度提升10倍的同时，潜在模型质量更优，并通过简单的时间至失效验证算法验证了潜在空间的有效性。
AI.conclusion: WAE-MDP通过形式化保证与高效蒸馏结合，为安全关键场景下的强化学习策略部署提供了可靠框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jemin Lee,Yongin Kwon,Sihyeong Park,Misun Yu,Jeman Park,Hwanjun Song
title: Q-HyViT: Post-Training Quantization of Hybrid Vision Transformers with Bridge Block Reconstruction for IoT Systems
title_zh: Q-HyViT：混合视觉变压器的训练后量化与物联网系统的桥块重建
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, accepted in IEEE Internet of Things Journal
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures, accepted in IEEE Internet of Things Journal
abstract: Recently, vision transformers (ViTs) have superseded convolutional neural networks in numerous applications, including classification, detection, and segmentation. However, the high computational requirements of ViTs hinder their widespread implementation. To address this issue, researchers have proposed efficient hybrid transformer architectures that combine convolutional and transformer layers with optimized attention computation of linear complexity. Additionally, post-training quantization has been proposed as a means of mitigating computational demands. For mobile devices, achieving optimal acceleration for ViTs necessitates the strategic integration of quantization techniques and efficient hybrid transformer structures. However, no prior investigation has applied quantization to efficient hybrid transformers. In this paper, we discover that applying existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods for ViTs to efficient hybrid transformers leads to a drastic accuracy drop, attributed to the four following challenges: (i) highly dynamic ranges, (ii) zero-point overflow, (iii) diverse normalization, and (iv) limited model parameters ($<$5M). To overcome these challenges, we propose a new post-training quantization method, which is the first to quantize efficient hybrid ViTs (MobileViTv1, MobileViTv2, Mobile-Former, EfficientFormerV1, EfficientFormerV2). We achieve a significant improvement of 17.73% for 8-bit and 29.75% for 6-bit on average, respectively, compared with existing PTQ methods (EasyQuant, FQ-ViT, PTQ4ViT, and RepQ-ViT)}. We plan to release our code at https://gitlab.com/ones-ai/q-hyvit.
summary: Recently, vision transformers (ViTs) have superseded convolutional neural networks in numerous applications, including classification, detection, and segmentation. However, the high computational requirements of ViTs hinder their widespread implementation. To address this issue, researchers have proposed efficient hybrid transformer architectures that combine convolutional and transformer layers with optimized attention computation of linear complexity. Additionally, post-training quantization has been proposed as a means of mitigating computational demands. For mobile devices, achieving optimal acceleration for ViTs necessitates the strategic integration of quantization techniques and efficient hybrid transformer structures. However, no prior investigation has applied quantization to efficient hybrid transformers. In this paper, we discover that applying existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods for ViTs to efficient hybrid transformers leads to a drastic accuracy drop, attributed to the four following challenges: (i) highly dynamic ranges, (ii) zero-point overflow, (iii) diverse normalization, and (iv) limited model parameters ($<$5M). To overcome these challenges, we propose a new post-training quantization method, which is the first to quantize efficient hybrid ViTs (MobileViTv1, MobileViTv2, Mobile-Former, EfficientFormerV1, EfficientFormerV2). We achieve a significant improvement of 17.73% for 8-bit and 29.75% for 6-bit on average, respectively, compared with existing PTQ methods (EasyQuant, FQ-ViT, PTQ4ViT, and RepQ-ViT)}. We plan to release our code at https://gitlab.com/ones-ai/q-hyvit.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变换器 (ViT) 在许多应用中取代了卷积神经网络，包括分类、检测和分割。然而，ViT 的高计算要求阻碍了其广泛实施。为了解决这个问题，研究人员提出了高效的混合 Transformer 架构，它将卷积层和 Transformer 层与线性复杂度的优化注意力计算相结合。此外，训练后量化已被提议作为减轻计算需求的一种手段。对于移动设备，实现 ViT 的最佳加速需要量化技术和高效混合变压器结构的战略集成。然而，之前没有研究将量化应用于高效混合变压器。在本文中，我们发现将现有的 ViT 训练后量化 (PTQ) 方法应用于高效混合变压器会导致精度急剧下降，这归因于以下四个挑战：(i) 高动态范围，(ii) 零点溢出，(iii) 多样化归一化，以及 (iv) 有限的模型参数（$<500 万美元）。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的训练后量化方法，该方法是第一个量化高效混合 ViT（MobileViTv1、MobileViTv2、Mobile-Former、EfficientFormerV1、EfficientFormerV2）的方法。与现有的 PTQ 方法（EasyQuant、FQ-ViT、PTQ4ViT 和 RepQ-ViT）相比，我们在 8 位和 6 位方面平均分别实现了 17.73% 和 29.75% 的显着改进}。我们计划在 https://gitlab.com/ones-ai/q-hyvit 发布我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-HyViT方法，通过桥接块重建技术对混合视觉Transformer进行后训练量化，以提升其在物联网系统中的部署效率。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer(ViT)计算需求高，难以部署于物联网设备。现有量化方法应用于高效混合Transformer时存在精度骤降问题，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 设计桥接块重建机制，解决动态范围、零点溢出、归一化差异及参数量限制四大挑战，首次实现对MobileViT等混合架构的高效量化。
AI.result: 在8位量化下平均提升17.73%，6位量化下提升29.75%，优于EasyQuant等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Q-HyViT有效解决了混合Transformer量化难题，为物联网场景下的轻量化部署提供了可行方案。
