We address these two challenges by learning probabilistic force strategies from data that are easily acquired offline in a robot-less simulation from human demonstrations with a joystick. We combine a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) and a Mixture Density Network (MDN) to model human-inspired behavior in such a way that the learned strategies transfer easily onto real hardware. The experiments show a UR10e robot that completes a plastic assembly with clearances of less than 100 micrometers whose strategies were solely demonstrated in simulation. 机器人装配任务的编程是制造和自动化的关键组成部分。然而，力敏感装配通常需要反应策略来处理定位的微小变化和不可预见的零件卡住。从人类表现中学习此类策略是一种很有前途的方法，但面临两个常见的挑战：处理难以从演示中捕获的低零件间隙，以及在无法访问真实硬件的情况下离线学习直观策略。我们通过从使用操纵杆进行人类演示的无机器人模拟中轻松离线获取的数据中学习概率力策略来解决这两个挑战。我们结合长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和混合密度网络 (MDN) 来模拟人类行为，以便将学习到的策略轻松转移到真实硬件上。实验表明，UR10e 机器人可以完成间隙小于 100 微米的塑料装配，其策略仅在模拟中得到验证。 本文提出一种从人类演示中学习概率力策略的方法，解决机器人精密装配中微米级间隙处理和离线学习的难题。 Stefan Scherzinger,Arne Roennau,Rüdiger Dillmann cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Florian Bemmann,Heinrich Hussmann
title: Self-Reflection as a Tool to Foster Profound Sustainable Consumption Decisions
title_zh: 自我反思作为促进深刻可持续消费决策的工具
abstract: The production of goods we buy on a daily basis accounts for a large portion of greenhouse gas emissions. Although consumers have the power to influence industries' behavior through their demand, making sustainable purchases is challenging. Current ICT systems supporting sustainable shopping decisions are not established in consumers' daily lifes. Shopping decisions are made on a complex set of criteria, thus classical persuasive approaches, like recommender-systems, might not be suitable. This work compiles the state of research on ICT supporting sustainable consumption, outlines unsolved challenges, and finally presents a novel concept: a system based on self-reflection instead of classical persuasive approaches, like recommender-systems. Self-reflection provokes revising individual behaviour and decisions, instead of presenting instructions. Combined with additional information on e.g., decision impact, people could learn how to make more sustainable decisions independently. We envision the deployment of such a system, fostering a change towards more sustainable industries to combat climate change.
summary: The production of goods we buy on a daily basis accounts for a large portion of greenhouse gas emissions. Although consumers have the power to influence industries' behavior through their demand, making sustainable purchases is challenging. Current ICT systems supporting sustainable shopping decisions are not established in consumers' daily lifes. Shopping decisions are made on a complex set of criteria, thus classical persuasive approaches, like recommender-systems, might not be suitable. This work compiles the state of research on ICT supporting sustainable consumption, outlines unsolved challenges, and finally presents a novel concept: a system based on self-reflection instead of classical persuasive approaches, like recommender-systems. Self-reflection provokes revising individual behaviour and decisions, instead of presenting instructions. Combined with additional information on e.g., decision impact, people could learn how to make more sustainable decisions independently. We envision the deployment of such a system, fostering a change towards more sustainable industries to combat climate change.
abstract_zh: 我们日常购买的商品的生产占温室气体排放的很大一部分。尽管消费者有能力通过自己的需求影响行业行为，但进行可持续的购买具有挑战性。当前支持可持续购物决策的信息通信技术系统尚未在消费者的日常生活中建立。购物决策是根据一组复杂的标准做出的，因此推荐系统等经典的说服方法可能不合适。这项工作汇编了支持可持续消费的信息通信技术的研究现状，概述了未解决的挑战，并最终提出了一个新颖的概念：一个基于自我反思的系统，而不是推荐系统等经典的说服方法。自我反思会促使人们修正个人行为和决定，而不是提出指示。结合决策影响等附加信息，人们可以学习如何独立做出更可持续的决策。我们设想部署这样一个系统，促进向更可持续的产业转变，以应对气候变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自我反思的新型信息通信技术（ICT）系统，旨在帮助消费者独立做出更可持续的购物决策，替代传统推荐系统。
AI.motivation: 现有ICT系统未能有效融入消费者日常生活，传统推荐系统难以应对购物决策的复杂性，亟需新方法促进可持续消费行为改变。
AI.method: 综述现有可持续消费ICT研究，识别关键挑战，设计以自我反思为核心的新系统框架，结合决策影响信息引导消费者自主学习可持续决策。
AI.result: 提出基于自我反思的可持续消费决策支持系统概念，为后续系统开发与实证研究奠定理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可通过促进消费者行为反思与决策学习，推动向可持续产业转型，为应对气候变化提供创新解决方案。

authors_text: Florian Bemmann,Carmen Mayer,Sven Mayer
title: Leveraging Mobile Sensing Technology for Societal Change Towards more Sustainable Behavior
title_zh: 利用移动传感技术促进社会变革，实现更可持续的行为
abstract: A pro-environmental attitude in the general population is essential to combat climate change. Society as a whole has the power to change economic processes through market demands and to exert pressure on policymakers - both are key social factors that currently undermine the goals of decarbonization. Creating long-lasting, sustainable attitudes is challenging and behavior change technologies do hard to overcome their limitations. Environmental psychology proposes social factors to be relevant, a.o. creating a global identity feeling and widening one's view beyond the own bubble. From our experience in the field of mobile sensing and psychometric data inferences, we see strong potential in mobile sensing technologies to implement the aforementioned goals. We present concrete ideas in this paper, aiming to refine and extend them with the workshop and evaluate them afterward.
summary: A pro-environmental attitude in the general population is essential to combat climate change. Society as a whole has the power to change economic processes through market demands and to exert pressure on policymakers - both are key social factors that currently undermine the goals of decarbonization. Creating long-lasting, sustainable attitudes is challenging and behavior change technologies do hard to overcome their limitations. Environmental psychology proposes social factors to be relevant, a.o. creating a global identity feeling and widening one's view beyond the own bubble. From our experience in the field of mobile sensing and psychometric data inferences, we see strong potential in mobile sensing technologies to implement the aforementioned goals. We present concrete ideas in this paper, aiming to refine and extend them with the workshop and evaluate them afterward.
abstract_zh: 广大民众的环保态度对于应对气候变化至关重要。整个社会有能力通过市场需求改变经济进程并向政策制定者施加压力——两者都是目前破坏脱碳目标的关键社会因素。建立持久、可持续的态度具有挑战性，行为改变技术很难克服其局限性。环境心理学提出社会因素是相关的，a.o.创造一种全球认同感并拓宽个人的视野，超越自己的泡沫。根据我们在移动传感和心理测量数据推断领域的经验，我们看到移动传感技术实现上述目标的巨大潜力。我们在本文中提出了具体的想法，旨在通过研讨会对其进行完善和扩展，并随后进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何利用移动传感技术促进社会可持续行为变革，通过结合环境心理学理论提出具体实施方案。
AI.motivation: 气候变化需要公众形成环保态度，但现有行为改变技术存在局限，需借助移动传感技术与社会因素（如全球身份认同）结合以实现长期可持续行为改变。
AI.method: 提出移动传感技术应用的具体构想，通过工作坊迭代完善方案，并进行后续评估验证。
AI.result: 形成可实施的移动传感技术应用框架，并通过工作坊讨论优化其社会影响力与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 移动传感技术结合社会心理机制可有效推动可持续行为，但需进一步开发与实证研究以验证效果。

authors_text: Dayuan Jian,Mohammad Rostami
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Training Event-Based Networks Using Contrastive Learning and Uncorrelated Conditioning
title_zh: 使用对比学习和不相关条件训练基于事件的网络的无监督域适应
abstract: Event-based cameras offer reliable measurements for preforming computer vision tasks in high-dynamic range environments and during fast motion maneuvers. However, adopting deep learning in event-based vision faces the challenge of annotated data scarcity due to recency of event cameras. Transferring the knowledge that can be obtained from conventional camera annotated data offers a practical solution to this challenge. We develop an unsupervised domain adaptation algorithm for training a deep network for event-based data image classification using contrastive learning and uncorrelated conditioning of data. Our solution outperforms the existing algorithms for this purpose.
summary: Event-based cameras offer reliable measurements for preforming computer vision tasks in high-dynamic range environments and during fast motion maneuvers. However, adopting deep learning in event-based vision faces the challenge of annotated data scarcity due to recency of event cameras. Transferring the knowledge that can be obtained from conventional camera annotated data offers a practical solution to this challenge. We develop an unsupervised domain adaptation algorithm for training a deep network for event-based data image classification using contrastive learning and uncorrelated conditioning of data. Our solution outperforms the existing algorithms for this purpose.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机为在高动态范围环境和快速运动操作期间执行计算机视觉任务提供可靠的测量。然而，在基于事件的视觉中采用深度学习面临着由于事件相机的新旧性而导致注释数据稀缺的挑战。传输可以从传统相机注释数据中获得的知识为这一挑战提供了实用的解决方案。我们开发了一种无监督域适应算法，用于使用对比学习和不相关的数据条件来训练基于事件的数据图像分类的深度网络。为此，我们的解决方案优于现有算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习和非相关条件的无监督领域适应方法，用于解决事件相机数据标注不足问题，实现事件数据图像分类。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在动态环境和快速运动场景中具有优势，但其标注数据稀缺，而传统相机拥有大量标注数据，需通过领域适应实现知识迁移。
AI.method: 设计无监督领域适应算法，结合对比学习增强特征表示，通过非相关条件解耦领域差异，实现从传统相机到事件相机的数据迁移。
AI.result: 该方法在事件数据图像分类任务中优于现有算法，有效缓解了标注数据不足的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督领域适应框架为事件相机深度学习应用提供了可行解决方案，验证了对比学习与非相关条件结合的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习和非相关条件的无监督领域适应方法，用于解决事件相机数据标注不足问题，实现事件数据图像分类。
ai_content.motivation: 事件相机在动态环境和快速运动场景中具有优势，但其标注数据稀缺，而传统相机拥有大量标注数据，需通过领域适应实现知识迁移。

ai_content_json.method: 设计无监督领域适应算法，结合对比学习增强特征表示，通过非相关条件解耦领域差异，实现从传统相机到事件相机的数据迁移。
ai_content_json.result: 该方法在事件数据图像分类任务中优于现有算法，有效缓解了标注数据不足的挑战。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出的无监督领域适应框架为事件相机深度学习应用提供了可行解决方案，验证了对比学习与非相关条件结合的有效性。

search_text: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Training Event-Based Networks Using Contrastive Learning and Uncorrelated Conditioning 使用对比学习和不相关条件训练基于事件的网络的无监督域适应 Event-based cameras offer reliable measurements for preforming computer vision tasks in high-dynamic range environments and during fast motion maneuvers. However, adopting deep learning in event-based vision faces the challenge of annotated data scarcity due to recency of event cameras. Transferring the knowledge that can be obtained from conventional camera annotated data offers a practical solution to this challenge. We develop an unsupervised domain adaptation algorithm for training a deep network for event-based data image classification using contrastive learning and uncorrelated conditioning of data. Our solution outperforms the existing algorithms for this purpose. 基于事件的相机为在高动态范围环境和快速运动操作期间执行计算机视觉任务提供可靠的测量。然而，在基于事件的视觉中采用深度学习面临着由于事件相机的新旧性而导致注释数据稀缺的挑战。传输可以从传统相机注释数据中获得的知识为这一挑战提供了实用的解决方案。我们开发了一种无监督域适应算法，用于使用对比学习和不相关的数据条件来训练基于事件的数据图像分类的深度网络。为此，我们的解决方案优于现有算法。 本文提出一种基于对比学习和非相关条件的无监督领域适应方法，用于解决事件相机数据标注不足问题，实现事件数据图像分类。 Dayuan Jian,Mohammad Rostami cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Gu,Guang Chen,Yufei Wang,Libo Zhang,Tiejian Luo,Longyin Wen
title: Text with Knowledge Graph Augmented Transformer for Video Captioning
title_zh: 用于视频字幕的带有知识图增强变压器的文本
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: Video captioning aims to describe the content of videos using natural language. Although significant progress has been made, there is still much room to improve the performance for real-world applications, mainly due to the long-tail words challenge. In this paper, we propose a text with knowledge graph augmented transformer (TextKG) for video captioning. Notably, TextKG is a two-stream transformer, formed by the external stream and internal stream. The external stream is designed to absorb additional knowledge, which models the interactions between the additional knowledge, e.g., pre-built knowledge graph, and the built-in information of videos, e.g., the salient object regions, speech transcripts, and video captions, to mitigate the long-tail words challenge. Meanwhile, the internal stream is designed to exploit the multi-modality information in videos (e.g., the appearance of video frames, speech transcripts, and video captions) to ensure the quality of caption results. In addition, the cross attention mechanism is also used in between the two streams for sharing information. In this way, the two streams can help each other for more accurate results. Extensive experiments conducted on four challenging video captioning datasets, i.e., YouCookII, ActivityNet Captions, MSRVTT, and MSVD, demonstrate that the proposed method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, the proposed TextKG method outperforms the best published results by improving 18.7% absolute CIDEr scores on the YouCookII dataset.
summary: Video captioning aims to describe the content of videos using natural language. Although significant progress has been made, there is still much room to improve the performance for real-world applications, mainly due to the long-tail words challenge. In this paper, we propose a text with knowledge graph augmented transformer (TextKG) for video captioning. Notably, TextKG is a two-stream transformer, formed by the external stream and internal stream. The external stream is designed to absorb additional knowledge, which models the interactions between the additional knowledge, e.g., pre-built knowledge graph, and the built-in information of videos, e.g., the salient object regions, speech transcripts, and video captions, to mitigate the long-tail words challenge. Meanwhile, the internal stream is designed to exploit the multi-modality information in videos (e.g., the appearance of video frames, speech transcripts, and video captions) to ensure the quality of caption results. In addition, the cross attention mechanism is also used in between the two streams for sharing information. In this way, the two streams can help each other for more accurate results. Extensive experiments conducted on four challenging video captioning datasets, i.e., YouCookII, ActivityNet Captions, MSRVTT, and MSVD, demonstrate that the proposed method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, the proposed TextKG method outperforms the best published results by improving 18.7% absolute CIDEr scores on the YouCookII dataset.
abstract_zh: 视频字幕旨在使用自然语言描述视频内容。尽管已经取得了重大进展，但实际应用的性能仍有很大提升空间，这主要是由于长尾词的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视频字幕的带有知识图增强转换器（TextKG）的文本。值得注意的是，TextKG 是一个双流转换器，由外部流和内部流组成。外部流旨在吸收额外的知识，对额外知识（例如预先构建的知识图）与视频的内置信息（例如显着对象区域、语音转录和视频字幕）之间的交互进行建模，以减轻长尾词的挑战。同时，内部流旨在利用视频中的多模态信息（例如视频帧的出现、语音文字记录和视频字幕）来确保字幕结果的质量。此外，两个流之间还使用交叉注意力机制来共享信息。这样，两个流可以互相帮助，得到更准确的结果。在四个具有挑战性的视频字幕数据集（即 YouCookII、ActivityNet Captions、MSRVTT 和 MSVD）上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法比最先进的方法表现更好。具体来说，所提出的 TextKG 方法在 YouCookII 数据集上将 CIDEr 绝对分数提高了 18.7%，优于已发布的最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识图谱增强的双流Transformer模型（TextKG），用于改进视频字幕生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕生成方法在处理长尾词时表现不足，难以有效融合外部知识与多模态视频信息。
AI.method: 设计双流Transformer架构，外部流整合知识图谱与视频内部信息（如物体区域、语音转录），内部流挖掘视频多模态特征，并通过交叉注意力机制实现两流信息交互。
AI.result: 在YouCookII等四个数据集上优于现有方法，其中YouCookII数据集CIDEr指标提升18.7%。
AI.conclusion: TextKG通过知识图谱增强与多模态信息融合，有效缓解了长尾词问题，提升了视频字幕生成质量。

authors_text: Shenghai Liao,Xuya Liu,Ruyi Han,Shujun Fu,Yuanfeng Zhou,Yuliang Li
title: Region-wise matching for image inpainting based on adaptive weighted low-rank decomposition
title_zh: 基于自适应加权低秩分解的图像修复区域匹配
comment: region-wise matching algorithm, image inpainting, 20 pages, 18 figures
comments: region-wise matching algorithm, image inpainting, 20 pages, 18 figures
abstract: Digital image inpainting is an interpolation problem, inferring the content in the missing (unknown) region to agree with the known region data such that the interpolated result fulfills some prior knowledge. Low-rank and nonlocal self-similarity are two important priors for image inpainting. Based on the nonlocal self-similarity assumption, an image is divided into overlapped square target patches (submatrices) and the similar patches of any target patch are reshaped as vectors and stacked into a patch matrix. Such a patch matrix usually enjoys a property of low rank or approximately low rank, and its missing entries are recoveried by low-rank matrix approximation (LRMA) algorithms. Traditionally, $n$ nearest neighbor similar patches are searched within a local window centered at a target patch. However, for an image with missing lines, the generated patch matrix is prone to having entirely-missing rows such that the downstream low-rank model fails to reconstruct it well. To address this problem, we propose a region-wise matching (RwM) algorithm by dividing the neighborhood of a target patch into multiple subregions and then search the most similar one within each subregion. A non-convex weighted low-rank decomposition (NC-WLRD) model for LRMA is also proposed to reconstruct all degraded patch matrices grouped by the proposed RwM algorithm. We solve the proposed NC-WLRD model by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) and analyze the convergence in detail. Numerous experiments on line inpainting (entire-row/column missing) demonstrate the superiority of our method over other competitive inpainting algorithms. Unlike other low-rank-based matrix completion methods and inpainting algorithms, the proposed model NC-WLRD is also effective for removing random-valued impulse noise and structural noise (stripes).
summary: Digital image inpainting is an interpolation problem, inferring the content in the missing (unknown) region to agree with the known region data such that the interpolated result fulfills some prior knowledge. Low-rank and nonlocal self-similarity are two important priors for image inpainting. Based on the nonlocal self-similarity assumption, an image is divided into overlapped square target patches (submatrices) and the similar patches of any target patch are reshaped as vectors and stacked into a patch matrix. Such a patch matrix usually enjoys a property of low rank or approximately low rank, and its missing entries are recoveried by low-rank matrix approximation (LRMA) algorithms. Traditionally, $n$ nearest neighbor similar patches are searched within a local window centered at a target patch. However, for an image with missing lines, the generated patch matrix is prone to having entirely-missing rows such that the downstream low-rank model fails to reconstruct it well. To address this problem, we propose a region-wise matching (RwM) algorithm by dividing the neighborhood of a target patch into multiple subregions and then search the most similar one within each subregion. A non-convex weighted low-rank decomposition (NC-WLRD) model for LRMA is also proposed to reconstruct all degraded patch matrices grouped by the proposed RwM algorithm. We solve the proposed NC-WLRD model by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) and analyze the convergence in detail. Numerous experiments on line inpainting (entire-row/column missing) demonstrate the superiority of our method over other competitive inpainting algorithms. Unlike other low-rank-based matrix completion methods and inpainting algorithms, the proposed model NC-WLRD is also effective for removing random-valued impulse noise and structural noise (stripes).
abstract_zh: 数字图像修复是一个插值问题，推断缺失（未知）区域中的内容与已知区域数据一致，使得插值结果满足一些先验知识。低秩和非局部自相似性是图像修复的两个重要先验。基于非局部自相似性假设，将图像划分为重叠的方形目标块（子矩阵），并将任何目标块的相似块重塑为向量并堆叠成块矩阵。这样的补丁矩阵通常具有低秩或近似低秩的性质，并且其缺失的条目通过低秩矩阵近似（LRMA）算法来恢复。传统上，在以目标补丁为中心的本地窗口内搜索$n$个最近邻相似补丁。然而，对于缺失行的图像，生成的补丁矩阵很容易出现完全缺失的行，从而导致下游低秩模型无法很好地重建它。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种区域匹配（RwM）算法，将目标块的邻域划分为多个子区域，然后在每个子区域内搜索最相似的子区域。还提出了 LRMA 的非凸加权低秩分解（NC-WLRD）模型来重建由所提出的 RwM 算法分组的所有退化补丁矩阵。我们通过乘子交替方向法 (ADMM) 求解所提出的 NC-WLRD 模型，并详细分析收敛性。大量在线修复（整行/列缺失）实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他竞争性修复算法的优越性。与其他基于低秩的矩阵补全方法和修复算法不同，所提出的模型 NC-WLRD 对于去除随机值脉冲噪声和结构噪声（条纹）也很有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应加权低秩分解的区域匹配算法，用于解决图像修复中缺失行/列导致的低秩矩阵恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 传统非局部自相似性方法在处理缺失行/列时，因生成的补丁矩阵存在完全缺失行而难以有效重建，导致低秩模型失效。
AI.method: 提出区域匹配（RwM）算法将邻域划分为子区域分别搜索相似补丁，并结合非凸加权低秩分解（NC-WLRD）模型与ADMM算法进行矩阵恢复。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在行/列缺失修复及随机脉冲噪声、条纹噪声去除方面优于其他主流修复算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过区域划分与自适应加权策略，有效解决了传统低秩方法在缺失区域重建中的局限性，具有更广的适用性。

search_text: Region-wise matching for image inpainting based on adaptive weighted low-rank decomposition 基于自适应加权低秩分解的图像修复区域匹配 Digital image inpainting is an interpolation problem, inferring the content in the missing (unknown) region to agree with the known region data such that the interpolated result fulfills some prior knowledge. Low-rank and nonlocal self-similarity are two important priors for image inpainting. Based on the nonlocal self-similarity assumption, an image is divided into overlapped square target patches (submatrices) and the similar patches of any target patch are reshaped as vectors and stacked into a patch matrix. Such a patch matrix usually enjoys a property of low rank or approximately low rank, and its missing entries are recoveried by low-rank matrix approximation (LRMA) algorithms. Traditionally, $n$ nearest neighbor similar patches are searched within a local window centered at a target patch. However, for an image with missing lines, the generated patch matrix is prone to having entirely-missing rows such that the downstream low-rank model fails to reconstruct it well. To address this problem, we propose a region-wise matching (RwM) algorithm by dividing the neighborhood of a target patch into multiple subregions and then search the most similar one within each subregion. A non-convex weighted low-rank decomposition (NC-WLRD) model for LRMA is also proposed to reconstruct all degraded patch matrices grouped by the proposed RwM algorithm. We solve the proposed NC-WLRD model by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) and analyze the convergence in detail. Numerous experiments on line inpainting (entire-row/column missing) demonstrate the superiority of our method over other competitive inpainting algorithms. Unlike other low-rank-based matrix completion methods and inpainting algorithms, the proposed model NC-WLRD is also effective for removing random-valued impulse noise and structural noise (stripes). 数字图像修复是一个插值问题，推断缺失（未知）区域中的内容与已知区域数据一致，使得插值结果满足一些先验知识。低秩和非局部自相似性是图像修复的两个重要先验。基于非局部自相似性假设，将图像划分为重叠的方形目标块（子矩阵），并将任何目标块的相似块重塑为向量并堆叠成块矩阵。这样的补丁矩阵通常具有低秩或近似低秩的性质，并且其缺失的条目通过低秩矩阵近似（LRMA）算法来恢复。传统上，在以目标补丁为中心的本地窗口内搜索$n$个最近邻相似补丁。然而，对于缺失行的图像，生成的补丁矩阵很容易出现完全缺失的行，从而导致下游低秩模型无法很好地重建它。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种区域匹配（RwM）算法，将目标块的邻域划分为多个子区域，然后在每个子区域内搜索最相似的子区域。还提出了 LRMA 的非凸加权低秩分解（NC-WLRD）模型来重建由所提出的 RwM 算法分组的所有退化补丁矩阵。我们通过乘子交替方向法 (ADMM) 求解所提出的 NC-WLRD 模型，并详细分析收敛性。大量在线修复（整行/列缺失）实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他竞争性修复算法的优越性。与其他基于低秩的矩阵补全方法和修复算法不同，所提出的模型 NC-WLRD 对于去除随机值脉冲噪声和结构噪声（条纹）也很有效。 本文提出一种基于自适应加权低秩分解的区域匹配算法，用于解决图像修复中缺失行/列导致的低秩矩阵恢复问题。 Shenghai Liao,Xuya Liu,Ruyi Han,Shujun Fu,Yuanfeng Zhou,Yuliang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Shuo Yang,Zhaopan Xu,Kai Wang,Yang You,Hongxun Yao,Tongliang Liu,Min Xu
title: BiCro: Noisy Correspondence Rectification for Multi-modality Data via Bi-directional Cross-modal Similarity Consistency
title_zh: BiCro：通过双向跨模态相似性一致性对多模态数据进行噪声对应校正
comment: CVPR 2023
comments: CVPR 2023
abstract: As one of the most fundamental techniques in multimodal learning, cross-modal matching aims to project various sensory modalities into a shared feature space. To achieve this, massive and correctly aligned data pairs are required for model training. However, unlike unimodal datasets, multimodal datasets are extremely harder to collect and annotate precisely. As an alternative, the co-occurred data pairs (e.g., image-text pairs) collected from the Internet have been widely exploited in the area. Unfortunately, the cheaply collected dataset unavoidably contains many mismatched data pairs, which have been proven to be harmful to the model's performance. To address this, we propose a general framework called BiCro (Bidirectional Cross-modal similarity consistency), which can be easily integrated into existing cross-modal matching models and improve their robustness against noisy data. Specifically, BiCro aims to estimate soft labels for noisy data pairs to reflect their true correspondence degree. The basic idea of BiCro is motivated by that -- taking image-text matching as an example -- similar images should have similar textual descriptions and vice versa. Then the consistency of these two similarities can be recast as the estimated soft labels to train the matching model. The experiments on three popular cross-modal matching datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves the noise-robustness of various matching models, and surpass the state-of-the-art by a clear margin.
summary: As one of the most fundamental techniques in multimodal learning, cross-modal matching aims to project various sensory modalities into a shared feature space. To achieve this, massive and correctly aligned data pairs are required for model training. However, unlike unimodal datasets, multimodal datasets are extremely harder to collect and annotate precisely. As an alternative, the co-occurred data pairs (e.g., image-text pairs) collected from the Internet have been widely exploited in the area. Unfortunately, the cheaply collected dataset unavoidably contains many mismatched data pairs, which have been proven to be harmful to the model's performance. To address this, we propose a general framework called BiCro (Bidirectional Cross-modal similarity consistency), which can be easily integrated into existing cross-modal matching models and improve their robustness against noisy data. Specifically, BiCro aims to estimate soft labels for noisy data pairs to reflect their true correspondence degree. The basic idea of BiCro is motivated by that -- taking image-text matching as an example -- similar images should have similar textual descriptions and vice versa. Then the consistency of these two similarities can be recast as the estimated soft labels to train the matching model. The experiments on three popular cross-modal matching datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves the noise-robustness of various matching models, and surpass the state-of-the-art by a clear margin.
abstract_zh: 作为多模态学习中最基本的技术之一，跨模态匹配旨在将各种感觉模态投射到共享的特征空间中。为了实现这一目标，模型训练需要大量且正确对齐的数据对。然而，与单模态数据集不同，多模态数据集极其难以精确收集和注释。作为替代方案，从互联网收集的同时出现的数据对（例如图像文本对）已在该领域得到广泛利用。不幸的是，廉价收集的数据集不可避免地包含许多不匹配的数据对，这已被证明对模型的性能有害。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 BiCro（双向跨模态相似性一致性）的通用框架，它可以轻松集成到现有的跨模态匹配模型中，并提高其对噪声数据的鲁棒性。具体来说，BiCro 的目标是估计噪声数据对的软标签，以反映它们的真实对应程度。 BiCro 的基本思想是这样的——以图像文本匹配为例——相似的图像应该有相似的文本描述，反之亦然。然后可以将这两个相似度的一致性重新构建为估计的软标签来训练匹配模型。在三个流行的跨模态匹配数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了各种匹配模型的噪声鲁棒性，并明显超越了最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiCro框架，通过双向跨模态相似性一致性修正多模态数据中的噪声对应关系，提升跨模态匹配模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多模态数据集因标注困难常包含大量错配样本，这些噪声数据会损害模型性能，现有方法缺乏有效应对策略。
AI.method: 利用双向跨模态相似性一致性原理，通过估计噪声样本的软标签反映真实对应关系，以图像-文本匹配为例，强制图像相似性与文本相似性保持一致进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在三个主流跨模态匹配数据集上验证，BiCro显著提升模型抗噪能力，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BiCro为多模态学习提供了通用噪声修正框架，能有效增强现有匹配模型对噪声数据的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Huixu Dong,Ziyi Zheng,Haotian Guo,Sihao Yang,Chen Qiu,Jiansheng Dai,I-Ming Chen
title: Theoretical Model Construction of Deformation-Force for Soft Grippers Part II: Displacement Control Based Intrinsic Force Sensing
title_zh: 软夹具变形力理论模型构建第二部分：基于内力传感的位移控制
abstract: Force-aware grasping is an essential capability for most robots in practical applications. Especially for compliant grippers, such as Fin-Ray grippers, it still remains challenging to build a bidirectional mathematical model that mutually maps the shape deformation and contact force. Part I of this article has constructed the force-displacement relationship for design optimization through the co-rotational theory. In Part II, we further devise a displacement-force mathematical model, enabling the compliant gripper to precisely estimate contact force from deformations sensor-free. The presented displacement-force model elaborately investigates contact forces and provides force feedback for a force control system of a gripper, where deformation appears as displacements in contact points. Afterward, simulation experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed model through comparisons with the finite-element analysis (FEA) in Ansys. Simulation results reveal that the proposed model accurately estimates contact force, with an average error of around 3% and 4% for single or multiple node cases, respectively, regardless of various design parameters (Part I of this article is released in Arxiv1)
summary: Force-aware grasping is an essential capability for most robots in practical applications. Especially for compliant grippers, such as Fin-Ray grippers, it still remains challenging to build a bidirectional mathematical model that mutually maps the shape deformation and contact force. Part I of this article has constructed the force-displacement relationship for design optimization through the co-rotational theory. In Part II, we further devise a displacement-force mathematical model, enabling the compliant gripper to precisely estimate contact force from deformations sensor-free. The presented displacement-force model elaborately investigates contact forces and provides force feedback for a force control system of a gripper, where deformation appears as displacements in contact points. Afterward, simulation experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed model through comparisons with the finite-element analysis (FEA) in Ansys. Simulation results reveal that the proposed model accurately estimates contact force, with an average error of around 3% and 4% for single or multiple node cases, respectively, regardless of various design parameters (Part I of this article is released in Arxiv1)
abstract_zh: 力感知抓取是大多数机器人在实际应用中的必备能力。特别是对于柔性夹具，例如 Fin-Ray 夹具，建立相互映射形状变形和接触力的双向数学模型仍然具有挑战性。本文第一部分通过同转理论构建了用于设计优化的力-位移关系。在第二部分中，我们进一步设计了一个位移力数学模型，使柔性夹具能够在无需传感器的情况下精确估计变形产生的接触力。所提出的位移力模型详细研究了接触力，并为夹具的力控制系统提供力反馈，其中变形表现为接触点的位移。随后，进行仿真实验，通过与 Ansys 中的有限元分析 (FEA) 进行比较来评估所提出模型的性能。仿真结果表明，无论各种设计参数如何，所提出的模型都能准确估计接触力，对于单节点或多节点情况，平均误差分别约为 3% 和 4%（本文第一部分发布在 Arxiv1 中）

AI.tldr: 本文构建了基于位移控制的柔性夹爪内在力感知的变形-力理论模型，实现无传感器接触力估计。
AI.motivation: 柔性夹爪在实际应用中需要精确的力感知能力，但现有方法难以建立变形与接触力的双向数学映射关系，尤其在无传感器情况下更显挑战。
AI.method: 基于共旋转理论构建位移-力数学模型，通过接触点位移表征变形，结合仿真实验与Ansys有限元分析验证模型性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，模型在单节点和多节点情况下接触力估计平均误差分别为3%和4%，且对不同设计参数具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的位移-力模型能有效实现柔性夹爪的无传感器力反馈，为力控系统提供理论支撑，具有实际应用价值。

The presented displacement-force model elaborately investigates contact forces and provides force feedback for a force control system of a gripper, where deformation appears as displacements in contact points. Afterward, simulation experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed model through comparisons with the finite-element analysis (FEA) in Ansys. Simulation results reveal that the proposed model accurately estimates contact force, with an average error of around 3% and 4% for single or multiple node cases, respectively, regardless of various design parameters (Part I of this article is released in Arxiv1) 力感知抓取是大多数机器人在实际应用中的必备能力。特别是对于柔性夹具，例如 Fin-Ray 夹具，建立相互映射形状变形和接触力的双向数学模型仍然具有挑战性。本文第一部分通过同转理论构建了用于设计优化的力-位移关系。在第二部分中，我们进一步设计了一个位移力数学模型，使柔性夹具能够在无需传感器的情况下精确估计变形产生的接触力。所提出的位移力模型详细研究了接触力，并为夹具的力控制系统提供力反馈，其中变形表现为接触点的位移。随后，进行仿真实验，通过与 Ansys 中的有限元分析 (FEA) 进行比较来评估所提出模型的性能。仿真结果表明，无论各种设计参数如何，所提出的模型都能准确估计接触力，对于单节点或多节点情况，平均误差分别约为 3% 和 4%（本文第一部分发布在 Arxiv1 中） 本文构建了基于位移控制的柔性夹爪内在力感知的变形-力理论模型，实现无传感器接触力估计。 Huixu Dong,Ziyi Zheng,Haotian Guo,Sihao Yang,Chen Qiu,Jiansheng Dai,I-Ming Chen cs.RO

authors_text: Yihan Zeng,Chenhan Jiang,Jiageng Mao,Jianhua Han,Chaoqiang Ye,Qingqiu Huang,Dit-Yan Yeung,Zhen Yang,Xiaodan Liang,Hang Xu
title: CLIP$^2$: Contrastive Language-Image-Point Pretraining from Real-World Point Cloud Data
title_zh: CLIP$^2$：来自真实世界点云数据的对比语言-图像-点预训练
comment: To appear at CVPR 2023
comments: To appear at CVPR 2023
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training, benefiting from large-scale unlabeled text-image pairs, has demonstrated great performance in open-world vision understanding tasks. However, due to the limited Text-3D data pairs, adapting the success of 2D Vision-Language Models (VLM) to the 3D space remains an open problem. Existing works that leverage VLM for 3D understanding generally resort to constructing intermediate 2D representations for the 3D data, but at the cost of losing 3D geometry information. To take a step toward open-world 3D vision understanding, we propose Contrastive Language-Image-Point Cloud Pretraining (CLIP$^2$) to directly learn the transferable 3D point cloud representation in realistic scenarios with a novel proxy alignment mechanism. Specifically, we exploit naturally-existed correspondences in 2D and 3D scenarios, and build well-aligned and instance-based text-image-point proxies from those complex scenarios. On top of that, we propose a cross-modal contrastive objective to learn semantic and instance-level aligned point cloud representation. Experimental results on both indoor and outdoor scenarios show that our learned 3D representation has great transfer ability in downstream tasks, including zero-shot and few-shot 3D recognition, which boosts the state-of-the-art methods by large margins. Furthermore, we provide analyses of the capability of different representations in real scenarios and present the optional ensemble scheme.

However, due to the limited Text-3D data pairs, adapting the success of 2D Vision-Language Models (VLM) to the 3D space remains an open problem. To take a step toward open-world 3D vision understanding, we propose Contrastive Language-Image-Point Cloud Pretraining (CLIP$^2$) to directly learn the transferable 3D point cloud representation in realistic scenarios with a novel proxy alignment mechanism. Specifically, we exploit naturally-existed correspondences in 2D and 3D scenarios, and build well-aligned and instance-based text-image-point proxies from those complex scenarios. On top of that, we propose a cross-modal contrastive objective to learn semantic and instance-level aligned point cloud representation. Experimental results on both indoor and outdoor scenarios show that our learned 3D representation has great transfer ability in downstream tasks, including zero-shot and few-shot 3D recognition, which boosts the state-of-the-art methods by large margins. Furthermore, we provide analyses of the capability of different representations in real scenarios and present the optional ensemble scheme.
abstract_zh: 对比语言-图像预训练受益于大规模未标记的文本-图像对，在开放世界视觉理解任务中表现出了出色的性能。然而，由于文本-3D 数据对有限，将 2D 视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的成功应用到 3D 空间仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。利用 VLM 进行 3D 理解的现有工作通常采用为 3D 数据构建中间 2D 表示，但代价是丢失 3D 几何信息。为了向开放世界 3D 视觉理解迈出一步，我们提出了对比语言-图像-点云预训练 (CLIP$^2$)，通过新颖的代理对齐机制直接学习现实场景中的可转移 3D 点云表示。具体来说，我们利用 2D 和 3D 场景中自然存在的对应关系，并从这些复杂场景中构建对齐良好且基于实例的文本图像点代理。最重要的是，我们提出了一个跨模式对比目标来学习语义和实例级对齐的点云表示。室内和室外场景的实验结果表明，我们学习的 3D 表示在下游任务中具有很强的迁移能力，包括零镜头和少镜头 3D 识别，这大大提高了最先进的方法。此外，我们分析了实际场景中不同表示的能力，并提出了可选的集成方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP²方法，通过构建文本-图像-点云代理对，直接学习可迁移的3D点云表示，解决现有3D理解方法因丢失几何信息而导致的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有3D理解方法依赖2D中间表示，导致3D几何信息丢失。需直接利用真实场景中的文本-3D数据对，建立开放世界的3D视觉理解框架。
AI.method: 利用2D/3D场景中的自然对应关系构建文本-图像-点云代理对，设计跨模态对比目标，通过对比学习实现语义与实例级对齐的点云表示。
AI.result: 在室内外场景的零样本/少样本3D识别任务中显著超越现有方法，验证了3D表示的强迁移能力，并提出不同表示的组合策略。
AI.conclusion: CLIP²通过跨模态对齐机制有效桥接2D与3D理解，为开放世界3D视觉任务提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的3D-文本交互方式。

authors_text: Johann Brehmer,Joey Bose,Pim de Haan,Taco Cohen
title: EDGI: Equivariant Diffusion for Planning with Embodied Agents
title_zh: EDGI：使用具体代理进行规划的等变扩散
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2023. v2: matches camera-ready version
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2023. v2: matches camera-ready version
abstract: Embodied agents operate in a structured world, often solving tasks with spatial, temporal, and permutation symmetries. Most algorithms for planning and model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) do not take this rich geometric structure into account, leading to sample inefficiency and poor generalization. We introduce the Equivariant Diffuser for Generating Interactions (EDGI), an algorithm for MBRL and planning that is equivariant with respect to the product of the spatial symmetry group SE(3), the discrete-time translation group Z, and the object permutation group Sn. EDGI follows the Diffuser framework (Janner et al., 2022) in treating both learning a world model and planning in it as a conditional generative modeling problem, training a diffusion model on an offline trajectory dataset. We introduce a new SE(3)xZxSn-equivariant diffusion model that supports multiple representations. We integrate this model in a planning loop, where conditioning and classifier guidance let us softly break the symmetry for specific tasks as needed. On object manipulation and navigation tasks, EDGI is substantially more sample efficient and generalizes better across the symmetry group than non-equivariant models.
summary: Embodied agents operate in a structured world, often solving tasks with spatial, temporal, and permutation symmetries. Most algorithms for planning and model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) do not take this rich geometric structure into account, leading to sample inefficiency and poor generalization. We introduce the Equivariant Diffuser for Generating Interactions (EDGI), an algorithm for MBRL and planning that is equivariant with respect to the product of the spatial symmetry group SE(3), the discrete-time translation group Z, and the object permutation group Sn. EDGI follows the Diffuser framework (Janner et al., 2022) in treating both learning a world model and planning in it as a conditional generative modeling problem, training a diffusion model on an offline trajectory dataset. We introduce a new SE(3)xZxSn-equivariant diffusion model that supports multiple representations. We integrate this model in a planning loop, where conditioning and classifier guidance let us softly break the symmetry for specific tasks as needed. On object manipulation and navigation tasks, EDGI is substantially more sample efficient and generalizes better across the symmetry group than non-equivariant models.
abstract_zh: 具身代理在结构化世界中运行，通常解决具有空间、时间和排列对称性的任务。大多数用于规划和基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）的算法都没有考虑到这种丰富的几何结构，导致样本效率低下和泛化能力差。我们引入了用于生成交互的等变扩散器 (EDGI)，这是一种用于 MBRL 和规划的算法，该算法对于空间对称群 SE(3)、离散时间平移群 Z 和对象排列群 Sn 的乘积是等变的。 EDGI 遵循 Diffuser 框架（Janner 等人，2022），将学习世界模型和其中的规划视为条件生成建模问题，在离线轨迹数据集上训练扩散模型。我们引入了一种新的 SE(3)xZxSn 等变扩散模型，支持多种表示。我们将此模型集成到规划循环中，其中条件和分类器指导让我们根据需要轻轻地打破特定任务的对称性。在对象操作和导航任务中，EDGI 的样本效率明显更高，并且比非等变模型在对称组上的泛化能力更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EDGI算法，通过引入等变扩散模型提升具身智能体在规划和模型基于强化学习中的样本效率与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有规划和模型基强化学习算法未充分利用空间、时间及排列对称性等几何结构，导致样本效率低且泛化性差。
AI.method: 设计SE(3)×Z×Sⁿ等变扩散模型，结合条件生成与分类器引导，在离线轨迹数据集上训练并集成到规划循环中。
AI.result: 在物体操作与导航任务中，EDGI相较非等变模型显著提升样本效率，并在对称性组内实现更好泛化。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模几何对称性，EDGI为具身智能体规划提供了更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Changwoon Choi,Sang Min Kim,Young Min Kim
title: Balanced Spherical Grid for Egocentric View Synthesis
title_zh: 用于以自我为中心的视图合成的平衡球形网格
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023
abstract: We present EgoNeRF, a practical solution to reconstruct large-scale real-world environments for VR assets. Given a few seconds of casually captured 360 video, EgoNeRF can efficiently build neural radiance fields which enable high-quality rendering from novel viewpoints. Motivated by the recent acceleration of NeRF using feature grids, we adopt spherical coordinate instead of conventional Cartesian coordinate. Cartesian feature grid is inefficient to represent large-scale unbounded scenes because it has a spatially uniform resolution, regardless of distance from viewers. The spherical parameterization better aligns with the rays of egocentric images, and yet enables factorization for performance enhancement. However, the naïve spherical grid suffers from irregularities at two poles, and also cannot represent unbounded scenes. To avoid singularities near poles, we combine two balanced grids, which results in a quasi-uniform angular grid. We also partition the radial grid exponentially and place an environment map at infinity to represent unbounded scenes. Furthermore, with our resampling technique for grid-based methods, we can increase the number of valid samples to train NeRF volume. We extensively evaluate our method in our newly introduced synthetic and real-world egocentric 360 video datasets, and it consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: We present EgoNeRF, a practical solution to reconstruct large-scale real-world environments for VR assets. Given a few seconds of casually captured 360 video, EgoNeRF can efficiently build neural radiance fields which enable high-quality rendering from novel viewpoints. Motivated by the recent acceleration of NeRF using feature grids, we adopt spherical coordinate instead of conventional Cartesian coordinate. Cartesian feature grid is inefficient to represent large-scale unbounded scenes because it has a spatially uniform resolution, regardless of distance from viewers. The spherical parameterization better aligns with the rays of egocentric images, and yet enables factorization for performance enhancement. However, the naïve spherical grid suffers from irregularities at two poles, and also cannot represent unbounded scenes. To avoid singularities near poles, we combine two balanced grids, which results in a quasi-uniform angular grid. We also partition the radial grid exponentially and place an environment map at infinity to represent unbounded scenes. Furthermore, with our resampling technique for grid-based methods, we can increase the number of valid samples to train NeRF volume. We extensively evaluate our method in our newly introduced synthetic and real-world egocentric 360 video datasets, and it consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 EgoNeRF，这是一种为 VR 资产重建大规模现实世界环境的实用解决方案。给定几秒钟随意捕捉的 360 度视频，EgoNeRF 可以有效地构建神经辐射场，从而从新的视角实现高质量渲染。受最近使用特征网格的 NeRF 加速的推动，我们采用球坐标而不是传统的笛卡尔坐标。笛卡尔特征网格在表示大规模无界场景时效率很低，因为它具有空间统一的分辨率，无论距观看者的距离如何。球面参数化更好地与以自我为中心的图像的光线对齐，并且能够进行因式分解以增强性能。然而，朴素的球形网格在两个极点存在不规则性，并且也无法表示无界场景。为了避免极点附近的奇点，我们结合了两个平衡的网格，从而形成了准均匀的角度网格。我们还以指数方式划分径向网格，并将环境贴图放置在无穷远处以表示无界场景。此外，通过我们基于网格方法的重采样技术，我们可以增加有效样本的数量来训练 NeRF 体积。我们在新引入的合成和真实世界的以自我为中心的 360 度视频数据集中广泛评估了我们的方法，并且它始终实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoNeRF方法，通过改进神经辐射场（NeRF）的网格表示，实现基于第一视角360度视频的高质量新视角渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统笛卡尔坐标系网格难以高效表示大规模无界场景，且无法适应第一视角图像的光线分布特性。
AI.method: 采用球面坐标系替代笛卡尔坐标系，结合双平衡网格消除极点畸变，使用指数级径向划分并添加无限远环境贴图，配合网格重采样技术提升样本有效性。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界数据集上均达到最先进性能，显著提升大规模场景的视点合成质量与效率。
AI.conclusion: 球面网格参数化有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为第一视角虚拟现实内容生成提供了高效可行的解决方案。

Given a few seconds of casually captured 360 video, EgoNeRF can efficiently build neural radiance fields which enable high-quality rendering from novel viewpoints. Motivated by the recent acceleration of NeRF using feature grids, we adopt spherical coordinate instead of conventional Cartesian coordinate. Cartesian feature grid is inefficient to represent large-scale unbounded scenes because it has a spatially uniform resolution, regardless of distance from viewers. The spherical parameterization better aligns with the rays of egocentric images, and yet enables factorization for performance enhancement. However, the naïve spherical grid suffers from irregularities at two poles, and also cannot represent unbounded scenes. To avoid singularities near poles, we combine two balanced grids, which results in a quasi-uniform angular grid. We also partition the radial grid exponentially and place an environment map at infinity to represent unbounded scenes. Furthermore, with our resampling technique for grid-based methods, we can increase the number of valid samples to train NeRF volume. We extensively evaluate our method in our newly introduced synthetic and real-world egocentric 360 video datasets, and it consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. 我们推出了 EgoNeRF，这是一种为 VR 资产重建大规模现实世界环境的实用解决方案。给定几秒钟随意捕捉的 360 度视频，EgoNeRF 可以有效地构建神经辐射场，从而从新的视角实现高质量渲染。受最近使用特征网格的 NeRF 加速的推动，我们采用球坐标而不是传统的笛卡尔坐标。笛卡尔特征网格在表示大规模无界场景时效率很低，因为它具有空间统一的分辨率，无论距观看者的距离如何。球面参数化更好地与以自我为中心的图像的光线对齐，并且能够进行因式分解以增强性能。然而，朴素的球形网格在两个极点存在不规则性，并且也无法表示无界场景。为了避免极点附近的奇点，我们结合了两个平衡的网格，从而形成了准均匀的角度网格。我们还以指数方式划分径向网格，并将环境贴图放置在无穷远处以表示无界场景。此外，通过我们基于网格方法的重采样技术，我们可以增加有效样本的数量来训练 NeRF 体积。我们在新引入的合成和真实世界的以自我为中心的 360 度视频数据集中广泛评估了我们的方法，并且它始终实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出EgoNeRF方法，通过改进神经辐射场（NeRF）的网格表示，实现基于第一视角360度视频的高质量新视角渲染。 Changwoon Choi,Sang Min Kim,Young Min Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Tianhang Wang,Guang Chen,Kai Chen,Zhengfa Liu,Bo Zhang,Alois Knoll,Changjun Jiang
title: UMC: A Unified Bandwidth-efficient and Multi-resolution based Collaborative Perception Framework
title_zh: UMC：一个统一的带宽高效和多分辨率的协作感知框架
abstract: Multi-agent collaborative perception (MCP) has recently attracted much attention. It includes three key processes: communication for sharing, collaboration for integration, and reconstruction for different downstream tasks. Existing methods pursue designing the collaboration process alone, ignoring their intrinsic interactions and resulting in suboptimal performance. In contrast, we aim to propose a Unified Collaborative perception framework named UMC, optimizing the communication, collaboration, and reconstruction processes with the Multi-resolution technique. The communication introduces a novel trainable multi-resolution and selective-region (MRSR) mechanism, achieving higher quality and lower bandwidth. Then, a graph-based collaboration is proposed, conducting on each resolution to adapt the MRSR. Finally, the reconstruction integrates the multi-resolution collaborative features for downstream tasks. Since the general metric can not reflect the performance enhancement brought by MCP systematically, we introduce a brand-new evaluation metric that evaluates the MCP from different perspectives. To verify our algorithm, we conducted experiments on the V2X-Sim and OPV2V datasets. Our quantitative and qualitative experiments prove that the proposed UMC greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art collaborative perception approaches.
summary: Multi-agent collaborative perception (MCP) has recently attracted much attention. It includes three key processes: communication for sharing, collaboration for integration, and reconstruction for different downstream tasks. Existing methods pursue designing the collaboration process alone, ignoring their intrinsic interactions and resulting in suboptimal performance. In contrast, we aim to propose a Unified Collaborative perception framework named UMC, optimizing the communication, collaboration, and reconstruction processes with the Multi-resolution technique. The communication introduces a novel trainable multi-resolution and selective-region (MRSR) mechanism, achieving higher quality and lower bandwidth. Then, a graph-based collaboration is proposed, conducting on each resolution to adapt the MRSR. Finally, the reconstruction integrates the multi-resolution collaborative features for downstream tasks. Since the general metric can not reflect the performance enhancement brought by MCP systematically, we introduce a brand-new evaluation metric that evaluates the MCP from different perspectives. To verify our algorithm, we conducted experiments on the V2X-Sim and OPV2V datasets. Our quantitative and qualitative experiments prove that the proposed UMC greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art collaborative perception approaches.
abstract_zh: 多智能体协作感知（MCP）最近引起了广泛关注。它包括三个关键流程：沟通共享、协作整合、以及针对不同下游任务的重构。现有的方法追求单独设计协作过程，忽略它们内在的相互作用并导致性能不佳。相比之下，我们的目标是提出一个名为 UMC 的统一协作感知框架，利用多分辨率技术优化通信、协作和重建过程。该通信引入了一种新颖的可训练多分辨率和选择区域（MRSR）机制，实现了更高的质量和更低的带宽。然后，提出了基于图的协作，对每个分辨率进行调整以适应 MRSR。最后，重建集成了下游任务的多分辨率协作特征。由于通用指标无法系统地反映MCP带来的性能提升，因此我们引入了一种全新的评估指标，从不同角度对MCP进行评估。为了验证我们的算法，我们在 V2X-Sim 和 OPV2V 数据集上进行了实验。我们的定量和定性实验证明，所提出的 UMC 大大优于最先进的协作感知方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UMC框架，通过多分辨率技术统一优化多智能体协作感知中的通信、协作与重建过程，提升性能并设计新评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独设计协作过程，忽略通信、协作与重建的内在交互，导致性能次优，需统一优化并建立系统性评估标准。
AI.method: UMC引入可训练多分辨率选择区域（MRSR）机制降低通信带宽，基于图的多分辨率协作方法适配不同尺度，结合多分辨率特征重建下游任务，提出全新评估指标。
AI.result: 在V2X-Sim和OPV2V数据集上，UMC在定量与定性实验中均显著优于现有最先进协作感知方法。
AI.conclusion: UMC通过统一优化多分辨率协作流程及新评估指标，有效提升了多智能体协作感知的性能与效率。

authors_text: Anahita Nekoozadeh,Mohammad Reza Ahmadzadeh,Zahra Mardani
title: Multiscale Attention via Wavelet Neural Operators for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 通过小波神经算子实现视觉变压器的多尺度注意力
abstract: Transformers have achieved widespread success in computer vision. At their heart, there is a Self-Attention (SA) mechanism, an inductive bias that associates each token in the input with every other token through a weighted basis. The standard SA mechanism has quadratic complexity with the sequence length, which impedes its utility to long sequences appearing in high resolution vision. Recently, inspired by operator learning for PDEs, Adaptive Fourier Neural Operators (AFNO) were introduced for high resolution attention based on global convolution that is efficiently implemented via FFT. However, the AFNO global filtering cannot well represent small and moderate scale structures that commonly appear in natural images. To leverage the coarse-to-fine scale structures we introduce a Multiscale Wavelet Attention (MWA) by leveraging wavelet neural operators which incurs linear complexity in the sequence size. We replace the attention in ViT with MWA and our experiments with CIFAR and Tiny-ImageNet classification demonstrate significant improvement over alternative Fourier-based attentions such as AFNO and Global Filter Network (GFN).
summary: Transformers have achieved widespread success in computer vision. At their heart, there is a Self-Attention (SA) mechanism, an inductive bias that associates each token in the input with every other token through a weighted basis. The standard SA mechanism has quadratic complexity with the sequence length, which impedes its utility to long sequences appearing in high resolution vision. Recently, inspired by operator learning for PDEs, Adaptive Fourier Neural Operators (AFNO) were introduced for high resolution attention based on global convolution that is efficiently implemented via FFT. However, the AFNO global filtering cannot well represent small and moderate scale structures that commonly appear in natural images. To leverage the coarse-to-fine scale structures we introduce a Multiscale Wavelet Attention (MWA) by leveraging wavelet neural operators which incurs linear complexity in the sequence size. We replace the attention in ViT with MWA and our experiments with CIFAR and Tiny-ImageNet classification demonstrate significant improvement over alternative Fourier-based attentions such as AFNO and Global Filter Network (GFN).
abstract_zh: 变形金刚在计算机视觉领域取得了广泛的成功。它们的核心是自我注意（SA）机制，这是一种归纳偏差，通过加权基础将输入中的每个标记与其他每个标记相关联。标准SA机制的复杂度与序列长度呈二次方关系，这阻碍了其在高分辨率视觉中出现的长序列的实用性。最近，受偏微分方程算子学习的启发，引入了自适应傅里叶神经算子（AFNO），用于基于通过 FFT 有效实现的全局卷积的高分辨率注意力。然而，AFNO 全局滤波不能很好地表示自然图像中常见的中小尺度结构。为了利用从粗到细的尺度结构，我们通过利用小波神经算子引入了多尺度小波注意力（MWA），这会导致序列大小的线性复杂性。我们用 MWA 取代了 ViT 中的注意力，并且我们使用 CIFAR 和 Tiny-ImageNet 分类进行的实验表明，与 AFNO 和全局过滤网络 (GFN) 等基于傅里叶的注意力相比，有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小波神经算子的多尺度注意力机制（MWA），用于改进视觉Transformer在高分辨率图像处理中的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制计算复杂度高，难以处理高分辨率图像；现有基于傅里叶的方法（如AFNO）无法有效捕捉自然图像中的小尺度结构。
AI.method: 通过引入小波神经算子设计多尺度注意力模块（MWA），将小波变换与注意力机制结合，实现线性复杂度的高效计算，并将其集成到ViT架构中。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和Tiny-ImageNet分类任务中，MWA相比AFNO和GFN等方法取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MWA通过多尺度特征建模有效解决了高分辨率视觉任务中的计算瓶颈，为Transformer的高效应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Multiscale Attention via Wavelet Neural Operators for Vision Transformers 通过小波神经算子实现视觉变压器的多尺度注意力 Transformers have achieved widespread success in computer vision. At their heart, there is a Self-Attention (SA) mechanism, an inductive bias that associates each token in the input with every other token through a weighted basis. The standard SA mechanism has quadratic complexity with the sequence length, which impedes its utility to long sequences appearing in high resolution vision. Recently, inspired by operator learning for PDEs, Adaptive Fourier Neural Operators (AFNO) were introduced for high resolution attention based on global convolution that is efficiently implemented via FFT. However, the AFNO global filtering cannot well represent small and moderate scale structures that commonly appear in natural images. To leverage the coarse-to-fine scale structures we introduce a Multiscale Wavelet Attention (MWA) by leveraging wavelet neural operators which incurs linear complexity in the sequence size. We replace the attention in ViT with MWA and our experiments with CIFAR and Tiny-ImageNet classification demonstrate significant improvement over alternative Fourier-based attentions such as AFNO and Global Filter Network (GFN). 变形金刚在计算机视觉领域取得了广泛的成功。它们的核心是自我注意（SA）机制，这是一种归纳偏差，通过加权基础将输入中的每个标记与其他每个标记相关联。标准SA机制的复杂度与序列长度呈二次方关系，这阻碍了其在高分辨率视觉中出现的长序列的实用性。最近，受偏微分方程算子学习的启发，引入了自适应傅里叶神经算子（AFNO），用于基于通过 FFT 有效实现的全局卷积的高分辨率注意力。然而，AFNO 全局滤波不能很好地表示自然图像中常见的中小尺度结构。为了利用从粗到细的尺度结构，我们通过利用小波神经算子引入了多尺度小波注意力（MWA），这会导致序列大小的线性复杂性。我们用 MWA 取代了 ViT 中的注意力，并且我们使用 CIFAR 和 Tiny-ImageNet 分类进行的实验表明，与 AFNO 和全局过滤网络 (GFN) 等基于傅里叶的注意力相比，有显着改进。 本文提出一种基于小波神经算子的多尺度注意力机制（MWA），用于改进视觉Transformer在高分辨率图像处理中的效率和性能。 Anahita Nekoozadeh,Mohammad Reza Ahmadzadeh,Zahra Mardani cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyin Chen,Haibin Zheng,Tao Liu,Rongchang Li,Yao Cheng,Xuhong Zhang,Shouling Ji
title: Edge Deep Learning Model Protection via Neuron Authorization
title_zh: 通过神经元授权进行边缘深度学习模型保护
abstract: With the development of deep learning processors and accelerators, deep learning models have been widely deployed on edge devices as part of the Internet of Things. Edge device models are generally considered as valuable intellectual properties that are worth for careful protection. Unfortunately, these models have a great risk of being stolen or illegally copied. The existing model protections using encryption algorithms are suffered from high computation overhead which is not practical due to the limited computing capacity on edge devices. In this work, we propose a light-weight, practical, and general Edge device model Pro tection method at neuron level, denoted as EdgePro. Specifically, we select several neurons as authorization neurons and set their activation values to locking values and scale the neuron outputs as the "asswords" during training. EdgePro protects the model by ensuring it can only work correctly when the "passwords" are met, at the cost of encrypting and storing the information of the "passwords" instead of the whole model. Extensive experimental results indicate that EdgePro can work well on the task of protecting on datasets with different modes. The inference time increase of EdgePro is only 60% of state-of-the-art methods, and the accuracy loss is less than 1%. Additionally, EdgePro is robust against adaptive attacks including fine-tuning and pruning, which makes it more practical in real-world applications. EdgePro is also open sourced to facilitate future research: https://github.com/Leon022/Edg
summary: With the development of deep learning processors and accelerators, deep learning models have been widely deployed on edge devices as part of the Internet of Things. Edge device models are generally considered as valuable intellectual properties that are worth for careful protection. Unfortunately, these models have a great risk of being stolen or illegally copied. The existing model protections using encryption algorithms are suffered from high computation overhead which is not practical due to the limited computing capacity on edge devices. In this work, we propose a light-weight, practical, and general Edge device model Pro tection method at neuron level, denoted as EdgePro. Specifically, we select several neurons as authorization neurons and set their activation values to locking values and scale the neuron outputs as the "asswords" during training. EdgePro protects the model by ensuring it can only work correctly when the "passwords" are met, at the cost of encrypting and storing the information of the "passwords" instead of the whole model. Extensive experimental results indicate that EdgePro can work well on the task of protecting on datasets with different modes. The inference time increase of EdgePro is only 60% of state-of-the-art methods, and the accuracy loss is less than 1%. Additionally, EdgePro is robust against adaptive attacks including fine-tuning and pruning, which makes it more practical in real-world applications. EdgePro is also open sourced to facilitate future research: https://github.com/Leon022/Edg
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习处理器和加速器的发展，深度学习模型作为物联网的一部分被广泛部署在边缘设备上。边缘设备模型通常被认为是有价值的知识产权，值得仔细保护。不幸的是，这些模型有很大的被盗或非法复制的风险。现有的使用加密算法的模型保护存在较高的计算开销，由于边缘设备的计算能力有限，这并不实用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种轻量级、实用且通用的神经元级别的边缘设备模型保护方法，记为EdgePro。具体来说，我们选择几个神经元作为授权神经元，并将它们的激活值设置为锁定值，并在训练期间将神经元输出缩放为“asswords”。 EdgePro 通过确保模型只有在满足“密码”时才能正常工作来保护模型，但代价是加密和存储“密码”信息而不是整个模型。大量的实验结果表明，EdgePro可以很好地完成不同模式的数据集保护任务。 EdgePro 的推理时间增加仅为最先进方法的 60%，而准确性损失小于 1%。此外，EdgePro 对于自适应攻击（包括微调和修剪）具有很强的鲁棒性，这使得它在实际应用中更加实用。 EdgePro 也开源以方便未来的研究：https://github.com/Leon022/Edg

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经元授权的轻量级边缘设备深度学习模型保护方法EdgePro，通过在训练时设置授权神经元的激活值作为‘密码’来实现模型保护。
AI.motivation: 现有模型加密方法因计算开销大而不适用于计算能力有限的边缘设备，需寻找更轻量且实用的模型保护方案。
AI.method: 选择部分神经元作为授权神经元，将其激活值设为锁定值并缩放为‘密码’，模型仅在满足‘密码’条件时才能正确运行，通过加密存储‘密码’而非整个模型实现保护。
AI.result: EdgePro在不同数据集任务中表现良好，推理时间仅增加60%（相比最先进方法），精度损失低于1%，且对微调和剪枝等攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EdgePro提供了一种兼顾安全性与效率的边缘设备模型保护方案，具有实际应用价值并已开源。

authors_text: Yang Hai,Rui Song,Jiaojiao Li,Mathieu Salzmann,Yinlin Hu
title: Rigidity-Aware Detection for 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 6D 物体姿态估计的刚度感知检测
comment: CVPR 2023
comments: CVPR 2023
abstract: Most recent 6D object pose estimation methods first use object detection to obtain 2D bounding boxes before actually regressing the pose. However, the general object detection methods they use are ill-suited to handle cluttered scenes, thus producing poor initialization to the subsequent pose network. To address this, we propose a rigidity-aware detection method exploiting the fact that, in 6D pose estimation, the target objects are rigid. This lets us introduce an approach to sampling positive object regions from the entire visible object area during training, instead of naively drawing samples from the bounding box center where the object might be occluded. As such, every visible object part can contribute to the final bounding box prediction, yielding better detection robustness. Key to the success of our approach is a visibility map, which we propose to build using a minimum barrier distance between every pixel in the bounding box and the box boundary. Our results on seven challenging 6D pose estimation datasets evidence that our method outperforms general detection frameworks by a large margin. Furthermore, combined with a pose regression network, we obtain state-of-the-art pose estimation results on the challenging BOP benchmark.
summary: Most recent 6D object pose estimation methods first use object detection to obtain 2D bounding boxes before actually regressing the pose. However, the general object detection methods they use are ill-suited to handle cluttered scenes, thus producing poor initialization to the subsequent pose network. To address this, we propose a rigidity-aware detection method exploiting the fact that, in 6D pose estimation, the target objects are rigid. This lets us introduce an approach to sampling positive object regions from the entire visible object area during training, instead of naively drawing samples from the bounding box center where the object might be occluded. As such, every visible object part can contribute to the final bounding box prediction, yielding better detection robustness. Key to the success of our approach is a visibility map, which we propose to build using a minimum barrier distance between every pixel in the bounding box and the box boundary. Our results on seven challenging 6D pose estimation datasets evidence that our method outperforms general detection frameworks by a large margin. Furthermore, combined with a pose regression network, we obtain state-of-the-art pose estimation results on the challenging BOP benchmark.
abstract_zh: 最近的 6D 对象姿态估计方法首先使用对象检测来获取 2D 边界框，然后再实际回归姿态。然而，他们使用的一般对象检测方法不适合处理杂乱的场景，从而导致后续姿态网络的初始化效果不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种刚性感知检测方法，利用了 6D 姿态估计中目标物体是刚性的这一事实。这让我们引入了一种在训练期间从整个可见对象区域中采样正对象区域的方法，而不是天真地从对象可能被遮挡的边界框中心抽取样本。因此，每个可见对象部分都可以对最终的边界框预测做出贡献，从而产生更好的检测鲁棒性。我们的方法成功的关键是可见性图，我们建议使用边界框和框边界中每个像素之间的最小障碍距离来构建可见性图。我们在七个具有挑战性的 6D 姿态估计数据集上的结果证明我们的方法大大优于一般检测框架。此外，结合姿态回归网络，我们在具有挑战性的 BOP 基准上获得了最先进的姿态估计结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于6D物体姿态估计的刚性感知检测方法，以提高在杂乱场景下的检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的6D物体姿态估计方法在使用通用目标检测方法获取2D边界框时，难以应对杂乱场景，导致姿态回归网络初始化效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于物体刚性的检测方法，利用物体的刚性特征，在训练过程中从整个可见物体区域中采样正样本，而不是仅仅从边界框中心采样。同时，提出了一个可见性图，利用边界框内每个像素到边界框边界的最小屏障距离构建。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在七个具有挑战性的6D姿态估计数据集上显著优于通用检测框架，并在BOP基准测试中取得了最先进的姿态估计结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的刚性感知检测方法有效提升了6D物体姿态估计在复杂场景下的检测鲁棒性，并在多个基准测试中表现优异。

ai_content_json.method: 本文提出了一种基于物体刚性的检测方法，利用物体的刚性特征，在训练过程中从整个可见物体区域中采样正样本，而不是仅仅从边界框中心采样。同时，提出了一个可见性图，利用边界框内每个像素到边界框边界的最小屏障距离构建。
ai_content_json.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在七个具有挑战性的6D姿态估计数据集上显著优于通用检测框架，并在BOP基准测试中取得了最先进的姿态估计结果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的刚性感知检测方法有效提升了6D物体姿态估计在复杂场景下的检测鲁棒性，并在多个基准测试中表现优异。

search_text: Rigidity-Aware Detection for 6D Object Pose Estimation 用于 6D 物体姿态估计的刚度感知检测 Most recent 6D object pose estimation methods first use object detection to obtain 2D bounding boxes before actually regressing the pose. However, the general object detection methods they use are ill-suited to handle cluttered scenes, thus producing poor initialization to the subsequent pose network. To address this, we propose a rigidity-aware detection method exploiting the fact that, in 6D pose estimation, the target objects are rigid. This lets us introduce an approach to sampling positive object regions from the entire visible object area during training, instead of naively drawing samples from the bounding box center where the object might be occluded. As such, every visible object part can contribute to the final bounding box prediction, yielding better detection robustness. Key to the success of our approach is a visibility map, which we propose to build using a minimum barrier distance between every pixel in the bounding box and the box boundary. Our results on seven challenging 6D pose estimation datasets evidence that our method outperforms general detection frameworks by a large margin. Furthermore, combined with a pose regression network, we obtain state-of-the-art pose estimation results on the challenging BOP benchmark. 最近的 6D 对象姿态估计方法首先使用对象检测来获取 2D 边界框，然后再实际回归姿态。然而，他们使用的一般对象检测方法不适合处理杂乱的场景，从而导致后续姿态网络的初始化效果不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种刚性感知检测方法，利用了 6D 姿态估计中目标物体是刚性的这一事实。这让我们引入了一种在训练期间从整个可见对象区域中采样正对象区域的方法，而不是天真地从对象可能被遮挡的边界框中心抽取样本。因此，每个可见对象部分都可以对最终的边界框预测做出贡献，从而产生更好的检测鲁棒性。我们的方法成功的关键是可见性图，我们建议使用边界框和框边界中每个像素之间的最小障碍距离来构建可见性图。我们在七个具有挑战性的 6D 姿态估计数据集上的结果证明我们的方法大大优于一般检测框架。此外，结合姿态回归网络，我们在具有挑战性的 BOP 基准上获得了最先进的姿态估计结果。 本文提出了一种用于6D物体姿态估计的刚性感知检测方法，以提高在杂乱场景下的检测鲁棒性。 Yang Hai,Rui Song,Jiaojiao Li,Mathieu Salzmann,Yinlin Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Arham Muslim,Mohamed Amine Chatti,Mouadh Guesmi
title: Open Learning Analytics: A Systematic Literature Review and Future Perspectives
title_zh: 开放学习分析：系统文献综述和未来展望
comment: n N. Pinkwart & S. Liu (Eds.), Artificial Intelligence Supported Educational Technologies (pp. 3-29). Cham: Springer
comments: n N. Pinkwart & S. Liu (Eds.), Artificial Intelligence Supported Educational Technologies (pp. 3-29). Cham: Springer
abstract: Open Learning Analytics (OLA) is an emerging research area that aims at improving learning efficiency and effectiveness in lifelong learning environments. OLA employs multiple methods to draw value from a wide range of educational data coming from various learning environments and contexts in order to gain insight into the learning processes of different stakeholders. As the research field is still relatively young, only a few technical platforms are available and a common understanding of requirements is lacking. This paper provides a systematic literature review of tools available in the learning analytics literature from 2011-2019 with an eye on their support for openness. 137 tools from nine academic databases are collected to form the base for this review. The analysis of selected tools is performed based on four dimensions, namely 'Data, Environments, Context (What?)', 'Stakeholders (Who?)', 'Objectives (Why?)', and 'Methods (How?)'. Moreover, five well-known OLA frameworks available in the community are systematically compared. The review concludes by eliciting the main requirements for an effective OLA platform and by identifying key challenges and future lines of work in this emerging field.
summary: Open Learning Analytics (OLA) is an emerging research area that aims at improving learning efficiency and effectiveness in lifelong learning environments. OLA employs multiple methods to draw value from a wide range of educational data coming from various learning environments and contexts in order to gain insight into the learning processes of different stakeholders. As the research field is still relatively young, only a few technical platforms are available and a common understanding of requirements is lacking. This paper provides a systematic literature review of tools available in the learning analytics literature from 2011-2019 with an eye on their support for openness. 137 tools from nine academic databases are collected to form the base for this review. The analysis of selected tools is performed based on four dimensions, namely 'Data, Environments, Context (What?)', 'Stakeholders (Who?)', 'Objectives (Why?)', and 'Methods (How?)'. Moreover, five well-known OLA frameworks available in the community are systematically compared. The review concludes by eliciting the main requirements for an effective OLA platform and by identifying key challenges and future lines of work in this emerging field.
abstract_zh: 开放学习分析（OLA）是一个新兴的研究领域，旨在提高终身学习环境中的学习效率和有效性。 OLA采用多种方法从来自不同学习环境和背景的广泛教育数据中获取价值，以深入了解不同利益相关者的学习过程。由于该研究领域还相对年轻，可用的技术平台较少，缺乏对需求的共同理解。本文对 2011 年至 2019 年学习分析文献中可用的工具进行了系统的文献综述，着眼于它们对开放性的支持。收集了来自 9 个学术数据库的 137 个工具，作为本次审查的基础。对所选工具的分析是基于四个维度进行的，即“数据、环境、背景（什么？）”、“利益相关者（谁？）”、“目标（为什么？）”和“方法（如何？）”。此外，系统地比较了社区中可用的五个著名的 OLA 框架。审查最后提出了有效 OLA 平台的主要要求，并确定了这一新兴领域的主要挑战和未来工作方向。

AI.tldr: 对开放学习分析（OLA）工具进行系统文献综述，分析其支持开放性的特点，并探讨未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 填补OLA领域研究空白，明确有效平台的需求与挑战，推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述方法，收集并分析2011-2019年间九个数据库的137个工具，基于四个维度及五个框架进行比较。
AI.result: 明确了有效OLA平台的核心需求，识别出关键挑战及未来研究方向，如数据隐私、跨环境兼容性等。
AI.conclusion: 当前OLA领域缺乏统一标准和技术平台，需加强跨学科合作与标准化建设以促进其发展。

authors_text: Qianxiong Xu,Cheng Long,Liang Yu,Chen Zhang
title: Road Extraction with Satellite Images and Partial Road Maps
title_zh: 利用卫星图像和部分道路图提取道路
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
abstract: Road extraction is a process of automatically generating road maps mainly from satellite images. Existing models all target to generate roads from the scratch despite that a large quantity of road maps, though incomplete, are publicly available (e.g. those from OpenStreetMap) and can help with road extraction. In this paper, we propose to conduct road extraction based on satellite images and partial road maps, which is new. We then propose a two-branch Partial to Complete Network (P2CNet) for the task, which has two prominent components: Gated Self-Attention Module (GSAM) and Missing Part (MP) loss. GSAM leverages a channel-wise self-attention module and a gate module to capture long-range semantics, filter out useless information, and better fuse the features from two branches. MP loss is derived from the partial road maps, trying to give more attention to the road pixels that do not exist in partial road maps. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, e.g. P2CNet achieves state-of-the-art performance with the IoU scores of 70.71% and 75.52%, respectively, on the SpaceNet and OSM datasets.
summary: Road extraction is a process of automatically generating road maps mainly from satellite images. Existing models all target to generate roads from the scratch despite that a large quantity of road maps, though incomplete, are publicly available (e.g. those from OpenStreetMap) and can help with road extraction. In this paper, we propose to conduct road extraction based on satellite images and partial road maps, which is new. We then propose a two-branch Partial to Complete Network (P2CNet) for the task, which has two prominent components: Gated Self-Attention Module (GSAM) and Missing Part (MP) loss. GSAM leverages a channel-wise self-attention module and a gate module to capture long-range semantics, filter out useless information, and better fuse the features from two branches. MP loss is derived from the partial road maps, trying to give more attention to the road pixels that do not exist in partial road maps. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, e.g. P2CNet achieves state-of-the-art performance with the IoU scores of 70.71% and 75.52%, respectively, on the SpaceNet and OSM datasets.
abstract_zh: 道路提取是主要根据卫星图像自动生成道路地图的过程。现有模型的目标都是从头开始生成道路，尽管大量道路地图虽然不完整，但却是公开可用的（例如来自 OpenStreetMap 的地图）并且可以帮助道路提取。在本文中，我们提出基于卫星图像和部分道路地图进行道路提取，这是一种新颖的方法。然后，我们为该任务提出了一个两分支部分到完整网络（P2CNet），它有两个突出的组成部分：门控自注意力模块（GSAM）和缺失部分（MP）损失。 GSAM 利用通道自注意力模块和门模块来捕获远程语义，过滤掉无用信息，并更好地融合两个分支的特征。 MP损失是从部分道路地图中推导出来的，试图更多地关注部分道路地图中不存在的道路像素。进行了大量的实验来证明我们模型的有效性，例如P2CNet 在 SpaceNet 和 OSM 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，IoU 分数分别为 70.71% 和 75.52%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卫星图像与部分道路图进行道路提取的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有模型均从头生成道路图，未利用已有的不完整公开道路图（如OpenStreetMap），而这些数据可辅助提升提取效果。
AI.method: 提出双分支P2CNet网络，包含通道级自注意力模块与门控模块（GSAM）以融合特征，并设计基于部分地图缺失区域的MP损失函数。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet和OSM数据集上分别达到70.71%和75.52%的IoU，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验验证了方法的有效性，结合部分道路图信息可显著提升道路提取性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 实验验证了方法的有效性，结合部分道路图信息可显著提升道路提取性能。

authors_text: William Hunt,Jack Ryan,Ayodeji O. Abioye,Sarvapali D. Ramchurn,Mohammad D. Soorati
title: Demonstrating Performance Benefits of Human-Swarm Teaming
title_zh: 展示人类群体协作的性能优势
comment: 3 Pages, 2 Figures, Accepted to AAMAS 2023 Demo tack
comments: 3 Pages, 2 Figures, Accepted to AAMAS 2023 Demo tack
abstract: Autonomous swarms of robots can bring robustness, scalability and adaptability to safety-critical tasks such as search and rescue but their application is still very limited. Using semi-autonomous swarms with human control can bring robot swarms to real-world applications. Human operators can define goals for the swarm, monitor their performance and interfere with, or overrule, the decisions and behaviour. We present the ``Human And Robot Interactive Swarm'' simulator (HARIS) that allows multi-user interaction with a robot swarm and facilitates qualitative and quantitative user studies through simulation of robot swarms completing tasks, from package delivery to search and rescue, with varying levels of human control. In this demonstration, we showcase the simulator by using it to study the performance gain offered by maintaining a ``human-in-the-loop'' over a fully autonomous system as an example. This is illustrated in the context of search and rescue, with an autonomous allocation of resources to those in need.
summary: Autonomous swarms of robots can bring robustness, scalability and adaptability to safety-critical tasks such as search and rescue but their application is still very limited. Using semi-autonomous swarms with human control can bring robot swarms to real-world applications. Human operators can define goals for the swarm, monitor their performance and interfere with, or overrule, the decisions and behaviour. We present the ``Human And Robot Interactive Swarm'' simulator (HARIS) that allows multi-user interaction with a robot swarm and facilitates qualitative and quantitative user studies through simulation of robot swarms completing tasks, from package delivery to search and rescue, with varying levels of human control. In this demonstration, we showcase the simulator by using it to study the performance gain offered by maintaining a ``human-in-the-loop'' over a fully autonomous system as an example. This is illustrated in the context of search and rescue, with an autonomous allocation of resources to those in need.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人群可以为搜索和救援等安全关键任务带来鲁棒性、可扩展性和适应性，但它​​们的应用仍然非常有限。使用具有人类控制的半自主群体可以将机器人群体带入现实世界的应用。人类操作员可以为群体定义目标，监控其表现并干扰或否决决策和行为。我们推出了“人机交互群”模拟器（HARIS），它允许多用户与机器人群交互，并通过模拟机器人群完成任务（从包裹递送到搜索和救援）以及不同程度的人类控制来促进定性和定量用户研究。在本次演示中，我们展示了模拟器，通过使用它来研究通过在完全自治系统上维护“人机交互”所提供的性能增益作为示例。这在搜索和救援的背景下得到了说明，即向有需要的人自主分配资源。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了HARIS模拟器，用于研究人类与机器人群体协作在搜索救援等任务中的性能优势。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人群体在安全关键任务中应用受限，需通过人类控制增强其实际应用能力。
AI.method: 构建多用户交互模拟器HARIS，模拟不同人类控制水平下机器人群体完成任务的场景。
AI.result: 实验表明，在搜索救援任务中人类参与的混合系统相比全自主系统能更高效分配资源。
AI.conclusion: 人类与机器人群体协作可显著提升复杂任务性能，HARIS为相关研究提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Mohamed Amine Chatti,Volkan Yücepur,Arham Muslim,Mouadh Guesmi,Shoeb Joarder
title: Designing Theory-Driven Analytics-Enhanced Self-Regulated Learning Applications
title_zh: 设计理论驱动的分析增强型自我调节学习应用程序
comment: In: Sahin M., Ifenthaler D. (eds) Visualizations and Dashboards for Learning Analytics. Advances in Analytics for Learning and Teaching (pp. 47-68). Springer, Cham
comments: In: Sahin M., Ifenthaler D. (eds) Visualizations and Dashboards for Learning Analytics. Advances in Analytics for Learning and Teaching (pp. 47-68). Springer, Cham
abstract: There is an increased interest in the application of learning analytics (LA) to promote self-regulated learning (SRL). A variety of LA dashboards and indicators were proposed to support different crucial SRL processes, such as planning, awareness, self-reflection, self-monitoring, and feedback. However, the design of these dashboards and indicators is often without reference to theories in learning science, human-computer interaction (HCI), and information visualization (InfoVis). Moreover, there is a lack of theoretically sound frameworks to guide the systematic design and development of LA dashboards and indicators to scaffold SRL. This chapter seeks to explore theoretical underpinnings of the design of LA-enhanced SRL applications, drawing from the fields of learning science, HCI, and InfoVis. We first present the Student-Centered Learning Analytics-enhanced Self-Regulated Learning (SCLA-SRL) methodology for building theory-driven LA-enhanced SRL applications for and with learners. We then put this methodology into practice by designing and developing LA indicators to support novice programmers' SRL in a higher education context.
summary: There is an increased interest in the application of learning analytics (LA) to promote self-regulated learning (SRL). A variety of LA dashboards and indicators were proposed to support different crucial SRL processes, such as planning, awareness, self-reflection, self-monitoring, and feedback. However, the design of these dashboards and indicators is often without reference to theories in learning science, human-computer interaction (HCI), and information visualization (InfoVis). Moreover, there is a lack of theoretically sound frameworks to guide the systematic design and development of LA dashboards and indicators to scaffold SRL. This chapter seeks to explore theoretical underpinnings of the design of LA-enhanced SRL applications, drawing from the fields of learning science, HCI, and InfoVis. We first present the Student-Centered Learning Analytics-enhanced Self-Regulated Learning (SCLA-SRL) methodology for building theory-driven LA-enhanced SRL applications for and with learners. We then put this methodology into practice by designing and developing LA indicators to support novice programmers' SRL in a higher education context.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越关注应用学习分析 (LA) 来促进自我调节学习 (SRL)。提出了各种 LA 仪表板和指标来支持不同的关键 SRL 流程，例如规划、意识、自我反思、自我监控和反馈。然而，这些仪表板和指标的设计往往没有参考学习科学、人机交互（HCI）和信息可视化（InfoVis）等理论。此外，缺乏理论上合理的框架来指导 LA 仪表板和指标的系统设计和开发，以支撑 SRL。本章旨在借鉴学习科学、HCI 和 InfoVis 领域的知识，探索 LA 增强型 SRL 应用程序设计的理论基础。我们首先提出以学生为中心的学习分析增强型自我调节学习 (SCLA-SRL) 方法，用于为学习者并与学习者一起构建理论驱动的 LA 增强型 SRL 应用程序。然后，我们通过设计和开发 LA 指标来将该方法付诸实践，以支持新手程序员在高等教育环境中的 SRL。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计基于理论的学习分析增强型自我调节学习（SRL）应用，结合学习科学、人机交互和信息可视化理论。
AI.motivation: 现有学习分析仪表板和指标缺乏理论支持，难以系统指导SRL过程的设计与开发。
AI.method: 提出SCLA-SRL方法论，结合学习科学、HCI和InfoVis理论，设计支持新手程序员SRL的LA指标。
AI.result: 成功开发出基于理论框架的LA指标，有效支持高等教育中新手程序员的自我调节学习过程。
AI.conclusion: 理论驱动的SCLA-SRL框架为LA增强型SRL应用的设计提供了系统化指导，提升了学习效果。

authors_text: Jiuming Liu,Guangming Wang,Zhe Liu,Chaokang Jiang,Marc Pollefeys,Hesheng Wang
title: RegFormer: An Efficient Projection-Aware Transformer Network for Large-Scale Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: RegFormer：用于大规模点云配准的高效投影感知变压器网络
comment: Accepted by ICCV2023. Codes are released at https://github.com/IRMVLab/RegFormer
comments: Accepted by ICCV2023. Codes are released at https://github.com/IRMVLab/RegFormer
abstract: Although point cloud registration has achieved remarkable advances in object-level and indoor scenes, large-scale registration methods are rarely explored. Challenges mainly arise from the huge point number, complex distribution, and outliers of outdoor LiDAR scans. In addition, most existing registration works generally adopt a two-stage paradigm: They first find correspondences by extracting discriminative local features and then leverage estimators (eg. RANSAC) to filter outliers, which are highly dependent on well-designed descriptors and post-processing choices. To address these problems, we propose an end-to-end transformer network (RegFormer) for large-scale point cloud alignment without any further post-processing. Specifically, a projection-aware hierarchical transformer is proposed to capture long-range dependencies and filter outliers by extracting point features globally. Our transformer has linear complexity, which guarantees high efficiency even for large-scale scenes. Furthermore, to effectively reduce mismatches, a bijective association transformer is designed for regressing the initial transformation. Extensive experiments on KITTI and NuScenes datasets demonstrate that our RegFormer achieves competitive performance in terms of both accuracy and efficiency.
summary: Although point cloud registration has achieved remarkable advances in object-level and indoor scenes, large-scale registration methods are rarely explored. Challenges mainly arise from the huge point number, complex distribution, and outliers of outdoor LiDAR scans. In addition, most existing registration works generally adopt a two-stage paradigm: They first find correspondences by extracting discriminative local features and then leverage estimators (eg. RANSAC) to filter outliers, which are highly dependent on well-designed descriptors and post-processing choices. To address these problems, we propose an end-to-end transformer network (RegFormer) for large-scale point cloud alignment without any further post-processing. Specifically, a projection-aware hierarchical transformer is proposed to capture long-range dependencies and filter outliers by extracting point features globally. Our transformer has linear complexity, which guarantees high efficiency even for large-scale scenes. Furthermore, to effectively reduce mismatches, a bijective association transformer is designed for regressing the initial transformation. Extensive experiments on KITTI and NuScenes datasets demonstrate that our RegFormer achieves competitive performance in terms of both accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尽管点云配准在物体级和室内场景中取得了显着的进步，但大规模的配准方法却很少被探索。挑战主要来自室外激光雷达扫描点数量庞大、分布复杂、异常值多等问题。此外，大多数现有的配准工作通常采用两阶段范式：首先通过提取有区别的局部特征来找到对应关系，然后利用估计器（例如RANSAC）来过滤异常值，这高度依赖于精心设计的描述符和后处理选择。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于大规模点云对齐的端到端变压器网络（RegFormer），无需任何进一步的后处理。具体来说，提出了一种投影感知分层变压器，通过全局提取点特征来捕获长程依赖性并过滤异常值。我们的变压器具有线性复杂度，即使对于大规模场景也能保证高效率。此外，为了有效减少失配，设计了双射关联变换器来对初始变换进行回归。对 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 RegFormer 在准确性和效率方面都实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出RegFormer网络解决大规模点云配准问题，提升准确率与效率
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖两阶段流程和后处理，存在效率低、依赖性强的问题，需更高效端到端方法
AI.method: 提出投影感知分层Transformer捕捉长程依赖，结合双射关联Transformer回归初始变换，实现线性复杂度
AI.result: 在KITTI和NuScenes数据集上，RegFormer在准确率和效率方面均表现优异
AI.conclusion: RegFormer通过端到端设计有效解决大规模点云配准问题，为后续研究提供新方向
