To address these problems, we propose an end-to-end transformer network (RegFormer) for large-scale point cloud alignment without any further post-processing. Specifically, a projection-aware hierarchical transformer is proposed to capture long-range dependencies and filter outliers by extracting point features globally. Our transformer has linear complexity, which guarantees high efficiency even for large-scale scenes. Furthermore, to effectively reduce mismatches, a bijective association transformer is designed for regressing the initial transformation. Extensive experiments on KITTI and NuScenes datasets demonstrate that our RegFormer achieves competitive performance in terms of both accuracy and efficiency. 尽管点云配准在物体级和室内场景中取得了显着的进步，但大规模的配准方法却很少被探索。挑战主要来自室外激光雷达扫描点数量庞大、分布复杂、异常值多等问题。此外，大多数现有的配准工作通常采用两阶段范式：首先通过提取有区别的局部特征来找到对应关系，然后利用估计器（例如RANSAC）来过滤异常值，这高度依赖于精心设计的描述符和后处理选择。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于大规模点云对齐的端到端变压器网络（RegFormer），无需任何进一步的后处理。具体来说，提出了一种投影感知分层变压器，通过全局提取点特征来捕获长程依赖性并过滤异常值。我们的变压器具有线性复杂度，即使对于大规模场景也能保证高效率。此外，为了有效减少失配，设计了双射关联变换器来对初始变换进行回归。对 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 RegFormer 在准确性和效率方面都实现了具有竞争力的性能。 提出RegFormer网络解决大规模点云配准问题，提升准确率与效率 Jiuming Liu,Guangming Wang,Zhe Liu,Chaokang Jiang,Marc Pollefeys,Hesheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yi-Shan Lee,Wei-Cheng Tseng,Fu-En Wang,Min Sun
title: VMCML: Video and Music Matching via Cross-Modality Lifting
title_zh: VMCML：通过跨模态提升进行视频和音乐匹配
abstract: We propose a content-based system for matching video and background music. The system aims to address the challenges in music recommendation for new users or new music give short-form videos. To this end, we propose a cross-modal framework VMCML that finds a shared embedding space between video and music representations. To ensure the embedding space can be effectively shared by both representations, we leverage CosFace loss based on margin-based cosine similarity loss. Furthermore, we establish a large-scale dataset called MSVD, in which we provide 390 individual music and the corresponding matched 150,000 videos. We conduct extensive experiments on Youtube-8M and our MSVD datasets. Our quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework and achieve state-of-the-art video and music matching performance.
summary: We propose a content-based system for matching video and background music. The system aims to address the challenges in music recommendation for new users or new music give short-form videos. To this end, we propose a cross-modal framework VMCML that finds a shared embedding space between video and music representations. To ensure the embedding space can be effectively shared by both representations, we leverage CosFace loss based on margin-based cosine similarity loss. Furthermore, we establish a large-scale dataset called MSVD, in which we provide 390 individual music and the corresponding matched 150,000 videos. We conduct extensive experiments on Youtube-8M and our MSVD datasets. Our quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework and achieve state-of-the-art video and music matching performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于内容的系统来匹配视频和背景音乐。该系统旨在解决新用户音乐推荐或新音乐短视频推荐的挑战。为此，我们提出了一个跨模式框架 VMCML，它可以在视频和音乐表示之间找到共享的嵌入空间。为了确保两种表示可以有效共享嵌入空间，我们利用基于边距的余弦相似度损失的 CosFace 损失。此外，我们建立了一个名为 MSVD 的大规模数据集，其中提供了 390 首单独的音乐和相应的匹配的 150,000 个视频。我们在 Youtube-8M 和 MSVD 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们的定量和定性结果证明了我们提出的框架的有效性，并实现了最先进的视频和音乐匹配性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内容的视频与背景音乐匹配系统，通过跨模态框架VMCML解决短视频中音乐推荐的挑战。
AI.motivation: 针对新用户或新音乐在短视频平台中缺乏有效推荐机制的问题，需建立跨模态理解能力以实现精准匹配。
AI.method: 设计跨模态嵌入空间框架VMCML，采用CosFace损失函数优化视频与音乐表示的共享空间，并构建包含390首音乐及15万匹配视频的MSVD数据集。
AI.result: 在Youtube-8M和MSVD数据集上的实验表明，该方法在视频音乐匹配任务中达到最先进水平，定量与定性结果均验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VMCML框架通过跨模态表征学习有效解决了视频与音乐匹配问题，为短视频音乐推荐系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hirotaka Tahara,Hikaru Sasaki,Hanbit Oh,Edgar Anarossi,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Disturbance Injection under Partial Automation: Robust Imitation Learning for Long-horizon Tasks
title_zh: 部分自动化下的干扰注入：长期任务的鲁棒模仿学习
comment: 8 pages, Accepted by Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2023
comments: 8 pages, Accepted by Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2023
abstract: Partial Automation (PA) with intelligent support systems has been introduced in industrial machinery and advanced automobiles to reduce the burden of long hours of human operation. Under PA, operators perform manual operations (providing actions) and operations that switch to automatic/manual mode (mode-switching). Since PA reduces the total duration of manual operation, these two action and mode-switching operations can be replicated by imitation learning with high sample efficiency. To this end, this paper proposes Disturbance Injection under Partial Automation (DIPA) as a novel imitation learning framework. In DIPA, mode and actions (in the manual mode) are assumed to be observables in each state and are used to learn both action and mode-switching policies. The above learning is robustified by injecting disturbances into the operator's actions to optimize the disturbance's level for minimizing the covariate shift under PA. We experimentally validated the effectiveness of our method for long-horizon tasks in two simulations and a real robot environment and confirmed that our method outperformed the previous methods and reduced the demonstration burden.
summary: Partial Automation (PA) with intelligent support systems has been introduced in industrial machinery and advanced automobiles to reduce the burden of long hours of human operation. Under PA, operators perform manual operations (providing actions) and operations that switch to automatic/manual mode (mode-switching). Since PA reduces the total duration of manual operation, these two action and mode-switching operations can be replicated by imitation learning with high sample efficiency. To this end, this paper proposes Disturbance Injection under Partial Automation (DIPA) as a novel imitation learning framework. In DIPA, mode and actions (in the manual mode) are assumed to be observables in each state and are used to learn both action and mode-switching policies. The above learning is robustified by injecting disturbances into the operator's actions to optimize the disturbance's level for minimizing the covariate shift under PA. We experimentally validated the effectiveness of our method for long-horizon tasks in two simulations and a real robot environment and confirmed that our method outperformed the previous methods and reduced the demonstration burden.
abstract_zh: 具有智能支持系统的部分自动化（PA）已被引入工业机械和先进汽车中，以减轻人类长时间操作的负担。在PA下，操作员执行手动操作（提供动作）和切换到自动/手动模式的操作（模式切换）。由于PA减少了手动操作的总持续时间，这两个动作和模式切换操作可以通过模仿学习来复制，样本效率很高。为此，本文提出部分自动化下的干扰注入（DIPA）作为一种新颖的模仿学习框架。在 DIPA 中，模式和操作（在手动模式下）被假定为每个状态中的可观察值，并用于学习操作和模式切换策略。通过将干扰注入到操作员的动作中来优化干扰水平，从而最小化 PA 下的协变量偏移，从而增强上述学习。我们在两次模拟和真实的机器人环境中通过实验验证了我们的方法对于长视野任务的有效性，并证实我们的方法优于以前的方法并减少了演示负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIPA的新型模仿学习框架，用于在部分自动化（PA）环境下实现长期任务的鲁棒操作，通过注入干扰优化协变量偏移。
AI.motivation: 部分自动化系统减少了人工操作时间，但模仿学习面临协变量偏移问题，需通过干扰注入提升鲁棒性以适应长期任务。
AI.method: DIPA框架将模式和动作作为可观测状态，通过注入干扰优化操作员动作，同时学习动作与模式切换策略以最小化协变量偏移。
AI.result: 在两个仿真和一个真实机器人环境中验证了DIPA的有效性，表明其优于现有方法并减少了演示负担。
AI.conclusion: DIPA通过干扰注入和策略联合学习，在部分自动化长期任务中实现了更鲁棒的模仿学习，降低了人工操作需求。

Under PA, operators perform manual operations (providing actions) and operations that switch to automatic/manual mode (mode-switching). Since PA reduces the total duration of manual operation, these two action and mode-switching operations can be replicated by imitation learning with high sample efficiency. To this end, this paper proposes Disturbance Injection under Partial Automation (DIPA) as a novel imitation learning framework. In DIPA, mode and actions (in the manual mode) are assumed to be observables in each state and are used to learn both action and mode-switching policies. The above learning is robustified by injecting disturbances into the operator's actions to optimize the disturbance's level for minimizing the covariate shift under PA. We experimentally validated the effectiveness of our method for long-horizon tasks in two simulations and a real robot environment and confirmed that our method outperformed the previous methods and reduced the demonstration burden. 具有智能支持系统的部分自动化（PA）已被引入工业机械和先进汽车中，以减轻人类长时间操作的负担。在PA下，操作员执行手动操作（提供动作）和切换到自动/手动模式的操作（模式切换）。由于PA减少了手动操作的总持续时间，这两个动作和模式切换操作可以通过模仿学习来复制，样本效率很高。为此，本文提出部分自动化下的干扰注入（DIPA）作为一种新颖的模仿学习框架。在 DIPA 中，模式和操作（在手动模式下）被假定为每个状态中的可观察值，并用于学习操作和模式切换策略。通过将干扰注入到操作员的动作中来优化干扰水平，从而最小化 PA 下的协变量偏移，从而增强上述学习。我们在两次模拟和真实的机器人环境中通过实验验证了我们的方法对于长视野任务的有效性，并证实我们的方法优于以前的方法并减少了演示负担。 本文提出了一种名为DIPA的新型模仿学习框架，用于在部分自动化（PA）环境下实现长期任务的鲁棒操作，通过注入干扰优化协变量偏移。 Hirotaka Tahara,Hikaru Sasaki,Hanbit Oh,Edgar Anarossi,Takamitsu Matsubara cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Guoliang You,Xiaomeng Chu,Yifan Duan,Jie Peng,Jianmin Ji,Yu Zhang,Yanyong Zhang
title: $P^{3}O$: Transferring Visual Representations for Reinforcement Learning via Prompting
title_zh: $P^{3}O$：通过提示传输强化学习的视觉表示
comment: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the upcoming IEEE International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) in 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the upcoming IEEE International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) in 2023
abstract: It is important for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms to transfer their learned policies to new environments that have different visual inputs. In this paper, we introduce Prompt based Proximal Policy Optimization ($P^{3}O$), a three-stage DRL algorithm that transfers visual representations from a target to a source environment by applying prompting. The process of $P^{3}O$ consists of three stages: pre-training, prompting, and predicting. In particular, we specify a prompt-transformer for representation conversion and propose a two-step training process to train the prompt-transformer for the target environment, while the rest of the DRL pipeline remains unchanged. We implement $P^{3}O$ and evaluate it on the OpenAI CarRacing video game. The experimental results show that $P^{3}O$ outperforms the state-of-the-art visual transferring schemes. In particular, $P^{3}O$ allows the learned policies to perform well in environments with different visual inputs, which is much more effective than retraining the policies in these environments.
summary: It is important for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms to transfer their learned policies to new environments that have different visual inputs. In this paper, we introduce Prompt based Proximal Policy Optimization ($P^{3}O$), a three-stage DRL algorithm that transfers visual representations from a target to a source environment by applying prompting. The process of $P^{3}O$ consists of three stages: pre-training, prompting, and predicting. In particular, we specify a prompt-transformer for representation conversion and propose a two-step training process to train the prompt-transformer for the target environment, while the rest of the DRL pipeline remains unchanged. We implement $P^{3}O$ and evaluate it on the OpenAI CarRacing video game. The experimental results show that $P^{3}O$ outperforms the state-of-the-art visual transferring schemes. In particular, $P^{3}O$ allows the learned policies to perform well in environments with different visual inputs, which is much more effective than retraining the policies in these environments.
abstract_zh: 对于深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法来说，将其学到的策略转移到具有不同视觉输入的新环境中非常重要。在本文中，我们介绍了基于提示的近端策略优化（$P^{3}O$），这是一种三阶段 DRL 算法，通过应用提示将视觉表示从目标环境传输到源环境。 $P^{3}O$的过程由三个阶段组成：预训练、提示、预测。特别是，我们指定了一个用于表示转换的提示变换器，并提出了一个两步训练过程来为目标环境训练提示变换器，而 DRL 管道的其余部分保持不变。我们实现了 $P^{3}O$ 并在 OpenAI CarRacing 视频游戏上对其进行了评估。实验结果表明，$P^{3}O$ 优于最先进的视觉传输方案。特别是，$P^{3}O$ 允许学习的策略在具有不同视觉输入的环境中表现良好，这比在这些环境中重新训练策略要有效得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示的近端策略优化算法（$P^{3}O$），通过三阶段流程实现视觉表征在不同环境间的迁移，提升深度强化学习的策略适应性。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习策略在面对视觉输入差异较大的新环境时，需重新训练导致效率低下，亟需高效的视觉表征迁移方法。
AI.method: 设计三阶段流程（预训练、提示、预测），引入提示转换器（prompt-transformer）进行表征转换，并通过两阶段训练优化目标环境适配性，保留原有DRL框架其余部分。
AI.result: 在OpenAI CarRacing游戏中实验表明，$P^{3}O$优于现有视觉迁移方案，使策略在不同视觉输入环境中表现更优，无需重新训练即可实现有效迁移。
AI.conclusion: $P^{3}O$通过提示机制实现了高效的视觉表征迁移，为跨环境强化学习提供了新思路，验证了提示学习在DRL中的有效性。

search_text: $P^{3}O$: Transferring Visual Representations for Reinforcement Learning via Prompting $P^{3}O$：通过提示传输强化学习的视觉表示 It is important for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms to transfer their learned policies to new environments that have different visual inputs. In this paper, we introduce Prompt based Proximal Policy Optimization ($P^{3}O$), a three-stage DRL algorithm that transfers visual representations from a target to a source environment by applying prompting. The process of $P^{3}O$ consists of three stages: pre-training, prompting, and predicting. In particular, we specify a prompt-transformer for representation conversion and propose a two-step training process to train the prompt-transformer for the target environment, while the rest of the DRL pipeline remains unchanged. We implement $P^{3}O$ and evaluate it on the OpenAI CarRacing video game. The experimental results show that $P^{3}O$ outperforms the state-of-the-art visual transferring schemes. In particular, $P^{3}O$ allows the learned policies to perform well in environments with different visual inputs, which is much more effective than retraining the policies in these environments. 对于深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法来说，将其学到的策略转移到具有不同视觉输入的新环境中非常重要。在本文中，我们介绍了基于提示的近端策略优化（$P^{3}O$），这是一种三阶段 DRL 算法，通过应用提示将视觉表示从目标环境传输到源环境。 $P^{3}O$的过程由三个阶段组成：预训练、提示、预测。特别是，我们指定了一个用于表示转换的提示变换器，并提出了一个两步训练过程来为目标环境训练提示变换器，而 DRL 管道的其余部分保持不变。我们实现了 $P^{3}O$ 并在 OpenAI CarRacing 视频游戏上对其进行了评估。实验结果表明，$P^{3}O$ 优于最先进的视觉传输方案。特别是，$P^{3}O$ 允许学习的策略在具有不同视觉输入的环境中表现良好，这比在这些环境中重新训练策略要有效得多。 本文提出了一种基于提示的近端策略优化算法（$P^{3}O$），通过三阶段流程实现视觉表征在不同环境间的迁移，提升深度强化学习的策略适应性。 Guoliang You,Xiaomeng Chu,Yifan Duan,Jie Peng,Jianmin Ji,Yu Zhang,Yanyong Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sixun Dong,Huazhang Hu,Dongze Lian,Weixin Luo,Yicheng Qian,Shenghua Gao
title: Weakly Supervised Video Representation Learning with Unaligned Text for Sequential Videos
title_zh: 序列视频的未对齐文本的弱监督视频表示学习
comment: CVPR 2023. Code: https://github.com/svip-lab/WeakSVR
comments: CVPR 2023. Code: https://github.com/svip-lab/WeakSVR
abstract: Sequential video understanding, as an emerging video understanding task, has driven lots of researchers' attention because of its goal-oriented nature. This paper studies weakly supervised sequential video understanding where the accurate time-stamp level text-video alignment is not provided. We solve this task by borrowing ideas from CLIP. Specifically, we use a transformer to aggregate frame-level features for video representation and use a pre-trained text encoder to encode the texts corresponding to each action and the whole video, respectively. To model the correspondence between text and video, we propose a multiple granularity loss, where the video-paragraph contrastive loss enforces matching between the whole video and the complete script, and a fine-grained frame-sentence contrastive loss enforces the matching between each action and its description. As the frame-sentence correspondence is not available, we propose to use the fact that video actions happen sequentially in the temporal domain to generate pseudo frame-sentence correspondence and supervise the network training with the pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on video sequence verification and text-to-video matching show that our method outperforms baselines by a large margin, which validates the effectiveness of our proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/svip-lab/WeakSVR
summary: Sequential video understanding, as an emerging video understanding task, has driven lots of researchers' attention because of its goal-oriented nature. This paper studies weakly supervised sequential video understanding where the accurate time-stamp level text-video alignment is not provided. We solve this task by borrowing ideas from CLIP. Specifically, we use a transformer to aggregate frame-level features for video representation and use a pre-trained text encoder to encode the texts corresponding to each action and the whole video, respectively. To model the correspondence between text and video, we propose a multiple granularity loss, where the video-paragraph contrastive loss enforces matching between the whole video and the complete script, and a fine-grained frame-sentence contrastive loss enforces the matching between each action and its description. As the frame-sentence correspondence is not available, we propose to use the fact that video actions happen sequentially in the temporal domain to generate pseudo frame-sentence correspondence and supervise the network training with the pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on video sequence verification and text-to-video matching show that our method outperforms baselines by a large margin, which validates the effectiveness of our proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/svip-lab/WeakSVR
abstract_zh: 序列视频理解作为一种新兴的视频理解任务，因其目标导向的性质而引起了许多研究人员的关注。本文研究了弱监督序列视频理解，其中未提供准确的时间戳级别文本视频对齐。我们借用 CLIP 的想法来解决这个任务。具体来说，我们使用转换器来聚合视频表示的帧级特征，并使用预先训练的文本编码器分别对与每个动作和整个视频相对应的文本进行编码。为了对文本和视频之间的对应关系进行建模，我们提出了多粒度损失，其中视频段落对比损失强制整个视频和完整脚本之间的匹配，而细粒度帧句子对比损失强制每个动作与其描述之间的匹配。由于帧-句子对应关系不可用，我们建议利用视频动作在时域中顺序发生的事实来生成伪帧-句子对应关系，并用伪标签监督网络训练。关于视频序列验证和文本到视频匹配的大量实验表明，我们的方法大大优于基线，这验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/svip-lab/WeakSVR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱监督的序列视频理解任务，旨在在没有精确时间戳对齐的情况下，利用未对齐的文本进行视频表征学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确的文本-视频对齐信息，但在实际场景中此类标注往往难以获取，因此需要探索无需精确对齐的弱监督学习方法。
AI.method: 基于CLIP思想，使用Transformer聚合帧级特征，结合预训练文本编码器分别编码动作描述和完整视频文本。提出多粒度损失函数，包括视频-段落对比损失和帧-句子对比损失，并通过视频动作的时序性生成伪标签替代真实对齐数据。
AI.result: 在视频序列验证和文本-视频匹配任务中，该方法显著优于基线模型，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多粒度对比学习和伪标签生成，本文提出的方法有效解决了弱监督场景下序列视频理解的对齐难题。

authors_text: Hui Lv,Zhongqi Yue,Qianru Sun,Bin Luo,Zhen Cui,Hanwang Zhang
title: Unbiased Multiple Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督视频异常检测的无偏多实例学习
comment: 11 pages,10 figures
comments: 11 pages,10 figures
abstract: Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection (WSVAD) is challenging because the binary anomaly label is only given on the video level, but the output requires snippet-level predictions. So, Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is prevailing in WSVAD. However, MIL is notoriously known to suffer from many false alarms because the snippet-level detector is easily biased towards the abnormal snippets with simple context, confused by the normality with the same bias, and missing the anomaly with a different pattern. To this end, we propose a new MIL framework: Unbiased MIL (UMIL), to learn unbiased anomaly features that improve WSVAD. At each MIL training iteration, we use the current detector to divide the samples into two groups with different context biases: the most confident abnormal/normal snippets and the rest ambiguous ones. Then, by seeking the invariant features across the two sample groups, we can remove the variant context biases. Extensive experiments on benchmarks UCF-Crime and TAD demonstrate the effectiveness of our UMIL. Our code is provided at https://github.com/ktr-hubrt/UMIL.
summary: Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection (WSVAD) is challenging because the binary anomaly label is only given on the video level, but the output requires snippet-level predictions. So, Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is prevailing in WSVAD. However, MIL is notoriously known to suffer from many false alarms because the snippet-level detector is easily biased towards the abnormal snippets with simple context, confused by the normality with the same bias, and missing the anomaly with a different pattern. To this end, we propose a new MIL framework: Unbiased MIL (UMIL), to learn unbiased anomaly features that improve WSVAD. At each MIL training iteration, we use the current detector to divide the samples into two groups with different context biases: the most confident abnormal/normal snippets and the rest ambiguous ones. Then, by seeking the invariant features across the two sample groups, we can remove the variant context biases. Extensive experiments on benchmarks UCF-Crime and TAD demonstrate the effectiveness of our UMIL. Our code is provided at https://github.com/ktr-hubrt/UMIL.
abstract_zh: 弱监督视频异常检测（WSVAD）具有挑战性，因为二进制异常标签仅在视频级别给出，但输出需要片段级别预测。因此，多实例学习（MIL）在 WSVAD 中盛行。然而，众所周知，MIL 会遭受许多误报，因为片段级检测器很容易偏向于具有简单上下文的异常片段，被具有相同偏差的正态片段所迷惑，并错过具有不同模式的异常。为此，我们提出了一个新的 MIL 框架：Unbiased MIL (UMIL)，以学习改善 WSVAD 的无偏异常特征。在每次 MIL 训练迭代中，我们使用当前检测器将样本分为具有不同上下文偏差的两组：最置信的异常/正常片段和其余不明确的片段。然后，通过寻找两个样本组之间的不变特征，我们可以消除变量上下文偏差。对基准 UCF-Crime 和 TAD 进行的广泛实验证明了我们的 UMIL 的有效性。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ktr-hubrt/UMIL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出无偏多重实例学习（UMIL）框架，用于解决弱监督视频异常检测中因上下文偏差导致的误报问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多重实例学习（MIL）方法在弱监督视频异常检测中易受简单上下文异常片段干扰，导致正常片段与异常片段混淆或遗漏不同模式的异常。
AI.method: 通过每次训练迭代将样本分为两类（最自信的异常/正常片段和剩余模糊片段），并寻找跨组不变特征以消除上下文偏差。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime和TAD数据集上实验验证了UMIL的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: UMIL通过消除上下文偏差显著提升了弱监督视频异常检测性能，验证了其方法的有效性。

search_text: Unbiased Multiple Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection 用于弱监督视频异常检测的无偏多实例学习 Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection (WSVAD) is challenging because the binary anomaly label is only given on the video level, but the output requires snippet-level predictions. So, Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is prevailing in WSVAD. However, MIL is notoriously known to suffer from many false alarms because the snippet-level detector is easily biased towards the abnormal snippets with simple context, confused by the normality with the same bias, and missing the anomaly with a different pattern. To this end, we propose a new MIL framework: Unbiased MIL (UMIL), to learn unbiased anomaly features that improve WSVAD. At each MIL training iteration, we use the current detector to divide the samples into two groups with different context biases: the most confident abnormal/normal snippets and the rest ambiguous ones. Then, by seeking the invariant features across the two sample groups, we can remove the variant context biases. Extensive experiments on benchmarks UCF-Crime and TAD demonstrate the effectiveness of our UMIL. Our code is provided at https://github.com/ktr-hubrt/UMIL. 弱监督视频异常检测（WSVAD）具有挑战性，因为二进制异常标签仅在视频级别给出，但输出需要片段级别预测。因此，多实例学习（MIL）在 WSVAD 中盛行。然而，众所周知，MIL 会遭受许多误报，因为片段级检测器很容易偏向于具有简单上下文的异常片段，被具有相同偏差的正态片段所迷惑，并错过具有不同模式的异常。为此，我们提出了一个新的 MIL 框架：Unbiased MIL (UMIL)，以学习改善 WSVAD 的无偏异常特征。在每次 MIL 训练迭代中，我们使用当前检测器将样本分为具有不同上下文偏差的两组：最置信的异常/正常片段和其余不明确的片段。然后，通过寻找两个样本组之间的不变特征，我们可以消除变量上下文偏差。对基准 UCF-Crime 和 TAD 进行的广泛实验证明了我们的 UMIL 的有效性。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ktr-hubrt/UMIL。 本文提出无偏多重实例学习（UMIL）框架，用于解决弱监督视频异常检测中因上下文偏差导致的误报问题。 Hui Lv,Zhongqi Yue,Qianru Sun,Bin Luo,Zhen Cui,Hanwang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: JunYong Choi,SeokYeong Lee,Haesol Park,Seung-Won Jung,Ig-Jae Kim,Junghyun Cho
title: MAIR: Multi-view Attention Inverse Rendering with 3D Spatially-Varying Lighting Estimation
title_zh: MAIR：具有 3D 空间变化照明估计的多视图注意逆渲染
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Project Page is https://bring728.github.io/mair.project/
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Project Page is https://bring728.github.io/mair.project/
abstract: We propose a scene-level inverse rendering framework that uses multi-view images to decompose the scene into geometry, a SVBRDF, and 3D spatially-varying lighting. Because multi-view images provide a variety of information about the scene, multi-view images in object-level inverse rendering have been taken for granted. However, owing to the absence of multi-view HDR synthetic dataset, scene-level inverse rendering has mainly been studied using single-view image. We were able to successfully perform scene-level inverse rendering using multi-view images by expanding OpenRooms dataset and designing efficient pipelines to handle multi-view images, and splitting spatially-varying lighting. Our experiments show that the proposed method not only achieves better performance than single-view-based methods, but also achieves robust performance on unseen real-world scene. Also, our sophisticated 3D spatially-varying lighting volume allows for photorealistic object insertion in any 3D location.
summary: We propose a scene-level inverse rendering framework that uses multi-view images to decompose the scene into geometry, a SVBRDF, and 3D spatially-varying lighting. Because multi-view images provide a variety of information about the scene, multi-view images in object-level inverse rendering have been taken for granted. However, owing to the absence of multi-view HDR synthetic dataset, scene-level inverse rendering has mainly been studied using single-view image. We were able to successfully perform scene-level inverse rendering using multi-view images by expanding OpenRooms dataset and designing efficient pipelines to handle multi-view images, and splitting spatially-varying lighting. Our experiments show that the proposed method not only achieves better performance than single-view-based methods, but also achieves robust performance on unseen real-world scene. Also, our sophisticated 3D spatially-varying lighting volume allows for photorealistic object insertion in any 3D location.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种场景级逆渲染框架，该框架使用多视图图像将场景分解为几何体、SVBRDF 和 3D 空间变化光照。由于多视图图像提供了有关场景的各种信息，因此对象级逆渲染中的多视图图像已被视为理所当然。然而，由于缺乏多视图HDR合成数据集，场景级逆渲染主要使用单视图图像进行研究。通过扩展 OpenRooms 数据集、设计高效的管道来处理多视图图像以及分割空间变化的光照，我们能够使用多视图图像成功执行场景级逆渲染。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法不仅比基于单视图的方法获得了更好的性能，而且在未见过的现实场景中也实现了鲁棒的性能。此外，我们先进的 3D 空间变化照明体积允许在任何 3D 位置插入逼真的对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角注意力逆渲染框架MAIR，通过多视角图像分解场景为几何、SVBRDF和3D空间变化光照。
AI.motivation: 现有场景级逆渲染因缺乏多视角HDR数据集而依赖单视角图像，难以充分利用多视角信息进行场景分解。
AI.method: 扩展OpenRooms数据集并设计多视角处理流水线，结合多视角注意力机制与3D空间光照分割技术实现场景分解。
AI.result: 方法在性能上优于单视角方法，在未见过的真实场景中表现稳健，并支持任意3D位置的逼真物体插入。
AI.conclusion: MAIR通过多视角协同与光照建模解决了场景级逆渲染难题，为复杂场景的光照与材质分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Maurice Rupp,Oriane Peter,Thirupathi Pattipaka
title: ExBEHRT: Extended Transformer for Electronic Health Records to Predict Disease Subtypes & Progressions
title_zh: ExBEHRT：用于电子健康记录的扩展变压器以预测疾病亚型和进展
comment: ICLR 2023 Workshop on Trustworthy Machine Learning for Healthcare (Website: https://sites.google.com/view/tml4h2023/accepted-papers )
comments: ICLR 2023 Workshop on Trustworthy Machine Learning for Healthcare (Website: https://sites.google.com/view/tml4h2023/accepted-papers )
abstract: In this study, we introduce ExBEHRT, an extended version of BEHRT (BERT applied to electronic health records), and apply different algorithms to interpret its results. While BEHRT considers only diagnoses and patient age, we extend the feature space to several multimodal records, namely demographics, clinical characteristics, vital signs, smoking status, diagnoses, procedures, medications, and laboratory tests, by applying a novel method to unify the frequencies and temporal dimensions of the different features. We show that additional features significantly improve model performance for various downstream tasks in different diseases. To ensure robustness, we interpret model predictions using an adaptation of expected gradients, which has not been previously applied to transformers with EHR data and provides more granular interpretations than previous approaches such as feature and token importances. Furthermore, by clustering the model representations of oncology patients, we show that the model has an implicit understanding of the disease and is able to classify patients with the same cancer type into different risk groups. Given the additional features and interpretability, ExBEHRT can help make informed decisions about disease trajectories, diagnoses, and risk factors of various diseases.
summary: In this study, we introduce ExBEHRT, an extended version of BEHRT (BERT applied to electronic health records), and apply different algorithms to interpret its results. While BEHRT considers only diagnoses and patient age, we extend the feature space to several multimodal records, namely demographics, clinical characteristics, vital signs, smoking status, diagnoses, procedures, medications, and laboratory tests, by applying a novel method to unify the frequencies and temporal dimensions of the different features. We show that additional features significantly improve model performance for various downstream tasks in different diseases. To ensure robustness, we interpret model predictions using an adaptation of expected gradients, which has not been previously applied to transformers with EHR data and provides more granular interpretations than previous approaches such as feature and token importances. Furthermore, by clustering the model representations of oncology patients, we show that the model has an implicit understanding of the disease and is able to classify patients with the same cancer type into different risk groups. Given the additional features and interpretability, ExBEHRT can help make informed decisions about disease trajectories, diagnoses, and risk factors of various diseases.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们引入了ExBEHRT，即BEHRT（应用于电子健康记录的BERT）的扩展版本，并应用不同的算法来解释其结果。虽然 BEHRT 仅考虑诊断和患者年龄，但我们通过应用一种新颖的方法来统一不同特征的频率和时间维度，将特征空间扩展到多个多模式记录，即人口统计、临床特征、生命体征、吸烟状况、诊断、手术、药物和实验室测试。我们表明，附加功能显着提高了不同疾病中各种下游任务的模型性能。为了确保鲁棒性，我们使用预期梯度的适应来解释模型预测，该梯度之前尚未应用于具有 EHR 数据的转换器，并且提供比以前的方法（例如特征和令牌重要性）更精细的解释。此外，通过对肿瘤患者的模型表示进行聚类，我们表明该模型对疾病有隐含的理解，并且能够将具有相同癌症类型的患者分为不同的风险组。鉴于额外的功能和可解释性，ExBEHRT 可以帮助就各种疾病的疾病轨迹、诊断和风险因素做出明智的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExBEHRT模型，通过整合多模态电子健康记录数据预测疾病亚型及进展，并增强模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有BEHRT模型仅使用诊断和年龄信息，缺乏对多模态数据的整合，限制了疾病预测的准确性与临床适用性。
AI.method: 扩展特征空间至多模态数据（如人口统计学、实验室检测等），统一特征频率与时间维度；采用预期梯度方法解释模型预测，并通过聚类分析验证模型对疾病隐含理解。
AI.result: 多模态特征显著提升模型在多种疾病任务中的表现，预期梯度解释方法提供更细致的模型洞察，聚类分析显示模型可隐式区分同类型癌症患者的风险分组。
AI.conclusion: ExBEHRT通过多模态数据整合与可解释性分析，为疾病轨迹预测、诊断及风险分层提供决策支持。

search_text: ExBEHRT: Extended Transformer for Electronic Health Records to Predict Disease Subtypes & Progressions ExBEHRT：用于电子健康记录的扩展变压器以预测疾病亚型和进展 In this study, we introduce ExBEHRT, an extended version of BEHRT (BERT applied to electronic health records), and apply different algorithms to interpret its results. While BEHRT considers only diagnoses and patient age, we extend the feature space to several multimodal records, namely demographics, clinical characteristics, vital signs, smoking status, diagnoses, procedures, medications, and laboratory tests, by applying a novel method to unify the frequencies and temporal dimensions of the different features. We show that additional features significantly improve model performance for various downstream tasks in different diseases. To ensure robustness, we interpret model predictions using an adaptation of expected gradients, which has not been previously applied to transformers with EHR data and provides more granular interpretations than previous approaches such as feature and token importances. Furthermore, by clustering the model representations of oncology patients, we show that the model has an implicit understanding of the disease and is able to classify patients with the same cancer type into different risk groups. Given the additional features and interpretability, ExBEHRT can help make informed decisions about disease trajectories, diagnoses, and risk factors of various diseases. 在本研究中，我们引入了ExBEHRT，即BEHRT（应用于电子健康记录的BERT）的扩展版本，并应用不同的算法来解释其结果。虽然 BEHRT 仅考虑诊断和患者年龄，但我们通过应用一种新颖的方法来统一不同特征的频率和时间维度，将特征空间扩展到多个多模式记录，即人口统计、临床特征、生命体征、吸烟状况、诊断、手术、药物和实验室测试。我们表明，附加功能显着提高了不同疾病中各种下游任务的模型性能。为了确保鲁棒性，我们使用预期梯度的适应来解释模型预测，该梯度之前尚未应用于具有 EHR 数据的转换器，并且提供比以前的方法（例如特征和令牌重要性）更精细的解释。此外，通过对肿瘤患者的模型表示进行聚类，我们表明该模型对疾病有隐含的理解，并且能够将具有相同癌症类型的患者分为不同的风险组。鉴于额外的功能和可解释性，ExBEHRT 可以帮助就各种疾病的疾病轨迹、诊断和风险因素做出明智的决策。 本文提出ExBEHRT模型，通过整合多模态电子健康记录数据预测疾病亚型及进展，并增强模型可解释性。 Maurice Rupp,Oriane Peter,Thirupathi Pattipaka cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Vincent Unsel,Stephan Wiefling,Nils Gruschka,Luigi Lo Iacono
title: Risk-Based Authentication for OpenStack: A Fully Functional Implementation and Guiding Example
title_zh: OpenStack 基于风险的身份验证：功能齐全的实施和指导示例
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table
abstract: Online services have difficulties to replace passwords with more secure user authentication mechanisms, such as Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). This is partly due to the fact that users tend to reject such mechanisms in use cases outside of online banking. Relying on password authentication alone, however, is not an option in light of recent attack patterns such as credential stuffing. Risk-Based Authentication (RBA) can serve as an interim solution to increase password-based account security until better methods are in place. Unfortunately, RBA is currently used by only a few major online services, even though it is recommended by various standards and has been shown to be effective in scientific studies. This paper contributes to the hypothesis that the low adoption of RBA in practice can be due to the complexity of implementing it. We provide an RBA implementation for the open source cloud management software OpenStack, which is the first fully functional open source RBA implementation based on the Freeman et al. algorithm, along with initial reference tests that can serve as a guiding example and blueprint for developers.
summary: Online services have difficulties to replace passwords with more secure user authentication mechanisms, such as Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). This is partly due to the fact that users tend to reject such mechanisms in use cases outside of online banking. Relying on password authentication alone, however, is not an option in light of recent attack patterns such as credential stuffing. Risk-Based Authentication (RBA) can serve as an interim solution to increase password-based account security until better methods are in place. Unfortunately, RBA is currently used by only a few major online services, even though it is recommended by various standards and has been shown to be effective in scientific studies. This paper contributes to the hypothesis that the low adoption of RBA in practice can be due to the complexity of implementing it. We provide an RBA implementation for the open source cloud management software OpenStack, which is the first fully functional open source RBA implementation based on the Freeman et al. algorithm, along with initial reference tests that can serve as a guiding example and blueprint for developers.
abstract_zh: 在线服务很难用更安全的用户身份验证机制（例如双因素身份验证 (2FA)）替换密码。部分原因是用户倾向于在网上银行以外的用例中拒绝此类机制。然而，鉴于最近的攻击模式（例如凭证填充），仅依靠密码身份验证并不是一个选择。基于风险的身份验证 (RBA) 可以作为临时解决方案来提高基于密码的帐户安全性，直到找到更好的方法。不幸的是，尽管 RBA 受到各种标准的推荐并且在科学研究中被证明是有效的，但目前只有少数主要在线服务使用 RBA。本文提出了这样一个假设：RBA 在实践中采用率较低可能是由于其实施的复杂性。我们为开源云管理软件OpenStack提供了RBA实现，这是第一个基于Freeman等人的全功能开源RBA实现。算法，以及可以作为开发人员指导示例和蓝图的初始参考测试。

AI.tldr: 提出并实现基于风险的认证机制（RBA）在OpenStack中的完整方案，作为开源示例和开发蓝图
AI.motivation: 现有在线服务因实现复杂而未广泛采用RBA，尽管其能有效提升密码安全，因此需提供易参考的实现方案
AI.method: 基于Freeman算法设计并实现OpenStack的RBA模块，结合风险评估模型和动态验证策略
AI.result: 完成首个开源OpenStack RBA实现，并通过初步测试验证有效性，为开发者提供参考
AI.conclusion: 通过开源实现和测试，降低了RBA实施难度，推动其在云环境中的应用

authors_text: Zhilong Liang,Zhenzhi Tan,Ruixin Hong,Wanli Ouyang,Jinying Yuan,Changshui Zhang
title: Automatically Predict Material Properties with Microscopic Image Example Polymer Compatibility
title_zh: 使用显微图像自动预测材料特性聚合物兼容性示例
abstract: Many material properties are manifested in the morphological appearance and characterized with microscopic image, such as scanning electron microscopy (SEM). Polymer miscibility is a key physical quantity of polymer material and commonly and intuitively judged by SEM images. However, human observation and judgement for the images is time-consuming, labor-intensive and hard to be quantified. Computer image recognition with machine learning method can make up the defects of artificial judging, giving accurate and quantitative judgement. We achieve automatic miscibility recognition utilizing convolution neural network and transfer learning method, and the model obtains up to 94% accuracy. We also put forward a quantitative criterion for polymer miscibility with this model. The proposed method can be widely applied to the quantitative characterization of the microstructure and properties of various materials.
summary: Many material properties are manifested in the morphological appearance and characterized with microscopic image, such as scanning electron microscopy (SEM). Polymer miscibility is a key physical quantity of polymer material and commonly and intuitively judged by SEM images. However, human observation and judgement for the images is time-consuming, labor-intensive and hard to be quantified. Computer image recognition with machine learning method can make up the defects of artificial judging, giving accurate and quantitative judgement. We achieve automatic miscibility recognition utilizing convolution neural network and transfer learning method, and the model obtains up to 94% accuracy. We also put forward a quantitative criterion for polymer miscibility with this model. The proposed method can be widely applied to the quantitative characterization of the microstructure and properties of various materials.
abstract_zh: 许多材料特性都体现在形态外观中，并通过显微图像（例如扫描电子显微镜（SEM））进行表征。聚合物相容性是高分子材料的一个关键物理量，通常通过SEM图像来直观地判断。然而，人类对图像的观察和判断是耗时、费力且难以量化的。计算机图像识别结合机器学习方法可以弥补人工判断的缺陷，给出准确、定量的判断。我们利用卷积神经网络和迁移学习方法实现了自动混溶识别，模型的准确率高达94%。我们还利用该模型提出了聚合物混溶性的定量标准。该方法可广泛应用于各种材料微观结构和性能的定量表征。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用显微图像与机器学习方法自动预测材料属性，重点解决聚合物相容性的定量判断问题。
AI.motivation: 人工通过SEM图像判断聚合物相容性存在耗时、主观性强且难以量化的问题，需开发自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络结合迁移学习方法，对显微图像进行特征提取与分类，建立相容性定量判定模型。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到94%的准确率，并首次提出基于图像的聚合物相容性定量判定标准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为材料微结构与性能的定量表征提供了可推广的自动化技术路径。
